akkadian: me-et 17 gú urudu sig₅ ha-bu-lam
english: he owes me 17 talents of copper of good quality.

akkadian: na-pá-al-tù-šu šu-up-ra-nim ù 5 gú urudu
english: he must also pay 5 talents of copper of šu-ištar.

akkadian: ša sà-li-bu ha-bu-lu-ni a-dí-ni ú-lá ni-im-hu-ur
english: the silver that salibu owes we have not yet received.

akkadian: ku-<gap> lu-ub-lam <gap>-nu-<gap> i ha-hi-im ra
english: the servant of the s. of kasiya should bring it.

akkadian: urudu a-na ha-nu a ší-a-ma-tim a-dí-in
english: i gave 10 minas of copper to hanu for purchases.

akkadian: a-dí-šu-um té-er-ta-kà li-li-kam-ma a-šar pá-nu-im pá-ni-ší
english: send me a word and dispose of it wherever possible.

akkadian: 5 gú urudu iš-tí ku-ur-zi-a ù
english: 5 talents of copper is owed by kurziya and šu-nisaba.

akkadian: ub-lam urudu nu-sá-ni-iq-ma 1 gú-tum 1
english: today we checked your seal, and 8 shekels were missing.

akkadian: ší-sí-a ù am-ma ša ki-ma i-a-tí
english: let my brother šalim-aššur come, and then settle with him.

akkadian: ma-ah-ri-kà-ma iṣ-bu-tù a-ma-kam ṣa-ba-sú-nu-ma urudu li-dí-nu-ni-ku-um
english: seize them there and have them give you the copper.

akkadian: 3 ma-na urudu a qá-tí-šu ni-dí-in
english: we gave him 3 minas of copper to dispose of.

akkadian: ku-nu-ki-šu šu-hu-bur-ma na-áš-a-kum gán-lam₅ a-šu-mì šu-ki-tim-ma
english: it passes overland in the name of šukkutum as well.

akkadian: ma-lá ta-dí-na-šu-ni li-li-kam ṭup-pì-a ú hu-ur-ša-am
english: you have to seal for my tablets and the store-room.

akkadian: a-ša-me-ma a-na ku-ta-ni ší-mu-um i-na kà-ni-iš
english: i hear that there is a market for in kanesh.

akkadian: pá-hi-ra ší-lá-tum lá i-ba-ší a-ša-me-ma en-na-sú-in
english: i hear that enna-suen has come up from the city.

akkadian: qí-bi-ma šál-ma-ku lu ha-dí-a-ni₇ mì-ma i-ṣé-ri-a
english: let us be glad! šalim-aššur took nothing on my account.

akkadian: lá i-sà-hu-ur ṭù-ur-da-ni-šu-ma uz-né-kà id-a sà-he-er-tám
english: eništārum should not be delayed, send him and listen closely.

akkadian: a-na be-li-a ú-ba-lá-aṭ a-ma-kam sà-ni-iq-šu-ma lu-ma-li-kum
english: check him there so he may pay you in full.

akkadian: iš-tù-i-ša-qal ha-mu-uš-tim ša a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku ù kà-sí-a a-na 30 ha-am-ša-tim
english: reckoned from the week of aššur-taklāku and kasiya he is to pay in 30 weeks.

akkadian: 15 ma-na urudu ma-sí-a-am i-na áb-na-tí-ni i-na ṣé-er ú-na-bi₄
english: unabi and ašiat owe 15 minas of washed copper, weighed with our stones, to luzi.

akkadian: ù ṣí-ba-sú ša-áš-qí-il₅-šu ù a-ha-ma 25 ma-na urudu sig₅
english: also, he furthermore owes me 25 minas of good copper, the price of a donkey.

akkadian: a-ha-zi-im i-za-az ša-i-lá-ma lu dumu a-šur lu nu-a-um ší-be-e
english: make inquiries and whether it is an assyrian or an anatolian, set witnesses against him.

akkadian: ṭup-pá-am ša a-lim{ki} ú ra-bi-ṣa-am ša be-li-a lá ú-na-ah
english: i shall not obstruct the tablet from the city and the attorney of my lord.

akkadian: nu-šé-ṣí 3 gú urudu ší-kam ša-lim-wa-ar-dim i-dí-ni-a-tí ma-lá i-na
english: he will credit you there with as much as he received from your outstanding claims.

akkadian: té-zi-ba-ni i-na qá-qí-ri-im da-nim a-nim a-a-kam lá-al-qé-ma lu-ša-ki-il₅ a-na-ku
english: from where shall i get anything so i can feed anyone under these harsh conditions?

akkadian: lugal-{d}im mì-ma lá ub-lam ù šu-ma be-ú-lá-tí-ku-nu ba-at-qá-tù-nu a-na-ku
english: also, if you are in arrears with your working capitals, i shall personally pay them.

akkadian: i-šu iš-tù ha-muš-tim ša a-šur-i-mì-tí ù a-mur-ištar a-na 2
english: reckoned from the week of aššur-imittī and amur-ištar he is to pay within 2 months.

akkadian: a-hu-ú-a a-tù-nu lu a-wa-tum ba-at-qá-at a-ni-tum lá a-ni-tum tí-ir-ta-ak-nu li-li-kam-ma uz-ni pè-té-a
english: my dear brothers, send me word and inform me one way or the other whether the affair has been settled.

akkadian: e-na-a-šùr a ša-pár-tim ú-kà-al i-na a-lá-ak dumu a-na-<gap> ú maškim ša ì-lí-pí-ú-ṣur
english: when ana-x's son and ili-pi-usur's attorney come here they will pay me the silver and i will release the gods.

akkadian: a-pu-tum a-na a-wi-il₅-tim lá ta-pá-ṭí-ri ú mì-ma lá ta-dí-ni-ší-im ú iš-tí e-wa-ri-mu-ša
english: my dear brothers, instruct her there so that there will be no wrongdoing in my storeroom to make me unhappy.

akkadian: a-lá-hi-im i-da-an a-ha-ma a-na 1 ma-na 7 gín ša ší-ta ta-ah-sí-sà-tí-a a-za-kà-ar-šu-ma
english: further, i shall formally state to him the 1 mina 7 shekels from my two memoranda, and he must pay.

akkadian: a ma-lá dí-in a-lim{ki} a-li ra-bi₄-ṣú-um i-pá-li-lu lu-ta-me ù ú-nu-tám lu-na-dí-id ù
english: according to the verdict of the city wherever the attorney interrogates, he may impose an oath and search the goods.

akkadian: ma-da-tim lu-lá-pí-ta-kum iš-tù ma-ar-ṣa-am li-bi-im ú a-ší-ra-am ú-lá ni-ir-ta-ší a-bi a-ta tí-ir-ta-kà
english: why should i write at length to you, that we are unhappy and have no one to care for us?

akkadian: ša ší-nu-nim ta-ah-sí-is-tám mu-nu-sú-nu na-áš-a-kum mì-ma a-nim a-na šu-ištar ni-ip-qí-id-ma na-áš-a-kum ku-sí-tám ša a-n
english: the robe you left here has also been sold for 1 mina 6 shekels and the proceeds in silver is in ali-ahum's possession.

akkadian: šu-ma be-lí a-ta tí-ir-ta-kà li-li-kam-ma ṭup-pá-am ša ší-be ú-kà-al lá-ah-ri-im-ma lá-at-be-a-ma lá-tal-kam a-we-lúm ú-na-a-ni
english: if you are truly my lord, send word here, i hold the tablet with witnesses; i shall certify it, set out and come.

akkadian: a-we-lim ša-ah-lá-at šu-ma a-we-lúm é-tám i-šu-ma na-ru-qú-šu šál-ma-at a-ni-tum lá a-ni-tum tí-ir-ta-ak-nu za-ku-tum li-li-kam
english: send me a clear report whether it is so or not that the man has a house and his joint-stock capital is safe.

akkadian: a-ṣé-ri-a lu-ub-lu-nim ù i-na ri-iš a-mu-tim ší-be šu-ku-un ki-ma a-šu-mì dumu puzur₄-sú-in a-mu-tám gán-lam₅
english: also, set witnesses for the amount of iron to the fact that the iron must pass overland in the name of puzur-suen's son.

akkadian: a-na pá-ni a-na ha-hi-im šé-bi₄-lam mì-šu ša áš-ta-na-me-ú-ma am-tí a-dí-ni i-na wa-áš-ha-ni-a lu
english: why is it that i keep hearing that my maid is still staying in wašhaniya and that you keep silent about it?

akkadian: na-áš-a-ku-nu-tí a-ma-kam iš-tí áb-nim ša tù-ša-qí-lá-ni ma-ah-ṣa-ma šu-ma ba-tí-iq i-li i-ṣé-ri-šu id-a a-ha-ma
english: check? it there with the weight-stone that you weigh with and if there is too little, add bags on top of it.

akkadian: a-lu-lá-a iš-qú-lu-ni-ku-nu-tí-ni tí-ir-ta-ak-nu li-li-kam ṭup-pì ša ku-lu-ma-a ú-kà-lu-ni šu-ma tù-šé-ṣí-a-šu li-tí-a-ma ku-un-kà-ma šé-bi₄-lá-ni-šu
english: as to my tablet which kulumaya holds, if you have recovered it, then split (the envelope), seal it (again) and send it.

akkadian: ma-li-a-am ma-nu-kà-bi₄-a na-áš-a-ku-nu-tí a-hu ú-a a-tù-nu i-na ša-am-ší im-ma ma-nu-kà-bi₄-a e-ra-ba-ni pí-ri-kà-ni ša-ma-nim-ma
english: please, my brothers, buy on the very day mannu-kī-abiya arrives in town -textiles and send them to me with the first opportunity.

akkadian: igi ṣí-lá-{d}im kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ší-bu-tí-ni ba-áb i-lim igi pá-aṭ-ri-im ša a-šur ṭup-pá-am
english: the kanesh colony gave us and we gave our testimony in the gate of the god before aššur's dagger on a tablet.

akkadian: da-na-sú li-iq-bi₄-a-ku-nu-tí šu-ma lá i-ta-ah-ba-lam ṭup-pè-a pè-té-a-ma ta-ah-sí-sà-tim ša šu-mì i-ri-ší-im lá-áp-tù šé
english: ask ennam-aššur about a tablet concerning 2.5 minas of silver where the creditor's name has been declared, and send it to me.

akkadian: i-da-an-ma ú ṭup-pá-am ša ku-nu-ki-kà ú-ta-ra-kum-ma ú na-áš-pè-er-tí a-ni tum i-mu-a-at
english: and then i will give you back the tablet with your seal and this letter will be cancelled.

akkadian: kišib šu-ku-bi₄-im dumu qá-a-tim kišib a-lá-hi-im dumu a-šur-ma-lik kišib ku-na-a dumu
english: seal of šu-kūbum, son of qa'atum, seal of ali-ahum, son of aššur-mālik, seal of kunnāya, son of manana.

akkadian: a-na 4 ha-am-ša-tim i-ša-qú-lu šu-ma lá iš-qú-lu ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám
english: if they have not paid (in time), they must add interest according to the rule of the colony.

akkadian: a-dí ší-ni-šu tí-ir-tí i-li-kà-ku-um ki-ma lá-am-ni-iš e-ta-na-pu-šu iš-tù na-ah-ri-a tí-i-ir-tí a-šur-ma-lik
english: since he keeps behaving in an evil manner a message from aššur-malik son of šu-ištar came from nahriya.

akkadian: a-dí tí-ir-tí i-lá-kà-ni li-dí-in a-hu-a-tù-nu a-dí ma-lá ú ší-ni-šu tí-ir-tí i-li-kà-ku-nu-tí-ma
english: my dear brothers, i sent word to you once or twice, so do pay attention to my instructions.

akkadian: kišib sú-kà-lí-a dumu a-mur-a-šùr kišib a-ku-za dumu šu-a-nim kišib ú-ra-a dumu
english: seal of sukkalliya son of amur-aššur, seal of akuza son of šu-anum, seal of uraya son of manana.

akkadian: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šur ni-dí-in
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave (our testimony) before the dagger of aššur.

akkadian: kišib e-lá-ma dumu i-dí-sú-en₆ kišib zu-za-a dumu i-sí-hi-im kišib en-na-sú-en₆ dumu
english: seal of elamma, son of iddin-suen, seal of susāya, son of isihum, seal of ennam-suen, son of kukurānum.

akkadian: a-na 15 ha-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá ìš-qúl ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im
english: if he does not pay he will add (interest) in accordance with the regulation of the colony.

akkadian: ù-lá i-tù-ru šu-ma i-tù-ru lá-am-nu-ut a-na a-šùr ru-ba-im ù gal
english: if they raise claim, it is an evil against anna, aššur, the king and the rabi sikkitim.

akkadian: kù ú-ta-ar-ma ú i-ta-lá-ak šu-ma a-e-ma ú-dá-pì-ir e-ga-ar-ma ig-ri sà-ri-dim
english: if goes somewhere else i will rent somebody and the wages of the donkey-driver he shall compensate.

akkadian: dingir-kur-ub ša tí-iš-mur-na ha-bu-lam ṭup-pè-a pè-té-a-ma ṭup-pu-šu šé-li-a-ma a-ma-kam urudu
english: open for my tablets, produce his tablet and have him pay the copper and its interest there.

akkadian: ù ša-lim-ìr-dí ub-lu-nim túg ra-qá-tí-kà a-šùr-e-mu-qí i-na ma-ri-it-hi-im i-dí-ší-na-ma ší-im-ší-na
english: aššur-emūqī sold your thin textiles in marithum, but he has not brought the proceeds from their sale.

akkadian: i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb i-na
english: if he does not pay he will add interest in accordance with the regulation of the colony.

akkadian: da-a-sú ù ú-kúl-tù-šu ša ki-ta-a iš-tù bu-ru-uš-ha-tim a-dí a-lim{ki} e-lá-ma
english: the road-tax he incurs and the food of kitaya from burušhattum until the city elamma has paid.

akkadian: 3 ha-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám
english: if he has not paid, he must add interest in accordance with the rule of the colony.

akkadian: kà-ru-um dur₄-hu-mì-it i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in ṭup-pu-um
english: for these words the durhumit colony made us available and before aššur's dagger we gave our testimony.

akkadian: i-a-tí ša-hi-ṭá šu-ma lá ki-am ma-lá um-me-a-ni ú-ra-ki-sú-ni-ni li-ba-ak-nu i-ma-ra-aṣ
english: if this does not happen, you will be sorry about everything the investors have contracted with me.

akkadian: a šu-mì-kà ma-ga-ra-am ú-lá i-mu-a a-pu-tum i-na ša-am-ší
english: urgent, set out and come here the very day you hear our letter!

akkadian: a-na anše ik-šu-ud a-hi a-ta we-da-ku mu-ša-ki-il₅ anše
english: i have no one to feed the donkey or realise the outstanding claims.

akkadian: iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša kur-ub-ištar ù ì-lí-iš-ta-kál a-na 4
english: from the week of kurub-ištar and iliš-tikal he will pay in 4 months.

akkadian: wa-dí-a a-hu-a a-tù-nu i-ih-da-ma iš-tí a-li-ki-im pá-ni-im-ma áb-kà-nim
english: my dear brothers, take care to ship it with the very first transport.

akkadian: lá i-ma-ra-aṣ ṭup-pí-a ú ú-tù-up-tí lu tù-ša-ṣí-ir ma-lá
english: until my brother reveals to me my father's assets i shall be delayed.

akkadian: dumu i-ku-nim ṣí-ib-tám ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im kà-né-eš ú-ṣa-áb
english: he will add interest according to the regulation of of the kanesh colony.

akkadian: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we have our testimony.

akkadian: a-ma-kam i-na be-el id-ma-tim ša ki-ma um-mì-a-né ma-ma-an
english: over there no one of the share-holders representing the investors shall approach anything.

akkadian: ú lá ša-qí-il₅ tí-ir-ta-ak-nu a-ṣé-ri-a iš-tí hu-ma-ša-na li-li-kam
english: send me word with humašana whether the silver has been paid or not.

akkadian: iš a-qá-qá-dí-a ša-pì-ik a-lam am-ta-na-ha-ar-ma a-na ra-bi₄-ṣí-im lá
english: i keep appealing to the city that they should not give an attorney.

akkadian: a-pu-tum ki-ma ṭup-pá-am ša sá-ra-tim ta-áš-me-ú tí-ib-a-ma a-tal-kam
english: urgent, set out and come since you have heard a letter with falsehoods.

akkadian: ma-tí-ma lá i-li-<gap>-kam ú šu-ma ša-hi-re-en lá tù-šé-lá-nim
english: however, send me word if you do not bring the boots up here.

akkadian: en-na-sú-in ša-li-ma šu-ma iš-tù a-lim{ki} i-ta-ṣa-am úz-ni pé-té-a
english: ask about enna-suen, and inform (plural) me if he has left the city.

akkadian: šu-ni-sà-ba iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša a-bi-ì-lí a-na 4 ha-am-ša-tim
english: reckoned from the week of abī-ilī they are to pay within 4 weeks.

akkadian: ki-ma i-a-tí igi 3 dumu um-me-a-nim qá-at-kà šu-ku-un
english: also, on behalf lay claim to it with 3 affiliated traders as witnesses.

akkadian: ta-ar-gu₅-ma-ni ta-ša-qá-al a-pu-tum ṭup-pè-e šé-bi₄-lá-ni-im ṭup-pì e ták-lá-a-ma
english: do not hold back the tablets lest the man ruins my father's house.

akkadian: i-ba-ší i-na a-lá-ki-kà e-na-na-tim e-ri-iš-ma e-nu-nu-ni-kum ša-áp-ra-tum ša
english: when you come, ask for clemency, and they will be lenient with you.

akkadian: šu-hu-bu-ur i-da-na-ku-nu-tí-ni i-na li-bi ṭup-pí-a šu-uk-na-ma i-na ku-nu-ki-ku-nu
english: and the bundle should remain with ali-ahum under my seal until i arrive.

akkadian: ša a-bu-silim qá-sú iš-ku-un a-na-kam ki-ma a-bu-silim 1
english: here i gave 1 mina of silver to sukkaliya on behalf of abu-šalim.

akkadian: šu-ma a-hu-ú-a a-tù-nu al-kà-nim-ma ša-li-ú-um i-ṣé-er é a-bi₄-ku-nu
english: please, my brothers, come here so that nobody will harm your paternal house.

akkadian: ku-ku-ra-nim ṭup-pu-um ša a-wi-it e-lá-ma zu-za-a ù en-na-sú-en₆
english: tablet of the declared value (of the goods) of elamma, susaya and ennam-suen.

akkadian: ninda ša ni-ku-lu-ni kà-sà-am ša ni-iš-tù-ú lu
english: he surely knows that we eat bread and drank the cup (together)!

akkadian: ša-áp-ku i-na lá tá-da-ni-im la-mu-tám ep-šu-ú igi
english: i gave them to a fuller for repairs with aluwa as witness.

akkadian: a-tù-nu ta-áš-ta-pu-a-ma a-na lá a-we-lim ta-áš-ku-na-ni áš-me-ma
english: but as for you, you kept quiet and made me a non-gentleman.

akkadian: bé-et a-bi-a al-qé-ma a-hu-kà i-tù-ra-am i-na al
english: what did my paternal house that your brother came back on me?

akkadian: i-šu iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša a-mur-ištar a-na 23
english: reckoned from the week of amur-ištar he must pay in 23 weeks.

akkadian: kišib a-lu-lá-a dumu a-li-a kišib a-šur-pì-lá-ah dumu
english: seal of alulāya, son of aliya, seal of aššur-pilah, son of šu-anum.

akkadian: i-ba-ší a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim ni-ìš a-lim{ki} nu-ta-mì-šu-nu
english: we made them swear an oath by the city for these words.

akkadian: ta-dí-in-ma a-na u₄-mì-im wa-ar-ke-e li-ba-kà i-ma-ra-iṣ a-na
english: don't fail to give that silver lest you will regret it afterwards!

akkadian: re-eš-tám ší-it-ri ša té-zi-bu lu hi-ba-ra-tim lu
english: all this we entrusted to šu-ištar(?) and he brings it to you.

akkadian: igi e-zé-e ṭup-pu-um ša bé-ú-lá-ti-šu a-ha-ma i-ba-ší
english: we made them swear an oath by the city for these words.

akkadian: šu-ma lá qé-pu-tum hu-sà-ra-am kà-il₅ ú né-nu
english: if the things are not entrusted goods, then keep the lapis lazuli.

akkadian: e-ri-ib-tim a bé-et kà-ri-im ni-dí-in 12 gú
english: damiq-pī-aššur brought 12 talents of good copper and 1 talent of .

akkadian: i-šu-ú iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša kàr-ri-a a-na 36
english: reckoned from the week of karriya he must pay in 36 weeks.

akkadian: iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša kàr-ri-a a-na 36 ha-am-ša-tim
english: reckoned from the week of karriya he must pay within 36 weeks.

akkadian: lá-šu a-dí 5 u₄-me ša-lim-wa-ar-dí i-za-ku-ma ni-ṭá-ra-dam
english: within 5 days šalim-wardī will be cleared and we shall send him.

akkadian: ší-ni-in ú šé-na-tim ša sí-ni-iš-tim ša-ma-ma šé-bi₄-lá-nim
english: urgent, as for the textiles, sell them as well as you can.

akkadian: urudu ma-lá e-pu-šu-ni iš-tí-a-ma a-na pu-ru-uš-ha-dim ú-šé-ra-áb-šu
english: what copper i shall make i shall bring into purušhaddum with me.

akkadian: am-tim e-zi-ib er-ša-ší-ma a ma-lá tí-ir-tí-a ep-ša-ma ša-áš-qí-lá-šu-nu-ma a-šar lá-qá-im ku-un-kà-ma li-ib-ší a-hu-ú-a a-tù-nu
english: demand them from her, act in accordance with my instructions, make them pay and seal what there is to recieve and let it be.

akkadian: lá tù-ú-na-a-ni ù sí-ki-ni lá ú-kà-lu a-dí ha-am-ší-šu ù iš-ri-šu a-ha-am eb-ra-am nu-šé-ší-ib-ma a-ta
english: five or ten times we have had a colleague and friend sit down to negotiate, but you have rejected everything; so, you cheat me.

akkadian: ša tù-šé-bi₄-lá-ni-ni ṭup-pu-šu ha-ar-ma-am ša hu-bu-li-šu šu-nu-nu na-áš-a-ku-nu-tí a-hu-a a-tù-nu a-ma-kam ih-da-ma ší-im ṣú-ba-tí-a
english: my dear brothers, take care there to have šalim-wardī and šu-nūnu credit you with the proceeds from my previous shipment of textiles and tin.

akkadian: a-hu-a a-tù-nu i ni-kà-sí-a i-na bé-et kà-ri-im šu-ùh-ta ú qá-tí mì-ma lá ta-na-dí-a
english: my dear brothers, withdraw at my accounting in the office of the colony and do not deposit anything on my account.

akkadian: a-lim{ki} 3 gú 35 ma-na urudu ší-kam ša ṭup-pí-kà ša-ni-im e-li-im u₄-mu-kà 2
english: as to the 3 talents 35 minas of copper from your second, upper tablet, your term is exceeded by 2 years.

akkadian: kišib du-šu-ba kišib šu-ni-il₅-ga kišib ší-li-ú-ma-an kišib tal-ha-ma kišib šar-bu-nu-a kišib kà-áš-ší kišib
english: seal of dušuba, seal of šunilga, seal of šiliuman, seal of talhama, seal of šarbunuwa, seal of kašši, seal of gadina.

akkadian: ú-ṣú-ur-ša-a-šur ú-ší-ir a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš ṣa-he-ra-bi₄ i-dí-ni-ma ṭup-pá-am igi gír ša
english: the plenary assembly of the kanesh colony has given me for these proceedings and i gave a tablet before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: ta-mu-im i-za-az é a-bi-kà hu-ra-áš-kà a-na lá-ma-dim i-lu-ku ù ṭup-pí-kà a-na šé-ṣú-im i-za-zu
english: they will come to your father's house to learn about your store, and they stand ready to take out your tablets.

akkadian: a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am ší-bu-tí-ni igi gír ša a-šùr ni-dí-in igi
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave a tablet with our testimony before the dagger of aššur.

akkadian: ar-ši-ah igi ku-ku-lá-nim igi e-lá-li-a ṭup-pí-šu ib-ri-ú-ma ù šu-nu-ma ik-nu-ku-ma a-na ma-ṣa-ar-tim ú-šé-ri-bu
english: they inspected his tablets and they were also the ones who sealed them (again) and brought them (again) into the strong-room.

akkadian: dumu a-mur-{d}utu iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša i-na-a dumu e-lá-li ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
english: reckoned from the week of innaya son of elāli he will add interest in accordance with the rule of the colony.

akkadian: šu-ma ba-tí-qum ma-ma-an e-tí-iq ra-bi₄-ṣú-um le-tí-iq-ma ú-nu-tám ša ba-tí-qí-im lu-na-dí-id a-hu-ú-a be-lu-a a-tù-nu
english: also, if anyone has departed with an express caravan, the attorney will travel and search the goods of the express caravan.

akkadian: ša i-na a-lim{ki} a-bu-ni i-ṣé-er ú-ṣur-ša-ištar il₅-qé-ú a ší-a-tí kà-áb-sà-ni a-wa-tum i-ma-qú-ut-ma a-dí
english: concerning 3.5 minas of silver that our father took on uṣur-ša-ištar's account in the city - for that we are pardoned.

akkadian: lu gám-ru-ma lu ni-is-ha-tum lu mu-ṭá-ú 4 gú lá 5 ma-na
english: the wool - both expenses, import duty and deficit - has been cleared as 4 talents less 5 minas.

akkadian: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ší-bu-tí-ni igi gír ša a-šùr
english: the kanesh colony has given us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before the dagger of aššur.

akkadian: ṣí-ba-sú ša-áš-qí-lá-šu a-dí tí-ir-tí i-lá-kà-ni urudu é iš-tí-in i ba-ri-ku-nu ku-un-kà-ma
english: until my instructions arrive, seal it in a house belonging to one of you and let it remain there.

akkadian: i-na mu-qá-ri-be ta-bi-ra šu-ma a-lá-kam iš-tí ku-li-a lá i-mu-ú kà-sí-a-šu-ma šé-ri-a-ni-šu
english: if among the escorts you have chosen somebody refuses to accompany kuliya, bind him and have him brought here.

akkadian: a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um dur₄-hu-mì-it i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am igi gír ša a-šur ša ší-bu-tí-ni
english: the durhumit colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave a tablet with our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: sig₅ ku-nu-ki-ni ša-lim-wa-ar-dim i-ra-dí-a-kum 21 gú 30 ma-na urudu i-na ma-ṣa-ar-tim
english: we brought uot 21 talents 30 minas of copper from the safe. šalim-wardī gave us 3 talents of -copper.

akkadian: i-na áb-na-tí-ni i-ša-qú-lu šu-ma lá iš-qú-lu ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣú-bu
english: if they have not paid (in time) they must add interest in accordance with the rule of the colony.

akkadian: tù-šé-ra-šu sà-ru-tí iš-me lá iš-ta-na-me ki-ma a-na-kam a-hi ù tap-pá-i
english: does he not hear all the time that they maltreat my brother and my partner here?

akkadian: tù-na-a-ni ù sí-ki-ni lá ú-kà-lu a-dí 5-ší-šu ù 10-ri-šu a-ha-am
english: five or ten times we have arranged meetings with brothers and friends, but you keep refusing.

akkadian: tù-ša-as-ha-ra-ni ha-ra-na-am dí-na-ni-ma li-ba-am a-na tám-kà-ri-im dí-na-ma a-m-ru u₄-me-šu lá
english: arrange a caravan trip for me and encourage the merchant, so his ill-wishers will not multiply.

akkadian: é a-bi₄-kà a-ta-ma ù ku-lu ma-e-em a-ṣé-ri-kà-ma ta-ur a-pu-tum a-ma-kam
english: you yourself are in your father's house and all the water has fallen back upon you.

akkadian: i-na ša-am-ší ṭup-pí ta-ša-me-a-ni túg ú-ma-kál lá ta-kà-lá a-na a-lá-hi-im
english: the very day you hear my letter do not hold back the textile a single day.

akkadian: dumu a-lá-hi-im igi a-šùr-i-mì-tí dumu i-ku-pí-ištar igi en-na-sú-in dumu šu-ištar
english: witnessed by aššur-malik son of ali-ahum, by aššur-imittī son of ikūn-pī-ištar, by enna-suen son of šu-ištar.

akkadian: lá a-ni-tum li-li-kam-ma ṭé-mì-i lu ṣa-áb-ta-am a ba-ri-ku-nu i-na e-ra-bi₄-a
english: between you, when i arrive and consider the case, it must not be overturned for me.

akkadian: a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-né-eš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš-ki i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ší-bu-tí-ni igi gír ša a-šùr ni-dí-in
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: a-na 3 ha-am-ša-tim i-ša šu-ma lá iš-qúl ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im
english: if he does not pay he will add interest according to the regulation of the colony.

akkadian: ša ša-lim-ma šu-ma ma-ma-an a-na é-be-tí i-tù-a-ar-ší-im a-šùr-du₁₀ ù ištar-lá-ma-sí
english: if anybody raises a claim against her for the house, aššur-ṭāb and ištar-lamassī will clear her.

akkadian: tí-ir-ta-ak-nu-ma li-li-kam iš-tí a-li-ki-im pá-ni-im-ma ki-ma ṭup-pá-am ta-áš-me-a-ni tí-ir-ta-ak-nu li-li-kam
english: send me word with the very first transport, as soon as you have heard the letter.

akkadian: a-šur-ma-lik dumu a-lá-hi-im ip-qí-du-šu a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-né-eš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: 16 túg i-ší-tù-nim wa-ar-ki-a-ma a-na ší-tí-im ma-lá ta-du-nu-šu-ni a-ṣé-ri-a šé-bi-lá-šu-nu
english: after i left, with respect to the remainder, send me as much as you will sell.

akkadian: tár-dí-ú-tum 4 túg ša uš-ma-a šu-ma hu-ur-šu-um lá ša-ṣú-ur túg-ba-tí-a
english: if the store-room is not guarded, then place the textiles where they will be under guard.

akkadian: a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um ka-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šur ší-bu-tí-ni
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: i-ri-šum i-šu iš-tù ha-muš-tim ša a-šur-i-dí ù tap-pá-i-šu a-na 2
english: reckoned from the week of aššur-imittī and his partner he is to pay within 2 months.

akkadian: ni-is-ú-um ša ká i-ku-pì-a im-tù-qú-ut ú u₄-ma-am i-ṣa-ru-um i-ma-qú-ut-ma i-qá-bi₄-a-ni a ma-nim lá-ar-ší li-bi₄ ú-dí
english: as to your father's house, the nis'u of ikūn-pīya's door has fallen down and today the annexe will fall, and he will blame me.

akkadian: a-hu-ú-a a-tù-nu ih-da mì-ma i-ṣé-ri-a ṣí-ib-tum lá i-lá-qé
english: my dear brothers, take care so he does not take any interest from me.

akkadian: šu-ma a-hi a-ta urudu ṣa-al-ma-am ki-iṣ-ra-am iš-tí ma-ma-an
english: if you are my brother, send me a lump of black copper with somebody.

akkadian: ú-kà-in a-na 1 gú 30 ma-na urudu a-na
english: the colony imposed a penalty on me of 1 talent 30 minas of copper.

akkadian: ša šu-ištar li-iš-qú-ul ba-lu-um té-er-tí-a ki a-wi-lim i-mì-gi₅-ir
english: he has come to an agreement with the man without an instruction of mine.

akkadian: a-lim{ki} ú ru-ba-im ta-mu-ú lu ú-kà-al ba-a-nim {d}utu
english: come, show me this very day where they keep your father's copper and silver!

akkadian: ma-áš-ha-tim áš-me a-pu-tum a-ma-kam é bé-tám ù ṭup-pé-e
english: it is urgent that you guard the house, the tablets and anything else there!

akkadian: igi e-me-me igi a-šur-i-dí šu-ma ib-tù-a-ni-a-tí iš-tí-ni i-ra-ba-áš
english: should he prevail over us, then he can present his claim together with us.

akkadian: wa-ah-šu-ša-na wa-áš-ba-ku a-dí a-wa-tum ša ša-lá-tù-wa-ar i-za-ku-a-ni wa-ša-na-lam
english: until the matter of šalatuwar has been cleared up, wašanalam has left for šalatuwar.

akkadian: ì-lí-dan be-el ší-ma-tí-a a-na ba-áb dingir lá ú-šé-ru-du
english: they shall not lead my testamentary executors down to the gate of the god.

akkadian: a-lá-ni na-dí-i ku-nu-ki-a i-lá-li-ú-ma-an na-áš-a-ku-um dug a-ha-ma a-lá-ni
english: separately a jar with acorns with the seals of šaktunua he is bringing you.

akkadian: a-mur-{d}utu dumu be-lá-nim ù e-na-a-šur dumu šu-ul-mu-ša-a-šur a-šu
english: in the presence of ennam-aššur, son of ennam-aššur, (and) of ennam-aššur, son of pilah-ištar.

akkadian: a-ša-tám e-ta-ha-az a-na dur₄-hu-mì-it a-šu-mì-ki e-tí-iq-ma a-wa-tám ni-kà-ša-ad
english: i shall travel to durhumit for your sake, and we shall settle the manner.

akkadian: a-mu-tim i-tur₄-dingir a-na en-um-a-šur i-dí-in eq-lam a-na-num ù
english: from here and from there it will pass overland in the name of ennam-aššur.

akkadian: ù a-lá-num eq-lam a-šu-mì i-tur₄-dingir e-tí-iq a ma-lá
english: from here and from there it will pass overland in the name of itūr-ilī.

akkadian: dan-a-šur iš-qú-ul-ni-a-tí 3 ša-áb-ra-tim lá iš-bi-ir-ma 15 gín
english: he did not break the 3 blocks, and he promised to pay 15 shekels.

akkadian: i-šu-ú iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša da-la-áš ù du-ùh-ni-iš a-na
english: reckoned from the week of dalaš and duhniš he must pay in 43 weeks.

akkadian: šu-ma puzur₄-a-šur mì-ma iš-pu-ra-kum na-pá-al-tù-šu šu-up-ra-ma úz-ni pé-té
english: if puzur-aššur has written anything to you, send me his answer to inform me.

akkadian: túg ša a-ha-tí a-na li-ta-áb-ší-a tù-šé-bi₄-lá-ni ta-ak-lá ù
english: why have you held back the garment my sister had sent me to wear?

akkadian: ta-dí-ni-im i-na u₄-mì-im ša ṭup-pí ta-ša-me-a-ni a-šur-ma-sú-i ù a-tí me-eh-ra-at ší-ma-tim šu-ba-al-ki-ta-ma
english: kudātum brought you 0.5 mina of silver; aluwa brings you 0.5 mina of silver and furthermore 2 shekels for your daughter.

akkadian: a-na a-we-li i-dí-nu-ni a-tù-nu ú-lá mu-ut a-bi₄-a ú-lá šu-lu-um-ku-nu ta-áš-pu-ra-ni-ma li-ba-am ta-dí-na-nim
english: as for you (plur.), you did not write either about my father's death or send me your greetings to encourage me.

akkadian: a-wa-tum lu-up-ta a-wa-tim ga-me-ra-ma ik-ri-bu-um i-na ba-ri-ku-nu li-qí-bi-ma i-na a-lá-ki-a a-na-ku ù
english: conclude the case and let an oath be sworn among you, so i and ali-ahum may pay half the silver each.

akkadian: ù i-na ṭup-pí-im pá-qá-dí-im ṭup-pu-um a-šu-mì zu-ba gán-lam le-tí-qá-am a-dí a-ni-tim iš-tù
english: and when you entrust the tablet (declare) that the tablet has to go overland in the name of zuba.

akkadian: i-ta-lá-ak me-er-ú-a a-tù-nu a-dí ma-lá ù 2 ší-ni-šu áš-pu-ra-ku-nu-tí-ma a-tù-nu mì-ma-ša-ma ú-lá
english: my dear sons, i have written you once or twice but you have sent me no answer at all.

akkadian: dam-qá-a e-zi-ib a-mì-ma a-ni-im ša e-pu-lu-ni 19 gú 20 ma-na sig₅ a-na
english: for all of this on which they agreed he left 19 talents 20 minas of good (copper) with iddin-aššur.

akkadian: lu ta-áb-ri-am ú šu-ma ma-ma-an mì-ma ha-bu-ul-ší-im i-na ša-ha-tí-ša i-zi-iz-ma ša-dí-ší-im-ma lu
english: also, if anyone owes anything to her, assist her, make the payment for her and then do come here.

akkadian: i-na {d}utu-ši ṭup-pì ta-ša-me-ú tí-ib-a-ma a-tal-kam ù lu ni-iz-ku ša 11 gú
english: the very day you hear my letter you should set out and come and then let us settle accounts.

akkadian: dumu dan-a-šùr i-dí-in a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um wa-ah-šu-ša-na i-dí-ni-ma igi šu-ga-ri-a-im ša
english: for these words the wahšušana colony made me available and before the .-symbol of aššur i gave my testimony.

akkadian: ni-dí-in igi a-zu dumu puzur₄-a-šur igi i-ri-ší-im dumu a-mur-{d}utu du₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šur dumu a-li-li
english: witnessed by azu son of puzur-aššur, by irišum son of amur-šamaš; ṭāb-ṣill-aššur son of alili was our (absent) partner.

akkadian: kišib zu-ba dumu en-na-nim kišib puzur₄-{d}iškur dumu i-dí-ištar a-lá-bu-um dumu zi-a tap-pá-i-ni
english: seal of zuba, son of ennānum, seal of puzur-adad, son of iddin-ištar; ali-abum, son of ziya, was our companion.

akkadian: e-lá-i-kà lu ni-iz-ku a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš-ki i-dí-ni-ma igi gír ša
english: for these words the kanesh colony made me available and before the dagger of aššur i gave my testimony.

akkadian: lá-šu-a-ku-ma a-hi a-lá-hu-um i ri-iš a-bi-a i-zi-iz
english: they appropriated things illegally and my father wrote what he wished.

akkadian: gín it-ba-al mì-ma a-nim i ha-mu-uš-tim ša-kù-ul
english: all this was consumed / paid during / from the .

akkadian: ṣí-ib-tám lá ta-ga-mì-lá-šu ša-áš-qí-lá-šu-ma iš-tí a-li-ki-im pá-ni-e-ma
english: make him pay and send it with the very first transport.

akkadian: ir-dí-a-ku-nu-tí ta-ší-a-tim a-ma-kam e-me-me šu-ma e-ri-iš-ku-nu dí-na
english: give the carriage costs there if ememe asks you for it.

akkadian: ì-lí-mì-tí dí-in a-hi a-ta lá i-sà-ri-ru ṭù-ur-da-nu-šu
english: my dear brother, they should not delay; send them to me.

akkadian: a-na dumu um-me-a-nim ke-nim dí-in-ma lu-ub-lu-nim a-šu-mì
english: concerning the narrow track i keep hearing that orders are strict.

akkadian: a-nim ṣú-ha-ri ú-šé-bi₄-lam i-tur₄-dingir ha-ra-šu a-na a-lim{ki}
english: as for itūr-ilī, his journey to the city is getting close.

akkadian: 15 ma-na mì-ma ú-lá na-ak-sá ú 1
english: also one ingot of 4.6666 minas was sealed by my seal.

akkadian: am-tí ta-áp-qí-id-ki-im a-ha-ma 1 iš-té-et i-lá-am ku-nu-ki-a
english: moreover, later they brought you one leather bag under my seal.

akkadian: a-na ì-lí-a i-za-zu lu-qú-tum ša a-bi-šu-nu a-na
english: the merchandise? of their father belongs to the two of them.

akkadian: a-hi a-ta ar-ša-tim kà-ar-pá-at a-na qá-tí-im dí-in
english: my dear brother, give a pot of wheat to dispose over.

akkadian: ṭé-em a-bi-kà ù ni-ší-kà a-ta-ma tí-dí-e a-ma
english: you yourself know the opinion of your father and your people.

akkadian: i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul ku-uk-ra am-tum am-tí
english: if he does not pay the slave-girl kukra is my slave-girl.

akkadian: kà-ú-lim i-dì-ni-a-ti i-hi-id-ma lu-qú-tám i pá-ni-e-ma a-li-ki-im
english: take care to dispatch the goods with the very first transport.

akkadian: na-áš-ú-ni-kum ú 10 anše ṣa-lá-mì ú ú-nu-sú-nu
english: they also lead 10 black donkeys and their harness to you.

akkadian: a-šur wa-bar-tum ša ša-mu-ha i-dí-ni-ma ší-bu-tí a-dí-in
english: the station at šamuha gave me and i gave my testimony.

akkadian: zu-ku-a a-hu-ú-a a-tù-nu a-na a-wa-at ṭup-pí-im ih-da
english: my dear brothers, pay attention to the words of the letter!

akkadian: ni-iš-qú-ul šu-ma um-me-a-nu a-bi-ni i-pá-lu-hu-ma ni-iš a-lim{ki} lá i-ta-mu-ú ma-lá a-wa-tim i-na pá-ni-tim ú-kà-i-lu
english: if our father's inverstors are afraid and do not swear the oath by the city, then write the words i earlier suggested.

akkadian: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-ìš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-um igi gír ša a-šùr ba-áb dingir-lim ni-dí-in
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave a tablet before aššur's dagger in the gate of the god.

akkadian: li-mu-um a-al-du₁₀ 3 gú 23 ma-na urudu iš-tí ì-lí-iš-ta-kál 5 gú urudu iš-tí ku-ra
english: month allanātum, eponymy ali-ṭāb. 3 talents 23 minas of copper is owed by iliš-tikal; 5 talents of copper is owed by kura.

akkadian: iš-tù a-lim{ki} e-li-am šu-ma ke-na-ma e-li-am za-ku-sà a-na mì-ma tí-ir-tí-a iš-tí ba-tí-qí-im šu-up-ra-nim-ma úz-ni
english: if he has really come up, send me a report concerning all my merchandise ordered with an express caravan to inform me.

akkadian: urudu ta-pá-ša-ta-i-am za-ak-wa-am šu-ma i-na ú-me-šu lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im tù-ur-hu-mì-it ṣí-ib-ta-am
english: if he does not pay when his term is up, he will add interest in accordance with the rule of the durhumit colony.

akkadian: ta-ta-wa-a-ni a-na ha-ar-zi-ga mì-ma lá ak-lá ú-ṭá-tám ú mì-ma
english: as for what you talk about here, i did not withhold anything from harziga.

akkadian: a-lu-wa a-na ṣé-ri-kà ú-ta-e-ra-šu ù-la-ma iš-té pu-ru-uš-ha-dim <gap>-tim ṣú-ba-tù-kà
english: your textiles were stored and as they were not sold they were treated badly.

akkadian: ta-al-qí-i a-dí mu-ut-ki i-lá-kà-ni a-na é-bé-tí-šu ù a ma-tí-šu
english: until your husband arrives you are not to touch his house and his slave-girls.

akkadian: ha-mu-uš-tim ša da-la-áš ù du-ùh-ni-iš a-na 43 ha-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal
english: reckoned from the week of dalaš and duhniš he must pay within 43 weeks.

akkadian: i-šu-ú iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša ma-nu-ki-a-šur ù i-ku-nim a-na 6
english: reckoned from the week of mannu-kī-aššur and ikūnum they must pay within 6 weeks.

akkadian: sí-ki-ni ú-kà-lu ba-a-am a-na tám-kà-ri a-bi-ni lu nu-sà-li-ma tám-kà-ri
english: come on, let us plead with our father's customers and satisfy our father's customers.

akkadian: ú-ṭù-tum a-bi-ki-tim i-gi₅-im-ru úz-ni pí-té-a a-dí bu-lá-tí ša a-bi-a
english: before i came ali-ahum had opened the strong-room and even taken out the assets.

akkadian: ra-qá-tim ù šu-lu-up-ki-e iš-tí wa-ar-ki-ú-tim ú-šé-ba-lá-kum lu šu-ul-hu lu
english: with the next shipment i will send you garments, thin textiles and šulupkian textiles.

akkadian: kišib lu-zi-na kišib a-šur-du₁₀ ša hu-bu-ul a-šur-ba-ni dumu sú-ku-ku
english: seal of luzina, seal of aššur-ṭāb, of the debt of aššur-bāni, son of sukkuku.

akkadian: kà-al-a-at a-hu-a a-tù-nu i-na lu-qú-tim ša tám-kà-ri-im ṣú-ba-tù an-hu-tù-um
english: my dear brothers, among the goods of the merchant there are some old textiles.

akkadian: ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb šu-ma dumu a-šùr-du₁₀ a-na ma-lá-ba i-tù-ru en-na-sú-in
english: if the sons of aššur-ṭāb raise a claim against malaba ennam-suen will clear him.

akkadian: i-dí-i um-ma ša-lim-a-šùr-ma a-na šu-be-lim-ma i pí-i i-sú-ri-ik a-bi-a
english: on the orders of issu-arik, my father, i wrote myself as your father's guarantor.

akkadian: a-na ku-li-a dumu a-lá-bi₄-im dub i-dí-na-bi₄-im dumu šu-ištar gudu₄
english: to kuliya, son of ali-abum, tablet of iddin-abum, son of šu-ištar, priest of ištar.

akkadian: kà-ni-iš i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul i tù-ur-hu-mì-it i-ṣé-ri-šu a-lá-qé
english: if he does not pay i will collect it in durhumit for his account.

akkadian: iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša li-ba-a ù ì-lí-iš-tí-kál a-na 20 ha-am-ša-tim
english: reckoned from the week if libbaya and iliš-tikal he must pay within 20 weeks.

akkadian: a-dí puzur₄-a-šur ša ta-áš-pu-ra-ni lá ak-šu-da-a-šu a-na-kam géme-tí-šu ú-ša-i-il₅-ma
english: also, concerning puzur-aššur, about whom you wrote, i have not caught up with him.

akkadian: i-šu iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša li-ba-a ù ì-lí-iš-tí-kál a-na 20
english: reckoned from the week of libbaya and iliš-tikal he must pay within 20 weeks.

akkadian: e-lá-ma dumu i-dí-sú-in igi ku-lá a-hu šu-kà-tim igi ki-da
english: witnessed by elamma son of iddin-suen, by kula the brother of šukkutum, by kida.

akkadian: qí-bi-ma um-ma id-na-a-ma áš-ta-na-me-ma a-na ší-ip-ru-tim a-lá-hu-um a ša
english: i keep hearing that ali-ahum will function as envoy in the case of blood-money.

akkadian: a-dí-na-kum 3 ša-lá-ší-šu qá-dum ša ha-ra-an a-lim{ki} ha-ra-nam ú-qá
english: three times i waited for the caravan together with those on the road to the city.

akkadian: a-ší-tí-šu lá-ma-sà-tum tí-šu iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša i-na-a a-na ša
english: reckoned from the week of innāya not later than the festival of parka they will pay.

akkadian: ša-lim-ar-dí ù šé-ep-ištar i-ra-dí-ú-ni-ku-nu-tí a-ma-kam ša-áp-tám ú maš-ki i
english: lock the wool and the hides in the store room there and send me the servants.

akkadian: me-ha-ar-šu a-na šu-nu-tí dí-in ù ša-nàm me-eh-ra-am a-ta kà-il₅
english: wrap the tablet and entrust it to aluwa and an affiliated trader so they bring it.

akkadian: ek-pá-at šu-ma mì-ma ri-ik-sú-um é-tí-šu i-ba-ší tí-ir-tí-kà li-li-kam-ma ik
english: send me word whether there are any bundles in his house and make up your mind.

akkadian: šu-ma urudu mì-ma a-hu-ur ba-tí-iq ù wa-tù-ur dí-na-ma ab-kà-nim
english: if any copper is still unsold, sell it at any price and ship it(s yield) here.

akkadian: lu-lá-am ù ar-za-lam a-na da-da-a e lá ta-dí-in-ma li-bi₄
english: by no means fail to give the antimony and the to dadaya lest i get angry!

akkadian: a-ta be-lí a-ta šu-ma lá ku-a-tí a-bi₄ ša-ni-am ú-lá
english: my dear father and lord, if it were not for you i would have no father.

akkadian: ú-lá ni-tù-ra-kum a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um dur₄-hu-mì-it ni-dí-in igi
english: the durhumit colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: li-bi a-bi-kà tù-šé-ṣa-kà lá ta-ša-lá-aṭ mì-ma lá ta-pá-lá-ah e-lá-nu-kà
english: do not act highhandedly, you have nothing to fear since your father has nobody but you.

akkadian: šé-ri-a-nim šu-ma a-lá-kam lá i-mu-a ší-pí-a-šu-ma ù a-na ig-ri
english: if he refuses to come, question him and then let him look for hire (with others).

akkadian: 5 ša-na-tim a-ša-qú-lu-šu-nu-ma na-áš-ú-ni-ku-nu-tí a-na-kam igi 3 dumu um-me-a-ni
english: here i entrusted the silver and the tablet to them with 3 affiliated traders as witnesses.

akkadian: áš-qú-ul ú-ku-ul-tí maškim a-na-ku-ma ú-ša-qí-il₅ ṣí-li-a mì-ma a-na ú-ku-ul-tí-šu ú-lá i-dí-in
english: i too paid for the food of the attorney. ṣilliya did not give anything for his food.

akkadian: sig₅ a-na en-na-sú-in dí-in a-hu-a a-tù-nu ih-da-ma urudu a-šur-i-dí ša-áš-qí-lá ù
english: please, my brothers, take care to make aššur-idī pay the copper and write me also his reaction.

akkadian: ša i-na lu-hu-za-tí-a i-ba-ší-ú-ni šu-ma a-mì-ša-am ù-šé-ri-bu-ni-šu-nu a ma-lá tí-ir-tí-a a-na
english: if they have brought them in there, then convert them to silver in accordance with my instructions.

akkadian: šu-ištar a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um hu-ra-ma i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šur
english: for these words the hurama colony made us available and before aššur's dagger we gave our testimony.

akkadian: ṣú-uh-ri-im a-mur-a-šur ub-lá-ku-nu-tí tí-ir-tí ma-lá ú 2 ší-ni-šu i-li-kà-ku-nu-tí a-tù-nu šu-lu-um-ku-nu
english: i sent you word once or twice, (but) (as for?) you, no greeting whatever came from you.

akkadian: il₅-qé-ú ša mì-ma a-we-li a-ni-ú-tim ṭup-pì-šu-nu ha-ru-mu-tim a-na a-ta-ta dumu lugal-sú-in
english: with respect to all these men i have left their certified tablets with atata son of šar-suen.

akkadian: ṭup-pè-a na-ad-a-at a-bi₄ a-ta be-li a-ta dumu um-me-a-ni-im ke-ni-im a-gu₅-ur-ma a-mu-tám
english: my dear father and lord, hire a reliable affiliated trader and have him bring me the iron.

akkadian: i-na ha-hi-im wa-áš-ba-ku a-na ší-tí anše lu-qú-tim a-li-ik-ma illat-tum ik-ta-al-ú-ni a-hi
english: i left for the rest of the donkeys (with) the goods but they held up the caravan.

akkadian: a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš ṣa-he-er gal i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ší-bu-tí-ni igi gír ša a-šùr ni-dí-in
english: the plenary assembly of the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: ù ú-ku-ul-tim il₅-qé 12 túg-pì-ri-kà-ni ša té-zi-bu 1 túg ša li-tab-ší-kà 1 sìla
english: with respect to the undergarments you left, either the or those of the he brings a memorandum with their number.

akkadian: gig ú 2 na-ru-uq še-am e-lá-nu-ma e-zi-ba-ki-im a-ha-ma 17 na-ru-uq
english: further, they carted 17 sacks 2 jars of wheat and 17 sacks 2 jars of barley from tumliya.

akkadian: wa-ar-kà-num ub-lu-ni-ki-im ú 45 ma-na urudu sig₅ ša a-ba-ba i-dí-na-ni
english: also, the 45 minas of good copper that ababa gave me i left under my seal for ennam-aššur.

akkadian: iš-tí-kà la uš-ta-me-ru li-ba-kà la tù-lá-ma-an ú-lá a-na ší-a-ma-tim a-la-ak
english: i cannot travel to make purchases (for you), i must travel for an order of our paternal house.

akkadian: ṭup-pè-e ša ku-nu-ki-a ša i-da-na-ku-nu-tí-ni ki-lá-šu-nu-ma i li-bi₄ ṭup-pì-a šu-uk-na
english: keep the tablets with my seal that he gives to you and put them among my other tablets.

akkadian: ha-lá-bi₄-im me-ta-at mì-ma té-zi-bu pá-hi-ra-ma a-na hu-ur-ší-im iš-té-en šé-ri-ba-ma ki-ma
english: collect everything she left behind and bring it into one single storeroom and seal it in my name'.

akkadian: ù dan-a-šùr a-na áb-ša-lim ni-dí-in gám-ra-am ù ú-ku-ul-tám mì-ma ú-lá
english: the bead of gold you sent to the girl was broken and therefore she would not receive it.

akkadian: ša hu-bu-li-a a-na ša ki-ma šu-ku-bi₄-im dí-na-a šu-ma u₄-mu-a a-hu-ru
english: entrust the silver from wahšušana to the lady and the girl, and let it remain in my house.

akkadian: dingir-pì-la-ah šu-ma a-ma-kam wa-at-ra-am e-ri-iš-ma lu-ša-zi-za-ku-nu-tí-ma ú ra-ki-sà-šu-ma a-na ú-ku-ú
english: if he asks for more there, then let him appoint a stand-in for you and bind him over.

akkadian: a-hi-šu ù a-ha-at a-bi-šu i-dí-sú-in it-ma ša-lim-a-šùr a-na hu-bu-ul i-ba-a-a lá i-tù-ar-šu-nu-tí a-hu-um a-na a-hi-im
english: iddin-suen swore on behalf of his sister, his brother and his father's sister. šalim-aššur must not raise claim against them for ibaya's debt.

akkadian: ša-lá-hi-ša ta-áš-pu-ra-ni-ni a-na-kam a-da-da iš-tí a-šur-du₁₀ dumu a-zu-za-a i ša-lá-ah-šu-wa i-mì-ig-ru-ma a-na ku-ša-ra a-da-da a-na
english: here adada agreed with aššur-ṭāb son of azuzaya in šalahšuwa, and adada has travelled to kuššara to have the man swear an oath.

akkadian: iš-al-ni-a-tí-ma na-pá-lá-tí-ni a-na a-lim{ki} i-ta-ba-al i-nu-mì a-bu-ni i-na dur₄-hu-mì-it me-tù a-na-ku
english: when our father died in durhumit i personally was not present, but my brother ali-ahum took care of my father.

akkadian: 1 túg ra-qá-tám sig₅ a-na en-um-a-šur iš-tù a-lim{ki} i-na e-lá-i-šu a-šur-du₁₀
english: aššur-ṭāb will bring 1 thin textile of fine quality for ennam-aššur up here when he comes up from the city.

akkadian: 3 ku-ta-ni ù túg a-bar-ni-am ša ta-ak-lu-ú a-na ha-dí-a-šu dí-in-ma lu-ub-lam
english: the 3 -textiles and the abarnian one that you held back, give them to hadiaššu to bring them to me.

akkadian: ša-i-il₅ 4 gú 30 ma-na urudu ṣa-lá-ma-am é a-šur-iš-tí-kál dumu hi-na-a
english: ask annina there! 4 talents 30 minas of black copper is deposited in the house of aššuruš-tikal son of hinnaya.

akkadian: ša i-dí-a-šur a-dí ha-am-ší-šu tí-ir-tí i-li-kà-ku-nu-tí ú a-tù-nu mì-ma-ša-ma lá ta-áš-pu-ra-nim-ma
english: you have not sent me word to inform me whether he has paid the silver and its interest or not.

akkadian: a-wa-at ṭup-pí-im a-ni-im ni-iš a-lim{ki} it-mu-ú-ni-ma a-hu-um a-na a-hi-im la i-tù-ru
english: they swore by the city concerning the words of this tablet, and no one must raise claim against the other.

akkadian: ša-lim-wa-ar-dim 10 u₄-me ú 20 u₄-me
english: because of him we made šalim-wardī wait 10 or 20 days.

akkadian: ša ku-ku-ú 5 gín a-na šé-né-šu
english: his share in the losses amounted to 1.5 shekels of silver.

akkadian: šál-ma-a-šùr i bu-ul-ṭí-šu hu-sà-ra-am a-na ší-a-ma-tim
english: when šalim-aššur was alive he gave you lapis lazuli for purchases.

akkadian: i-na a-al ší-a-ma-tim wa-áš-ba-ku a-šu-mì ša
english: i am staying in a city where purchases can be made.

akkadian: ma-na urudu a-na qá-té ṣú-ha-ri-a dí-in
english: give 1 mina of copper to my servant to dispose of.

akkadian: ší-tí ú-ṭí-tim áb-kà-nim a-ba-kam lá a-ba-kam
english: send me word as to whether it is shipped or not.

akkadian: ù um-mì-ki i-ba-ší-ú pá-al-ha-ni-ma pá-ṭá-ra-am ú-lá
english: we did not dare to open them because we were afraid.

akkadian: ir-ma-a-šur i-šu iš-tù ha-ir-uš-tim ša e-dí-na-a
english: from the week of edināya he will pay within 15 weeks.

akkadian: a-wa-at kà-ri-im i-lá-ak-šu-um ṣa-áb-ta-šu-ma urudu ù
english: seize him and have him pay the copper and its interest.

akkadian: i-a-tí ku-un-kà áš-ta-na-me-ma ma-ma-na am-tám a-na
english: i hear by rumor that somebody intends to marry the maid.

akkadian: al-le a-bu-ša ú-ba-ša-am a-šé-pé-šu mu-qú-ut ú
english: her father shames me; fall at his feet and honour him.

akkadian: ta-ma-lá-ke ša qá-tí-kà al-pì-lí ú-ša-al li-ba-kà
english: as for the coffers under your control, alpilī will make enquiries.

akkadian: li-li-kam e a-ta-lá-ak-ma li-ba-kà e tù-lá-mì-nam
english: if i do not depart, do not be angry with me.

akkadian: ša-áp-ra-tí-šu ù ṭup-pì-šu lu-šé-ru-ú 15 gú
english: the winter has become bad and until today they are delayed.

akkadian: ší-a-tí li-zi-zi-im šu-ma a-ki-am iš-tí a-we-li-im
english: if it is like that, make an agreement with the man.

akkadian: ṭù-ur-da-nim be-lu-a a-tù-nu a-ma-kam lá ta-ša-lá-ṭá-ma u₄-me-e ma-du-tim a-na-kam lá a-sà-hu-ur-ma é
english: my dear lords, do not act rashly there, lest i be delayed here a long time, and my father's house be lost.

akkadian: ṭup-pí-a šu-uk-na ú ta-ah-sí-is-tám ša a-na ṣí-it en-um-a-šur ú-ša-qí-lu am-ra-ma i-na na-áš-pé-er-tí-ku-nu
english: also, look at the memorandum stating that he paid for ennam-aššur's various expenses, and make it known to me in your missive.

akkadian: li-ba-kà ú li-bi-i e im-ra-aṣ ha-nu-ba a-na-kam ú-ta-za-am um-ma šu-ut-ma a-dí-i na-áš-pè-er-tám
english: please, see to it, gentleman as you are, that a favorable letter of yours reaches šu-suen, hanuba, puzur-lama, me, and your caravan.

akkadian: um-me-a-nim ke-nim lá ša ša-ha-tim wa-áš-bu ta-ma-lá-kà-am ku-nu-ki-a pí-iq-da a-hu-ú-a a-tù-nu i-na
english: my dear brothers, the same day send me word about where you have left the container under my seal and inform me.

akkadian: a-wi-lim ta-mu-im e-tí-tí-iq ma-mì-tám iš-tí a-wi-lim i-lá-qé-ma ú lu-qú-tám ša dumu a-zu-za-a-ma
english: he will get an oath from the man and then he will dispatch the goods of azuzaya's son on the narrow track.

akkadian: a-lim{ki} ni-il₅-qé a-ma-kam ki-ma ša bu-lu-uṭ a-bi-ku-nu la tù-uš-té-ṣa-a-ma ša-li-um i-ṣé-er é
english: just as when your father was still alive do not quarrel there so no evildoer may do harm to your father's house.

akkadian: a-na ša ki-ma i-a-tí šu-qú-ul lu gi₅-mì-lu-um i-a-tí ki-ma ag-mì-lu-kà-ni-ma ha-ra-nam a-dí-na-ku-um
english: may it be a favour for me since i have done you a favour and i have arranged a caravan for you.

akkadian: ša-ak-na-at šu-ma té-bi-ib-tum i-tab-ší qá-dí a-hi-šu-n
english: in accordance with the testamentary dispositions applying to them.

akkadian: tí-ib-a-ma a-tal-kam a-na-kam é a-bi-ku-nu za-ki-a
english: clear up the affairs of your father's house here.

akkadian: a-na a-bi₄-kà ha-bu-la-ku a-na a-li-tim 10
english: you have received 10 shekels of silver for alitum.

akkadian: 1 anše ṣa-lá-ma-am a-na-nu-um a-na šé-bu-lim
english: take a black donkey from here for the shipment.

akkadian: sà-hi-ir-tám ku-nu-ki-kà na-ki-ru-um ub-lam 10 ma-na
english: annima and eništārum brought you 10 minas of silver.

akkadian: na-hi-da-ma ú-ṭá-tám ú e-ṣí lu-pá-hi-ru-nim ú-ṭá-tám
english: also, instruct my servants to gather grain and firewood.

akkadian: na-dí té-i-ra-tum ša ú-kà-lu-ma té-er-ta-kà li-li-kam
english: send me word about the orders that he holds.

akkadian: a-ni-<gap> 2 né-nu na-al-pu-ta-ni a-ša-me-ma e-pì-iš-tí
english: i hear that the man's actions are in disorder.

akkadian: ṭup-pé-e ša a-bi₄-kà ta-ki-li na-áš-ú-ni-kum ta-ki-li
english: indeed they bring you your father's letter with slander.

akkadian: li-ší-li-ih bé-lu-a a-tù-nu ih-da-ma ṣú-ha-ri-a ṭù-ur-da
english: my dear lords, take care to send my servant.

akkadian: iq-bi₄-ú-nim mì-ma la i-dí-nu-nim a-na-kam a-mu-ri-ú
english: here the amorites seized (them) with you as witness.

akkadian: áš-qúl mì-ma a-nim a-šu-mì a-mur-{d}utu áš-qúl
english: i paid all this in the name of amur-šamaš.

akkadian: 1 gín lá ta-be-e-lá ša-ma-nim a-ha-ma
english: as with the previous instructions make a collected purchase.

akkadian: ga-am-ra-kum mì-ma a-nim ku-nu-ki-ni i-dí-a-bu-um i-ra-dí-a-kum
english: iddin-abum leads all this to you under our seals.

akkadian: ṣú-ba-tù sig₅ diri ša tám-kà-ri-im a-hu-a
english: the textiles of extra-fine quality belong to the merchant.

akkadian: hu-ša-li dumu a-šur-dan ù šu-ma-a-bi₄-a ik-nu-ku
english: the son of aššur-dān and šumi-abiya sealed the pouches.

akkadian: ší-a-ma-tim a-d-in 5 ìr-du ù 5
english: all this, lamassutum, the wife of elamma, left behind.

akkadian: igi pì-lá-ah-ištar dumu e-lá-ma igi a-šur-ba-ni dumu du-mu-uq-ištar
english: witnessed by pilah-ištar, son of elamma, and by aššur-bāni, son of dumuq-ištar.

akkadian: igi en-nam-{d}iškur dumu zi-ra um-mì-a-nu-šu a-na ší-a-ma-tim ú-ra-ki-sú-ni
english: his investors had contractually bound me to (provide it) for making purchases.

akkadian: kišib ú-zu-a kišib i-dí-a-bi-im kišib sú-kà-lim dumu i-dí-sú-in
english: seal of uzua, seal of iddin-abum, seal of sukkallum son of iddin-suen.

akkadian: áb-ša-ra-ni li-mu-um ku-bi-a ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
english: he must add interest in accordance with the rule of the colony.

akkadian: kišib a-šur-e-mu-qí kišib en-nam-a-šùr dumu me-na-a kišib i-dí-a-bi-im
english: seal of aššur-emūqī, seal of ennam-aššur s. of menaya, seal of iddin-abum.

akkadian: kišib a-la-bi-im dumu sú-li-a kišib ki-li-a dumu en-na-nim
english: seal of ali-abum son of ṣuliya, seal of kiliya son of ennānum.

akkadian: 6 ma-na urudu ší-im ep-ri a-na ú-zu-a e-zi-ib
english: i left 6 minas of copper, the price of rations, with uzuwa.

akkadian: ší-ni-šu té-er-tí i-li-kà-ku-nu-tí i-na ṣú-ba-tí ša tám-kà-ri-im ṣú-ba-tù
english: among the textiles belonging to the merchant there are some old textiles.

akkadian: kišib a-mur-ištar kišib en-nam-a-šur dumu me-na-a kišib i-dí-a-bi₄-im
english: seal of amur-ištar, seal of ennam-aššur son of menaya, seal of iddin-abum.

akkadian: ú tí-ir-ta-ak-nu mì-ma ú-lá i-li-kam a-hu-a a-tù-nu mì-šu
english: my dear brothers, why do you not pay attention to my instructions?

akkadian: iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša a-mur-ištar a-na 23 ha-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal
english: reckoned from the week of amur-ištar he must pay within 23 weeks.

akkadian: šé-bi₄-lam 1 túg sig₅ ku-lu-ma-a na-áš-a-kum ší-im-šu šé-bi₄-lam
english: kulumaya brings you 1 fine textile; send me the proceeds from it.

akkadian: a-bu-ni a-ma-kam a-na tí-ir-tí a-bi₄-ni i-hi-id-ma za-ki-i a-ni-ša-am
english: take care there of our father's instructions and clear up the affairs.

akkadian: mì-ma tí-ir-tí a-bi₄-ni lá tù-pá-na-am a-na-kam iš-té-en ù
english: you shall not transfer any consignment of our father's to this place.

akkadian: kišib a-šùr-e-mu-qí kišib en-nam-a-šùr dumu me-na-a kišib i-dí-a-bi-im
english: seal of aššur-emūqi, seal of ennam-aššur son of menaya, seal of iddin-abum.

akkadian: li-ib-ší šu-ma i tí-ki-ir-kà a-na da-ni-tim pí-kà dí-šu-um
english: if he contests it with you, then give him a harsh talking-to.

akkadian: kišib i-dí-a-bi₄-im dumu i-tur₄-dingir kišib ú-nu-ba kišib a-ší-a-at
english: seal of iddin-abum son of itūr-ilī, seal of unuba, seal of ašiat.

akkadian: urudu 18 gú 6 ma-na urudu i li-bi i-dí-a-šur a-lá-an
english: the rest of the copper, 18 talents 6 minas of copper, is in iddin-aššur's possession.

akkadian: lá a-wi-lim a-ta-áš-kà-an a-hi a-ta am-tí šu-pur-ma li-ir-dí-ú-nim a-na ha-ar-pé
english: my dear brother, write about my maid so they lead her to me before harvest.

akkadian: ha-ra-ni le-pu-uš i-na {d}utu-ši ša ṭup-pí ta-ša-me-ú we-da-ku ṣú-ha-ri ṭur₄-da-am
english: the very day you hear my letter - since i am alone, send the servants!

akkadian: a-šur-du₁₀ šu-ištar ù a-na-ku lu né-ta-wu i-na ta-am-ni-a ha-mu-uš-tum ša
english: aššur-ṭāb, šu-ištar and i myself, we will discuss in tawiniya; the week eponymy of aššur-bāni.

akkadian: li-iṣ-hi-ir ù urudu na-am-a-dam ša ṭup-pì-kà a-dí tù-wa-ri-a ni-sí 1
english: then we have settled the majority of the copper from your tablet until my return.

akkadian: ra-bi-ú-tim a-dí 5 u₄-me-e ú-ṣa-ba-am iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša ma-nu-ba-lu-a-šur a-na
english: reckoned from the week of mannum-balum-aššur he will pay my silver in the next week.

akkadian: igi šu-a-nim i-nu-mì i-dí-a-bu-um a-na a-lim{ki} i-lu-ku qá-dí na-ru-qí-šu-ma e-tí-iq
english: when iddin-abum goes to the city it will go along together with his joint-stock investments.

akkadian: dumu qá-a-a-tim igi i-dí-a-šur dumu bu-sú-sú igi a-bu-ša-lim dumu i-dí-èr-ra
english: in the presence of iddin-aššur, son of b / pususu, of abu-šalim, son of iddin-erra.

akkadian: kišib a-ku-za dumu šu-a-nim kišib ú-ra-a dumu ma-na-na kišib a-šur-ba-ni dumu ša-lim-a-šùr
english: seal of akuza son of šu-anum, seal of uraya son of manana, seal of aššur-bāni son of šalim-aššur.

akkadian: lu-bu-šu-am ku-nu-ki-a a-ṣé-er ku-zi-zi-a šu-be-lúm ù a-lu-a na-áš-ú ù mì-šu ša a-dí
english: but why is it that although i wrote to you about pilah-ištar, my servants have stayed until today?

akkadian: a-bi-šu-nu a-na i-dí-sú-in ù a-hi-šu dumu i-ba-a-a ù-lá i-tù-wa-ar-šu-nu-tí a-hu-um a-na a-hi-im
english: and šalim-aššur must not raise claim against iddin-suen or his brother for the debt of their father ibaya.

akkadian: 20 ma-na urudu sig₅ i ší-im ku-uk-ra i-ri-ih-ma i-ṣé-er {d}utu-a-bi lá-ma-sà-tum tí-šu
english: 20 minas of refined copper that remained from the price for kukra are owed by šamaš-abī to lamassutum.

akkadian: dumu puzur₄-a-na igi a-du-du-wa dumu en-na-ma-nim igi en-na-sú-in dumu i-tur₄-dingir igi šu-a-nim dumu šu-sú-in
english: witnessed by anah-ilī son of puzur-anna, by aduduwa son of ennam-anum, by ennau-suen son of itūr-ilī, by šu-anum son of šu-suen.

akkadian: igi gír ša a-šur ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in igi a-ta-ta dumu šu-ku-bi₄-im igi šu-a-šur dumu id-n
english: witnessed by atata son of šu-kūbum, by šu-aššur son of iddin-aššur; aššur-rabi was on that very day our thir (witness partner).

akkadian: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-né-eš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am igi igi gír ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
english: for these words the kaneš colony made us available and this tablet we gave as our testimony rendered before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: kišib a-šùr-ma-lik dumu dingir-ba-ni kišib a-la-hi-im dumu i-na-ah-dingir kišib a-mur-ištar dumu mì-šu-gal kišib a-gu-a kišib i-dí-a-bi-im
english: seal of aššur-malik son of ilī-bāni, seal of ali-ahum son of inah-ilī, seal of amur-ištar son of miššu-rabi, seal of aguwa, seal of iddin-abum.

akkadian: a-na-kam ki-a-am ša ki-ma ku-a-tí i-zi-zu-ma a-dí li-bi-kà lu-qú-tám ù e-ma-re-e qá-at-kà ša-ki-in
english: here your representatives acted like this, so for as long as you wish your claim has been placed on the goods and the donkeys.

akkadian: li-bi-i im-ta-ra-aṣ a-ma-kam a-na ú-ṣur-ša-ištar dí-ší-ma a-na
english: give it to uṣur-ša-ištar there so he can give it to the maid.

akkadian: né-ru-ub-ma 4 ma-na 15 gín-ku-nu a-na 5
english: therefore? our tablet of 51 minas of silver plus interest on it tablet.

akkadian: ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb a-hu-ú-a be-lu-ú-a a-tù-nu a-wi-lúm a-dí
english: my dear brothers and lords, the man has cheated me once or twice.

akkadian: ša a-na a-bi₄-ku-nu a-dí-nu šé-bi₄-lam 1 túg
english: send me the proceeds from my textiles that i gave to your father.

akkadian: ša-ak-ší-dí lu-mu-un li-bi₄-im a-ra-ší-a-ku-um a-wa-tim ša ta-ta-wu-ni
english: i could get angry with you, (for) the words you spoke are improper!

akkadian: i-dí-na-ni šu-ú-ša-al-šu-um lá-áš-qú-lá-kum igi 2 dumu um-me-a-ni
english: seize ennānum and have him pay the silver and send it to me.

akkadian: ṣí-ib-tám lá i-lá-qé gi-mì-li a-na šu-ki-tim li-dí-ma
english: if he does not charge interest he will do šukkutum a real favour.

akkadian: túg li-iš-qú-lam i-na {d}utu-ši ṭup-pá-am ú-lá-pì-ta-ku-nu-tí-ni a-na
english: the very day i wrote the letter to you i left for wahšušana.

akkadian: hu-bu-li dingir-ba-ni dí-na-šu-um ù ṭup-pé-e ša ku-nu-ki-a
english: also, let him give you the tablets with my seal that he holds.

akkadian: ṭup-pu-um ša hu-bu-ul a-na-ah-ì-lí ša i-li-a-ni sà-ar
english: the tablet of the debt of anah-ili that may turn up is invalid.

akkadian: ištar-tù-li-id dumu a-da-a igi bu-da-a dumu ta-ra-wa-zi
english: in the presence of istar-tulid, son of adaya, of budaya, son of tarawazi.

akkadian: bur-ištar ša-i-il₅ mì-ma ša a-dí-nu-šu-i-ni a-na a-šur-ṣú-lu-li
english: all i gave him for assur-sululi has been registered on a wax tablet.

akkadian: iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša ku-lu-uk-lu a-na 3 ha-am-ša-tim
english: reckoned from the week of kuluklu he is to pay within 3 weeks.

akkadian: lu-ub-lá-šu a-na-kam ṣa-al-tám iš-tí-a e-pu-uš-ma li-bi₄-i da-ni-iš
english: here he has started a fight with me and has offended me seriously.

akkadian: ni-lá-qé kišib en-na-sú-in dumu i-ku-a kišib sà-li-a
english: man-mahir son of amur-ištar owes 30 talents of -copper from durhumit to šalim-aššur.

akkadian: a-wi-lúm é a-bi₄-a e it-ba-al a-ba-ú-a be-lu-ú-a
english: my dear fathers and lords, save me while i can still be saved.

akkadian: a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-né-eš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am ša ší-bu-tí-ni igi gír ša a-šùr ni-dí-in igi
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave a tablet with our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: bu-lá-tí ša a-bu-ni 3 gú ù 5 ma-na urudu sig₅ ša ma-ma-hi-ir na-dí
english: in addition to our father's assets 3 talents plus 5 minas of good copper belonging to man-mahir were deposited.

akkadian: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am ší-bu-tí-ni igi gír ša a-šùr ni-dí-in
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave a tablet with our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-ìš ṣa-he-er gal i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šur ṭup-pá-am ni-dí-in
english: the plenary assembly of the kanesh colony gave for these proceedings and we gave the tablet before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: kišib šu-ku-bi-im dumu a-šùr-i-dí kišib i-dí-ištar dumu a-šùr-i-dí sú-in-na-da dumu en-um-a-šùr tap-pá-i-ni a-na
english: sealed by šu-kūbum son of aššur-idī, by iddin-ištar son of aššur-idī; suen-nādā son of ennam-aššur was our (absent) partner.

akkadian: ku-ta-ni 1 ša a-ki-dí-e 1 ra-qá-tám a ma-lá tí-ir-tí-kà a-na a-lá-bi₄-im ù i-dí-a-šùr
english: we entrusted 2, 1 akkadian one and 1 thin textile to ali-abum and iddin-aššur in accordance with your instructions.

akkadian: na-na kà-ší-im en-um-a-šur dumu e-lá-ma ip-qí-sú-um igi ša-lim-a-šur dumu a-zi-da igi a-šur-ma-lik dumu
english: before šalim-aššur, son of azida, aššur-mālik, son of ennam-aššur, (and) suen-nādā, son of akazi, he entrusted (them) to him.

akkadian: ší-it-ra-am a-na lá-ma-sí-tim a-na a-wa-tim ša ta-áš-pu-ra-ni a-wi-lu-um
english: as for the matter about which you wrote me, the gentleman has perished / disappeared.

akkadian: qá-qá-ad šál-mì-šu-nu ra-ki-is šu-ma i-na u₄-me-šu-nu lá iš-ta-aq-lu
english: should they not pay when their term is due, then i will take away tuwatuwi.

akkadian: šu-ma ší-bé ša ra-bi-ú-tim i-šu-am mì-nam a-qá-be a-na-ku
english: if he has witnesses among the great men against me, then what can i say?

akkadian: ma-lá ú ší-ni-šu áš-pu-ra-ku-ma ṭup-pá-am lá ta-dí-in a-hi
english: i have written you once or twice but you have not given me a reply.

akkadian: ša-pí-ir 2-ší-na mu-qá-ri-bé dí-na-šu-ma kà-ru-um a-na kà-ri-im li-ip-qí-sú
english: give him two escorts and (thus each) colony must convey him to the (next) colony.

akkadian: a-ta be-li a-ta a-ša ak-lu-ú li-ba-kà lá tù-lá-ma-na-kum
english: my dear brother and lord, do not be angry with me because i held back.

akkadian: li-bi i-li-ma a-bu-ni me-et lá šál-ma-a-šur a-bu-ni a-ta
english: it is not šalim-aššur who is our father, it is you who are our father.

akkadian: ha-ar-ma-am e-zi-ba-ku-nu-tí iš-tù ú-mu-šu im-lu-ú-ni i-na ma-ah-ri-a 22
english: after his loan came due his terms have become overdue for me by 22 weeks.

akkadian: lu-ta-mì-ú-ni ṭup-pá-am ša ku-nu-ki-a ša tù-kà-lu-ú a-na ša
english: give the tablet with my seal that you have in your possession to my representatives.

akkadian: zu-ba igi puzur₄-{d}iškur a-lá-bu-um dumu zi-a tap-pá-i-ni a-na
english: in the presence of zuba (and) of puzur-adad; ali-abum, son of zia was our colleague.

akkadian: la ta-áš-ta-na-me-e mì-šu ša áš-ta-na-me-ú-ma a-wa-at a-hi-ú-tim ta-áš-ta-na-me-ú
english: why is it that i keep hearing that you always listen to what strangers say?

akkadian: áš-pu-ra-ku-nu-tí i-na tí-ir-tí-ku-nu ha-ra-an sú-qí-ni-ma a-šé-ru-ub lu-qú-tim ta-áš-ta-na-pá-ra-nim um-ma a-tù-nu-ma a-šar
english: in your instructions you keep writing to me about bringing the goods on the narrow track.

akkadian: a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: ú-ku-ul-tí-šu-nu a-dí-šu-nu-tí igi a-hu-wa-qar dumu šu-ištar igi ba-zi-a dumu dingir-ku-ru-ub igi
english: witnessed by ahu-waqar son of šu-ištar, by baziya son of ilī-kurub, by the son of qardaya.

akkadian: ili₅-ba-ni dumu i-a-a gír ša a-šùr it-ma-ma en-nu-um-dingir dumu ku-za-ri pá-šu
english: ilī-bāni son of yaya swore by aššur's dagger and ennam-ilī son of kuzari heard his statement.

akkadian: dumu a-mur-a-šùr igi a-ku-za dumu šu-a-nim igi ú-ra-a dumu ma-na na
english: witnessed by sukkalliya son of amur-aššur, by akuza son of šu-anum, by uraya son of manana.

akkadian: ma-na-na a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš-ki i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šùr
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um dur₄-hu-mì-it i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šur ša a-šur ší-bu-tí-ni
english: for these words the durhumit colony gave us and before aššur's dagger we gave our testimony.

akkadian: qá-tí-šu-nu i-dí-in a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um wa-ah-šu-ša-na i-dí-in-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša
english: the wahšušana colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: ša-lim-bé-lí li-dí-na-ki-im a-pu-tum a-ma-kam lu a ba-ba-tí lu a-na é-be-tí-a lá
english: urgent, do not act rashly there with regard to either the outstanding claims or my house.

akkadian: i-ša-qá-lam₅ igi i-tur₄-dingir dumu a-mur-ištar igi a-ta-ta ha-pu-dim igi a-lu-lá-a dumu
english: witnessed by itūr-ilī son of amur-ištar, by atata the blind one, by alulaya son of isalia.

akkadian: a-na ra-dí-im iš-hi-a-ni-tí-im 11 ku-ta-ni i-na na-ru-qá-tim du-ur-kà-ma a-šu-mì da-dí-a e-ez-ba
english: pack 11 kutānus in the sacks and leave them in dādiya's name until my instructions arrive.

akkadian: a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-in-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šur ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: qá-tí-šu-nu i-dí-in a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um wa-ah-šu-ša-na i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša
english: the wahšušana colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: ša-bu-ú ṭup-pé-a iš-tí lá-ma-sà-tim i-ba-ší-ú lu ma-ma-an i-na ša-zu-uz-tí-a ú-kà-al-šu-nu a-dí
english: are my tablets with lamassutum or does someone from my representatives have them in his possession?

akkadian: ša-lim-wa-ar-dí dingir-pì-lá-ah lá-šu-ma a-na dam dingir-pì-lá-ah igi 3 me-er-e um-mì-a-ni ni-ip-qí-id-ma
english: ilī-pilah is not here so we entrusted them to ilī-pilah's wife witnessed by 3 affiliated traders.

akkadian: a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um du-ur-hu-mì-it i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šur ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
english: the durhumit colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: ku-un-kà-ší-ma li-bi₄-ší a-dí a-lá-kà-ni ú-ṭá-tám li-im-hu-ra-ma a-na bé-tim e-ri-im lá e-ra-ba-am
english: let him receive the grain until i arrive, so i shall not enter an empty house.

akkadian: i-dí-{d}im dumu a-šùr-du₁₀ igi tù-ur-a-a dumu me-na-a igi kur-ub-a-šùr dumu ṣí-li-a
english: witnessed by iddin-adad son of ašsur-ṭāb, by tūraya son of menaya, by kurub-aššur son of ṣilliya.

akkadian: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-ma igi gír ša a-šur ší-bu-tí
english: the kanesh colony gave me for these proceedings and i gave my testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: ah-ša-lim i-šu iš-tù ha-muš-tim ša a-šur-ma-lik dumu sú-kà-li-a a-na 12 ha-am-ša-tim
english: reckoned from the week of aššur-malik son of sukkalliya he is to pay within 12 weeks.

akkadian: ú-bi-il₅ gán-lam a-na-nu-um ù a-lá-nu-um a šu-mì-šu-nu-ma i-tí-iq kù
english: it will travel overland in both directions at their expense, (for) it is money of their trust.

akkadian: a-wa-tí ša ta-at-wu-ú ú a-na-ku a-wa-at ša a-hi eb-ri
english: as for the words you spoke, i too can listen to the words of colleagues and friends.

akkadian: a-na ší-mì-im a-na ša-na-ú-um il₅-qé-ú ší-im hu-sà-ri-ku-nu ku-nu-ki-ni bu-ur-sú-in
english: with the price of your lapis lazuli under our seal būr-suen is on his way to you.

akkadian: ku-nu-ki ša-ak-tù-nu-a na-áš-a-ku-um a-lá-ni ku-nu-ki-a li-ip-qí-du-ni-ku-ma i-na ku-nu-ki-a li-bi-ší
english: the acorns he must entrust to you under my seal and they must remain under my seal.

akkadian: ta-pá-qí-da-ni a-na a-wi-lim sà-ri-im ša ki-ma a-šur-lá-ma-sí i-na maš-kà-tí-a
english: when you entrust merchandise (for transport). (must it be) to a perfidious men, who replaces / represents?

akkadian: šu-ma a-hu-ú-a a-tù-nu ša-li-ú-um i-ṣé-ri-ku-nu lá i-ša-lá ìr a-šar
english: forward the slave to them where you can, so that the creditors will not sell my father.

akkadian: a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um wa-ah-šu-ša-na i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šu
english: witnessed by aššur-idī, by elāli; puzur-ilī son of balzuenum was our (absent) partner.

akkadian: 1 gín pá-zu-ur-tí-šu-nu ša-bu-ú túg ku-nu-ki-a li-im-nu-ú-ni-ku-nu-tí-ma ú túg
english: they have been paid in silver 0.3333 mina 1 shekel for their smuggling.

akkadian: e-lá-ma ib-ší 2 ṣí-il₅-a-nu ša ṭup-pé-e ku-nu-ku ša a-he-ki
english: there are still two ṣ-containers with tablets sealed by your brothers and mother.

akkadian: lá sà-ha-ra-am sà-ha-ar-tí na-áp-ra-ṣa-am ú maš-ki ša-pá-tí-a lá té-zi-ba-am
english: you shall not leave my small goods, a chisel and my woolen fleeces.

akkadian: ší-im-šu-nu šé-bi-lam i-na anše ša lugal-{d}im 1 anše i-a-um
english: of the donkeys of šar-adad 1 donkey belongs to me and to aššur-imittī.

akkadian: i-šé-e igi a-šùr-ták-lá-ku dumu kàr-wa-a igi ìr-ad-a-šùr dumu diri-e-im
english: in the presence of assur-taklaku, son of karways, of urad-assur, son of watrum.

akkadian: a-ha-at a-bi-šu i-dí-sú-in it-ma ù ša-lim-a-šur a-na hu-bu-ul i-ba-a-a
english: iddin-suen swore on behalf of his sister, his brother and his father's sister.

akkadian: 12 ša a-ki-dí-e ku-nu-ki ša šál-ma-a-šùr ṣú-ha-ru-kà na-áš-ú-ni-ku-nu-tí 2
english: your servants are bringing you 4 and 12 akkadian ones sealed by šalim-aššur.

akkadian: ku-ta-ni dam-qú-tim i-tur₄-dingir a-na en-um-a-šur a ší-a-ma-tim i-dí-in a-na-num
english: itūr-ilī gave 0.3333 mina of beads(?) plus 2 good to ennam-aššur for purchases.

akkadian: 22 ma-na urudu i-ṣé-er a-al-du₁₀ ša tù-ùh-pì-a a-al-du₁₀ dumu
english: 22 minas of copper āl-ṭāb from tuhpiya owes to āl-ṭāb, son of aššur-ṭāb.

akkadian: na-áš-a-ku-um urudu ša ki-ma sá-li-a né-ri-iš-ma ta-dá-na-am lá i-mu-ú
english: we asked for copper from salliya's representatives but they would not give it.

akkadian: za-ku-tum a-ṣé-er ša ki-ma ku-a-tí ù a-ṣé-ri-a šu-up-ra-am a
english: my dear father, send a final report to your representatives and to me.

akkadian: 15 ma-na urudu ma-sí-a-am i-ṣé-er ú-nu-ba ú a-ší-a-at wa-ar-dí
english: unuba and ašiat, dan-aššur's slaves, owe 15 minas of washed copper to luzi.

akkadian: ku-nu-ku ša en-um-a-šur dumu e-lá-ma a-ha-ma 1 túg ku-sí-tum
english: separately 1 -garment of uṣur-ša-aššur that has been sealed later? is also available.

akkadian: igi ištar kà-ki-bi₄-im i-li-ni lá-ak-ru-ba-am a-na a-lá-hi-im qí-bi₄-ma mì-nam
english: provide me with a sacrifice and i shall pray to ištar-the-star, our god.

akkadian: a-hi a-ta a-na a-wa-at ṭup-pí-im i-hi-id-ma iš-tí a-zu-ú tí-ir-ta-kà le-zi-ba-am
english: my dear brother, pay heed to the words of the letter and let your message be left with azu.

akkadian: a-ni-ša-am lá té-ta-ar-ba-am ha-ra-kà ta-ta-lá-ak a-hi a-ta be-lí a-ta 3
english: please my brother, my lord, give these three garments for children that you brought up (from assur) to kuliya.

akkadian: a-na a-wi-li lu-šé-bi-il₅-ma a-na a-šùr-i-dí li-iš-qú-lu ša ki-ma i-a-tí ṭup-pá-am
english: pay the silver then i will send it to the gentlemen, so that they can pay it to aššur-idī.

akkadian: a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um ta-wi-ni-a i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šur ṭup-pá-am a-ni-am
english: for these words the tawiniya colony made us appear in court and before aššur's dagger we gave this tablet.

akkadian: šu-ma i-na pí-i-kà ṣú-ha-ar-tum ṭá-ar-da-at ma a-wa-tum ku-a-a-tum šu-up-ra-ma lu
english: write me in your own words whether the girl was chased out by your order, so i may know.

akkadian: i-pá-li-lu lu-ta-me ú ú-nu-tám lu-na-dí-id a-hu-ú-a be-lu-a a-tù-nu i-dí-ku-nu dí-na-ma
english: my dear brothers and lords, you must make an effort and do a favour to aššur and to me.

akkadian: 10-tim ú ša-du-a-tám li-qé-a-ma ša ba-ri-ni li-li-kam-ma gír ša a-šur
english: do not fail to produce aššur's dagger in the presence of kuliya and people shall not spare each other!

akkadian: am-tim li-dí-ší šu-ma lá ta-dí-in-ší li-bi₄ i-ma-ra-aṣ
english: if you have not give it, i shall be upset.

akkadian: i-ze-za-am-dingir ša ni-iš a-lim{ki} ta-mu-ú-ni uz-na-tí-šu-nu al-pu-ut
english: i impressed upon them what was sworn by the city.

akkadian: na-áš-a-ku-nu-tí a-hu-ú-a a-tù-nu lu-lá-am ù a-lá-ni a
english: my dear brothers, offer the and the acorns for sale.

akkadian: a-šùr wa-bar-tum ša ša-mu-ha i-dí-ni-ma ṭup-pá-am a-dí-in
english: the šamuha station gave me, and i gave the tablet.

akkadian: a li-bi₄ ṭup-pè-a šu-uk-na-ma ù tí-ir-ta-ak-nu li-li-kam
english: place it among my tablets and then send me word.

akkadian: e-né-ku-nu lá-mu-ur iš-ra-tim šé-bu-ul-ta-ku-nu ku-nu-ki-a a-lu-wa na-áš-a-ku-nu-tí
english: aluwa brings you the belts, your shipment, under my seal.

akkadian: a-tù-nu ta-ša-a-ma-ni a-tù-nu iš-tí-šu ku-un-kà a-na ší-tí
english: buy textiles from talhat for the rest of my silver.

akkadian: na-hi-da-ší-ma i-na hu-ur-ší-a ší-lá-tum lá i-ba-ší-ma li-bi
english: inform me how much grain was spent for the mourning-ritual.

akkadian: a-lá-hu-um a-hu-kà iš-tí-kà a-ša-áp-ru-sí-im i-za-az tí-ir-ta-kà a-wa-tim
english: ali-ahum, your brother, is ready to separate (him) from you.

akkadian: ub-lá-kum mì-šu tí-ir-ta-kà ki-a-ma lá i-lá-kam a-na
english: why has word concerning this not come here from you?

akkadian: šu-uk-na a-dí tí-ir-ta-ak-nu i-lá-kà-ni ri-iš lu-qú-tim ú-kà-al
english: i hold on to the goods until your orders arrive.

akkadian: a-ṣé-er anše a-ni-ú-tim 3 anše ù ṣú-ha-ri
english: dispatch 3 donkeys and servants in addition to these donkeys.

akkadian: a-na a-bi₄-a ha-bu-lá-tù-nu ṭup-pá-ak-nu ha-ar-ma-am ša hu-bu-li-ku-nu
english: my father left me your certified tablet concerning your debt.

akkadian: il₅-qé šu-ma a-šur-ma-lik a-na bu-zi-a i-tù-ar šu-ištar
english: if aššur-malik raises claim against buziya, šu-ištar will clear him.

akkadian: ṭup-pu-um ša ší-bu-tí-a ša igi šu-ga-ri-a-e ša
english: the tablet with my testimony before the šugarri'ā'u of aššur.

akkadian: lu-šé-bu-lu-ni-kum ú ší-im túg ṣú-ba-tí ša a-lá-hi-im ú e-na-nim li-iš-lu-ṭù-ma lu-šé-bi₄-lu-ni-kum
english: also, they should take control of the proceeds from the textiles belonging to ali-ahum and ennānum and send it to you.

akkadian: i-is-ku-ri-im lá-pu-ut a-pu-tum lá ta-ša-lá-aṭ ṭup-pá-am ša é bé-lúm-ba-ni na-áš-pár-ta-kà li-li-kam
english: as for the tablet of / in the house of belum-bani - when your letter comes we will obtain its release.

akkadian: ša dingir-ba-ni dumu ib-ni-lí ki a-ta-a urudu ma-lá i-na li-bi₄-šu-nu i-ba-ší-ú
english: settle accounts for all the copper they still owe and collect it and add it to that derived from the gold.

akkadian: ha-ar-mu-um ša hu-bu-ul en-um-a-šur dumu ša-lim-a-šùr ša e-li-a-ni sà-ar igi ku-ku-wa dumu
english: a certified tablet concerning the debt of ennam-aššur son of šalim-aššur that may appear will be invalid.

akkadian: ma-na-na a-na gám-ri-im ù hu-lu-qá-e ša illat ì-lí-a-lim a-na mì-ma šu-um-šu ku-na-a
english: for expenses and losses of the caravan of ilī-ālum, whatsoever, kunnāya shall not raise claim against elamma.

akkadian: igi a-šùr-lá-ma-sí dumu šu-ku-bi₄-im igi en-na-nim igi ú-ba-a igi šu-mì-a-bi₄-a igi a-mur-{d}utu
english: in the presence of assur-lamassi, son of su-kubum, of ennanum, of ubaya, of sumi-abiya, and of amur-samas.

akkadian: i-lá-qé mì-ma a-nim a-na ir-ma-a-šur e-zi-ib igi šu-ištar dumu da-da-nim igi sà-ba-sí-a
english: all this i left to ir'am-aššur, in the presence of šu-ištar, son of dadānum, and of sabasiya.

akkadian: dan-a-šùr sí-ki e-na-sú-in dumu i-dí-a-bi₄-im ú-kà-al-ma a-na ha-nu dumu i-tur₄-dingir a-na qá-ta-tim
english: dan-aššur detains enna-suen son of iddin-abum and he gave him to hanu son of itūr-ilī as guarantor.

akkadian: a-na a-la-hi-im dumu šál-ma-a-šur a-ni-na dumu puzur₄-a-na ú a-šur-ma-lik dumu a-lá-hi-im kišib
english: to ali-ahum son of šalim-aššur, annina son of puzur-anna and aššur-malik son of ali-ahum; seal of zukuwa.

akkadian: im-dí-dingir il₅-qé šu-ma um-me-a-nu i-ku-pì-ištar ú-la me-er-ú-šu a-na e-lá-ma i-tù-ru im-dí-dingir ú-ba-áb-šu
english: if the investors of ikūn-pī-ištar or his sons raise a claim against elamma imdī-ilum will clear him.

akkadian: a-šur-du₁₀ a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um wa-ah-šu-ša-na i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šur ṭup-pá-am ša ší-bu-tí-a a-dí-in sí-li-ištar tap-pá-i
english: for these words the wahšušana colony gave us and before aššur's dagger i gave the tablet with my testimony. ṣilli-ištar was my fellow witness.

akkadian: il₅-qé-šu 1 túg ku-ta-nam {d}im-ba-ni ub-lá-ma i-ri-šu-ma il₅-qé-šu 1 túg ku-ta-nam en-nam-a-šur dumu a-mur-ištar ub-lá-ma i-ri-šu-ma il₅-qé-šu
english: adad-bāni brought 1 -textile and it was irišum who received it.ennam-aššur son of amur-ištar brought 1 -textile and it was irišum who received it.

akkadian: iš-tí a-na-na li-ib-ší-ú a-ma-kam im-ra-mu-ša a-na ba-áb-tim ša tù-um-li-a-i-im li-hi-id
english: there ewarimuša should take care of the outstanding claims of the man from tumliya.

akkadian: ú a-ší-a-at lu-zi i-šu iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša a-mu-ru-um-ba-ni ú a-šur-na-da
english: reckoned from the week of amurrum-bāni and aššur-nādā they must pay within 4 weeks.

akkadian: lá e-ru-bu a-bi a-ta mì-ma li-ba-kà lá i-lá-mì-in a-na ša
english: although i did not reach that realisation(?), my dear father, do not be angry.

akkadian: a-šar ma-lá-ki-im mì-il₅-kà-ni šu-ma a-wa-tum i-za-ku-wa a-na ma-lá tí-ir-tí-kà e-ra-áb
english: if the matter is cleared up, i shall enter in accordance with your instructions.

akkadian: ì-lí-a-lim šu-ištar i-šu igi ì-lí-dan dumu id-na-a-šur igi i-ku-pí-a-šur dumu
english: witnessed by ilī-dān, son of iddin-aššur, by ikūn-pī-aššur, son of puzur-ištar, and by šu-kūbum.

akkadian: igi be-lá-nim dumu šu-a-šur me-er-ú en-um-a-šur i-šé-e-ú-šu i-na-sú-in a-na a-lá-hi-im
english: enna-suen will not raise claim against ali-ahum or ennam-aššur's sons for anything at all.

akkadian: du₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šur na-áš-a-ku-um šu-ma be-li a-ta iš-tí a-li-ki-im pá-ni-i-ma sà-he-er-tám šé-bi-lam
english: if you are indeed my lord, send me small goods with the first transport.

akkadian: a-tù-nu-ma ku-un-kà e-na-na-ta-am na-hi-da-ma ba-lu-ku-nu ṭup-pè-e-a ma-ma-na lá i-pá-té ma-ma-an
english: give ennanātum instructions that no one must open for my tablets without your permission.

akkadian: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am ší-bu-tí-ni igi gír ša a-šùr ni-dí-in igi sú-kà-lí-a
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave a tablet with our testimony before the dagger of aššur.

akkadian: kišib en-na-nim dumu a-la-bi-im kišib dan-a-šùr dumu ir-nu-id kišib bu-zu-a dumu a-šùr-du₁₀ kišib a-du-da dumu
english: sealed by ennānum son of ali-abum, by dan-aššur son of irnuid, by buzuwa son of aššur-ṭāb, by aduda son of zuwa.

akkadian: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am ší-bu-tí-ni igi gír ša a-šùr ni-dí-in igi sú-kà-li-a
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave a tablet with our testimony before the dagger of aššur.

akkadian: kišib a-mur-{d}utu dumu mì-šu-ra-bi kišib na-bi-sú-in dumu {d}ab-ba-ni kišib i-ku-pí-a-šùr dumu šu-ištar a-na
english: seal of amur-šamaš son of miššu-rabi, seal of nabi-suen son of illil-bāni, seal of ikūn-pī-aššur son of šu-ištar.

akkadian: ša áš-pu-ra-ku-nu-tí-ni ep-ša ù ṣí-ba-tim ša a-šur-i-mì-tí mì-ma lá i-sà-li-ma li-bi₄ lá i-ma-ra-ṣa-kum
english: also, with respect to the interest(?) of aššur-imittī he must not lie and make me angry at you.

akkadian: i-dí-a-bu-um é-tí ša bu-ri-im a-šar ša-lim-a-šùr wa-áš-bu iš-tí tù-ud-ha-li-a a-hu tù-li iš-a-am a-na
english: iddin-abum has bought the houses by the well, where šalim-aššur is living, from tudhiliya the brother of tuli.

akkadian: kišib ba-zi-a dumu dingir-kur-ub kišib a-hu-qar dumu zu-ur-zu-ur kišib i-ri-ší-im dumu a-mur-{d}utu ša
english: seal of baziya son of ilī-kurub, seal of ahu-waqar son of zurzur, seal of irišum son of amur-šamaš.
