akkadian: kišib ba-ba-zu-a dumu šu-a-nim kišib du₁₀-ṣí-li-a-šur dumu a-li-li kišib šu-ištar dumu a-šùr-lá-ma-sí a-na
english: seal of babazua son of šu-anum, seal of ṭāb-ṣill-aššur son of ali-ilī, seal of šu-ištar son of aššur-lamassī.

akkadian: i-dí-a-bu-um é-tí ša bu-ri-im a-šar ša-lim-a-šùr wa-áš-bu iš-tí tù-ud-ha-li-a a-hu tù-li iš-a-am a-na
english: iddin-abum has bought the houses by the well, where šalim-aššur is living, from tudhaliya the brother of tuli.

akkadian: igi a-šur-ma-lik ṭup-pu-um ša a-lim{ki} ša be-ú-lá-tí-šu sà-ar
english: the tablet in the city concerning his working capital is invalid.

akkadian: ša qí-ip-tí-šu-nu igi a-šùr-na-id dumu a-šur-i-dí igi ás-qú-dim
english: in the presence of aššur-nādā, son of aššur-idī, and of asqūdum.

akkadian: igi šu-ištar dumu šu-ki-tim igi a-šur-ma-lik dumu ša-ba-ha-nim
english: in the presence of šukutum (and) of aššur-mālik, son of šabahānum.

akkadian: šu-ut a-na a-šur-ma-lik im-nu-šu-nu 1 e-li-tám a-šur-ma-lik i-na
english: aššur-malik left one top-pack before his departure and ilī-bāni took that.

akkadian: a-na pá-ni-a ṭur₄-dam a-hi a-ta be-li a-ta tí-ir-ta-kà
english: my dear brother and lord, send me word to inform me.

akkadian: ù a-mur-ištar i-ša-ha-at a-hi-a li-zi-zu a-dí a-hi i-lá-kà-ni
english: then my own representatives, šu-illil and amur-ištar may assist my brother.

akkadian: igi a-šur-ba-ni dumu ku-ta-a igi ili₅-ba-ni dumu a-mur-ištar
english: witnessed by aššur-bāni son of kutaya, by ilī-bāni son of amur-ištar.

akkadian: a-šùr ni-dí-in igi a-ku-za igi lá-li igi šu-ku-bi₄-im
english: witnessed by akuza, by lalum, by šu-kūbum, by aššur-imittī, by itūr-ilī.

akkadian: ki-ma me-er-e šál-ma-a-šur a-na qá-ta-tim a-da-ku-nu me-er-ú me-tim
english: representing the sons of šalim-aššur i hand you over to guarantors.

akkadian: ša-li-iṭ-ma iš-tí-ša-ma li-bi-ší a-dí a-lá-ki-a lu ú-ṭá-tám lu
english: collect both grain and firewood from the anatolians before i come.

akkadian: 1 na-ru-uq ar-ša-tim ša-da-ag-de₈-e a-na dumu ì-lí-a-lim a-dí-in 1 na-ru-uq ar-ša-tim iš-tù tù-um-li-a a-na puzur₄-e-nam ú-šé-bi₄-lá-am
english: further, i gave 1 sack of wheat last year to ilī-ālum's son; i sent 1 sack of wheat from tumliya to puzur-ennam.

akkadian: ú-ku a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-né-eš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šùr i-na ba-áb dingir ṭup-pá-am ni-dí-in
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave a tablet before aššur's dagger in the gate of the god.

akkadian: ha-ra-be-et ú-ra-da-am lá i-le-e a-sú-ri ṣú-ha-ru-kà e ta-aṭ-ru-da-šu-ma i li-bi₄ ma-tim mì-ma e i-né-pí-šu-ma li-ba-kà e
english: god forbid that you should send your servant and that you should be angry because something was done in the central country.

akkadian: ṭup-pu-um ša ba-áb dingir ša igi gír ša a-šùr ša ší-bu-tí-ni
english: the tablet from the gate of the god from before aššur's dagger, with our testimony.

akkadian: ṭup-pu-um ša ba-áb dingir-lim ša ší-bu-tí-šu-nu ša igi gír ša a-šùr
english: the tablet from the gate of the god with their testimony from before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: a-ta gi₅-im-lá-ni ú a-na-ku a-we-el gi₅-mì-li-im šu-ma a-bu-silim lá-šu tí-ir-tí-kà li-li-kam-ma
english: my dear brother, do me a favour for i am also a man of favours.

akkadian: ṣí-ip-um li-mu-um puzur₄-{d}mu igi a-bu-sa-lim dumu i-dí-ìr-ra igi i-dí-a-šùr dumu pu-ur-sí-sí-im
english: in the presence of abu-šalim son of iddin-erra, of iddin-aššur, son of bursa / isum.

akkadian: i-ba-ší šu-ma a-na qá-ta-tí-šu-nu en-um-a-šur ù i-ku-pí-a i-ma-ṣí-ú qá-ta-tí-šu-nu li-il₅-qé-ú-ma ší-bi šu-uk-na-šu-nu-tí bé-lu-ni a-tù-nu
english: if ennam-aššur and ikūn-pīya take responsibility for their shares, they may receive their shares, but set witnesses for them.

akkadian: ma-na-na a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am ší-bu-tí-ni igi gír ša a-šùr ni-dí-in
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave the tablet with our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: am-tám ku-uk-ra ša {d}utu-a-bi dumu zu-za-nim iš-tí ṣú-ha-ri-im ša ha-da-i-kur a-lá-hi-nim ša-lim-a-šur dumu ip-hu-ri-im iš-a-am ha-ma-am ma-ah-ri-ni
english: the slave-girl kukra, which šamaš-abī, son of zuzānum, <had acquired?> from the boy of hada'ikur, the, ? šallim-aššur, son of iphurum, has bought.

akkadian: iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša a-šùr-ma-lik ṣa-lá-mì-im ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im a-na 1 ma-na-e-em ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb lí-mu-um ša qá-té ba-zi-a
english: starting from the week eponymy of assur-mālik, the black one, he will add interest per mina according to the regulation of the colony.

akkadian: sí-sí-a-nim i-na sí-sí-kà-at pì-ri-kà-ni šu-mì tám-kà-ri-im
english: indicate the name of the merchant on the hem of the .

akkadian: iš-tí ší-ip-ri-ku-nu a-na da-me-e ša a-hi-a
english: i left with your envoys to sue for blood-money for my brother.

akkadian: mì-šu-um lá ta-ša-ra-ni-a-tí lá tí-dí-e ki-ma
english: don't you realize that you left us behind in an empty house?

akkadian: šál-ma-ni ú-ru-za-na-tim me-ra-lì ša ub-lá-ni lá
english: the .'s of merali, which he brought, he refused to give (us).

akkadian: ú i-dí-in-ni-ra-ah be-lúm-ba-ni i-šu igi a
english: witnessed by ikūnum, son of aššur-bāni, (and) by the son of šu-ilabrat.

akkadian: i ta-wi-ni-a wa-áš-ba-ni ni-iš-ta-na-me wa-áš-bu-tum ša
english: we hear rumours that the residents of wahšušana have left the city.

akkadian: lu-za-ki-ú-ni-kum e ta-áš-lu-ut-ma lá ta-áš-pu-ur ú
english: do not act on your own authority since you have not written.

akkadian: ù a-na dumu kà-né-eš lá ta-dá-na-šu a-na
english: you must not sell her! to an assyrian or to a citizen of kanesh.

akkadian: a-we-lúm lá da-am-qú-um i-na e-ni-kà a-na ba-ú-ší-a
english: a man who is no good stands ready to defame me in your eyes.

akkadian: e-tí-iq lu-qú-sú iš-tù a-lim{ki} a-šu-mì ki-lá-li-ma gán-lam
english: the goods purchased will pass overland from the city in the names of both.

akkadian: tù-uš-ta-na-e-dí ù a-ta-ma tí-de₈-e ki-ma a-ka-al-tám 30
english: and you know yourself that you left only 30 portions of food for me.

akkadian: ṭù-ur-da-ni-šu-nu a-hu-ú-a-tù-nu ih-da-ma ú a-na-ku a-wa-at-ku-nu a-ša-me
english: heed my request, my brothers, and i too can listen to what you say!

akkadian: lu nu-šé-ṣí-šu a-ha-at-kà a-na a-bi-kà ma-da-tí-ma ta-ta-wu i-na
english: your sister talks a lot to your father and she tries to make him forget you!

akkadian: pá-nim-ma šé-bi-lam a-ta kà-ra-am a-na lá kà-ri-im tal-qé-ma
english: you treated the as if it were not the and failed to send the silver here.

akkadian: sà-he-er-tám e-lá-lí ú en-um-ì-lí na-áš-ú-ni-kum a-ma-kam i-na {d}utu-ši ṭup-pí
english: the very day you hear my letter there you (plur.) must satisfy your palace, for the is dead.

akkadian: ah-zu-ni a-hi-iz géme a ší-mì-im lá i-da-an té-er-tum a-na
english: he stays married to the maid just as he has married (her), he shall not sell the maid.

akkadian: ší-ip-ri-ni šé-bi₄-lá-nim me-he-er ṭup-pì-ni a-na kà-ar kà-ar-ma ú wa-bar-ra-tim
english: send a copy of (this) letter of ours to every single colony and to all the trading stations.

akkadian: ma-ku-hu ša a-ma-kam ṭá-áb-ú-ku-um a-mu-ur-ma té-er-ta-kà li-li-kam-ma i ha-ra-an
english: look out for - or -textiles over there that please you and let your report come to me.

akkadian: i-na ša-na-at ú-šé-lá-am šu-ma a-dí ša-na-at ku-ta-na-am lá uš-té-li-am
english: if he has not brought up a within a year, he must pay 10 shekels of silver here.

akkadian: ú ší-mu-um ma-ad ší-ma-am ša ta-šé-e-ú i li-bi-kà ša
english: purchases at which you are striving, which will secure you and us a profit, i can realize here.

akkadian: mì-ma ú-lá i-ṭá-hi a ma-lá ṭup-pì-im ša a-lim{ki} i-ša-ri-iq-šu-um
english: according to the tablet of the city, (if he does) it will be considered as stolen by him.

akkadian: wa-ah-šu-ša-na i-ta-ṣú-nim a-dí u₄-me-e za-ku-sà ni-ša-me-ma a-le ni-pá-nu-ú ni-ša-pá-ra-ku-um
english: within two days, when we hear more details, we will inform you by letter where we are heading.

akkadian: kà-lá-pí-im i-li-kà-ni ší-bé-e a-dí-ni lá ah-ri-im i ší-be-a a-zu kà-ṣa-ar
english: as for your letter which arrived here concerning the axe, i have not yet recorded (the dispositions) of the witnesses.

akkadian: lá ta-kà-lá-a li-il₅-qé ú šu-ma kà-lá ṭup-pè-e e-ri-iš-ku-nu lá ta-kà-lá-a-šu
english: also, if he demands all the tablets from you, then do not hold him back but let him take them.

akkadian: šu-ma a-na am-tim ú-la é-tí ú-ṭá-hi be-tù ù a-ma-tum ša
english: if he makes an attempt at a slave-girl or the house, the house and the slave-girls belong to the lady!

akkadian: a-na ša-na-at ta-ša-qal šu-ma i-ma-lá u₄-me-ša lá ta-áš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im
english: if she has not paid when her term is over she will add interest in accordance with the regulation of the colony.

akkadian: bé-tí-ša ú-ba-áb-ší-ma pá-ni-ša ṣa-al-mu-tim ú-ša-an-wa-ar a-tí ma-tí-ma tí-ir-tí-ki lá i-li-kam-ma li-ba-am ú-lá
english: on the day you hear my letter aššur-massu'ī and you should have a copy made of our father's testament and send it with aluwa.

akkadian: šu-kà-tám ú-ša-áš-qí-il₅-šu ku-nu-ki ša šu-ki-tim šu-hu-bur na-áš-a-kum gán-lam₅ a-šu-mì šu-ki-tim a-dí kà-ni-iš{ki}
english: total of your silver, both the proceeds from the tin and that from šukkutum, 15 minas 12 shekels of silver, šu-hubur brings to you.

akkadian: li-mu-um ša qá-tí a-mur-a-šur dumu kà-ri-a
english: eponymy after that of amur-aššur son of karriya.

akkadian: a-šur-mu-ta-bi₄-il₅ dí-in ú a-na-ku ga-ma-al-kà a-le-e
english: i too am capable of doing you favours.

akkadian: ú-lá i-šu a-na a-wa-at ṭup-pì-im i-hi-id
english: pay attention to the words of the tablet.

akkadian: i-ta-dí-in i li-bi ú-ṭí-tim i-ṣa-hi-ir a-ha-ma
english: it will be deducted from the grain account.

akkadian: igi lá-qé-pì-im i-tur₄-dingir dumu a-mur-ištar tap-pá-i-ni
english: itūr-ilī son of amur-ištar was our (absent) partner.

akkadian: lu-mu-un li-bi-im a ku-lu-ma-a lá a-ra-ší
english: let me not have to face kulumaya's anger.

akkadian: a-na pá-ni-a šé-bi₄-lam iš-té-en₆ i-na ṣú-ha-ri-kà
english: send one of your servants before (i come).

akkadian: ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in i-tur₄-dingir dumu a-mur-ištar tap-pá-i-ni
english: itūr-ilī son of amur-ištar was our (absent) partner.

akkadian: igi a-šur-e-mu-qí igi en-nam-a-šur dumu me-na-a
english: witnessed by aššur-emūqi, by ennam-aššur son of menaya.

akkadian: dumu puzur₄-a-na a-šar šu-ištar i-ba-ší-a tí-ir-ta-kà
english: the pledges from puzur-anna's son are with šu-ištar.

akkadian: i-na a-lá-ak illat-tim ša ma-ma-hi-ir a-lá-hu-um ù dam-qá-a ú-šé-bu-lu-ni-šum
english: when man-mahir's caravan arrives ali-ahum and damqaya will send it to him.

akkadian: dí-ší-im a-na-kam a-na a-wa-tim ša ki-ma um-me-a-ni-a i-ṣa-áb-tù-ni wa-ar-ki
english: the representatives of my investor have been seized here for a lawsuit.

akkadian: i-le-e i-na li-bi-kà i-šu-ú i-na ṭup-pí-im pá-qá-dim bi-za-lá a-na
english: when the tablet was handed over bizala took responsibility for her share.

akkadian: ili₅-ba-ni dumu ba-ší-lam igi a-hu-qar dumu zu-ur-zu-ur igi tù-ra-am-ì-lí dumu e-dí-na-a-šùr a-ha-ma
english: witnessed by ilī-bāni son of baši-ilum, by ahu-qar son of zurzur, by tūram-ilī son of eddin-aššur.

akkadian: a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am ší-bu-tí-ni igi gír ša a-šùr ni-dí-in
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš-ki i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: kišib ú-ra-a dumu ma-na-na kišib ì-lí-dan dumu i-dí-a-šur kišib ma-nu-um-ba-lúm-a-šur dumu ib-ki-im
english: sealed by uraya son of manana, by ilī-dan son of iddin-aššur, by mannum-balum-aššur son of ibkum.

akkadian: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-né-eš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šur ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: igi ma-sà-a dumu a-šùr-ni-im-ri igi ma-ṣí-ì-lí dumu bu-zu-zi-im igi a-mur-a-šùr dumu a-šùr-du₁₀
english: witnessed by masaya, son of aššur-nimrī, by maṣi-ilī, son of buzuzum, by amur-aššur, son of aššur-ṭāb.

akkadian: ú-ku-ul-tí-šu-nu a-dí-šu-nu-tí igi a-hu-wa-qar dumu šu-ištar igi ba-zi-a dumu dingir-ku-ru-ub igi a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku
english: witnessed by ahu-waqar son of šu-ištar, by baziya son of ilī-kurub, by aššur-taklāku son of qardaya.

akkadian: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: 1 túg ku-ta-nam šu-li dumu puzur₄-a-bé-eh a-lá-ha-am a-hu-šu a-na e-lá-ma ú-kà-a-an šu-ma
english: šuli, son of puzur-abeh, will bring proof that ali-ahum, his brother, owes 1 -textile to elamma.

akkadian: ša i-ba-ší-ú a-na a-lá-hi-im ù a-lu-a dí-in-ma lu-ub-lu-nim a-na da-áš-i-šu ba-a-nim lu
english: every textile that is available give that to ali-ahum and aluwa so they may bring it.

akkadian: igi a-hu-qar dumu šu-ištar igi a-šur-du-gul dumu pì-lá-ah-ištar igi a-ni-na dumu man-a-na
english: witnessed by ahu-waqar son of šu-ištar, by aššur-dugul son of pilah-ištar, by annina son of puzur-anna.

akkadian: igi i-ku-pì-a dumu ili₅-mì-šar igi ba-ba-lá dumu a-šur-du₁₀ igi a-šur-du₁₀ dumu hu-ra-ṣa-nim
english: witnessed by ikūn-pīya son of ilī-mīšar, by babala son of aššur-ṭāb, by aššur-ṭāb son of huraṣānum.

akkadian: um-ma kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš-ma a-na ku-li-a ší-ip-ri-ni kà-ar kà-ar-ma a-le sú-kà-li-a dumu a-šùr-iš-ti-kál
english: thus kanesh to kuliya, our messenger (and) every single, wherever sukkaliya, son of aššuriš-tikal, is staying.

akkadian: igi a-šùr-i-mì-tí dumu du-dí-ki igi tù-ur-a-a dumu ú-zu-a igi en-na-sú-in dumu i-dí-a-bi-im
english: witnessed by aššur-imittī son of dudiki, by tūraya son of uzuwa, by enna-suen son of iddin-abum.

akkadian: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dì-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša {d}a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: il₅-qé šu-ma ša-da-na ú-lá ša ki-ma ša-da-na a-na puzur₄-a-šur dumu a-šur-dan i-tù-ar ú-zu-a dumu li-bi₄-a
english: if šāt-anna or šāt-anna's representative raise claim against puzur-aššur son of aššur-dan, then uzuwa son of libbiya will clear him.

akkadian: dumu ba-zi-a igi im-dí-lim dumu šu-lá-ba-an igi e-me-me-i dumu a-zu-ta-a
english: in the presence of imdī-ilum, son of šu-labān, of ememe'i, son of azutaya.

akkadian: 40 ma-na urudu ma-sí-am ší-im anše i li-bi₄ a-šur-du₁₀ anše
english: 40 minas of refined copper the price of a donkey, due from aššur-ṭāb.

akkadian: dumu i-ku-nim igi pí-lá-ah-a-šur dumu da-nu-um-ì-lí igi a-šur-ma-lik dumu a-zu-za
english: in the presence of pilah-aššur, son of dannum-ilī, of aššur-mālik, son of azuza.

akkadian: igi e-na-ah-dingir dumu šu-a-šur igi a-dí-da dumu ìr-ad-i-li-šu igi id-na-a
english: witnessed by enah-ilī son of šu-aššur, by adida son of warad-ilišu, by idnaya.

akkadian: ša {d}a-šùr a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um dur₄-hu-mì-it i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
english: the durhumit colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony.

akkadian: igi a-šùr-i-mì-tí dumu du-dí-ki igi tù-ur-a-šùr dumu ú-zu-a igi en-na-sú-in
english: witnessed by aššur-imittī son of dudiki, by tūr-aššur son of uzuwa, by enna-suen.

akkadian: a-šur a-dí-in igi a-da-da a-šur-i-mì-tí dumu a-ta-a ù puzur₄-tí-a-am-tim tap-pá-ú-a
english: witnessed by adada; aššur-imittī son of ataya and puzur-ti'amtum were my (absent) partners.

akkadian: a-lá-bi-im dumu a-šur-e-mu-qí e-zi-ib tí-ir-ta-kà a-ṣé-er a-lá-bi-im li-li-ik-ma túg li-dí-na-kum
english: send word to ali-abum so that he may give the textiles to you.

akkadian: igi en-nam-a-a igi en-nam-a-šur dumu da-da igi a-šur-na-da dumu a-mur-lu-ṣú
english: witnessed by ennamaya, by ennam-aššur son of dada, by aššur-nādā son of amur-luṣu.

akkadian: 30 gú urudu sà-hi-ra-am ša dur₄-hu-mì-it i-na ṣé-er ma-ma-hi-ir dumu
english: man-mahir son of amur-ištar owes 30 talents of -copper from durhumit to šalim-aššur.

akkadian: ú-ub-lu-nim ša-il₅-ma šé-bi₄-lam a ma-lá na-áš-pè-er-tí-kà i-ri-šu-um i-na dur₄-hu-mì-it u₄-ma-am
english: in accordance with your missive i expect erišum in durhumit today or tomorrow.

akkadian: ša-na-at e-tí-qú i-na tù-wa-ar ṣú-ha-ri-a iš-tù pu-ru-uš-ha-dim urudu-ú-šu ma-sí-a-am a-na ah-ša-lim ù a-na ša ki-ma i-a-tí šu-qú-ul-ma
english: when my servant returns from purušhaddum pay his washed copper to ah-šalim or to my representatives, and get your tablet from ah-šalim.

akkadian: ṭup-pu-um ša ší-bu-tí-a ša igi šu-ga-ri-a-im ša
english: tablet with my testimony before the šugarri'ā'um of aššur.

akkadian: a-ma-kam i-na ṣé-er šál-ma-a-šur e-ku-nu li-li-ik šu-ma
english: my dear brothers, keep an eye on šalim-aššur there.

akkadian: šu-bé-lúm iš-qú-ul lu-qú-tám ša puzur₄-a-šùr dumu i-šar-ki-da-a-šur
english: goods that puzur-aššur son of išār-kitt-aššur brought up here.

akkadian: kišib a-šùr-i-mì-tí kišib šu-a-nim kišib i-dí-a-bi-im ša
english: seal of aššur-imittī, seal of šu-anum, seal of iddin-abum.

akkadian: kišib a-šùr-e-mu-qí kišib en-nam-a-šur kišib i-dí-a-bi-im ša
english: seal of aššur-emūqi, seal of ennam-aššur, seal of iddin-abum.

akkadian: áb-ša-ra-ni li-mu-um šu-sú-in dumu ba-bi-lim 3 gín
english: month ab-šarrāni, in the eponymy šu-suen son of babilum.

akkadian: kišib a-šur-i-dí kišib en-num-a-šur kišib en-num-a-šur ša
english: seal of aššur-idī, seal of ennam-aššur, seal of ennam-aššur.

akkadian: 5 ma-na urudu a-na lu-lu mì-ma a-nim
english: all this aššur-šamšī paid for the debt of aššur-ṭāb.

akkadian: a-la-hu-um igi da-dí-a igi i-dí-a-bi₄-im igi a-šùr-{d}utu-ši
english: i will take the silver wherever i see him.

akkadian: ni-kà-sí ma-ah-ri-ni i-dí-a-bu-um ù ša-lim-a-šùr i-sí-ú-ma a-na
english: iddin-abum and šalim-aššur settled accounts with us as witnesses.

akkadian: a-a-ar-tim mì-ma a-nim a-na a-šùr-ṣú-lu-li a-dí-in ša-bu
english: all this i gave to assur-sululi, he is satisfied.

akkadian: a-dí 10 u₄-me-e lá ta-ha-ta-ar a-ṣé-er e-ni-ša-ri-im
english: i have sent uṣur-ša-ištar to enišārum concerning your tin.

akkadian: i-ra-dí-ú-ni-kum 1 ma-na urudu a-na qá-tí-šu-nu ni-dí-in
english: we gave 1 mina of copper for their expenses.

akkadian: ni-kà-sí ma-ah-ri-ni i-dí-a-bu-um ù ša-lim-a-šùr i-sí-ú a-na
english: iddin-abum and šalim-aššur settled accounts with us as witnesses.

akkadian: 14 ma-na kù ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi₄-im a-mur-ištar
english: iddin-abum owes 14 minas of refined silver to amur-ištar.

akkadian: ša-du-a-sú ša-bu igi ip-pa-lu dumu a-mur-ištar igi a-šur-ma-lik dumu a-mu-ra igi a-šur-i-mì-tí dumu a-ni-nim
english: in the presence of ippalu, son of amur-ištar, of aššur-mālik, son of amura, of aššur-imittī, son of anīnum.

akkadian: a-na kur-ub-ištar mì-ma a-nim a-na a-šur-lá-ma-sí áp-qí-id igi a-mur-ištar igi a-šùr-na-da
english: all this i entrusted to aššur-lamassī, in the presence of amur-ištar, (and) of aššur-nādā.

akkadian: a-na šu-be-lim áp-qí-id igi a-šùr-na-da dumu a-šùr-i-dí igi šu-sú-in dumu šu-hu-bu-ur
english: in the preence of aššur-nādā, son of aššur-idī, (and) of šu-suen, son of šu-hubur.

akkadian: i-li-kà-ni ša-lim-a-šùr il₅-qé ší-tí ṣú-ba-tí-šu 45 ku-ta-nu qá-du-um ṣú-ba-tí-šu sig₅ ku-nu-ku ša šu-ku-bi-im é ša-lim-a-šùr
english: the rest of his textiles, 45 including his textiles of good quality, are in šalim-aššur's house under šu-kūbum's seal.

akkadian: a-mur-ištar a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am ša ší-bu-tí-ni igi gír ša a-šùr ni-dí-in
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave a tablet with our testimony before assur's dagger.

akkadian: ša ki-ma i-dí-a-šùr dumu ku-bi₄-dí ù ku-la é i-dí-a-bi₄-im a-na hu-bu-ul i-dí-a-bi₄-im ik-nu-ku-ma am-tám ù ìr uš-té-ṣí-ú i-na šál-ší-im
english: the representatives of iddin-aššur son of kūbi-idī and kula sealed iddin-abum's house because of iddin-abum's debt, and they brought out the maid and slave.

akkadian: ša sà-ra-tim li-mu-um ša i qá-té sú-kà-lí-a il-qé-ú
english: month ii,eponymy of the one who took over from sukkalliya.

akkadian: igi i-dí-ku-bi igi a-lá-bi-im dumu šu-a-šùr igi en-na-sú-in
english: witnessed by iddin-kūbī, by ali-abum son of šu-aššur, by enna-suen.

akkadian: ta-ša-li-ṭí a-wa-tí ša ì-lí-dan i-dí-a-šur ù šu-ištar al-té-qé
english: i have accepted the proposal of ilī-dan, iddin-aššur and šu-ištar.

akkadian: a-šùr-mì-tí i-ša-qal igi ú-ṣur-ša-a-šùr igi sí-ki-le-i igi ir
english: in the presence of uṣur-ša-aššur, of sikile'i, and of wardum.

akkadian: ù me-er-e en-um-a-šùr a-na ma-mì šu-um-šu lá i-tù-wa-ar
english: month mahhur-ilī, eponymy after that of enna-suen s. of šu-aššur.

akkadian: da-šùr áš-lu-uṭ ší-tí hu-sà-ri-im i li-bi šu-ištar a-hu-ur
english: the rest of the lapis lazuli remains in šu-ištar's possession.

akkadian: igi a-šùr-ba-ni dumu kur-bi-a-a igi iš-me-dingir igi i-dí-ku-bi-im
english: witnessed by aššur-bāni son of kurbiya, by išme-ilum, by iddin-kūbum.

akkadian: kišib ṣí-lu-uš-da-gan kišib a-šùr-ba-ni dumu i-dí-a-bi-im kišib i-dí-a-bi-im dumu a-šùr-ba-ni 20 ma-na
english: seal of ṣilluš-dagān, seal of aššur-bāni son of iddin-abum, seal of iddin-abum son of aššur-bāni.

akkadian: a-mur-ištar ú ì-lí-áš-ra-ni sú-ub-ra-am iš-ú-mu-ma a-na du-ur-hu-mì-it i-ta-al-ku a-ma-kam lu-ba-li-ṭá-kum 5 ma-na
english: amur-ištar gave 5 minas of copper to the one who brought the textiles to marithum.

akkadian: lá-at-bi₄-a-ma lá-tal-kam ù a-dí ṭup-pì-im ša {d}utu-ba-ni a-dí ma-lá ù ší-ni-šu ni-gi₅-ri-ma ša ki-ma ku-a-tí ṭup-pá-am
english: also, with respect to šamaš-bāni's tablet we sued both once and twice, but your representatives refuse to give the tablet.

akkadian: kišib a-ku-za kišib la-li-im kišib šu-ku-bi-im dumu a-zu kišib a-šùr-i-mì-tí dumu i-ku-pì-ištar kišib i-tur₄-dingir dumu a-mur-ištar
english: sealed by akuza, by lalum, by šu-kūbum son of azu, by aššur-imittī son of ikūn-pi-ištar, by itūr-ilī son of amur-ištar.

akkadian: um-ma šu-lí-ma a-na sà-ak-ta-a qí-bi₄-ma a-hi a-ta e-eb-ri a-ta a-na a-mì-ú-tim
english: thus šuli, say to saktāya please, my brother, my friend, i do not look at the others there, i only look at you!

akkadian: ù kur-ub-ištar a-na ša-na-at i-ša-qal šu-ma i-na ma-lá u₄-me-šu lá iš-qúl
english: if he has not paid at the completion of his term, he will add interest in accordance with the rule of the colony.

akkadian: i-dí-a-šùr a-na ni-kà-sí kà-ší-id iš-tù 5 ša-na-tim a-na wa-ah-šu-ša-na ú dur₄-hu-mi-it
english: since five years we keep sending messages to him to wahšušana and durhumit, but until this very day he holds us in play.

akkadian: il₅-qé igi a-šùr-i-mì-tí dumu du-dí-ki igi en-na-sú-in igi a-šùr-e-mu-qí dumu i-ku-nim igi a-šùr-du₁₀ dumu en-na-sú-in dumu za-li-dí
english: witnessed by aššur-imittī son of dudiki, by enna-suen, by aššur-emūqī son of ikūnum, by aššur-ṭāb son of enna-suen, (grand)son of zalidī.

akkadian: igi puzur₄-a-na dumu i-dí-{d}im ni-kà-sú ša iš-ra-tim ša é kà-ri-im a-dí-ni ú-lá ša-sí-ú
english: the accounts concerning the tithe concerning the office of the colony have not yet been settled.

akkadian: a-ni-na igi sà-ak-li-a dumu na-áp-ra-kà igi puzur₄-a-šùr dumu ší-ik-tí-ha-šu-ut igi ili₅-ba-ni dumu a-mur-ištar
english: witnessed by sakliya son of napraka, by puzur-aššur son of šikti-hašut, by ilī-bāni son of amur-ištar.

akkadian: i-šu igi ku-li-a dumu a-lá-bi-im igi ur-ad-a-šur dumu diri-im igi a-šur-ma-lik dumu sá-ma
english: witnessed by kuliya son of ali-abum, by urad-aššur son of watrum, by aššur-malik son of samaya.

akkadian: a-mì-ú-tim a-ta-kà-al ki-ma a-na-ku a-na tí-ir-tí-kà na-hi-da-ku-ni ù a-ta a-na tí-ir-tí-a lá ta-hi-id
english: although i personally pay attention to your instructions, you have not paid attention to my instructions.

akkadian: mì-ma a-nim a-mur-ištar i-ra-dí-a-kum lu-qú-ut-kà ša-al-ma-at-ma iš-tí ma-sú-e ša ú-nu-ut-kà a-bu-kà-ni ša-lim-a-hu-um i-li-kam
english: your merchandise is safe, and šalim-ahum came with the leaders with whom i dispatched your goods.

akkadian: pì-lá-ah-ištar ù šu-be-lúm a-na um-mì-iš-ha-ra ù en-um-a-šur qá-sú-nu ik-bu-sú-ma
english: when ummī-išhara and ennam-aššur effectuate a clearance with the investors of their father elamma they will acquire their plot.

akkadian: li-li-a-ma a pá-ni-a šé-bi-lam a-hi a-ta a-lá-nu-kà a-ha-am ra-bi-am
english: my dear brother, apart from you i have no elder brother.

akkadian: il₅-qé igi i-lá-áš-ra-ni dumu sú-kà-li-a igi en-na-sú-in dumu i-dí-a-bi₄-im
english: witnessed by ilī-ašrannī son of sukkalliya, by enna-suen son of iddin-abum.

akkadian: li-li-kam-ma uz-ni pè-té šu-ma lá a-lá-hu-um dumu du-dí-ki ma-ma-an
english: they do not know anyone other than ali-ahum son of dudiki.

akkadian: ni-dí-in igi ú-ṣú-ra-nim dumu sá-li-a igi a-šùr-ták-lá-ku dumu a-šùr-mu-ta-bi-il₅
english: witnessed by uṣurānum son of salliya, by aššur-taklāku son of aššur-muttabbil.

akkadian: ú-kúl-tí-šu-nu a-dí-šu-nu-tí igi a-hu-qar dumu zu-ur-zu-ur igi a-šùr-ták-lá-ku dumu
english: witnessed by ahu-waqar son of zurzur, by aššur-taklāku son of qardum-adad.

akkadian: 16 ma-na kù ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er a-šùr-eš-tí-kál ù i-dí-a-bi₄-im i-sú-rik₁₃
english: aššuriš-tikal and iddin-abum owe 16 minas of refined silver to issu-arik.

akkadian: lá-qé 1 túg ku-ta-nam ša i-a-a a-mur-ša-ra-sà ub-lá-ma i-ri-šum
english: amur-šarrassa brought 1 -textile belonging to yaya and irišum received it.

akkadian: i-na li-bi-kà a-dí-i igi a-šur-gal dumu a-sú-a igi šu-sú-in a-hi-kà igi ša-lim-a-hi-im i-na é-tí-kà
english: witnessed by aššur-rabi son of asuwa, šu-suen, your brother, and šalim-ahum we settled accounts in your house.

akkadian: igi e-na-a-nim igi la-qé-pì-im a-na 11 túg ku-ta-ni a-mur-ištar ù a-la-hi-im a-na e-la-ma a-šùr-la-ma-sí
english: for 11 -textiles aššur-lamassī will confirm to elamma (the liability of) āmur-ištar and ali-ahum within 5 months.

akkadian: a-na a-lim{ki} ṭup-pá-am ša hu-bu-ul en-na-nim ku-nu-ki-a dumu
english: a tablet recording a debt of ennānum, with my seals, didiya's son has with him for you.

akkadian: a-dí-na-kum lá lá-mu-un a-na dingir-lim šu-a-tí ší-im-šu šé-bi₄-lam
english: the woven cloth of the lady i gave you is not bad! send its price to me.

akkadian: a-na itu-<gap>-kam i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl ki-ma a-wa-at
english: if he does not pay he will add interest in accordance with the rule of the .

akkadian: ša kà-ni-iš a-tù-nu ù da-ra-áš ší-ta-a-ma-ma pí-ri-kà-nu a-šar
english: as long as a has not entered, do not release a single shekel of silver to daraš.

akkadian: ší-bi-a ta-áš-ta-na-pá-ra-am tí-ir-ta-kà i-na ša-am-ší na-áš-pé-er-tí ta-ša-me-ú tí-ir-ta-kà
english: your message should - on the very day you hear my missive - your message should come.

akkadian: a be-ú-lá-tí-šu lá i-da-ra-kam lá ta-ga-ra-šu i-nu-mì lu-qú-tám
english: (if) for his working capital he does not do the packing you (plur.) must not hire him.

akkadian: né-mu-ur-ma lá-šu a-na a-šur-du₁₀ ni-iš-tap-ra-am té-er-tù-šu li-tù-ra-am-ma a-šar
english: when his message (telling) where it has been placed comes back we will send it to you.

akkadian: kišib a-šur-i-mì-tí dumu a-mur-lu-ṣú kišib a-bu-ša-lim dumu a-šùr-e-mu-qí a-na a-wa-tim
english: seal of aššur-imittī son of amur-luṣu, seal of abu-šalim son of aššur-emūqī.

akkadian: a-da-da gír ša a-šur iṣ-ba-at-ma i-sá-a dumu da-ga-ma-al-ki-im pì-šu iš-me
english: adada seized aššur's dagger and isaya son of dagan-malkum heard his statement.

akkadian: e-zi-ib 1 iš-tí-in e-li-tám ša ṣú-ba-tí ša e-zi-bu-šu-ni igi šu-ku-bi-im
english: apart from one single top-pack with textiles that he left with him.

akkadian: i-dí-šum igi en-na-sú-in dumu i-ku-a-a igi sà-li-a dumu i-dí-a-šur igi sig₅-pí-a-šur igi a-šur-na-da dumu en-nam-a-šur
english: witnessed by enna-suen son of ikuwaya, by salliya son of iddin-aššur, by damiq-pī-aššur, by aššur-nādā son of ennam-aššur.

akkadian: kà-ni-iš a-na ku-li-a ša-qí-il₅ da-tim ší-ip-ri-ni kà-ar kà-ar-ma a-le sú-kà-li-a dumu a-šùr-iš-tí-kál wa-áš-bu-ni ṣa-he-er gal
english: to kuliya, the-payer, our messenger, to every single, wherever sukkaliya, son of aššuriš-tikal is staying, small and big.

akkadian: igi a-šùr-i-mì-tí dumu du-dí-ki igi iš-me-dingir igi a-šùr-ba-ni igi en-na-sú-in igi a-šùr-e-mu-qí igi ah-ša-lim me-er-e-šu
english: witnessed by aššur-imittī son of dudiki, by išme-ilum, by aššur-bāni, by enna-suen, by aššur-emūqi, by ah-šalim his son.

akkadian: da-a-sú a-ša-qal šu-ma a-lá-kam lá i-mu-a a-pu-tum
english: if he refuses to come, then it is important that he does not cheat you.

akkadian: i-ba-a ú a-na ší-bi₄-kà kà-ra-am lá ša-a-lam
english: when ibaya's son arrives and they confront the city assembly, at that time demand terms.

akkadian: 1 gín a-na da-ra-áš lá tù-ša-ra pí-ri-kà-ni
english: also, i shall pay up the food of the slave-girls as a substitute for daraš.

akkadian: e-ra-ba-am ú-lá a-mu-a a-dí a-ší-im ša pá-kà
english: aluwa brings you every shekel of silver that i exhausted myself to make in šalatuwar.

akkadian: 1 túg a-ta tù-ma-li 1 túg ú-ṣú-ur-ša-ištar
english: i deposited a textile in the colonial office as your share, 1 textile lamassutum took.

akkadian: ša-bu-a-ku ù tí-ir-ta-kà li-li-kam-ma ṭup-pì-i le-ri-iš-ma lá-du-uk
english: also, send word and let me ask for my tablet so i can annul it.

akkadian: ú-šé-ṣa-am ṭup-pá-am šu-ma šu-a-tí na-áš-a-tù-nu a-lu-a iš-tí-ku-nu-ma
english: as for the tablet, if you bring it for him, aluwa shall return with you.

akkadian: a-šu-mì 2 túg ša ha-al-qú-ni a-na šu-ištar ù e-lá-li lá kà-áš-du
english: concerning 2 textiles that were lost they have not reached šu-ištar and elāli.

akkadian: túg sig₅ i-na ša šé-ep sú-kà-a iš-tí a-nu-pì-ištar ú a-hi-i-a šé-bi₄-lá-nim
english: send me 5 good textiles from sukaya's transport with anu-pī-ištar and my brother.

akkadian: ili₅-me-ta-ak i-na ku-bu-ur-na-at a-na ša-lim-wa-ar-dí i-ša-qal
english: he will pay to šalim-wardī in kuburnat.

akkadian: igi a-zu-na-a igi du₁₀-ṣí-li-a-šur a-na a-wa-tim
english: witnessed by šalim-ahum, by azunaya, by ṭāb-ṣill-aššur.

akkadian: li-bi₄ a-šur-sipa igi a-šur-dan igi ir-ma-a-šur
english: in the presence of aššur-dān, of ir'am-aššūr.

akkadian: li-bé-e da-da-a i-na kà-ni-iš i-ša-qal igi
english: witnessed by adad-bāni, by our own amur-ištar.

akkadian: šál-mì-šu-nu ra-ki-is igi du₁₀-a-šur igi šu-ištar
english: in the presence of ṭāb-aššur, of šu-ištar.

akkadian: a-lá-hi-im ip-qí-id igi a-šùr-ba-ni dumu ku-ta-a igi sig₅-pí-a-šùr dumu ìr-ad-ì-lí-šu dumu a-šùr-i-dí
english: witnessed by aššur-bāni son of kutaya, by damiq-pī-aššur son of warad-ilīšu, (grand)son of aššur-idī.

akkadian: lá ta-pá-tí-i ù li-ba-am ú-lá ta-dí-ni-im
english: as for me, apart from you, what sister and lady do i have?

akkadian: hu-sà-ru-ú ú-ta-ru-ú ša lá ú-ta-e-ru-ú i-ša-ri-iq-šu-um
english: he who does not return it will have it taken away by force.

akkadian: na-ru-qí-šu la-qé-ep lá-qá-am qá-bi-a-ku ṭup-pá-ak-nu ha-ar-ma-am
english: i have in my possession a valid record of yours (to that effect).

akkadian: ni-iš-ta-pár-šu-ma a-di u₄-mì-im a-nim i-ta-ba-al-ni-a-tí a-ma-kam
english: make him pay the silver over there his datum for a full share.

akkadian: e im-ra-aṣ a-bi-i a-ta be-lí a-ta
english: send me silver and let him be the messanger coming with that silver.

akkadian: qí-bi-ma a-pu-tum i-na ša-am-ší ṭup-pá-am ta-ša-me-ú
english: the very day you hear the letter you must set out and come.

akkadian: a-dí a-ma-kam wa-áš-ba-tí-ni sí-ku-šu kà-il₅ šu-ma
english: as long as you stay there you must hold him by his hem.

akkadian: li-li-kam a-zu u₄-ma-kál lá i-sà-hu-ur tí-ir-ta-kà
english: azu must not be delayed a single day! - your message should come!

akkadian: é-tám kà-ba-sà-am lá-ak-bu-us a-wa-tim a-ni-na i-de₈
english: if it is a matter of remitting the house, i shall do it!

akkadian: ší-ba-am a-na urudu ú hu-sà-ri-im mì-ma
english: do not in any way worry about the copper and the lapis lazuli.

akkadian: me-hi-ri-a ša-áš-qí-lá a ma-lá ší-im ṣú-ba-tí-a
english: if it is 0.5 shekel each, make him set it on a rider.

akkadian: a ṣé-er ṣú-ha-ar-tim ú é-be-tim e-ku-nu
english: please, my brothers, keep an eye on the girl and on the house.

akkadian: a-na u₄-mu-ú e-ṭá-ri-im eṭ-ra-ni gi-mì-lam i-ṣé-er
english: my dear brothers and lords, save me while i can still be saved.

akkadian: a-na dumu a-šùr ù dumu kà-né-eš
english: do not sell her to an assyrian or to a citizen of kanesh.

akkadian: ša-zu-úz-ta-kà ù a-na-ku ni-iṣ-ba-at 20 u₄-me-e
english: we set a term of 20 days for him to pay the silver.

akkadian: kù.babbar ša-áš-qí-li-šu šu-ma i-na-ki-ir-ki ší-bi a-na-ku
english: if he contests you, then i have witnesses for him.

akkadian: a-ni-ša-am a-ba-ra-im li-ik-šu-dam i-nu-mì an.na ù
english: it should reach me here before the suspension of traffic.

akkadian: {d}mar.tu-ba-ni i-ri-šu-um i-šu a-na pá-ha-ar ad-ri-im
english: he will pay at the gathering of the threshing floor.

akkadian: a-ṣé-ri-ni ú-šé-bi-lam wa-ar-kà-tám 18 ma-na kù.babbar
english: later the son of ṣallāmum produced 18 minas of silver.

akkadian: ta-ša-me-ú é.gal-lim-ku-nu áp-lá-ma ra-bi sí-ki-tim me-et
english: before the land has heard it your must withdraw yourselves.

akkadian: kù.babbar al-qé ih-da-ma ṣí-ib-tám i-ṣé-ri-a lá
english: take care that he should not take interest from me.

akkadian: 1 ma-na 10 gín kù.babbar i-ṣé-er
english: iddin-ištar owes 1 mina 10 shekels of silver to issu-arik.

akkadian: a-la-hi-im dí-na 4 ma-na an.na-ku-um ku-nu-ki-a
english: uku brings you 4 minas of tin under my seal.

akkadian: ú-ma-lá 2 gín kù.babbar lu-bu-šu il₅-qé
english: two shekels of silver, his clothing allowance, he has received.

akkadian: a-lá-hu-um i-šu iš-tù itu.1.kam hu-bu-ur a-na
english: reckoned from the month huburhe will pay in 2 months.

akkadian: šé-bi-lam ṣú-ha-ru-a ú-ma-kál lá i-bi₄-tù ṭur₄-da-šu-nu
english: my servants must not delay a single day, send them.

akkadian: im-ṭí 2.5 ma-na urudu sig₅ i
english: we did not give them anything for expenses and food.

akkadian: a-lim{ki} it-mu-ú itu.1.kam hu-bu-ur li-mu-um a-lá-hu-um
english: for this matter they swore the oath by the city.

akkadian: a-na šu-ku-bi-im ma-ma-an i-tù-a-ar ša-lim-a-šùr ú-ba-áb-šu
english: if anyone raises claim against šu-kūbum, šalim-aššur will clear him.

akkadian: a-dí an.na-ki-kà ú-ṣú-ur-ša-ištar áš-ta-pá-ar iš-tù za-al-pá
english: when they come back from zalpa, i shall send ali-ahum.

akkadian: kù.babbar-pì-kà 5 gín kù.babbar a-ma-kam lu
english: your servants there bring you both the and the wool.

akkadian: 1.5 ma-na urudu a-na qá-tí-šu-nu ú-ra-dí
english: i have added 1.5 mina of copper to their account.

akkadian: gín kù.babbar i-ṣé-er ga-lu ù ku-lu-ma-an
english: 18 shekels of silver galu and kuluman owe to peruwa.

akkadian: ra-bi₄-ṣí-im i-zi-iz-ma kù.babbar ša li-bi₄ a-hi-kà
english: come here yourselves and discuss about the testament concerning you.

akkadian: úz-ni pè-té šu-ma ú-šé-ri-bu-ni-šu-nu a ma-lá ú-ša-hi-zu-kà a-na kù.babbar
english: if they have brought them in, then convert them to silver as i instructed you.

akkadian: a-na ba-zi-a qí-bi₄-ma um-ma a-ru-na-ah-šu-ma a-le-e i-lu-ú ša i-ta-mu-ú-ni
english: say to baziya, thus arunahšu: where is the god by whom the oath was sworn?

akkadian: kù.babbar ga-me-er mì-ma a-nim a-dí a-wa-tim ša é a-bi-ni
english: all this i have paid in order to conclude the matter of our father's house.

akkadian: i-kà-ša-da-ni a-na-kam ú-ku-ul-tí anše.hi.a da-na-at i-hi-id-ma ṣú-ha-ri ṭur₄-da-ma ku-ṣú-um
english: take care to send me servants and the cold should not catch up with me.

akkadian: ma-na kù.babbar a-lá-hu-um lu-ra-dí-ú-ma kù.babbar dí-na-šu-nu-tí-ma a-na ma-lá ú-ša-hi-zu-šu-nu-ni
english: also, the 22 textiles that are with ali-ahum, i want them for my entrance gift.

akkadian: 2 dug gig ú 17 na-ru-uq 2 dug še-am
english: all the grain plus the silver from the natives my father had designated for me.

akkadian: a-bu-ni i-na bu-ul-ṭí-šu 9 túg.hi.a a-na be-et kà-ri-im na-dí
english: our father deposited 9 textiles at the office of the colony while he was alive.

akkadian: i-li-kam um-ma ší-it-ma a mì-nim ṭup-pá-am lá i-dí-na-kum a-ta
english: a letter of the girl here in which she wrote: 'why did you the tablet?

akkadian: en-na-sú-in i-šu iš-tù itu.kam hu-bu-ur li-mu-um šu-da-a dumu en-na-nim
english: from month vi, eponymy of šudaya, son of ennānum he will pay within 3 weeks.

akkadian: dumu šu-{d}en.líl-ma kù.babbar ša-bu-a-tí 2 ṭup-pé-e ha-ar-me-en ša hu-bu-lim
english: you have in your possession 2 certified tablets concerning the debt of my brother aššur-ṭāb.

akkadian: a-na té-er-tí-a ih-da ki-ma ša a-na-ku wa-áš-ba-ku-ni kù.babbar ša-qí-il₅
english: my dear brothers, pay attention to my instructions as if i was staying there myself.

akkadian: lá ú-kà-i-in kù.babbar 0.5 ma-na šu-li a-na e-lá-ma i-ša-qal
english: if he does not bring proof šuli will pay 0.5 mina of silver to elamma.

akkadian: u₄-mu-šu 1 itu.kam e-tí-qú 4 gú urudu ki a-šur-i-mì-tí
english: his terms are overdue by 1 month. 4 talents of copper is owed by aššur-imittī.

akkadian: ú-ṣa-áb 10 gín kù.babbar a-ha-ma i-na ku-bu-ur ú-ṭí-tí-im i-na
english: separately he will pay 10 shekels of silver in kanesh, when the barley is ripe.

akkadian: ma-na kù.babbar a-ha-ma ni-is-ha-sú diri ša-du-a-sú ša-bu ša dam.gàr
english: separately 5 minas of silver, its excise added, his transport fee paid, belonging to .

akkadian: ha-mu-uš-tám ú itu.1.kam wa-dí-a 0.3333 ma-na 7 gín kù.babbar
english: pay the 0.3333 mina 7 shekels of silver that i left with you to iddin-aššur.

akkadian: uk-ta-al šu-ma a-e-ša-ma ú-da-pí-ir 1 gín.ta i-na itu.1.kam i-ma-nu-šu
english: if he goes away to somewhere else, he will charge him 1 shekel per month.

akkadian: 0.6666 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am bé-ú-la-tim ša ir-ma-a-šùr a-šùr-gal ú-kà-al
english: 0.6666 mina of refined silver, the working capital of ir'am-aššur, aššur-rabi has in his possession.

akkadian: ku-nu-tí ú-qá-a ù anše.hi.a a-na ší-mì-im dí-na-ma ší-im anše.hi.a
english: also sell the donkeys and have the price of the donkeys be available in silver.

akkadian: šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 1.5 gín.ta a-na 1 ma-na-im i-na itu.1.kam ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
english: if he has not paid in time, he will add interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per mina per month.

akkadian: ku-nu-ki-a en-na-num na-ší kù.babbar i-na ma-na-i-šu áš-du a-na e-na-ah-dingir i-ta-ší-a-ma ṭup-pá-am ša
english: ašdu weighed the silver with his one-mina weight for enah-ilī so let him give you a tablet with my seal.

akkadian: 6 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am 6 gín ša-du-a-sú ša e-la-ma a-na puzur₄-a-na dumu
english: 6 minas of refined silver, 6 shekels his transport-fee, belonging to elamma i entrusted to puzur-anna, the son of aššur-dān.

akkadian: 3 gín kù.babbar i-ṣé-er tù-ur-ha-lá en-nam-a-šur i-šu-ú ù 30 ri-ik-sí ša qá-nu-we
english: turhala owes 3 shekels of silver to ennam-aššur, and he will add 30 large bundles of reeds within 5 days.

akkadian: 3.8333 ma-na 2 ma-na urudu a-na ṣú-ha-ri dí-na-ma a-na é ub-ri a-šar
english: give 2 minas of copper to the servants and let them bring it to the inn where the tin is.

akkadian: i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul a-na 1 ma-na-im 1.5 gín.ta i-na 1 itu.kam
english: if he has not paid (in time), he must pay interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per mina per month.

akkadian: ki-ma <gap>-dí-ú urudu i-ša-qal <gap> šu-ma lá ú-šé-bi₄-lam-ma ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám
english: if he has not sent it (in time), he will pay interest in accordance with the rule of the colony.

akkadian: a-bi₄-ì-lí ṣú-ha-ri-kà a-dí-na-kum i-na a-wi-tí-ni šu-ma kù.babbar-pì a-bi₄-dingir lá i-dí-nam 1 ma-na
english: according to our agreement, should abī-ilī not have given me my silver, you would give me 66 shekels of silver.

akkadian: i-ba-ší a-ma-kam ṭup-pì-a bí-ri-ma šu-ma ṭup-pu-um i-ba-ší en-um-a-šur kà-li-im-šu-ma ù iš-tí-kà-ma ṭup-pu-um li-bi₄-ší ú tí-ir-ta-ak-nu
english: look at my tablets there, and if the tablet is indeed there, show it to ennam-aššur and then let the tablet be in your possession.

akkadian: ú-bu-bu-ší ṭup-pá-am ša ší-im é-be-tí a-ni-ú-tim ša ku-nu-uk nu-a-im be-el é pá-nim a-šùr-du₁₀ a-na ša-lim-ma i-dí-in
english: the tablet recording the payment for this house with the seal of the anatolian who was the previous owner of the house, aššur-ṭāb has given to šalimma.

akkadian: ma-na pá-ni-am-ma iš-tí ba-tí-qí-im lá i-li-kà-ku-ni a-ta-ma tí-de₈-e ki-ma na-ru-qá-at me-ra a-šur šu-um-šu i-na i-dí-im a-mì-im
english: you know very well that they deal with any assyrian's joint-stock capital in that understanding, and that at least 10 minas of good silver results for them.

akkadian: qá-tám ni-iš-ku-un šu.nígin 1 gú kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am ku-nu-ki-ni šu-ištar na-áš-a-kum ša-du-a-at kù.babbar šu-ištar ša-bu-ú
english: in all, šu-ištar brings you 1 talent of refined silver under our seals. šu-ištar has been paid the transport tariff on the silver.

akkadian: {d}utu-ši ṭup-pì ta-ša-me-a-ni kù.babbar lu 5 gín ma-lá ta-le-e-a-ni gu₅-um-ra-ma géme li-it-ru-ni-ší kù.babbar ta-da-nam
english: the very day you hear my letter, spend some 5 shekels of silver, whatever you can, so they can bring the maid here.

akkadian: kù.babbar-áp-šu a-hu-ur ur-ha-am iš-té-en nu-na-pì-iš urudu-a-kà da-an-ma 0.5 ma-na 6.6666 gín kù.babbar ù 2.3333
english: your copper is safe(?) and we made your brother pay 0.5 mina 6.6666 shekels of silver and 2.3333 shekels of silver in interest.

akkadian: a-na a-lá-hi-im a-ni-na ú a-šur-ma-lik qí-bi-ma um-ma zu-ku-a-ma a-dí ma-lá ú ší-ni-šu tí-ir-tí i-li-kà-ku-nu-tí
english: to ali-ahum, annina and aššur-malik from zukuwa: once or twice i have sent word to you but you have not answered at all.

akkadian: a-bi-kà i kà-né-eš i-li-a-am a re-eš₁₅ ṭup-pí-im ša hu-bu-ul a-bi-kà ku-nu-uk a-bi-kà a-mu-ur-ma ù
english: inspect the seal of your father at the top of your father's debt-note and then pay the silver and the interest on it".

akkadian: an.na ša šé-ep i-ri-ší-im 2.3333 ma-na an.na i-na i-šé-ra-tim ša é a-lim{ki} i-tí-ra-ma ša-lim-a-šur
english: of the tin transported by irišum 2.3333 minas of tin from the of the city hall was in excess, and šalim-aššur took it.

akkadian: a-na a-lim{ki} al-kà-ma en-na-sú-in ù a-lá-hu-ma pí-šu-nu a-na a-lim{ki} li-ip-té-ú ki-ma kù.babbar ta-da-nam lá
english: go to the city there and let enna-suen and ali-ahum make a statement to the city, that he refuses to give the silver.

akkadian: a-ta šu-ma an.na ú-lá túg.hi.a tù-šé-li-am a-na en-um-a-šur dí-in-ma ku-un-kà-ma šé-bi-lá-nim a-ha-ma 6
english: my dear brother, if you have brought up tin or textiles, give them to ennam-aššur, seal them and send them to me.

akkadian: um-ma kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš-ma a-na ša-qí-il₅ da-tim ší-ip-ri-ni kà-ar kà-ar-ma ú wa-bar-ra-tim qí-bi₄-ma ṭup-pu-um
english: thus kanesh, say to the -payers, our messenger, every single colony, and the trading stations: a letter of the city has arrived.

akkadian: ša-áš-qí-lá-šu šu-ma kù.babbar lá iš-ta-qal a-ša-sú me-er-a-sú e-ru-ba-tù-a šé-ṣí-šu-nu-ma i be-tí-kà lu wa-áš-ba
english: if he has not paid the silver, take out his wife and daughter, my security, and let them stay in your house.

akkadian: dam.gàr i-šu iš-tù ha-muš-tim ša a-mur-a-šur itu.kam ša ke-na-tim li-mu-um ša qá-tí i-na-a
english: she will pay within a year, reckoning from the week eponymy of amur-aššur, month iii, year eponymy of the successor of innāya.

akkadian: iš-tù ha-muš-tim ša {d}mar.tu-ba-ni itu.1.kam ša sá-ra-tim a-na ṣí-ib-tim a-dí-na-kum-ma 0.8333 gín.ta i-na
english: you must pay interest at the rate of 0.8333 shekel per month per mina; eponymy ikūn-pi-ištar. 5(+x) weeks have passed for you.

akkadian: šu-ma i-na ma-lá u₄-me-šu la iš-qú-ul 1.5 gín.ta i itu.kam a-na ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb
english: if he has not paid within his stipulated term he must pay interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina.

akkadian: ha-mu-uš-tim ša i-lá-kà-ni kù.babbar-pí i-ša-qá-lam šu-ma lá iš-qú-lam 0.5 gín.ta i-na itu.kam-im ṣí-ib-tám
english: if he has not paid (in time) he will continue to add interest every month at the rate 0.5 shekel (per mina).

akkadian: šu-ut kù.babbar-áp a-bi₄-a iš-tù mu.30.šè i-ma-kàr kù.babbar ul i-šu-ú a-ma-kam li-mu-um i ša-ha-tí-ku-nu
english: it is he who manages my father's silver after 30 years, (yet) they do not have any silver (to show for it).

akkadian: li-il₅-qé a-hu-a-tù-nu a-ma-kam am-tám sà-ni-qá-ma ú sí-li-a-ší-ma um-ma a-tù-nu-ma a-na ṣé-er be-li-ki-i i-ra-de₈-ú-ki
english: may dear colleagues, keep the maid there under control and cheat her by telling her: 'one will conduct you to your lord.

akkadian: ú-šé-lá-am šu-ma a-dí ša-na-at ku-ta-na-am iš-tù a-lim{ki} ú-lá uš-té-li-am 10 gín kù.babbar a-na-kam
english: if he has not brought a up here from the city in one year, he must pay 10 shekels of silver here.

akkadian: a-ki-a ni-dí-in i-na kù.babbar ša tù-šé-bi-la-ni 1.25 gín kù.babbar al-qé 2.75 gín kù.babbar
english: of the silver you sent i took 1 1 / 4 shekels. ṭāb-ṣill-aššur brings you 2 3 / 4 shekels of silver.

akkadian: a-lim{ki} lu ni-li-ik ṭup-pá-am ša a-lim{ki} ú ra-bi-ṣa-am lá nu-na-ah lá ri-ig-ma-tù ší-bu-tù
english: let us not obstruct the tablet of the city and the attorney." this is not a formal lawsuit but a witnessed statement."

akkadian: i-dí-e a-hi a-ta ṣí-ba-at kù.babbar-pì-a ú-lá ha-áš-ha-ku qá-qá-ad kù.babbar-pì-a šé-bi₄-lam a-na-kam
english: my dear brother, i do not need the interest on my silver, send me (only) my silver capital.

akkadian: ša en-na-sú-in dumu ku-ra-ra a-na 7 ha-am-ša-tim kù.babbar i-ša-qal šu-ma i-na
english: reckoned from the week of enna-suen son of kurara he will pay back the silver in 7 weeks.

akkadian: ha-bu-lu a-na ša-pár-tim ú-kà-al be-lí a-ta kù.babbar a-na šu-a-šùr šu-qú-ul-ma ṭup-pì
english: my dear lord, pay the silver to šu-aššur, get out my tablet and let it be with you.

akkadian: bi-lá-a šu.nígin 11 i-lá-tum 13 gú urudu ma-sí-um ša-pí-ik-ma ku-nu-ki-ša a-na-a-na
english: the washed copper had been packed, and my maid anna-anna entrusted it to you (fem.) under her seal.

akkadian: túg sig₅ a-lu-a na-áš-a-ku-nu-tí a-ma-kam iš-tí ší-im an.na-ki-a kù.babbar šé-bi₄-lá-ni-ma gi-im-lá-ni
english: there you should send me silver together with the proceeds from my tin, thus doing me a favour.

akkadian: šé-ṣí-a-ma li-qí-a ú a-ṣé-er ša kù.gi ṭí-ih-a-ma ú šu-ma i-na ba-áb-tí-a
english: moreover, if you have collected anything of my outstanding claims, buy for itiles and send them to me.

akkadian: ṭup-pu-um ša 0.3333 ma-na kù.babbar ša hu-bu-ul a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku ša e-li-a-ni sá-ar
english: the tablet recording a debt of 0.3333 mina of silver owed by aššur-taklāku which turns up is invalid.

akkadian: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni
english: that remains." the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: lá ṣú-ha-ru-kà a-dí e-tí-i ha-ra-nim ṣú-ba-tí-a ú-za-kà-ma kù.babbar-áp-kà a ni-ir-tí-kà ú-qá-ra-áb
english: when the road (opens) i shall clear my textiles and have your silver delivered directly to your person.

akkadian: itu.kam i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
english: if he does not pay, he will add interest in accordance with the regulation of the colony.

akkadian: ik-ri ú-lá kà-i-na-ni ṭup-pá-am ha-ar-ma-am ú-kà-al um-ma ì-lí-uṣ-ra-ni-ma ke-na 2
english: i have a certified tablet." ilī-uṣrannī answered: "yes, i owe you 2 minas 10 shekels of silver.

akkadian: ù té-er-ta-kà le-zi-ba-am a-dí an.na ša ta-dí-nu-ni-ma 27 ma-na an.na
english: give the bundle to ennam-aššur there and then let him leave a message from you for me.

akkadian: um-ma i-ku-pì-a-ma a-na en-nam-a-šùr qí-bi₄-ma šu-ma a-ni-ša-am ha-ra-kà al-kam-ma lu
english: from ikūn-pīya to ennam-aššur: if your journey takes you here, then come and let us clear accounts.

akkadian: šà.ba ab-num ša é kà-ri-im šu.nígin 0.8333 ma-na 8.25 gín
english: in all, 0.8333 mina 8 1 / 4 shekels of silver he transferred to the agreed amount.

akkadian: qí-bi₄-ma um-ma puzur₄-a-šur-ma la-a aq-bi₄-a-ku-um um-ma a-na-ku-ma 2 ú-me-e la
english: to uku from puzur-aššur: have i not told you as follows: 'do not delay by two days.

akkadian: i-a-tí qí-bi-ma šu-ma ší-ma-am i-da-na-ku-nu-tí la ta-ma-ha-ra-šu ù tí-ir-ta-ku-nu li-li-kam
english: to my representatives: if he gives you purchased goods, do not receive them but send me word.

akkadian: a-na-kam a-na an.na ša kù.babbar 1 ma-na ú-šé-lá-šu-um
english: i shall realise every mina of silver on the tin here for him.

akkadian: a-ma-kam šu-ma i-iš-hi-li túg.hi.a e-ri-iš-ku-nu mì-ma túg.hi.a lá
english: if išhili asks you for textiles there do not give him any textiles.

akkadian: i-dí-na a-pu-tum šu-uq-lu-um lá i-pá-ṭá-ar a-pu-tum kù.babbar a-na
english: urgent, the packet is not to be opened, urgent, send silver to me.

akkadian: an.na-ak qá-tim gám-ru 8.5 ma-na 0.6666 gín an.na
english: separately aššur-ṣulūlī took 5 11 / 12 shekels of silver as his one-third-share.

akkadian: i-šu iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša kà-ší-im <gap> a-na 13
english: reckoned from the week of the kaššum he must pay within 13 weeks.

akkadian: na-al-pu-ta-ku a-ma-kam a-šùr-ma-lik i-na ša-ha-tí-kà li-zi-iz-ma ṣa-áb-ta-ṣú-ma kù.babbar
english: have aššur-malik assist you there, seize him and make him pay the silver.

akkadian: na-ší ú kù.babbar-áp-kà ú-šé-ba-lá-ku ú kù.babbar 1 gín
english: moreover, i will send to you, to nenassa every (possible) shekel of silver'.

akkadian: 14.3333 ma-na lá 0.3333 gín kù.babbar e-lá-ma is-ni-iq-ni-a-tí
english: in all 14 minas 19.6666 shekels of silver elamma weighed out to us.

akkadian: kù.babbar a-ni-na ú e-ni-iš-ta-ru-um ub-lá-ku-nu-tí kù.babbar ša tù-šé-bi-lá-ni
english: the silver you sent me i have paid to cover my balance payments.

akkadian: a-ma-kam ša-li-ší a-we-lam ší-it tí-de₈-e ša kù.babbar ub-lá-ni
english: ask the maid there if she knows the man who brought the silver.

akkadian: é e-ri-šu-<gap> lá e-ra-ba-am <gap> ù i-na a-lá-ki-a
english: also, when i come i shall return your grain to you (fem. pl.).

akkadian: pá-ni-tim ší-ma-am pá-ah-ra-am ša-ma-nim lu-qú-tum <gap> lu ša-al-ṭá-at
english: as for your donkeys, do not worry over a single shekel of silver.

akkadian: ha-ra-an sú-qá-ni-ma i-ša-lá-ah a-ba-ú-a bé-lu-a a-tù-nu šu-ma a-ma-kam a-wa-at kà-ri-im ù e-kál-lim da-na-ma lu-qú-tum a-mì-ša-am lá
english: my dear fathers, if the orders of the colony and the palace are strict there, then we shall not let the goods enter for that destination.

akkadian: qá-at-ku-nu é kà-ri-im al-qé a-hu-a a-tù-nu a-na urudu ša um-me-an a-bi-ku-nu a-pu-lu a-ma-kam ih-da-ma um-me-a-ni ṭá-i-ba-ma
english: my dear brothers, take care to satisfy the investors there for the copper that i have balanced with the investors of your father, and withdraw mine.

akkadian: kišib šu-{d}en.líl dumu šu-ku-bi-im kišib ṣí-lu-lu dumu
english: seal of šu-illil son of šu-kūbum, seal of ṣilūlu son of uku.

akkadian: a-ma-kam kù.babbar ú ší-a-ma-tí-šu a-na en-um-a-šur šu-qúl
english: pay the silver or the goods bought with it there to ennam-aššur.

akkadian: an.na-ki 1 gú 55 ma-na ù ší-im
english: also, as for the rest of your textiles, leave them for dan-aššur.

akkadian: a-šur ú-ba-al-šu a-na hu-bu-ul en-um-a-šur a-na dam.gàr
english: he will pay it for the debt of ennam-aššur to the creditor.

akkadian: du₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šùr na-áš-a-kum a-hi a-ta té-er-ta-kà a-ni-tum lá
english: please my brother, send me a message telling me yes or no.

akkadian: tal-qé 2 gú an.na ku-nu-ku ša a-lim{ki}
english: one packet they detained in the colonial office because of the import-tax.

akkadian: kišib ú-ra-a-a dumu ma-na-na kišib {d}mar.tu-ba-ni dumu
english: seal of uraya son of manana, seal of amurrum-bāni son of manana.

akkadian: bu-la-lí e-lá-ma i-šu iš-tù itu.kam áb-ša-ra-ni li-mì-im
english: from month v?, eponymy of šu-hubur? he will pay within 3 months.

akkadian: ig-ri-šu-nu aq-bi-šu-nu an.na li-dí-nu-ni-ku-nu-tí-ma ú kù.babbar dí-na-šu-nu-tí
english: when they give you the tin, you then give them the silver.

akkadian: kù.babbar mì-ma lá tù-šé-ba-al-šu-um ší-ma-am ša-a-ma a-na
english: make purchases and give them to šamaš-ennam so he may bring it.

akkadian: um-me-a-nu ša a-bi₄-ni i-ṣa-áb-tù ù sí-ki-ni ú-kà-lu
english: we said: apart from this copper our father left no other assets.

akkadian: um-ma a-kà-dí-a-ma a-na a-šur-ma-lik qí-bi₄-ma mì-šu ša
english: from akkadiya to aššur-malik: why have you taken a wife in marriage?

akkadian: šu-{d}en.líl i-šu iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša li-ba-a a-na
english: reckoned from the week of libbaya he must pay in 13 weeks.

akkadian: 1 ma-na 2 gín an.na šu-ku-bu-um ih-bu-lam
english: for 1 mina 2 shekels of tin šu-kūbum became indebted to me.

akkadian: ku-a-tí a-wa-tum ša um-me-an a-bi₄-šu-nu ga-am-ra-at kù.babbar
english: the matter of the investors of their father has been cleared up.

akkadian: lá i-li-kam a-hi a-ta kù.babbar ša-áš-qí-il₅-šu-nu-ma ù
english: my dear brother, make them pay the silver and send me word.

akkadian: ha-nu-nu ṣa-áb-ta-ma 1 ma-na 1 gín kù.babbar
english: seize hanunu and have him pay 1 mina 1 shekel of silver.

akkadian: kù.babbar ni-iš-qú-ul i-hi-id-ma kù.babbar a-na ṣí-ib-tim i-lá-ak
english: realize well that the silver is interest bearing, so send the silver.

akkadian: urudu sig₅ ú 1 gú lu-lu-um sig₅-pí-a-šur
english: we checked the copper, and one mina was missing on each talent.

akkadian: 0.3333 ma-na 3 gín kù.babbar a-na sú-sá-a
english: 43 shekels of silver i paid to susāya on behalf of āl-ṭāb.

akkadian: ma-li-a-šu-nu šu-ma lá-šu anše.hi.a a-na 0.5 ma-na.ta
english: if he is not there (sell) the donkeys for 0.5 mina each.

akkadian: ah-mu-úṣ-ma a-dí-na-kum iš-tí pá-ni-im-ma a-li-ki-im kù.babbar dí-in-ma
english: provide silver and let one bring it me with the first caravan.

akkadian: lá ta-bi-tá urudu 1 gín ba-áb-tám lá
english: do not acquire an outstanding claim of a single shekel of copper!

akkadian: ma-na a qá-tí-šu ni-dí-in ší-tí kù.babbar-pì-kà 1 ma-na 6 gín kù.babbar ku-nu-ki-ni ha-nu na-áš-a-kum
english: we gave 4 minas for his expenses. hanu brings you the rest of you silver, 1 mina 6 shekels of silver under our seals.

akkadian: ha-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma i-na u₄-me-šu ma-al-ú-tim la iš-qú-ul 1.5 gín.ta i itu.kam a-na ma-na-im
english: if he has not paid before the completion of his term, he must pay interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina.

akkadian: ha-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma i-na ma-la u₄-me-šu lá eš-qú-ul 1.5 gín.ta i-na itu.kam a-na 1
english: if he has not paid at the completion of his term, he must pay interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina.

akkadian: šu-ma ṣí-ib-tám ša lá-qá-im il₅-qé 5 gín kù.babbar i li-bi₄ lu-lu i-šu šà.ba dí-na-šu-um
english: if he takes interest as he can, i have 5 shekels of silver owed by lulu; give (the interest) to him out of that.

akkadian: e-tí-iq ší-tí kù.babbar-pí-kà ša li-bi šu-ki-tim nu-ša-áš-qá-al-šu-ma iš-tí ší-im pí-ri-kà-ni-kà nu-šé-ba-lá-kum a-na a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma
english: we shall make šukkutum pay the rest of your silver owed by him and send it to you with the proceeds from your pirikannus.

akkadian: áp-qí-id kù.babbar a-na ṣé-er ša-lim-a-šùr ù dam.gàr ku-nu-ki-a ú-šé-bi-il₅-šu ša-du-a-at kù.babbar a-nim šu-ištar ša-bu-ú
english: i sent the silver under my seal with him to šalim-aššur and the merchant. šu-ištar has been paid the transport tariff for this silver.

akkadian: um-ma i-dí-a-bu-um-ma a-na en-um-a-šur ù a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma a-na-kam 3 gú 55 ma-na urudu ṣa-lá-ma-am
english: from iddin-abum to ennam-aššur and alāhum: here i have taken 3 talents 55 minas of black copper on your account in the colony office.

akkadian: dumu a-ta-a 0.6666 ma-na.ta i-na ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl 1.5 gín.ta ṣí-ib-tám a-na
english: he will pay 0.6666 mina per year; if he does not pay he will add an interest of 1.5 shekel per mina per month.

akkadian: iš-tù 4 ša-na-tim ṣí-ib-tám ù-ṣa-áb lu a-we-el-tum kù.babbar tal-qé lu en-nam-a-šur il₅-qí-i qá-qá-ad kù.babbar
english: whether the lady has received it or ennam-aššur has received it, take the capital sum from the man, for the lady is tied down.

akkadian: a-wa-tí-ni ší-a-ma-at a-lim{ki} lu 1 ma-na-um 0.6666 ma-na lu 1 ma-na-um 0.5 ma-na a-na
english: according to our agreement you will give from the purchase in the city either 0.6666 mina or 0.5 mina per mina to the merchant.

akkadian: šu-{d}en.líl ša ni-iš-pu-ra-ku-ni 3 ma-na kù.babbar šu-{d}en.líl dumu ma-nu-ki-a-šur e-pu-ul-ni-a-tí iš-tù ša-lim-wa-ar-dim i-li-kà-ni
english: with respect to šu-illil about whom we wrote to you, šu-illil son of mannum-kī-aššur promised 3 minas of silver to us.

akkadian: i-na pá-ni-a iṣ-ba-at a-na i-iš-ta-ku-ša-ar qí-bi-ma 5 pí-ri-kà-ni ša a ta-ad-mì-iq-tim ta-dí-ni-šu-ni ṣa-áb-tí-šu-ma
english: to ištakušar: seize him concerning the 5 that you gave him as an interest-free loan and make him pay the silver.

akkadian: šu-ma ma-ma-an i-tù-ra-am um-ma šu-ut-ma am-tum i-a-tum du-šu-ba ú šu-ni-il₅-ga ú é-sú-nu a-da-ga-al
english: if anybody vindicates her, saying: "the slave-girl is mine!" then i have a claim on dušuba and šunilga and their house.

akkadian: a-na a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma um-ma zu-ku-a-ma a-hi a-ta eb-ri a-ta ú a-ta ki-ma a-hi-ú-tim
english: to ali-ahum from zukuwa: althought you are my brother and friend, as if we were strangers you do not inform me.

akkadian: 15 ma-na kù.babbar ni-is-ha-sú diri ša-du-a-sú ša-bu ku-nu-ki-a a-na {d}iškur-pì-lá-ah dumu a-ni-nim áp-qí-id
english: 15 shekels of silver its excise added, his transport fee paid, under my seal i entrusted to adad-pilah, son of anīnum.

akkadian: 30 ma-na iš-tí a-lá-hi-im ni-il₅-qé-ma 1.6666 ma-na kù.babbar ṣí-ib-tám nu-ṣí-ib ší-tí kù.babbar-pì-kà 8.6666
english: thereof (we paid) 30 minas we had borrowed from ali-ahum and we added to it 1.6666 mina of silver as interest.

akkadian: a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš <gap> i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šùr ṭup-pá-am ša ší-bu-tí-ni
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave a tablet with our testimony before the dagger of aššur.

akkadian: ku-un-kà ú ri-ik-sú-um i-na ku-nu-ki-a a-dí tí-ir-tí i-lá-kà-ni a-šar a-lá-hi-im li-ib-ší a-šu-mì kù.babbar
english: five times i have sent word to you concerning iddin-aššur's silver, but you have written nothing to me to inform me.

akkadian: kù.babbar a-na en-um-a-šùr šu-qúl-ma ù ṭup-pá-am ša ku-nu-ki-šu li-dí-na-kum a ša ki-ma a-na
english: then let him give you a tablet with his seal to the effect that i shall not raise claim against kulma-kulma.

akkadian: ṭup-pá-kà iš-tí ah-ša-lim le-qé šu-ma urudu lá ta-kà-ša-ad 1 gú urudu sig₅ šu-qú-ul-ma ta-ah-sí-is-tám pá-tí-tám id-a-ma i-na hu-bu-li-kà
english: if you do not acquire enough copper, then pay 1 talent of good copper and set down in an open memorandum that it will be deducted from your debt.

akkadian: ša-áp-tum i-a-tù-ni ší-be šu-uk-na ù ša-áp-tám a-na ša-lim-wa-ar-dí ù ma-nu-ki-ì-lí-a sà-ni-qá-ma ma-lá ša-áp-tám i-za-ku-a-ni ší-bé-e šu-uk-na-šu-nu-tí ki-ma ša-áp-tum
english: also, check the wool for šalim-wardī and mannum-kī-iliya, and set witnesses for them about how much wool is cleared, stating that the wool and 7 donkeys belong to ennam-aššur.

akkadian: kišib ku-la a-hu-ú šu-ku-tim kišib puzur₄-tí-a-am-tim dumu ištar-pá-li-il₅ kišib en-um-a-šur dumu kà-ri-a kišib en-na-sú-in dumu i-dí-a-bi-im kišib a-nu-li
english: seal of kula brother of šukkutum, seal of puzur-ti'amtum son of ištar-pālil, seal of ennam-aššur son of karria, seal of enna-suen son of iddin-abum, seal of anuli his brother.

akkadian: sig₅ lu wa-at-ru-ma kù.babbar 1 gín.ta lá ta-be-e-lá-a ša-ma-nim šu-ma ší-mu-um
english: buy today for every shekel of silver that results either or (a textile) with a shining face or tin.

akkadian: i-ta-bu-lu-kà kù.babbar 10 gín lu a-na anše.hi.a lu a-na hi-ša-nim gu₅-mu-ur-ma
english: agree to some 10 shekels of silver either for donkeys or for a pole and set out and come.

akkadian: lá iš-qú-ul a-na 10 ma-na-e 1 ma-na.ta i-na itu.kam ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
english: if he has not paid he will pay interest at the rate 1 mina per 10 minas per month.

akkadian: i-na u₄-mì-im ša ra-bi₄-iṣ-ku-nu e-ra-ba-ni itu.1.kam iš-tí-in ra-mì-ni lu-za-ki-ma lá-li-kam-ma e-né-ku-nu
english: the very day your attorney arrives, i shall clear myself within a month and come to see your eyes.

akkadian: 12 ha-am-ša-tim e-tí-qú a-hi a-ta kù.babbar ú ṣi-ba-sú šu-qú-ul-ma a-na té-er-tí-a
english: please, my brother, pay the silver and its interest and let them give it to where i will instruct'.

akkadian: 1.5 ma-na 2 gín i ṭup-pì-im lá-pì-it 1.8333 ma-na a qá-tí-a
english: for 1 mina 32 shekels he has been registered on the tablet. 1.8333 mina you deposited as my share.

akkadian: 1 ma-na 6 gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er e-la-ma im-dí-dingir i-šu itu.kam
english: 1 mina 6 shekels of refined silver elamma owes to imdī-ilim, month ix eponymy of šudāya, son of ennānum.

akkadian: i-ša-qú-lu šu-ma lá iš-qú-lu ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣú-bu itu.kam a-lá-na-tim
english: if they have not paid (in time) they are to add interest according to the rule of the colony.

akkadian: ša sú-en₆-na-da il₅-qé-ú-ni 3 ma-na kù.babbar ša dam.gàr ku-nu-ku-a a-na ṣé-er
english: with 3 minas of silver of the trader, under my seals, i sent ellil-bāni, son of hannānum, to aššur-rabi.

akkadian: ku-wa-tí lí-ib-ší šu-ma ma-ma-an a-na kù.babbar ṣa-ba-tim ir-ta-ag-ma-kum kù.babbar kù.babbar kà-ri-im
english: should anybody raise a claim against you in order to seize that silver, the silver belongs to the colony.

akkadian: a-dí-in-ma pu-úz-ra-am i ṣa-at a-ma-kam ṣa-ba-sú-ma 2.5 ma-na.ta a kù.babbar ṣa-ba-at-ma
english: seize him there and take hold of 2.5 minas of silver (per talent) and make him pay the silver.

akkadian: um-ma zu-ku-a-ma mì-šu ša a-dí 5 ha-am-ší-šu áš-pu-ra-ni-ma úz-ni lá ta-pá-tí
english: to ali-ahum from zukuwa: why is it that i have written five times but you do not inform me?

akkadian: a-tù-nu kù.babbar ší-im a-ni-ki-a ša e-ni-iš-ta-ru-um ub-lá-ku-nu-tí-ni a-na pá-ni-a šé-bi₄-lá-nim e-ni-iš-ta-ra-am
english: my dear brothers, send me the silver that was the proceeds of my tin which eništārum brought to you.

akkadian: a-lu-wa-ma a-na áš-li-ki-im a-na e-pu-ší-im a-dí-šu-nu ma-lá ú-ṭá-tám a-na a-we-el-tim ta-dí-nu šu-up-ra-am 4 na-ru-uq lu
english: write how much grain you have given to the lady. 4 sacks should be in her possession, so send me word for there is no silver.

akkadian: ni-im-lik-ma lu né-pu-us a-hu-a a-tù-nu a-na-ku a-na ma-nim ú a-tù-nu a-na ma-nim i-šu-ma ku-nu-um ha-bu-lá-ku
english: my dear brothers, to whom can i turn and to whom can you, for it is your property that i owe - it is indeed yours!

akkadian: 10 gín kù.babbar a-na qá-tí-šu lá ta-be-i-il₅ dí-šu-um 15 ma-na
english: do not deny him 10 shekels of silver for his expenses - give it to him.

akkadian: ma-na 7 gín an.na ku-nu-ki-ni i-na 25 túg šu-ru-tim 2.5
english: the rest of the tin is 53 minas and 47 shekels, of tin under our seal.

akkadian: lá té-zi-ba-am a-hi a-ta i-hi-id ì.giš ú urudu lá té-zi-ba-am
english: please, my brother, take care not to leave the oil and the copper behind for me!

akkadian: lu-lá-hi-pu-šu-ma túg.hi.a a li-tab-ší-a a-hi ki-ma ta-áš-li-mu šu-lu-um-kà ṣú-ha-ri anše.hi.a
english: my dear brother, when you have come safely to kuburnat send me greetings with enah-ilī's servant.

akkadian: bé-ú-lá-at ha-al-gi-a-šu a-šur-i-mì-tí il₅-qé ma-lá ṣú-ba-tí ù an.na a-na ra-mì-ni-šu
english: clear what textiles and tin he brings on his own and let it remain with him.

akkadian: i-ša-qú-lu šu-ma lá iš-qú-lu 1.5 gín.ta a-na 1 ma-na-im i-na
english: if they fail to pay they will add 1.5 shekel per mina per month as interest.

akkadian: 1.5 gín.ta i-na itu.kam-im a-na 1 ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb itu.kam ṣí-ip-im
english: from the week of amriya and ikūnum he will add 1.5 shekel per mina per month.

akkadian: ub-lá-ni a ma-lá ṭup-pì-šu ú-sà-ni-iq-šu-ma bi₄-il₅-tum 2.5 ma-na im-ṭí i-na
english: i checked it in accordance with his letter, and 2.5 minas were missing on each talent.

akkadian: wa-ta-ar ku-nu-ku-kà i-na kù.babbar a-ni-im ša 3 ša-na-at ni-ba-kam áš-qúl
english: under your seal we shall despatch (it) out of this silver from (the last) three years.

akkadian: ša-áš-qí-lá-šu šu-ma kù.babbar lá-šu i-na ṣú-ba-tí qá-at-ku-nu lu-ša-áš-ki-ku-nu a-ba-ú-a a-tù-nu
english: if there is no silver, then i will let you make a claim to the textiles.

akkadian: a-dí a-lu-ku-ni-ma ṣú-ba-tí-a ú-za-kà-ni ú iš-tí a-we-el-tim a-za-zu-ma ù kù.babbar-áp-kà a ni-ir-tí-kà ú-qá-ra-áb a-dí-i kù.babbar-pì-im
english: before i leave and clear my textiles and also stand by the lady, then i shall have your silver delivered directly to your person.

akkadian: ha-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma i-na u₄-me-šu ma-al-ú-tim lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im i itu.kam ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
english: if he does not pay when his term is over he will add interest per month in accordance with the regulation of the colony.

akkadian: um-ma kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš-ma a-na kà-ar kà-ar-ma ú wa-bar-ra-tim a-dí tù-ùh-pí-a qí-bi-ma ku-li-a ší-pár-ni a-na ta-ʾi-tim
english: thus kanesh, say to every single colony and the trading stations until tuhpiya as follows: kuliya, our messanger, has been sent to transmit instructions.

akkadian: a-ṣé-er en-na-sú-in šu-up-ra-ma li-tal-kam šu-ma dam.gàr-šu ma-ma-an ú-kà-al-šu kù.babbar a-na dumu um-me-a-nim ke-nim li-ip-qí-id-ma lu-šé-bi-lam
english: if any of his creditors holds him back, then let him entrust the silver to a trustworthy affiliated trader and send it to me.

akkadian: ší-tí kù.babbar 58.5 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pu-um a-na i-ku-pí-a qí-bi-ma kù.babbar lu-ṣa-ri-ip-ma i-na a-ba-an dam.gàr-ri-im lu-sà-ni-iq-ma
english: also, set witnesses for him, confirming that the silver passes overland in šalim-aššur's name. šalim-aššur must contribute the transport tariff and the import duty.

akkadian: a-na qá-tí-šu 4.5 gín kù.babbar a sà-ha-ar-tí-šu 5.3333 ma-na an.na ga-am-ri-šu ni-dí-in mì-ma a-nim a-na
english: of that we gave 100 nails for his disposal, 4.5 shekels of silver for his small goods, 5.3333 minas of tin for his expenses.

akkadian: a-hu-a a-tù-nu i-ih-da-ma lu ší-im ṣú-ba-tí-a lu ša a-mur-ištar kù.babbar ku-un-kà-ma šé-bi₄-lá-nim a-na a-dí-da qí-bi-ma
english: my dear brothers, take care to seal both the proceeds from my textiles and those of amur-ištar in silver and send it to me.

akkadian: wa-áš-ba-ku a-dí ú-nu-tám ú-ša-lu-hu a-pu-tum a-dí a-lá-ki-a kù.babbar 1 ma-na pá-hi-ra-ma i-na é-tí-a li-ib-ší kù.babbar
english: before i take away my goods - urgent! - before i arrive, collect every mina of silver and let it be in my house.

akkadian: kù.babbar-áp-šu 11.3333 ma-na 2.5 gín šà.ba 10 gín kù.babbar a-na ša ma-e-im ni-dí-in 11 ma-na
english: of that we gave 10 shekels of silver for the 'water-man'. šu-hubur brings 11 minas 12.5 shekels of silver under our seals to you.

akkadian: a-lim{ki} lu ni-lik lá tù-na-ha-ni lá ri-ig-ma-tum ší-bu-tum
english: do not obstruct me." this is not a formal lawsuit but a witnessed questioning.

akkadian: šu.nígin 24 ma-na 10.8333 gín iš-tù 16.8333 ma-na
english: for the 2.5 textiles which the palace took, aššur-ṣulūlī received 0.5 mina of silver.

akkadian: um-ma šu-ku-bu-um a-na a-šùr-du₁₀ qí-bi₄-ma mì-šu ša a-dí
english: thus šu-kūbum, say to aššur-ṭāb: why do you keep writing me about the silver?

akkadian: dí-na a-na a-ki-a 0.3333 ma-na kù.babbar a-na be-a-lim
english: i promised to give 0.3333 mina of silver as a working capital to akiya.

akkadian: šu-a-tí a-na é li-mì-im dí-ni kù.babbar a-ni-um é
english: give that silver to the office of the this silver was in elamma's house.

akkadian: ú-ku-ú na-áš-a-ku-nu-tí an.na-kam a-na ší-mì-im dí-na-ma šu-ma e-ma-ra-am
english: sell the tin and buy him a donkey if he has asked for one.

akkadian: a-hu-wa-qar na-áš-a-kum a-ma-kam kù.babbar li-iš-qú-lá-ku-ma ú ṭup-pá-áš-nu dí-in
english: have them pay the silver there to you and then give them their tablet.

akkadian: šu-ma kur-ub-sú-in a-na a-al-du₁₀ i-tù-wa-ar pì-lá-ah-ištar ú-ba-áb-šu kù.babbar
english: if kurub-suen raises a claim (for it) for against al-ṭāb, pilah-ištar will clear him.

akkadian: a-nim kù.babbar ú ṣí-ba-sú a-<gap>-ta kù.babbar ku-un-kà-ma a-ṣé-er
english: make the silver arrive in 10 days so we can gladden our father's spirit.

akkadian: i-šu iš-tù itu.kam kà-an-wa-ar-ta li-mì-im a-ku-tim a-na itu.5.kam
english: reckoned from month x, eponymy year of akūtum, he will pay within 5 months.

akkadian: urudu i-ṣé-er puzur₄-{d}en.zu e-lá-ma i-šu i-na ad-ri-im i-ša-qal
english: at the time of the threshing he will weigh out pure copper of tappašatta.

akkadian: a-šar ša-ṣú-ru-ú šu-uk-na a-hu-ú-a a-tù-nu túg-ba-tí-a dí-na-ma kù.babbar
english: my dear brothers, sell my textiles so that the silver is ready for me.

akkadian: ší-a-ma-tim a-na síg.hi.a ša-a-mì-im ša-lim-a-ar-dí ù e-ni-ša-ru-um ub-lu-nim
english: pay close attention and seize the donkeys and his goods there when they leave.

akkadian: a ší-tí kù.babbar-pí-a pì-ri-kà-ni na-ar-bu-tim wa-as-mu-tim ša-ma-ma li-ib-ší
english: buy, soft and pleasant, for the rest of my silver and let them be.

akkadian: 5 gín kù.babbar a-na lu-bu-ší-ša ù ep-ri-ša a-na
english: give regularly 5 shekels of silver for her clothes and her provisions to mula.

akkadian: i-ší-qí-il₅ 10 ma-na-um áb-num ša ú-ša-qí-lu 0.3333 ma-na
english: the 10 mina weighing stone by which he weighed was 0.3333 mina too large.

akkadian: i ša-ha-tí-šu ta zi-iz lá ta-zi-iz ú-lá ik-ri ú-lá kà-i-ni um-ma ì-lí-uṣ-ra-ni-ma
english: deny or confirm that to me!" ilī-uṣrannī said: "and if i did assist, will you then sue me for the testimony?

akkadian: 16 ma-na kù.babbar en-nam-a-šur il₅-qé-ma 2 ma-na kù.gi ù 11 ma-na kù.babbar
english: ennam-aššur took these 16 minas of silver and sent 2 minas of gold and the 11 minas of silver to us.

akkadian: a-lu-a ub-lá-ku-nu-tí a-hu-a a-tù-nu kù.babbar ší-im an.na-ki ú ší-im ṣú-ba-tí-a šé-bi-lá-nim-ma gi-mì-lá-am
english: my dear brothers, send me the proceeds in silver from the tin and my textiles and thus do me a favour.

akkadian: ha-bu-lu kù.babbar a-al-du₁₀ iš-qú-ul a-al-du₁₀ i-lá-ak-ma né-mu-lu-um i-ta-áb-ší i-né-mì-li-im i-lá-qé šu-ma né-mu-lu-um
english: suhurpiyala (!) will make a business trip and if there is profit, he will take it (the silver) from the profit.

akkadian: 1.3333 ma-na 2 gín kù.babbar a-šu-mì ku-li-a dumu a-lá-bi-im a-na a-šur-ma-lik dumu
english: 1.3333 mina and 2 shekels of silver on behalf of kuliya, son of ali-abum, i paid to assur-malik son of kurara.

akkadian: ša dub-pá-am i-mu-a-at šu-ma kù.babbar lá iš-ta-aq-lu kù.babbar ú ṣí-ba-sú a-li ni-na-mu-ru
english: should they not pay the silver, then kuliya will pay me the silver and the interest on it, wherever we meet.

akkadian: kù.babbar-áp-šu ša-bu-ú-at urudu-i-a 14 gú 45.5 ma-na i-na 13 i-lá-tim ku-nu-ki-ni a-na
english: we left my copper, 14 talents 45.5 minas in 13 leather bags, under our seals, for abī-baštī and your son ennam-aššur.

akkadian: tù-uk-ta-ṣí-dá-ni kù.babbar ú ha-ra-na-tí-šu ṣa-ba-at-ma a-na ša ki-ma i-a-tí dí-in kù.babbar e-lá
english: get hold of the silver or what has been acquired with it during its journeys and give it to my representative(s).

akkadian: a-na ku-li-a qí-bi-ma um-ma a-ba-ba-a-ma a-na ma-lá pì-i na-áš-pár-tí-kà pá-ni-tim 3 ma-na
english: say to kuliya, thus says ababaya: exactly as your previous letter stated i have given 3 minas of silver to ennanatum.

akkadian: i-ba-šu-lu-ma kù.babbar 10 ma-na sig₅ ú-ṣí-a-šu-nu-tí-ni tí-de₈-ma i-na wa-ah-šu-ša-na ú ša-lá-tù-ar mu-uš-té-bi-lu
english: you know that in wahšušana and šalatuwar those who do business realise at least 10 minas of silver for the capitalists.

akkadian: šu-ma i-ku-pí-a a-na puzur₄.ištar lá i-ta-ha-ba-al a-na kù.babbar ša il₅-qé-ú ma-na-um ma-na
english: if ikūn-pīya did not owe anything to puzur-ištar, he must pay (a fine of) mina for mina the silver he received.

akkadian: kà-ri-im li-ší-ru <gap> kà-ru-um a-na dumu um-me-a-ni li-ip-qí-sú ù a-lu-a iš-tí wa-bi-il₅
english: the colony should entrust it to an affiliated trader, and aluwa shall come together with the one who brings the tablet.

akkadian: itu.kam i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám i itu.kam ú-ṣa-áb
english: if he has not paid (in time) he is to add interest according to the rule of the colony every month.

akkadian: ša ú-kà-lu li-dí-na-ku-nu-tí a-dí ṭup-pé-e ša ku-nu-ki-a ša ṭup-pu-šu ša e-li-ú-ni sá-ru-ni i-da-na-ku-nu-tí-ni ṭup-pu-šu lá tù-ša-ra-šu-um
english: until he gives you the tablets with my seal, stating that any tablet of his that may appear is invalid, you must not release his tablet to him.

akkadian: ṭup-pu-ú 8 baneš še-am ki e-wa-ar-nim 50 baneš še-am a-lam₅{ki} šu-ut-ma ú-ma-lá ki en-nam-{d}im dumu šu-na-a
english: three tablets. 8 3--measures of barley with ewarnum; 50 3--measures of barley - he himself will complement (it in?) the city - are with ennam-adad, son of šunāya.

akkadian: li-tù-ra-am šu-ma ṭup-pá-am šu-a-tí a-šur-du₁₀ lá na-ší a-na ša ki-ma šu-a-tí li-iš-pu-ur-ma ṭup-pá-am a-li i-ba-ší-ú igi
english: if aššur-ṭāb does not carry that tablet, he must write to his representatives, that they must release the tablet - wherever it may be - before the colony.

akkadian: en-nam-a-šùr a-na a-šùr-du₁₀ iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma en-nam-a-šùr-ma a-na a-šùr-du₁₀-ma a-na a-i-tim ta-ša-a-lá-ni ù
english: ennam-aššur seized us against aššur-ṭāb, and ennam-aššur said to aššur-ṭāb: for what do you question me and detain me?

akkadian: kišib en-na-nim dumu a-lá-bi₄-im kišib a-gi-a dumu puzur₄-a-šùr {d}im.gal dumu bu-zi tap-pá-i-ni
english: sealed by ennānum son of ali-abum, by agiya son of puzur-aššur; adad-rabi son of buzi was our (absent) partner.

akkadian: na-ra-am-zu 3 gín kù.babbar me-eh-ra-tim ša kà-ku-uš al-ma-tim iš-tí a-lu-wa en-um-a-šùr ú-šé-ba-al-šum
english: ennam-aššur will send him 3 shekels of silver, the corresponding amount for the -flour of the widow, with aluwa.

akkadian: um-ma a-šùr-ba-ni-ma a-na šu-pé-e-nu-ma-an um-mì-iš-ha-ra a-ší-tí-šu ú ha-nu qí-bi₄-ma a-wa-tim lá dam-qá-tim
english: from aššur-bāni to šuppi-numan, ummī-išhara, his wife and hanu: i have heard words that were not good but diminishing.

akkadian: a-na a-dí-da ú a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma um-ma dá-mì-iq-pì-a-šur-ma 24 túg i-na 6 na-ru-qá-tim
english: to adida and ali-ahum from damiq-pī-aššur: i left 24 textiles in 6 sacks in the storeroom under my seal.

akkadian: ma-ma-hi-ir il₅-qé 22 gín kù.babbar sig₅-pí-a-šur il₅-qé 17 gín lu ša-du-ú-tum lu
english: the remainder of your silver, 11 minas 6 shekels of refined silver, under our seals, damiq-pī-aššur brings to you.

akkadian: šà.ba qá-tí i-ta-dí-a šu-ma ha-ra-kà a-na bu-ru-uš-ha-tim i-ba-ší ṣú-ha-ru-um iš-tí-kà-ma li-li-ik lá
english: should your trip to burušhattum, take place, then let the boy go with you, do not leave him behind.

akkadian: i-lá-pá-at šu-ma i-na ma-lá u₄-me-šu a-na a-lim{ki} lá i-ta-lá-ak kù.babbar a-na-ku lá
english: if he has not left for the city within his stipulated term, he must repay the silver to kula.

akkadian: kù.babbar 1 gín kù.babbar ù 2 gín ig-ri-a ša-al-ma a-na ša-ni-ú-tim lá
english: inquire about my wages of 1 or 2 shekels of silver so i do not squander it to others.

akkadian: na-zu-um a-na en-um-a-šùr qí-bi-ma 2 anše ṣa-lá-me-en ú ú-nu-sú-nu lu-lu li-dí-na-kum ú
english: to ennam-aššur: have lulu give you 2 black donkeys and their harness; also, have arši-ah give you 1 donkey.

akkadian: ša ša-lá-ša-at a-tù-nu ha-bu-lá-tù-nu-ni-ma kù.babbar i qá-qá-ad šál-mì-ku-nu ra-ak-sú nu-kà-al lu ša
english: we have in our possession a tablet stating that you three owe silver and that you are jointly liable.

akkadian: iš-tù ha-muš-tim ša a-šùr-i-dí ù šu-ištar itu.kam kán-wa-ar-ta li-mu-um {d}iškur-ba-ni a-na 4
english: from the week of aššur-idī and šu-ištar, month ix, eponymy year of adad-bāni, they will pay within 4 weeks.

akkadian: um-ma a-al-du₁₀-ma a-na a-šur-{d}utu-ši qí-bi₄-ma mì-šu ša ta-áš-pu-ra-ni-ni um-ma a-tù-nu-ma al-kam ṣí-tám
english: say in particular to aššur-šamšī: why are youplur. writing me as follows: 'come here, we must submit the expenditures'?

akkadian: na-ší šu-ma i-nu-mì lu-qú-tum a-ni-tum ú-ṣí-a-ni u₄-mu-ú kà-ṣú a-bu-ša-lim iš-tí ma-ma-an i-na a-he-ni ša ú-ša-lá-ma-šu-nu pì-iq-da-šu-ma lu-ṣa-am šu-ma u₄-mu-ú
english: if, when this merchandise leaves, the weather is cool, then entrust abu-šalim to the care of one of our brothers who will bring them! here safely, then he can leave.

akkadian: nu-sá-as-hi-ir-šu i-na a-lá-ak šu-{d}en.líl tí-ir-tám za-ku-tám ni-ša-pá-ra-kum
english: when šu-illil arrives we shall send a final report to you.

akkadian: šu-ma kà-nu-tum a-na a-na-ah-ì-lí ta-tù-wa-ar a-lá-bu-um ú-ša-ha-sú-ú
english: should kannutum come back on anah-ili, then ali-abum will clear him.

akkadian: ša dam.gàr-ri-im a-pu-tum an.na qá-tim ma-sú-ùh ša
english: urgent, the expense tin is inferior - what he gave me.

akkadian: ta-er-šu-nu a-hi a-ta i-hi-id-ma kù.babbar 1 gín
english: my dear brother, take care to raise every shekel of silver.

akkadian: a-lim{ki} ub-lu a-ha-ma 5 gín kù.babbar a-na
english: furthermore, 5 shekels of silver i gave them for their food.

akkadian: kù.babbar a-na šu-ištar dumu ma-li-ki-il₅-šu áš-qúl 2.5
english: i paid 3 shekels of silver to šu-ištar son of malik-ilišu.

akkadian: 2 gín kù.ki ku-pu-ur-ší-ni-in sig₅ i-ṣé-er im-lik-a-šùr
english: 2 shekels of -gold of fine quality imlik-aššur owes to ir'am-aššur.

akkadian: ša-dí-na 1 gín kù.babbar dì-na-ma sà-hi-ir-tám ša-ma-šu-um
english: give 1 shekel of silver and buy small goods for him.

akkadian: le-qé-a-nim a-dí a-la-ki-a ṣí-ib-tám ša itu.kam iš-tí-in
english: i shall pay interest for a single month until i arrive.

akkadian: 0.6666 ma-na kù.babbar a-na e-tí-šu i-ša-qal šu-ma
english: he will pay 0.6666 mina of silver at the agreed time.

akkadian: 2 gín kù.ki i-ṣé-er i-dí-na-bi-im dumu šu-ištar
english: iddin-abum son of šu-ištar owes 2 shekels of gold to ali-ahum.

akkadian: ma-ah-ri-a-ma ú-mu-šu 20 ha-am-ša-tum e-tí-qú kù.babbar ú
english: the silver and its interest is a votive offering to aššur.

akkadian: a-lim{ki} ub-lu a-ha-ma 5 gín kù.babbar a-na
english: furthermore, i gave them 5 shekels of silver for their food.

akkadian: na-áš-ú-ni-ku-nu-tí šà.ba 5 ma-na an.na ik-ri-bu ša
english: of that 5 minas of tin are votive offerings for aššur.

akkadian: lá-šu kù.babbar 1 gín a-na ú-ku-ul-tí-a šé-bi₄-lam
english: send me just a single shekel of silver for my food.

akkadian: kù.babbar ša-áš-qí-il₅-šu 1 ma-na ni-ga-li ku-nu-ki-a a-na
english: aššur-rabi brings 1 mina of sickles under my seal for muza.

akkadian: ša hu-bu-ul i-dí-a-bi-im 13 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am
english: concerning the debt of iddin-abum of 13 minas of refined silver.

akkadian: 18 gín kù.babbar i-ṣé-er ki-da-ah-šu ù me-er-i-šu
english: kid-ahšu and his sons owe 18 shekels of silver to ali-ahum.

akkadian: u₄-mu-šu-nu ma-al-ú mì-ša-al kù.babbar a-na mu.4.šè i-ša-qal
english: for half the silver payment must be made in 4 years.

akkadian: tí-ir-tí-šu ub-lu a-ha-ma 5 gín kù.babbar a-na
english: furthermore, i gave them 5 shekels of silver for their food.

akkadian: áš-qúl 0.3333 ma-na 5 gín a-na eb-lá-i-im
english: i paid 0.3333 mina 5 shekels to the man from ebla.

akkadian: é hi-na-a i-ba-ší a-ba-ú-a a-tù-nu ṣa-ab-ta-šu-ma kù.babbar
