english: please, my fathers, seize him and make him pay the silver.

akkadian: i-na ší-mì-šu-nu kù.babbar sig₅ diri e-pu-uš a-dí
english: the silver must arrive with me while i am staying here.

akkadian: a-ta a-dí ša ha-ra-an sú-qí-nim tí-ir-ta-ak-kà a-na pá-ni-a li-li-kam-ma ki-ma ša-lu-um kù.babbar ša dam.gàr
english: my dear brother, send me word concerning the matter of the narrow track, so i can act to safeguard the merchant's silver.

akkadian: a-na a-lá-hi-im ú zu-ku-a um-ma puzur₄-a-šur-ma 13 ma-na an.na ku-nu-ki-a i-na za-al-pá a-na en-nam-a-šur
english: to ali-ahum and zukuwa from puzur-aššur; i gave 13 minas of tin under my seal in zalpa to ennam-aššur son of narām-suen.

akkadian: a-na tí-bu-lá ta-nu-uš-ta ù áš-ta-ah-šu-šar qí-bi₄-ma um-ma šu-ku-tum-ma mì-šu ša a-ma-kam a-na kà-ri-im a-we-lúm
english: to tibula, tanušta and aštahšušar from šukkutum: why is it that when the man goes to the colony there you release him?

akkadian: šu-ma i-na ma-lá u₄-me-šu lá iš-qúl 1.5 gín.ta i itu.1.kam a-1 ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb i-na
english: if he has not paid within the stipulated term he must pay interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina.

akkadian: lu i-na ba-a-áb-tí-šu a-lá-qé ší-tí kù.babbar a-na ṣí-ib-tim a-la-qé-ma kù.babbar ù ṣí-ba-sú ì-lí-a-lim ú-ma-lá
english: the rest of the silver i will (then) borrow at interest and the silver and the interest on it ilī-ālum will compensate.

akkadian: um-ma en-um-a-šùr-ma a-na ša-ta-na qí-bi-ma a-na-ku a-na ṣé-er ì-lí-dan a-na ku-bu-ur-na-at e-tí-iq-ma wa-ar-ki-tí-ma ma-ma-hi-ir
english: from ennam-aššur to šāt-anna:i have personally travelled to ilī-dan in kuburnat, and after i left man-mahir has taken a wife in marriage.

akkadian: um-ma ku-du-du-ma a-na mu-za ù en-nam-a-šur qí-bi₄-ma 17 ma-na urudu ší-kam a-na kà-na-a kà-ṣa-ri-ni
english: from kududu to muza and ennam-aššur: i gave 17 minas of copper to our harnessor kanaya but he has gone into hiding.

akkadian: en-um-a-šur dumu i-ku-pí-a kišib a-ni-na-a dumu diri-im kišib e-na-a-šur dumu šu-ul-mì-ša-a-šùr 12 ma-na urudu ší-kam i-ṣé-er en-um-a-šùr
english: seal of ennum-assur, son of ikuppiya, seal of aninaya, son of watrum, seal of ennam-assur, son of sulmi-sa-assur. 12 minas of copper ennum-assur, son of ikuppiya, owes to the creditor.

akkadian: a-na ta-i-tim a-na kà-ri-im kà-ni-iš ša-pí-ir a-pu-tum ki-ma ṭup-pí-ni ta-áš-me-a-ni iš-té-na mu-qá-ri-bé a-na a-sá-num dí-na-ma kà-ru-um kà-ri-im
english: as soon as you have heard our letter, each of you must give an escort to asānum and each must escort him to the next, all the way until kanesh.

akkadian: a ṣí-ib-tim li-is-hu-ra-am a-na 1 gú urudu sig₅ 1 gú 30 ma-na urudu sig₅ a-na da-áš-e i-ša-qal
english: for the 1 talent of refined copper he will pay 1.5 talent of refined copper, in late spring. 43 minas of copper, the price of a slave-girl is due by?

akkadian: lá ìš-qú-ul 1 ma-na-um 0.3333 ma-na i-lá-ak-šu-um a-na 1 ma-na kù.babbar hi-na-a i-šé-e-šu
english: if he does not pay per mina 0.3333 mina will amount for him (and) hinnāya will sue him for 1 mina of silver.

akkadian: a-lá-hu-um mu-ta-a kù.babbar lu ni-iš-qú-ul a-hu-a a-tù-nu a-na pá-ni-a tí-ir-ta-ku-nu iš-tí ṣú-ha-ri-a a-ni-tum
english: my dear brothers, send me word with my servant whether it is one or the other, so i can make up my mind.

akkadian: šu-ma lá-šu 1 ma-na kù.babbar i-na ra-mì-ni-kà a-na ṣú-ha-ri-kà ù e-lá-li pì-qí-id-ma lu-ub-lu-nim
english: if he is absent, entrust 1 mina of silver of your own to your servant and elāli so they can bring it here.

akkadian: a tí-ir-tí i-hi-da ša-áš-hi-ta-a šu-ma 0.5 gín.ta ra-ak-ba-am ša-áš-ki-na-šu be-lúm-ba-ni i-li-kam lá i-li-kam
english: as to the tablets concerning anatolians that i also left with you, make them pay the silver, and then let ali-ahum take it.

akkadian: a-na i-tur₄-dingir ú-ta-ar-ma kù.babbar-šu i-tur₄-dingir a-na en-um-a-šur i-ša-qal 0.3333 ma-na ší-kà-tám ù 2
english: if he has not sold the iron ennam-aššur will return the iron to itūr-ilī and itūr-ilī will pay silver for it to ennam-aššur.

akkadian: a-ta tí-ir-ta-kà-ma lá i-lá-kam ma-lá-ma kù.babbar 10 gín ba-áš-tám ú-lá ar-ta-áš-a-kum ù gi₅-mì-lá-kà
english: have i not acquired dignity for you worth just 10 shekels of silver, and have i not been able to return your favours?

akkadian: ú-šé-ṣí-šu-nu ší-im-šu-nu ha-nu ub-ba-lá-kum i-na ša ṭup-pí-šu ša šu-ki-tim 4 ma-na kù.babbar nu-ša-áš-qí-il₅
english: we made šukkutum pay 4 minas of silver out of what was in his tablet; šu-hubur brings it to you under his seal.

akkadian: anše.hi.a ṣa-lá-mu 0.6666 ma-na lá 4 gín kù.babbar-šu-nu 0.3333 ma-na 7 gín kù.babbar
english: when checking 3 shekels of silver proved to be missing; 3.5 shekels the harness of the donkeys; 1 shekel fodder for the donkeys.

akkadian: ta-ta-ma ta-lá-qé 1 gú ša du-du-na ha-bu-lu aṣ-ba-sú-ma um-ma šu-ut-ma urudu lá i-šu
english: as for the 1 talent that duduna owes, i seized him and he said: 'i have no copper, let it become interest bearing'.

akkadian: ša 25 ma-na urudu kù-áp-šu a šu-mì šu-ku-bi₄-im ú-ṣa-hi-ru ša 15 ma-na urudu a šu-mì-a ú-ṣa-hi-ru
english: from it they deducted the silver equivalent of 25 minas of copper for šu-kūbum's account and that of 15 minas of copper for my account.

akkadian: 0.6666 ma-na kù.babbar iš-tí en-na-sú-in e-ri-šu-ma 7.5 gín dí-šu-nu-tí
english: they asked for 0.6666 minas of silver from enna-suen but give them 7.5 shekels.

akkadian: ub-lam 5 ma-na kù.babbar ni-is-ha-sú diri ku-nu-ki-kà a-šùr-du₁₀ ub-lam
english: aššur-ṭāb brought 5 minas of silver, its import duty added and under your seal.

akkadian: i-dí-a-bi₄-im kù.babbar al-qé i-na 1 ma-na-im ša en-na-nim i-ta-ak-sá-am
english: i received the silver cut off by way of the one-mina stone of ennānum.

akkadian: i-dí-in kù.babbar šál-ma-am i-na e-ra-bi-šu-nu-ma i-na a-lim{ki} i-ša-qú-lu-ú kù.babbar
english: they will pay the correct amount of silver when they arrive from the city.

akkadian: na-áš-ú-ni-kum kù.babbar-áp-kà le-qé-ma ṭup-pì li-it-a-ma a qá-tí bu-ur-sú-in ù
english: take your silver and split my tablet and give it to būr-suen and ilī-imittī.

akkadian: ma-na 5 gín kù.babbar 1 gín kù.gi a-ta-ah-šu ú-bi₄-il₅-šu-um
english: as for aššur-imittī, 25 shekels of silver (and) 1 shekel gold atahšu brought him.

akkadian: 0.8333 ma-na 6.5 gín kù.babbar ša sú-hu-ur-pì-a-lá a-na sú-e-ta-ta
english: 56.5 shekels of silver, which suhurpiyala owes to suettata, that silver āl-ṭāb has paid.

akkadian: dumu ì-lí-e-mu-qí i-nu-mì kù.babbar áš-qú-lu e-na-a-šùr ú a-mur-{d}utu dumu
english: when i paid the silver ennam-assur and amur-samas, son of ili-pi-usur, acted as beru.

akkadian: kà-ri-im ú-ṣa-áb kù.babbar iš-ri-iq-ma kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš a-na šu-šál-šum i-dí-šu
english: he had stolen silver and the colony had convicted him to (pay) the triple.

akkadian: šu-ma-a šu.nígin 9 ṭup-pu-ú i-na ta-ma-lá-ki-im ša i-ša-sú-ú ta-ba-ku-tum
english: in all 9 tablets in a tablet box, to be read (and) thrown away(?).

akkadian: ta-dí šu.nígin 3 ma-na šu-mì ku-ni-lim é kà-ri-im lá-pí-it
english: in all 3.5 minas have been booked in kūn-ilum's name in the colonial office.

akkadian: i-šu iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša i-tur₄-dingir ú puzur₄-ša-du-e a-na itu.kam
english: reckoned from the week of itūr-ilī and puzur-šadu'e he must pay in one month.

akkadian: a-na ša-lim-a-šur qí-bi-ma um-ma ša-lim-a-šur-ma a-šu-mì ili₅-ba-ni dumu i-a-a
english: to šalim-aššur from šalim-aššur: i sent you word twice about ilī-bāni son of yaya.

akkadian: 3 gín ša sà-e-tim 0.5 ma-na 1 gín be-ú-lá-at
english: we gave 0.5 mina 1 shekel as the working capital of hani to him.

akkadian: itu.kam áb-ša-ra-ni li-mu-um ša qá-té a-bu-ša-lim dam.gàr dumu ì-lí-a-lúm
english: month v, the eponymy of the successor of abu-salim, the trader, son of ili-alum.

akkadian: ar-ša-tim še-am ar-ša-tim ú kù.babbar a-na ha-ar-pé-e a-ni-ú-tim i-da-an
english: he will pay the barley, the wheat and the silver at this (coming) harvest.

akkadian: a-na a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma um-ma i-ku-pí-a ú zu-ku-a 1 gú
english: to ali-ahum from ikūn-pīya and zukuwa: they brought your tin, 1 talent 30 minas.

akkadian: pè-té kù.babbar ša i-dí-a-šur ha-bu-lá-ni ša-qí-il₅ lá ša-qí-il₅ tí-ir-ta-kà
english: send me word whether the silver owed by iddin-aššur has been paid or not.

akkadian: igi e-ze-e šu-ma ú-da-pí-ir 1 gín.ta i-na itu.kam ú-ṣa-áb
english: if he disappears he will add 1 shekel of silver as interest per month.

akkadian: šu-ki-tim en-um-a-šur na-áš-a-ku-nu-tí ṭup-pá-am ša hu-bu-li-šu am-ra-ma ma-lá u₄-mu-šu e-tí-qú-ni 2 ta-ah-sí-is-té-en₆ pá-tí-té-en₆ lu-up-ta-ma iš-tí-it e-na-ah-dingir lu-kà-il₅ iš-tí-it
english: look at his debt-note and write two open memoranda about how much his terms are in arrears, and enah-ilī should keep one while šu-aššur should keep the other.

akkadian: e-lá-ma i-šu iš-tù ha-muš-tim ša dingir-na-da 1 gín.ta ṣí-ib-tám
english: from the week of ilī-nādā he will add 1 shekel of silver as interest per month.

akkadian: i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl 0.3333 gín.ta i-na itu.kam ú-ṣa-áb
english: if he has not paid he will pay interest at the rate 0.3333 shekel per month.

akkadian: i-dí-a-bi-im i-dí-in i-na a-lim{ki} šu-mì dam.gàr-ri-im 2 ma-na kù.gi
english: he will book 2 minas of gold in the name of a merchant in the city.

akkadian: puzur₄-a-šùr dumu a-zu-za ha-bu-lam iš-tù itu.kam na-ar-ma-ak-a-šùr li-mu-um en-na-sú-in
english: he is to pay within 7 months from the month narmak-aššur in the eponymy of enna-suen.

akkadian: ku-nu-ki-a be-lúm-ba-ni na-áš-a-ku-nu-tí síg.hi.a za-ku-tim ša-ma-nim kù.babbar 0.5 gín
english: buy for me cleaned wool, do not try to save even half a shekel of silver!

akkadian: um-ma me-er-ú i-dí-a-bi₄-im-ma a-na ša-lim-a-šùr-ma a-na a-i-tim tù-kà-al-ni-a-tí lá-mì-id-ni-a-tí
english: the sons of iddin-abum said as follows to šalim-aššur: for which things do you detain us?

akkadian: i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 3 gín.ta a-na 1 ma-na-im
english: if he has not paid, he will add (interest) at the rate 3 shekels per mina.

akkadian: ú-šé-tù-qú-nim ki-ma ša-lá-am an.na-ki e-ba-ar tí-mì-il₅-ki-a-ma an.na a-na dur₄-hu-mì-it
english: for the safety of the tin one must ship the tin on via timilkiya to durhumit.

akkadian: kù.babbar ma-lá ú-šé-bi₄-lá-ni i ku-nu-ki-šu-ma i qá-tí am-tí-a li-ib-ší
english: what silver he sent should remain in the hands of my maid under his own seal.

akkadian: um-ma i-dí-sú-in-ma a-na en-na-sú-in qí-bi₄-ma ṣú-ha-ṣú-ra-am ga-lá-ba-am ha-dí-a-šu <gap>-ra-de₈-am
english: thus iddin-suen, say to ennam-suen: the boy who is a barber hadiaššu is leading to you.

akkadian: i-lá-kà-ni kù.babbar li-ib-ší ú šu-ma kù.babbar lá ša-qí-il₅ tí-ir-ta-ak-nu
english: and if the silver has not been paid, send me word in wahšušana and inform me.

akkadian: lá iš-qúl a-na 1 ma-na-im 1.5 gín.ta i-na i-na
english: if he does not pay he will add per mina, per month 1.5 shekel as interest.

akkadian: kù.babbar šé-bi₄-lá-am ší-mu-um ša-i-im a-šur-mu-ta-pì-il₅ i-na pá-ni-ú-tim ni-ṭá-ra-dá-am da-a-nu
english: the purchases have been made, we will send aššur-mūtappil off to you with the next opportunity.

akkadian: šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 3 gín.ta i-na itu.kam ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
english: if he has not paid he will add interest at the rate 3 shekels per month.

akkadian: {d}im-ba-ni igi a-mur-ištar ni-a-im kù.ki a-ma-kam li-iš-qú-lá-ku-ma a-dí a-lá-kà-ni
english: have him pay the gold there to you and let it remain there until i come.

akkadian: ni-mu-wa lá ta-áš-ta-na-me-i ki-ma um-mì-ki iš-tù 10 ša-na-tim nu-a-um ah-zu-ma i-na é nu-a-im wa-áš-ba-at-ni
english: have you not heard that the anatolian is since ten years married to your mother and that she lived in the house of the anatolian?

akkadian: iš-qúl šu-ma iš-tù a-lim{ki} ú-nu-tám ša e-lá-ma lá i-sà-ri-dam da-a-sú ù ú-kúl-tù-šu ki-ta-a ú-ma-lá
english: if he does not transport of the goods of elamma from the city kitaya will compensate (what was paid him for) the road-tax and food.

akkadian: kù.babbar ú kù.ki šu-ut a-na é a-lim{ki} a-na hu-bu-ul ili₅-ba-ni i-ší-qí-il₅
english: the aforementioned silver and gold have been paid to the city office for (to cover) ili-bani's debts.

akkadian: i-<gap> an.na ù túg.hi.a a-na kù.babbar dí-na a-na ba-a-ba-tí-a ša nu-a-e
english: pay attention to my outstanding claims with anatolians, have the silver paid and send it to me.

akkadian: dumu a-zu-za-a iṣ-bu-tù-ma a-dí u₄-mì-im a-nim kà-li-i a-dí kù.babbar ša a-dí
english: so, they have seized azuzaya's son on the narrow track and he is detained until this day.

akkadian: a-na ku-li-a qí-bi₄-ma um-ma a-ba-ba-a-ma šál-ma-ni ṣú-hu-ur-kà ša-lim ni-šu-kà šál-mu ki-ma
english: to kuliya, thus says ababaya: we are well, your youngsters are well and your people are well.

akkadian: i-da-na-ku-nu-tí a-na kù.babbar ší-im an.na-ki-a pì-ri-kà-ni ša-ma-ma a-dí tí-ir-tí i-lá-kà-ni li-ib-ší-ú
english: buy for the silver proceeds from the tin and let them stay put until my instructions arrive.

akkadian: túg.hi.a 38.5 ma-na urudu sig₅ ší-im-šu-nu a-lá-hu-um a-na qá-tí a-bi-ni i-dí
english: ali-ahum deposited 3 textiles at the price of 38.5 minas of good copper on our father's account.

akkadian: ni-lik ṭup-pá-am ša a-lim{ki} ú ra-bi-ṣa-am ša be-li-ni lá nu-na-ah ší-bu-tum
english: we shall not obstruct the tablet of the city and the attorney of our lord." witnessed statement."

akkadian: i-šu et-qám-ma kù.babbar 1 ma-na bu-lá-tí-kà a-ni qá-at-kà li-iṣ-ba-at 10 ma-na
english: travel here so you personally now may seize hold of every mina of silver of your assets.

akkadian: i-mu-ú a-bi-i 13 ma-na.ta ni-kà-sí a-na é a-bi₄-šu a-na ì-lí-a-lim i-dí-in
english: my father settled accounts with ilī-ālum for his father's house at a rate of 13 minas each.

akkadian: a-ha-ma 1 ma-na kù.babbar i-ší-im sú-ub-ri-im pá-tim ki-ma i-a-tí i-tur₄-dingir il₅-qé
english: further, itūr-ilī took on my behalf 1 mina of silver from the price of the first slave.

akkadian: kù.babbar ta-áš-ta-na-pá-ra-ni a-wa-tí-a a-šur-ma-lik ù kur-ub-ištar ú-ga-me-ru-ma 3 ma-na kù.babbar i-nu-mì-šu-ma a-na kur-ub-ištar
english: aššur-mālik and kurub-ištar have settled my case and at that time i immediately paid 3 minas of silver to kurub-ištar.

akkadian: li-bi₄ a-ki-a kù.babbar dí-na-šu-ma ša 0.3333 ma-na kù.babbar ṭup-pu-šu lu-up-ta 4 gín kù.babbar
english: give him the silver and write his tablet for 0.3333 mina of silver. ṭāb-ṣill-aššur brings you 4 shekels of silver.

akkadian: a-lá-hu-um ra-bi-ṣa-am a-ba-ba e-pu-ul-šu um-ma a-lá-hu-um-ma us-kà-i-in a ṭup-pí-im ša a-lim{ki} ù ra-bi-ṣí-im
english: ali-ahum answered the attorney ababa, saying: i submit to the tablet of the city and the attorney of my lord.

akkadian: tí-ir-ta-kà li-li-kam 3.3333 gín kù.babbar a-šur-i-dí dumu a-mur-a-šur ha-bu-lam e-ri-šu-ma pí-ri-kà-nam a-na am-tim
english: aššur-idī son of amur-aššur owes me 3.3333 shekels of silver; demand it from him, and buy a for the maid.

akkadian: iš-me-ú um-ma a-nu-pí-a-ma ṭup-pu-um la ku-nu-ku-kà um-ma ga-al-ga-li-a-ma ku-nu-ku-a um-ma a-nu-pí-a-ma me-er-ú me-tim
english: anupiya said: does the tablet not bear your seals?" galgaliya answered: "they are my sealings." anupiya said: "we are inheritors.

akkadian: la ki-a-am ku-ta-nim ša-ma-ni-im 11.6666 ma-na kù.babbar túg lu-bu-šé ra-qá-tim ù šu-lu-up-ki-e ša
english: use 11.6666 minas of silver to buy -garments, thin textiles and šulupkian ones and send them with the next caravan.

akkadian: a-lá-hu-um ra-bi-ṣa-am a-ba-ba e-pu-ul um-ma a-lá-hu-um-ma us-kà-in a ṭup-pì-im ša a-lim{ki} ú ra-bi-ṣí-im
english: ali-ahum answered the attorney ababa, saying: i submit to the tablet of the city and the attorney of my lord.

akkadian: 10 gín kù.babbar e-zi-ba-ku-nu-tí urudu-ri-i a-na kù.babbar dí-na-ma ú kù.babbar
english: sell my copper for silver, then seal the proceeds in silver from my textiles and let it remain.

akkadian: lá tù-ma-na li-ib-ší a-hu-a a-tù-nu kù.babbar ṣú-ba-tí-a a-na i-ṭá-at-lim i-ta-dí-na
english: my dear brothers, as to the silver for my textiles, they should be sold for cash on delivery.

akkadian: dan-na a-hi a-ta tí-ir-ta-kà li-li-kam-ma úz-ni pé-té-e 0.5 ma-na 2
english: i left 0.5 mina 2 shekels of silver under my seal for ennānum son of abiya in purušhaddum.

akkadian: ú-ra-ki-sú en-na-nam ṣa-ba-at-ma kù.babbar ša-áš-qí-il₅-šu-ma a-na pá-ni-a šé-bi₄-lam šu-ma ta-da-gal-ma
english: if you observe that the narrow track is not opened up then send it with the caravan itself.

akkadian: ma-na kù.babbar a-šùr-ba-ni dumu i-dí-a-bi-im ha-bu-lam kù.babbar ša-áš-qí-il₅ šu-ma šé-bi₄-lam
english: assur-bani, son of iddin-abum, owes me 1 mina of silver, make him pay and send it to me.

akkadian: ší-im 1 udu ha-bu-lu iš-ni-am ip-qí-dam-ma a-dí-ni ú-lá al-qé kù.babbar
english: he entrusted it (for shipment) to me for the second time, but i have not yet obtained it.

akkadian: itu.2.kam i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
english: if he has not paid in time, he will add interest according to the rule of the colony.

akkadian: gín kù.babbar a-na am-tí-kà ni-dí-in 3.3333 gín lá-qé-pu-um a-na da-tim
english: of the 12 -textiles that you left, 1 textile was for your dress. 1 litre of fine oil.

akkadian: ṣí-ba-sú ik-ri-bu ša a-šur kù.babbar ú ṣí-ba-sú ma-lá a-wi-lúm iš-qú-lá-ku-nu-tí-ni
english: send me word about how much silver and interest the man has paid to you and inform me.

akkadian: a ni-sà-ba tù-ra-mì-ili₅ i-šu iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša dingir-na-da a-2 itu.kam
english: reckoned from the week eponymy of ilī-nādā he will send me the silver to kanesh in 2 months.

akkadian: šé-bi₄-lam a-hi a-ta ta-da-gal-ma a-na-kam kù.babbar 1 gín i-na qá-tí-a
english: my dear brother, you can see that not a single shekel of silver is in my possession here.

akkadian: ša šu-ku-bi-im ú ka-zi-a 22.5 še i-na itu.kam ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
english: from the week of šu-kūbum and kaziya he will add 1 / 8 shekel per month as interest.

akkadian: tí-ir-ta-ku-nu a-na wa-ah-šu-ša-na li-li-kam šu-ma kù.babbar ú ṣí-ba-sú i-ší-qí-il₅ ma-lá
english: if the silver and its interest has been paid, inform me about how much silver has been paid.

akkadian: kù.babbar i-ší-iq-lu úz-ni pé-té ṭup-pí ša nu-a-e ša e-lá-nu e-zi-bu
english: as to the tablets concerning anatolians that i left as well, take care to have the silver paid.

akkadian: i ma-sá-im im-ṭí 0.5 ma-na kù.babbar be-ú-lá-at ma-ṣi-ì-lí 2 gín
english: to supplement (the costs of) the donkey-loads we added 58.8333 shekels of silver from that of the barley.

akkadian: i-ša-qal šu-ma la iš-qú-ul 1.5 gín.ta a-na 1 ma-na-im i-na
english: if he has not paid he will add interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina.

akkadian: lá ni-na-me-er-ma ta-tù-ar 2 ma-na 7 gín kù.babbar ku-nu-ki ša
english: i carry with me 2 minas and 7 shekels of silver under the seals of ennam-suen and alpilī.

akkadian: a-ma-kam ṣú-ha-ru-um lá i-na-ma-ar ar-hi-iš ṭù-ur-da-ni-šu-ma a-wi-lam lu-ṭí-ba-am a-ha-ma 0.5
english: the boy must not be seen there, send him quickly here so that i can please the gentleman.

akkadian: lá i-šu iš-tù a-lim{ki} kù.babbar-pì ú-ta-ra-am 15 gín kù.babbar du₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šur na-áš-a-ku-nu-tí 5 gín kù.babbar i
english: i shall return my silver from the city. ṭāb-ṣill-aššur brings you 15 shekels of silver. 5 shekels of silver is owed by akiya.

akkadian: dumu sú-kà-lí-a a-dí-im ša-lim-a-šur i-na ba-áb ha-ra-ni-šu um-ma šu-ut-ma a-na šu-ta-mu-zi a-dí-da ù e-lá-a-ma a-hu-a-tù-nu
english: when šalim-aššur was about to leave he said to šu-tammuzi, adida and elaya: my dear brothers, i owe silver to the eponym amur-aššur.

akkadian: 2 ma-na 10 gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pu-um ší-im an.na ša dam.gàr a-na tù-ra-am-ì-lí dumu e-dí-a-šur en-um-a-šur
english: ennam-aššur has given 2 minas 10 shekels of refined silver, the price of tin belonging to a merchant, to tūram-ilī son of eddin-aššur.

akkadian: 10 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pu-um ni-is-ha-sú diri ša-du-a-sú ša-bu a-na hu-bu-li-a ša é a-bi-a ú-bi₄-il₅ a-ha-ma
english: i brought 10 minas of refined silver, its import duty added, its transport tariff paid for, for my debt to my father's house.

akkadian: mì-ma i-na ra-mì-ni-šu ú-lá i-dí-nam šu-ma be-lí a-ta túg ṣú-ba-tí-a a-na ṣú-ub-ri-im ta-er-ma sú-ub-ru-um a-na-ma ša-bi₄ ú ṣú-ha-ri šé-ri-a-am
english: if you are truly my lord, convert my textiles to a slave and as for the slave, as soon as he has been paid in full, send the servants.

akkadian: a-lim{ki} a-ṣé-er a-ha-ti-šu ú a-hi-šu i-lá-ak-ma a-dí té-er-tum i-tù-ra-ni be-tum₈ ú ú-tù-up-tum i ba-ri-šu-nu ma-ma-an a
english: a report will go to the city, to his sisters and his brothers and until a notice has come back the house and its inventory is their common property.

akkadian: ší-im anše a-ha-ma 6 gín kù.babbar ku-ta-nam a-dí-šu-nu-tí kù.babbar 0.3333 ma-na
english: i gave them 15 shekels of silver, the price of a donkey; further, 6 shekels of silver (and) a .

akkadian: a-na e-lá-ma qí-bi₄-ma um-ma a-šur-du₁₀-ma a-na-kam e-dí-na-a ú-ša-sí-ih-ma pí-šu en-nam-a-šur dumu
english: say to elamma, thus speaks aššur-ṭāb: i forced eddinaya to appear here and ennam-aššur, son of didi(a)ya, heard his statement.

akkadian: le-pu-uš 1 ma-na kù.babbar i-na qé-er-bi₄-ma ša 5 gín kù.babbar sà-he-er-tám
english: there is 1 mina of silver, but of that send me small goods worth 5 shekels of silver to hahhum.

akkadian: 1 ma-na 3.5 gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am be-ú-lá-at a-šùr-i-mì-ti iš-tí kù uk-ta-al
english: 1 mina and 3.5 shekels of refined silver, is the working capital of aššur-imittī; he is held by the silver.

akkadian: ha-am-ša-tim i-ša-qú-lu šu-ma lá iš-qú-lu 1.5 gín.ta i-na itu.kam-im a-na ma-na-im
english: if they have not paid (in time) they will add interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina.

akkadian: sig₅ ṣú-ha-ri 0.5 ma-na kù.babbar diri ša-du-a-sú ša-bu be-ú-lá-tí-a a-gi-a ha-bu-lam
english: also, if there are any good donkeys among my donkeys, send it here with enah-ilī's servant for my own trip.

akkadian: lu-qú-tim kù.babbar iz-ku-a-am kù.babbar tù-ša-aṣ-bi-ta-ma a ma-lá na-áš-pé-er-tim ša tám-kà-ri-im lá
english: you have had the silver seized, and in accordance with the message from the merchant you must not delay me.

akkadian: šu-ma lá iš-qúl 0.5 gín.ta i-na itu.kam a-na 1 ma-na-im ṣí-ib-tám
english: if he has not paid (in time), he will add interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina.

akkadian: šu-{d}en.líl i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 1.5 gín.ta i-na itu.kam a-na ma-na-im
english: if he has not paid (in time), he will add interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina.

akkadian: 13 ha-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 1.5 gín.ta i-na itu.kam a-na
english: if he has not paid (in time), he must add interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina.

akkadian: a-na e-na-na-at-a-šùr kù.babbar tù-ší-ru-ú a-na lá-ni-šu ta-tí-ki-il₅ lá é-tám lá ša-ra-am
english: you put trust in his outward appearance, but he as neither house nor child and still you released the silver!

akkadian: ha-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma la iš-qú-ul 1.5 gín.ta i-na itu.kam-im a-na ma-na-im
english: if he has not paid (in time), he must add interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina.

akkadian: ha-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma la iš-qú-ul 1.5 gín.ta a-na ma-na-im i-na itu.1.kam
english: if he has not paid (in time), he must add interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per mina per month.

akkadian: li-bi-i ṭup-pé-e-a šu-uk-na a-hu-ú-a a-tù-nu ih-da-ma kù.babbar šu-hu-bur ša-áš-qí-lá-ma ṭup-pí-i šé-ṣí-a-nim
english: my dear brothers, take care to have šu-hubur pay the silver and obtain the release of my tablet for me.

akkadian: 1 ma-na kù.babbar mì-ma ú-lá ni-iṣ-ba-at
english: we have not seized anything other than 1 mina of silver.

akkadian: áš-qúl ší-tí kù.babbar a-na kur-ub-ištar áš-qúl
english: the rest of the silver i have now paid to kurub-ištar.

akkadian: šé-ṣí-ma iš-tí-kà li-ib-ší-ú ù té-er-ta-kà li-li-kam-ma
english: also, send me word so i can set out and leave.

akkadian: ṭur₄-da-ni-šu a-na ú-ku qí-bi₄-ma lá aq-bi₄-a-ku-um
english: to uku: did i not speak to you about not delaying?

akkadian: ma-na urudu ku-nu-ki-kà ub-lu-nim urudu 0.6666
english: the copper was sold at the rate 0.6666 shekel 15 grains.

akkadian: ma-na.ta im-ṭí ú-ma-am ku-nu-ki-kà ni-is-ni-iq-ma 8
english: we sold your copper for one shekel of silver per mina.

akkadian: ab-kà-am anše.hi.a ší-na-am lu ṣa-hu-ru lá-nam-ma
english: the donkeys should be with short teeth and tall of height.

akkadian: e-li-ú kù.babbar ù kù.gi a-na ku-lu-ma-a
english: i entrusted the silver and gold to kulu-maya son of ataya.

akkadian: 15 gín kù.babbar i-na li-bi₄ i-ri-ší-im
english: 15 shekels of silver is owed by irišum son of amur-šamaš.

akkadian: na-áš-a-ku-nu-tí ṣú-ba-tám dí-na-ma kù.babbar ku-un-kà-ma šé-bi-lá-nim
english: sell the textile, seal the silver and send it to me.

akkadian: 3 gín kù.babbar i-na hu-lu-qá-e ik-šu-da-šu
english: his share in the losses amounted to 3 shekels of silver.

akkadian: a-na-kam kù.babbar ša-bu-a-ku ṭup-pá-am ša ku-nu-ki-šu-nu
english: give them the tablet with their seals and let them travel.

akkadian: a-na 17 ku-ta-ni ša i-na ba-at-na ha-al-qú-ni 1.3333 ma-na.ta an.na illat-tum ú-ma-li-ni-a-tí
english: for the 17 -textiles that were lost in batna the caravan paid us a compensation of 1.3333 mina of tin per (person).

akkadian: i-šu a-na mu.5.šè i-ša-qú-lu šu-ma lá iš-qú-lu 1.5 ma-na.ta i-na itu.kam-im ṣí-ib-tám
english: they will pay in 5 years; when they do not pay they will add 1.5 mina per (talent) per month as interest.

akkadian: dumu ba-ba-lá-nim e-zi-bu-nim ṣa-áb-ta-šu-ma té-er-tù-šu li-li-kam-ma kù.babbar lá-ap-ṭù-ur-ma a-na hu-ša-hi-a lá-al-qé a-šu-mì
english: seize him and let him send word to me, so i can redeem the silver and take it for my own needs.

akkadian: lu-up-ta-ma i-na pu-úz-ri-im šé-bi₄-lá-am um-ma ab-du-ma šu-ma a-bi₄ a-ta a-le-e a-wi-lá-am ga-ma-lá-am
english: abdu says / said: 'please, my father, i can do a man a favor, i will do wahtever you will write me.

akkadian: i-ṣé-er ku-na-na-a ku-li-a dumu a-lá-bi₄-im i-šu iš-tù itu.kam qá-ra-a-tim li-mu-um a-šùr-sipa dumu
english: the slave abi-ili with his fetter, kuliya, son of ali-abum, bought from samas-dugul, son of ibni-adad for 3.5 shekels of 'dust silver'.

akkadian: 1 ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb šu-ma lá-ma u₄-me-šu ṭup-pu-šu i-lá-pu-tù 5 ma-na kù.gi šu-mì
english: if they write his tablet before his term is up, he shall book 5 minas of gold in the name of šu-illil.

akkadian: túg.hi-tí-a šé-bi₄-lam šu-ma a-na a-lim{ki} ta-ša-pá-ra-ni lu ší-im túg.hi-tí-a lu ší-im ṣú-ha-ri-a
english: if you write to me in the city, send me both the proceeds from my textiles and the price of my servants.

akkadian: a-ma-kam ma-lá ta-le-e-ú a-na kù.babbar ta-e-er-ma
english: convert it to silver there as best you can.

akkadian: a-na-kam a-na ša-ba-a <gap> a-šar e-ra-bi-im
english: for that reason i have returned aluwa to you.

akkadian: áš-ba-at-ni-ma a-ta ta-áš-ta-pu-ú a-lá a-hi-im ú
english: i am treated like a non-brother and a non-gentleman.

akkadian: te-er-tí ú-qá-a ha-ra-nam a-na pu-ru-uš-ha-dim a-da-šu-um
english: i shall let him take a trip to purušhaddum.

akkadian: ṭup-pí-ni ta-ša-me-ú tí-ib-a-ma a-tal-kam ù a-hi-ú-tum
english: also, strangers may carry you away all the time.

akkadian: qá-tí-šu a-dí-in šu.nígin 20.5 ma-na urudu
english: i gave 2.5 minas of copper for his expenses.

akkadian: tám-kà-ri-im a-ma-kam kù.babbar ù ṣí-ba-sú a-na
english: pay the silver and its interest there to amur-ištar.

akkadian: ú-ṣa-ba-ku-um itu.kam qá-ra-tim li-mu-um en-na-sú-in dumu
english: month viii, year eponymy of ennam-suen, son of šu-ištar.

akkadian: lá-áš-qúl a-hu-ú-a a-tù-nu ih-da-ma kù.babbar šé-bi-lá
english: my dear brothers, take care to send the silver.

akkadian: ša la-qá-im ku-ra il₅-ta-qé 0.3333 ma-na
english: kura has successively obtained what he was entitled to.

akkadian: ù-la i-tù-wa-ar a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim ni-iš
english: the two must not raise claim against each other.

akkadian: ili₅-we-da-ak na-áš-a-kum 10 gín hu-sà-ru-um sig₅
english: take 10 shekels of extra-fine lapis lazuli for me.

akkadian: 8 ma-na kù ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi₄-im
english: iddin-abum owes 8 minas of refined silver to kula.

akkadian: da-da lá i-mu-a a-na ṣé-ri-a li-li-kam
english: if dada refuses, then let him come to me.

akkadian: šu.nígin 21 ma-na a-na am-tim e-zi-ib
english: in all 21 minas i left to the maid.

akkadian: um-ma pá-ru-ur-tum-ma a-na i-dí-a-bi-im qí-bi-ma a-ha-at
english: from parrurtum to iddin-abum: your father's sister is dead.

akkadian: ku-ul-ma-ku-ul-ma lá a-tù-ru kù.babbar ku-nu-kà-šu-ma iš-tí
english: seal the silver and let it remain with ennam-aššur.

akkadian: um-ma en-um-a-šur-ma a-na en-na-sú-in ù dingir-ba-ni
english: from ennam-aššur to enna-suen and ili-bāni: i am well.

akkadian: šu-ut lá-šu-ú e-lá-lí dumu sú-a-a ša-zu-uz-tù-šu 0.6666 ma-na
english: if he is not present, elalī!, son of sūaya, is his representative.

akkadian: le-qé-am 1.5 ma-na kù.babbar ku-nu-ki-a bu-ur-sú-in ù ì-lí-mì-tí
english: būr-suen and ilī-imittī bring you 1.5 mina of silver under my seal.

akkadian: um-ma ku-zi-a-ma a-na en-nam-a-šur qí-bi-ma urudu ku-nu-ki ša
english: from kuziya to ennam-aššur: we broke open the copper sealed by šu-zuzu.

akkadian: 2.5 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er puzur₄.ištar dumu dan-a-šur
english: puzur-ištar son of dan-aššur owes 2.5 minas of refined silver to aššuriš-takal.

akkadian: ṭup-pè lu ša dam.gàr ša e-zi-bu lu ta-na-ṣú-ur
english: and she must guard the tablets of the customers that i left.

akkadian: i-za-az i lá i-dim urudu 7 gú é
english: without reason he made the colony seize some 7 talents of copper.

akkadian: a-na a-šur-i-mì-tí qí-bi-ma um-ma a-šur-ba-ni-ma mì-nu-um ša a-na
english: to aššur-imittī from aššur-bāni: why do you keep writing me about silver?

akkadian: 12.5 gín kù.babbar ku-nu-ki-ni šu-hu-bur na-áš-a-kum 24 pí-ri-kà-ni-kà
english: hanu brought 24 pirikannus and he led them out into the villages.

akkadian: lá tù-šé-ba-lá a-ma-tum-ma a-ba-tí-iq ú ú-tù-ur dí-na-ma kù.babbar le-qé-a-ma tí-ib-a-ni-ma
english: sell even the slave-girls for any price, take the silver and set out and come!

akkadian: ištar-lá-ma-sí i-šu-ú a-na ša tù-ùh-tù-ha-nim 1.5 ma-na kù.babbar ù 2
english: they will give 1.5 mina of silver plus 2 sheep by the feast for tuhtuhānum.

akkadian: 6 gín kù.babbar ù 20 ak-li i-ṣé-er kà-ar-ší-ni ù a-li-li
english: karšini and alili owe 6 shekels of silver plus 20 loaves of bread to ištar-lamassī.

akkadian: a šu-mì-šu le-tí-iq a-na-kam kù.babbar li-ìš-qú-lu ṭup-pu-šu a-na ša ki-ma
english: they can pay the silver here; i shall (then) give his tablet to his representatives.

akkadian: iš-me-ú um-ma a-nu-pí-a-ma ṭup-pu-um lá ku-nu-ku-kà-a um-ma ga-al-ga-li-a-ma ku-nu-ku-a a-ma
english: anupiya said: does the tablet not bear your seals?" galgaliya answered: "they are my sealings.

akkadian: 2 túg.hi.a sig₅-tim a-na lí-ta-áb-ší-kà ú-šé-ba-lá-kum kù.babbar 1 ma-na ša
english: with the next caravan i will send you two fine garments for your personal wear.

akkadian: a-lá-hi-im iš-tù ha-muš-tim ša i-tur₄-dingir itu.kam ma-hu-ur-ì-lí li-mu-um e-na-sú-in iš-qú-lu-nim
english: reckoned from the week of itūr-ilī, month mahhur-ilī, in the eponymy enna-suen, they paid me.

akkadian: e-tí-qú a-na-kam um-me-a-nu-um ke-nu-um lá ša ša-ha-tim i-na kù.babbar-pì-a e-pu-lá-ni
english: here a reliable affiliated trader who is not to be feared guaranteed for my silver.

akkadian: kišib šu-nu-nu dumu a-mur-ištar kišib zu-zu dumu en-um-ì-lí kišib {d}mar.tu-ba-ni dumu šu-la-áb-ra-at
english: seal of šu-nūnu son of amur-ištar, seal of zuzu son of ennam-ilī, seal of amurrum-bāni son of šu-ilabrat.

akkadian: i-šu iš-tù sag itu.kam ša ki-na-tim li-mu-um ša qá-té ì-lí-dan a-na itu.kam
english: from the beginning of month iii, eponymy of the successor of ilī-dān, they will pay in a month.

akkadian: ig-ri-šu dí-na-šu 20 ma-na síg.hi.a ša ša-zu-a a-na i-sú-ri-ik dí-na-ma a-na hu-ur-ší-kà
english: give 20 minas of wool belonging to šazuwa to issu-arik and let him bring it to your store-room.

akkadian: a-na en-nam-a-šur ù a-lá-hi-im qí-bi₄-ma um-ma sig₅-pí-a-šur-ma a-hu-a a-tù-nu a-dí ma-lá ù
english: to ennam-aššur and ali-ahum from damiq-pī-aššur: my dear brothers, once or twice i have sent word to you.

akkadian: ma-na-im ṣí-ib-tám tù-ṣa-ba-am 18 ha-am-ša-tum u₄-mu-ú i-li-ku-ni-kum a-ha-ma 3 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am
english: further, i lent you 3 minas of refined silver against interest, from the week of amurrum-bāni, month ša-sarrātim.

akkadian: tù-šé-ba-lam 1.5 sìla ri-iš-tám iš-ru-um ù mu-sà-ru-um ù a-da-ah-ší kà-al-kà ir na-áš-a-kum
english: the slave kalka brings 1.5 litre of first-quality (oil), a belt and a girdle and -spice to you.

akkadian: i-šu 1 túg ku-ta-na-am a-na ša-na-at iš-tù a-lim{ki} ša 5 gín kù.babbar
english: he will bring one -textile worth 5 shekels of silver up here from the city within one year.

akkadian: {d}iškur-ba-ni ù en-na-sú-in ni-kà-sé i-sí-ú-ma 48.5 ma-na urudu en-na-sú-in i-ša-qal 31.5 ma-na urudu {d}iškur-ba-ni
english: adad-bāni and ennam-suen settled accounts and ennam-suen will pay 48.5 minas of copper and adad-bāni will pay 31.5 minas of copper.

akkadian: im-dí-lim i-ša-qal šu-ma e-la-ma a-na im-dí-lim a-mur-ištar la uk-ta-in kù.babbar ù ṣí-ba-tí-šu e-la-ma a-na
english: if elamma fails to confirm amur-ištar('s liability) for imdī-ilum, elamma will pay the silver and the interest on it to imdī-ilum.

akkadian: kù.babbar ša-bi-ma ší-tí kù.babbar iš-tí-kà li-ib-ší šu-ma túg.hi.a-tí ší-tap-ku-um i-ba-ší ú-ul kù.babbar ší-tap-kum i-ba-ší
english: if there is a possibility to invest textiles or to invest silver, deposit my share by taking it from (this shipment).

akkadian: na-am-ra-ni a-pu-tum tí-ib-a-ni-ma a-tal-kà-nim 1 gín kù.babbar ší-tám ša dingir-ba-ni en-na-sú-in ub-lam ša i-na-sú-in
english: enna-suen has brought 1 shekel of silver the rest that belongs to ilī-bāni. šar-adad has not brought anything belonging to enna-suen.

akkadian: a-nu-pí-a ki-ma me-er-e šál-ma-a-šur a-na ga-al-ga-li-a ù ha-ar-šu-ma-an iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am ša 10 ma-na kù.babbar ša hu-bu-li-šu-nu
english: representing the sons of šalim-aššur anupiya seized us against galgaliya and haršumnuman, and they heard a tablet concerning 10 minas of silver, their debt.

akkadian: e-zi-ib ù a-na-ku 1 ma-na 10 gín kù.babbar ha-bu-lá-ak-šu-um 1 ma-na 10 gín kù.babbar ku-nu-ki-a šé-lu-um-ar-dí
english: also, i personally owe him 1 mina 10 shekels of silver. šalim-wardī brings you the 1 mina 10 shekels of silver under my seal.

akkadian: i-na lu-qú-tim ša šé-ep kur-ub-ištar 2 gú an.na ú li-wi-sú 15 ku-ta-ni 2 anše.hi.a ṣa-lá-me kur-ub-ištar
english: of the merchandise shipped under kurub-ištar's responsibility kurub-ištar entrusted to me 2 talents of tin with its wrapping, 15 -textiles (and) 2 black donkeys.

akkadian: a-nu-pí-a ki-ma me-er-e šál-ma-a-šùr a-na ga-al-ga-li-a ù ha-ar-šu-nu-ma-an iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am ša 10 ma-na kù.babbar ša hu-bu-li-šu-nu
english: representing the sons of šalim-aššur anupiya seized us against galgaliya and haršumnuman, and they heard a tablet concerning 10 minas of silver, their debt.

akkadian: qá-tí ṣú-ha-ri-ša 1 gín kù.babbar sà-he-er-tám a-dí-šu-nu-tí 1 gín kù.babbar a-na ì.giš 0.3333 gín ú-ku-ul-tí anše
english: for a value of 1 shekel of silver i gave them sundries. 1 shekel of silver for oil 0.3333 shekel fodder for the donkey.

akkadian: kù.babbar be-ú-lá-tí-šu ku-ra i-na a-lim{ki} il₅-qé 0.5 ma-na kù.babbar a-na pá-ni-šu a-šur-ma-lik ú-šé-bi₄-il₅
english: kura has received 0.3333 mina of silver, his working capital, in the city, (and) 0.5 mina of silver aššur-mālik sent to him en route.

akkadian: a-na itu.6.kam i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl 1.5 gín.ta kù.babbar i-na itu.1.kam-im ṣí-ib-tám a-na
english: he will pay within 6 months, if he does not pay he will add 1.5 shekel of silver per month as interest per mina.

akkadian: ik-šu-sú ta-ší-a-at 10 túg.hi.a wa-at-ru-tim 1.5 ma-na an.na il₅-qé 0.5 ma-na kù.babbar bé-ú-la-tù-šu
english: as costs of transport of 10 extra textiles he (the harnesser) took 1.5 mina of tin, 0.5 mina of silver was his working capital.

akkadian: ha-am-ša-tum ú-mu-šu e-tí-qú kù.babbar ú ṣí-ba-sú ik-ri-bu ša a-šur kù.babbar i-ší-qí-il₅ lá i-ší-qí-il₅
english: send me word to wahšušana as to whether the silver and its interest - votive offerings for aššur - has been paid or not.

akkadian: ta-dí-na-am anše.hi.a-ri a-na sà-ra-dí-im ta-sà-na-li-a-ni ú-dí anše.hi.a a-na 10 gín.ta kù.babbar a-gu₅-ra-ku-um kù.babbar
english: you keep cheating me on the packing of the donkeys, yet i did rent the donkeys to you for 10 shekels of silver each.

akkadian: mì-li-ik šu-ma a-wi-lu-um kù.babbar i-šu-ú {d}utu-ba-ni na-hi-da-ma a-na ma-e ša-tá-e-em lá ú-ša-ar-šu kù.babbar-pu-um
english: if the man indeed has silver, then warn šamaš-bāni that he must not allow him to drink water. (for) the silver is your silver!

akkadian: ší-im ṣú-ba-tí-a ku-un-kà-ma li-ib-ší kù.babbar a-na hu-ša-hi-ku-nu
english: do not consider the silver for your own needs, let it remain (intact).

akkadian: e-et-qám-ma e-et-qám-ma a-šar a-wa-tim i-lá-ku lu né-pu-uš
english: do come here, come here, so we can do what the situation demands.

akkadian: mì-ma a-na a-lim{ki} lá tù-šé-ba-lá kù.babbar a-na
english: give the silver to my servants and let it remain in my house.

akkadian: iš-tù tù-um-li-a iš-du-du-nim mì-ma ú-ṭí-tim ú kù.babbar
english: urgent, do not open it up for the lady and give her nothing.

akkadian: a-na e-la-ma qí-bi-ma um-ma puzur₄-a-na-ma a-la-nu-kà a-ba-am
english: say to elamma, thus puzur-anna: i have no father and lord but you!

akkadian: ma-nu-ki-a-šur-ma le-ru-bu ú kù.babbar áš-ra-kam-ma ša-áš-qí-lá a-dí
english: he must check he that you buy, and let them remain with mannum-kī-aššur.

akkadian: ì-lí-e-mu-qí ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im 1.5 ma-na.ta a-na
english: samas-dugul is satisfied with the silver, the price of abi-ili and his fetter.

akkadian: 1 gú-tim i-na itu.kam ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb ìr
english: samas-dugul and his sons will not vidicate abi-ili from kuliya and his sons.

akkadian: a-na dumu um-me-a-nim pì-qí-id-ma lu-ub-lam ša 0.3333
english: buy onions and for 0.3333 shekel of silver and send it to me.

akkadian: u₄-mì-im ša a-šar ta-ma-lá-kà-am ku-nu-ki-a té-zi-ba-ni tí-ir-ta-ku-nu
english: to ali-ahum: i have shown the textile you sent me once or twice.

akkadian: i-na 1 ma-na kù.babbar ša tù-šé-bi₄-lá-ni síg.hi.a
english: for 1 mina of silver that you sent we bought wool for you.

akkadian: 0.3333 ma-na na-dí šu-ma be-li a-ta ší-im
english: if you are truly my lord, send me the proceeds from my textiles.

akkadian: šu-ma šál-mu-ma e-ru-bu lu šé <gap> li-ib-ší-ú
english: they should deduct 1 shekel each on the smuggling of my textiles there.

akkadian: a-we-lá-am iṭ-ra-šu-ma a-we-el-tum kà-aṣ-da-at kù.babbar lu tá-áš-qú-ul-ma
english: you are to pay the silver and it must become available for her.

akkadian: ša a-wa-tim né-nu šu-ma a-na ma-mì-tim ta-pá-li-li mu-ru-úṣ li-bi-kà a-na ša ki-ma ku-a-tí lá-pí-ta-ma
english: if you wish to start a judicial procedure to make me swear, write down your grievances for <your> representatives, so that they can make me swear.

akkadian: um-ma bu-bu-ra-num-ma a-na a-bi₄-a ù a-šùr-du₁₀ qí-bi-ma a-na a-šùr-du₁₀ qí-bi-ma iš-tù na-ar-ma-ak-a-šur ba-dí-a a-ma-kam wa-ša-áb-ma
english: from buburānum to abiya and aššur-ṭāb; specifically to aššur-ṭāb: badiya has lived there since the month narmak-aššur, and you just kept silent.

akkadian: a-šùr-du₁₀ a-na é puzur₄-li-a ú-šé-ri-ib-ni-a-tí-ma 26.3333 ma-na 8 gín kù.babbar ku-nu-ki-šu a-na dingir-na-da dumu a-šur-na-da
english: aššur-ṭāb led us into puzur-iliya's house and entrusted 26.3333 minas 8 shekels of silver under his seal to ilī-nādā son of aššur-nādā.

akkadian: tù-ša-ar šu-ma tù-ta-šé-er a-na-ku ú a-ha-tí a-na a-wa-tim ni-šé-e-kà ú ša ki-ma šu-wa-tí ší-bi₄ iš-ku-nu-nim
english: if you release it, then i and my sister will sue you in the matter."also, his representatives have set witnesses against me."

akkadian: šà.ba ša 22 gú urudu qá-ta-tí-šu-nu ì-lí-a i-tur₄-dingir ù i-dí-ku-bu-um kù.babbar-áp-šu il₅-qé-ú ší-tí
english: thereof, for the 22 talents of copper, their shares, iliya, itūr-ilī and iddin-kūbum have received its value in silver.

akkadian: 1 ku-ta-num 2 šu-re-en₆ ša šu-ku-bi-im a-na 0.6666 ma-na kù.babbar i-bu-ru-uš-ha-tim ta-ad-nu šà.ba
english: 1 -textile (and) 2 dark textiles belonging to šu-kūbum have been sold in burušhattum for 0.6666 mina of silver.

akkadian: i-ri-šum i-šu iš-tù ha-mu-uš₁₀-tim ša a-šur-i-mì-tí ù a-mur-ištar 0.3333 gín.ta i-na itu.kam ú-ṣa-áb
english: reckoned from the week of aššur-imittī and amur-ištar he must add interest at the rate 0.3333 shekel per month.

akkadian: kišib ni-mar-ištar dumu puzur₄-a-šùr kišib en-nam-a-šùr dumu kà-ri-a a-šùr-na-da dumu šu-{d}en.líl tap-pá-i-ni a-na
english: sealed by nimar-ištar son of puzur-aššur, by ennam-aššur son of karriya; aššur-nādā son of šu-illil is our (absent) partner.

akkadian: sú-kà-li-im lu-zi i-šu iš-tù itu.1.kam áb-ša-ra-ni li-mu-um ku-bi-a-a ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tam ú-ṣa-áb
english: reckoned from the month ab-šarrāni, eponymy kūbiya, he must add interest in accordance with the rule of the colony.

akkadian: ha-mu-uš-tim ša a-ku-za ṣí-ib-tám a-na 1 ma-na-im i itu.kam 1.5 gín.ta i-dí-a-bu-um ú-ṣa-áb
english: reckoned from the week of akuza iddin-abum must pay interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per mina per month.

akkadian: úz-ni pé-té-a a-na a-na-a-na qí-bi-ma ša-am-nam ṭá-i-bi ù a-na mì-ma ša áš-pu-ra-ki-ni ku-un-ki-ma
english: to anna-anna: make the oil sweet; also, seal all that i write you about and send it with šalim-wardī.

akkadian: a-ki-a dumu puzur₄-a-šùr <gap> {d}utu-ba-ni dumu en-na-sú-in ma-nu-um-ki-a-šùr dumu a-hu-wa-qar a-wi-lu a-ni-ú-tum da-a-nu
english: akiya, son of puzur-aššur, šamaš-bāni, son of ennam-suen, (and) mannum-kī-aššur, son of ahu-waqar - these gentlemen were the judges.

akkadian: en-um-a-šùr ú-šé-ṣí-am 30 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am en-na-num iš-qú-ul-ni-a-tí-ma
english: ennānum has paid us 30 minas of refined silver, and we gave him his tablet.

akkadian: gín kù.babbar tal-qé a-bu-kà é-tí dam-tí ù ìr-dí
english: your father must not make any claim on my house, my wife or my slave.

akkadian: bu-zu-zu 20 ma-na kù.babbar i da-na-ma qá-tí a-ša-kà-an
english: he will give me 20 minas of silver and i shall lay claim to that.

akkadian: mì-ma i qá-tí-šu lá i-ba-ší 1 gín kù.babbar
english: i myself obtained 4 shekels of silver (and) i (also) took 2.3333 shekels of samaya.

akkadian: ku-un-kà-ma a-na ištar-lá-ma-sí pí-iq-da ú i-ša-qá-al kù.babbar ki-ma
english: also, when the silver is paid set witnesses to prove that the wool is mine.

akkadian: i-ba-ší šu-ma sá-ah-ra-tí tí-ir-ta-kà li-li-kam-ma a-šar ta-ša-pá-ra-ni kù.babbar
english: if you are delayed, send word and i shall pay the silver where you write.

akkadian: iš-al-šu-ma um-ma kà-ru-ma a-wi-lúm a šu-mì a-mu-tí-kà dí-ik
english: go and sue for the blood-money for the man." he answered: "i shall not go.

akkadian: kù.babbar ma-lá il₅-qé-ú-ni 1 túg sig₅ ub-lá-ku-nu-tí 1
english: zuzuwa brought you 1 good textile; kulumaya brought you 1 good textile belonging to puzur-aššur.

akkadian: e-ri-ik ta-mì-šu ú-ta-mì-šu-ma 4 ma-na urudu a-na-ku a-dí
english: make him swear." i made him swear and i personally deposited 4 minas of copper.

akkadian: a-na ku-li-a qí-bi₄-ma um-ma al-pì-lí ú a-šur-lá-ma-sí šál-ma-ni
english: to kuliya, thus say alpilī and aššur-lamassī: we are well, we are staying in tawiniya.

akkadian: kù.babbar a-ša-qá-lá-ku-um a-ma-kam en-na-nàm ṣa-áb-ta-ma 0.5 ma-na 2
english: if ennānum refuses to pay you the silver, then state to him your harsh conditions.

akkadian: ša-lim-a-šùr gán-lam kù.babbar e-tí-qá-ni ša-du-a-tám ú ni-is-ha-tim šál-ma-a-š
english: he has been expelled(?) in accordance with a verdict of the city and the attorneys.

akkadian: a-na tám-kà-ri-kà li-ba-am dì-in kù.babbar 1 gín li-li-ma
english: may every shekel of silver be realised for it, as it is not your silver.

akkadian: ṣú-ha-ru-um lá i-sà-hu-ur ṭù-ur-da-ni ša 1 gín kù.babbar
english: buy shoes for 1 shekel of silver and some shoes for women and send them.

akkadian: ta-al-pu-ut a-ni-ša-am ta-áš-pu-ra-am um-ma ší-it-ma šu-up-ra-ma ší-me-a ma-ma-an
english: she wrote me here as follows: 'send (somebody) to collect the price due to me'.

akkadian: ṣí-ba-sú ša-áš-qí-lá-šu šu-ma mì-ma kù.babbar ù ṣí-ba-sú li-dí-na-ku-nu-tí-ma
english: place the tablet of ikūn-pī-ištar among my tablets and after that you four must seal.

akkadian: ke-e lá-li-kà-am ú-lá 10 gín kù.babbar i-na qá-tí-a
english: how could i come while i do not even have 10 shekels of silver available?

akkadian: lá ú-kà-i-na-šu-nu 0.3333 ma-na 5 gín.ta kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am
english: if he does not confirm them he shall pay 25 shekels of refined silver apiece.

akkadian: ha-mu-uš-tim ša puzur₄.ištar dumu šu-lá-áb-ra-at itu.kam hu-bu-ur li-mì-im a-lá-hi-im kù.babbar il₅-qé
english: in the week of puzur-ištar son of šu-ilabrat, month hubur, eponymy ali-ahum, he received the silver.

akkadian: 2.6666 ma-na 4 gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er ša-lim-a-hi-im ù šu-sú-in en-na-sú-in
english: a debt of 2 minas 44 shekels of refined silver šalim-ahum and šu-suen owe to ennam-suen.

akkadian: šà.ba 2 túg.hi.a ta-áb-lu 7 túg.hi.a a-na qá-tí a-bi-ni ṭá-hu-ú 3
english: of that 2 textiles have been taken away. 7 textiles are transferred to our father's account.

akkadian: a-na en-um-a-šur qí-bi₄-ma um-ma a-na-a-na-ma na-áš-pè-er-tám ša iš-tí ṣú-ha-ri ú-bi₄-ku-ni lá
english: to ennam-aššur from anna-anna: the missive that i dispatched with the servants must not be lost.

akkadian: le-qé šu-ma kù.babbar a qá-tí-kà ù-la ma-qí-it é dam.gàr a ṣí-ib-tim
english: if no silver has fallen into your hands, then take some at interest from a merchant-house.

akkadian: puzur₄.ištar a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš-ki i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šùr
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: ša e-zi-ba-ku-nu-tí-ni a-na i-dí-a-šur šu-uq-lá ú ma-lá ta-áš-ta-aq-lá-ni kù.babbar a-na a-lá-hi-im
english: also, what you have paid, let him give the silver to ali-ahum until my instructions arrive.

akkadian: a-na kù.babbar a-nim ma-ma-an a-na a-lá-hi-im i-tù-a-ar a-ni-na dumu man-a-na ú-ba-áb-šu
english: if anyone raises claim against ali-ahum for this silver, annina son of puzur-anna will clear him.

akkadian: i-ša-qú-lu 1.3333 gín kù.babbar ša ri-ik-sú i-na é-bé-tí-šu hi-li-qú-ni i-dí-a-šùr i-ša-qal
english: iddin-aššur will pay 1.3333 shekel of silver concerning a package that was lost in his house.

akkadian: ni-kà-al qá-du-um ṣú-ha-ri-im ša sig₅-a-a mì-šu-um kù.babbar ú-lá tù-šé-ba-lam-ma ma i-na
english: why do you not send any silver, with damqaya's servant, for we are dying from hunger!

akkadian: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-ma igi gír ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí a-dí-in šu-ku-bu-um dumu a-šur-i-dí ù i-dí-ištar dumu a-šur-na-da tap-pá-ú-a
english: the kanesh colony gave me for these proceedings and i gave my testimony before aššur's dagger. šu-kūbum son of aššur-idī and iddin-ištar son of aššur-nādā were my (absent) partners.

akkadian: a-lim{ki} da-nam ša ki-ma kù.ki ú kù.babbar ša kà-nu-tí-ni
english: i have a strong tablet of the city stating that the silver and gold belong to kannutum.

akkadian: a-ta ni-sí-ú-ma ni-iz-ku-ú lá tù-na-ha-ni a-lá-hu-um en-um-a-šùr e-pu-ul um-ma
english: do not obstruct me." ali-ahum answered ennam-aššur, saying: "the memoranda are sealed by you and by me.

akkadian: kù.babbar a-na ku-a-tí ta-dí-in 0.5 ma-na 7 gín kù.babbar
english: while you mother was still alive, before we left for the campaign, iliya was thrown into jail.

akkadian: kù.babbar ta-er-šu-nu šu-ma lá ú-šé-ri-bu-ni-šu-nu tí-ir-ta-kà ki pá-ni-im-ma li-li-kam-ma
english: if they have not brought them in, send me word with the first transport to inform me.

akkadian: šu-hu-bur a-na itu.3.kam i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl ki-ma a-wa-at
english: if he does not pay he will add (interest) in accordance with the rule of the colony.

akkadian: kù.babbar a-na ša ki-ma šu-a-tí ú-šé-ba-lam-ma urudu i-ša-qú-lu šu-ma
english: enna-suen, his daughter haditum and ataya son of ikūn-pīya owe 2.5 talents of good copper to šalim-aššur.

akkadian: a-na šu-ištar qí-bi₄-ma um-ma ì-lí-iš-tí-kál-ma ki-ma ša-nu-a-tí-ni lá a-tù-ra-am
english: to šu-ištar speak, this is what iliš-tikal says: since you were elsewhere i did not come back.

akkadian: kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am a-na ištar-lá-ma-sí ù ma-nu-ki-e-lí-a a-na ṣí-ib-tim i-dí-in
english: here kukuwa paid 2 minas 4 shekels of silver and entrusted it to šu-ištar under his seal.

akkadian: ap-lúm la-šu é-bé-tám né-nu ni-tá-ru ki-ma ṭup-pá-am ta-áš-me-ú tí-ib-a-ma
english: let us take away the house." set out and come here when you have heard the letter.

akkadian: ha-am-ša-tim i-ša-qú-lu šu-ma lá iš-qú-lu 1.5 gín.ta i itu.kam-im
english: if they do not pay they will add (an interest of) 1.5 shekel per mina per month.

akkadian: a-na a-lá-hi-im ú zu-ku-a qí-bi-ma um-ma puzur₄-a-šur-ma 13 ma-na
english: to ali-ahum and zukuwa from puzur-aššur: ennam-aššur brought 13 minas of tin there.

akkadian: a-ha-ma 0.5 ma-na kù.babbar ú 4 na-ru-uq ar-ša-tum ga-me-er
english: further, 0.5 mina of silver and 4 sacks of wheat have been spent.

akkadian: a-na a-šur-ni-im-ri qí-bi-ma um-ma ku-ur-bi₄-li-ma urudu ša tù-šé-bi₄-lá-ni lá
english: to aššur-nimrī from kurub-ilī: they do not want the copper you sent me.

akkadian: ú-ku-ul-tí-šu šu-ut-ma il₅-qé ší-tí ṣú-ba-tí-kà 22 túg 4.83334 gín.ta
english: the rest of your textiles, 22 pieces, were sold for 4.8333 shekels each.

akkadian: i qá-qá-ad šál-mì-šu-nu i-na a-lim{ki} ù gán-lim ra-ki-is itu.1.kam
english: they are jointly responsible for the silver, both in the city and abroad.

akkadian: kù.babbar-pí-a túg.hi.a ša ta-al-ha-at ša-ma-nim šu-ma ša ta-al-ha-at lá-šu
english: if there are none from talhat, then make a profitable purchase for me.

akkadian: a-na kù.babbar ta-e-er-ma tí-ib-a-ma a-tal-kam a-hi a-ta tí-de₈-e ki-ma
english: gentleman as you are, convert your merchandise into silver and come immediately here.

akkadian: 5 ma-na an.na ù 0.6666 ma-na kù i li-bi
english: 5 minas of tin and 0.6666 minas of silver is owed by iddin-abum.

akkadian: 5 gín kù.babbar šé-ep-ištar il₅-qé a-ma-kam lu-ba-li-ṭá-ku-um 7 ma-na
english: aššur-ennam son of šamaš-bāni brings you 7 minas of silver under our seals.

akkadian: ma-na 6 gín kù.babbar iṣ-bu-tù ù a-na-ku kù.babbar igi
english: and i have personally seized silver before 2 witnesses together with the customers.

akkadian: igi ni-mar-ištar igi en-um-a-šùr a-šùr-na-da dumu šu-{d}en.líl tap-pá-i-ni a-na
english: witnessed by nimar-ištar, by ennam-aššur; aššur-nādā son of šu-illil is our (absent) partner.

akkadian: ni-mar-ištar igi en-nam-a-šùr a-šùr-na-da dumu šu-{d}en.líl tap-pá-i-ni a-na a-wa-tim
english: witnessed by nimar-ištar, by ennam-aššur; aššur-nādā son of šu-illil is our (absent) partner.

akkadian: kù.babbar i-na qá-tí-kà lá ma-qí-it a-ni-tám lá a-ni-tám tí-ir-ta-kà
english: send me word whether or not any silver has fallen into your hands.

akkadian: i-nu-mì i-dí-a-bu-um a-wa-sú iq-bi-ú 10 ma-na kù.babbar a-na ša-lim-a-šùr
english: when iddin-abum spoke his will he gave 10 minas of silver to šalim-aššur.

akkadian: il₅-qé ṭup-pu-um ša 2 me-at 7 ma-na urudu ša
english: any tablet concerning 207 minas of copper which may turn up is invalid.

akkadian: ša 2 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er en-na-nim dumu a-zu-a
english: that ennānum, son of azua, owes 2 minas of refined silver to elamma.

akkadian: i-sú-ri-ik a-na a-lim{ki} i-lá-ak-ma é-tí-šu ša bu-ri-im a-šar a-ni ša-lim-a-šùr wa-áš-bu-ni a-na tù-ud-hi-li-a a-hu tù-li a-na ší-mì-im i-dí-šu-nu
english: as issu-arik will go to the city, he sold his houses by the well, where at present šalim-aššur is living, to tudhiliya the brother of tuli.

akkadian: i-sú-rik₁₃ a-na a-lim{ki} i-lá-ak-ma é-tí-šu ša bu-ri-im a-šar a-ni-i ša-lim-a-šùr wa-áš-bu-ni a-na tù-ud-ha-li-a a-hu tù-li a-na ší-mì-im i-dí-šu-nu
english: as issu-arik will go to the city, he sold his houses by the well, where at present šalim-aššur is living, to tudhaliya the brother of tuli.

akkadian: 40 ma-na kù.babbar ni-is-ha-sú diri ša-du-a-sú ša-bu en-um-a-šùr a-na a-lu-a ù e-ni-ša-ru-um i-na ša-la-tù-ar ku-nu-ki ip-qí-id
english: 40 minas of silver, its import duty added, its transport tariff paid for, ennam-aššur entrusted to aluwa and enišārum in šalatuwar under seal.

akkadian: 40 ma-na kù.babbar ni-is-ha-sú diri ša-du-a-sú ša-bu-ú en-um-a-šùr a-na a-lu-a ù e-ni-ša-ri-im i-na ša-lá-tù-ar ku-nu-ki ip-qí-id
english: 40 minas of silver, its import duty added, its transport tariff paid for, ennam-aššur entrusted to aluwa and enišārum in šalatuwar under seal.

akkadian: ša-na-at sá-ah-ra-ku-ma a-na a-lim{ki} a-lá-kam lá a-le a-wi-lu-um <gap> wa-ar-kà-at
english: because of this i am staying here now for a year and i could not go to the city.

akkadian: lá-šu kù.babbar ù ṣí-ba-sú a-li-a ù ha-ar-ša a-na a-al-du₁₀ i-ša-qú-lu
english: if there is no profit aliya and harša will pay the silver and the interest on it to āl-ṭāb.

akkadian: a-na púzur-a-na qí-bi-ma um-ma lá-ma-sí-ma ù ah-ba-áš-tí-ma a-na é a-lim{ki}
english: say to puzur-anna, thus lamassī and ah-bāštī: we keep going to the city hall, but they yield us nothing.

akkadian: i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb itu.kam
english: if he has not paid (in time) he is to add interest according to the rule of the colony.

akkadian: a-ṣé-er ša ki-ma i-a-tí ù ku-a-tí a-na kù.babbar ša-áš-qú-lim áš-ta-pá-ra-šu-ma
english: also, after i personally arrived, he demanded and demanded the silver repeatedly, but he would not pay the silver.

akkadian: iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša kà-ší-im 1 gín.ta ṣí-ib-tám i-na itu.1.kam-im ú-ṣa-áb
english: reckoned from the week of the -official he will pay interest at the rate of 1 shekel per month.

akkadian: um-ma e-la-ma ù a-šur-dan-ma a-na a-mur-ištar a-šur-na-da ù ku-ni-lim qí-bi₄-ma
english: thus elamma and aššur-dān, say to amur-ištar, aššur-nādā, and kūnilum: 7 minas 12 shekels of silver iddin-ištar brought here.

akkadian: áš-pu-ra-ku-nu-tí ki-ma ṭup-pì ta-áš-me-a-ni 30 túg.hi.a sig₅-tim
english: if ikūn-pī-aššur arrives there, he and aššur-rabi will ship it.

akkadian: i-ša-qal kù.babbar a šu-mì en-um-a-šur gán-lam e-tí-iq
english: the silver will travel overland in the name of ennam-aššur.

akkadian: 6 gín kù.babbar i-ṣé-er kà-ar-ší-ni ù a-li-li
english: karšini and alili owe 6 shekels of silver to ištar-lamassī.

akkadian: um-ma en-um-a-šur-ma a-na ku-ra qí-bi-ma ha-ra-ni a-na
english: from ennam-aššur to kura: my journey goes to the city.

akkadian: ub-lá-ku-um 2.3333 ma-na 4 gín kù.babbar ku-nu-ki-ni
english: the rest of the copper is 5 talents 12 minas.

akkadian: lu-ub-lam a-na-kam nu-a-ú a ṣí-ib-tim e-ta-na-ri-šu-ni i-na-sú-in
english: here the natives keep demanding (silver) at interest from me.

akkadian: iš-tí-ni a-na šál-ma-a-šur dí-na-ma an.na ša-lim-a-šur lu-ub-lam
english: give it to šalim-aššur and let šalim-aššur bring the tin.

akkadian: 2.5 gín kù.babbar a-na sà-he-er-tim e-lá-li na-áš-a-kum
english: elāli brings you 2.5 shekels of silver for small goods.

akkadian: kù.babbar a-na e-na-na-tim a-dí-in a-pu-tum mì-nu-um ša
english: please, what is this, that you released silver to ennanat-assur?

akkadian: pá-ni-e-ma i-hi-id-ma tí-ir-ta-kà li-li-kam a-na kà-lá kù.babbar
english: pay attention and send me word with the first transport.

akkadian: ma-na kù.babbar i-ri-ha-am 5.3333 ma-na kù.babbar ší-ip-kà-tí-kà
english: we received 5.3333 minas from what you invested with ali-ahum.

akkadian: ší-sí-a ù am-ma ša ki-ma i-a-tí šu-{d}en.líl
english: let my brother šalim-aššur come, and then settle with him.

akkadian: i-hi-id-ma kù.babbar ša-áš-qí-il₅ a-du-um puzur₄-a-šur tí-ir-tí i-lá-ak-šu-um
english: with respect to puzur-aššur, my instructions will go to him.

akkadian: 0.3333 ma-na 5 gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am ga-al-dá-a
english: 25 shekels of refined silver galdaya of elamma will manage.

akkadian: šu-ma a-na šu-ku-bi-im ma-ma-an i-tù-a-ar ša-lim-a-šùr ú-ba-áb-šu
english: if anyone raises claim against šu-kūbum, šalim-aššur will clear him.

akkadian: <gap>-a ma-li-a-nim a-hu-a a-tù-nu ṭup-pá-am a-we-el-tám ša-áš-me-a
english: my dear brothers, make the lady listen to the letter.

akkadian: ni-dí-in igi ú-ra-a igi {d}mar.tu-ba-ni bu-zu-ta-a tap-pá-i-ni
english: witnessed by uraya, by amurrum-bāni; buzutaya was our (absent) partner.

akkadian: gín ša-du-a-tám ni-dí 4.6666 ma-na 2.5 gín kù.babbar ku-nu-ki-ni ša-lim-wa-ar-dim na-áš-a-ku-um 1 gín kù.babbar
english: thereof we deposited 3.5 shekels as transport tariff. šalim-wardī brings you 4.6666 minas 2.5 shekels of silver under our seals.

akkadian: ma-ṣa-ra-tim an.na 10 ma-na nu-šé-ra-ba-am tí-ir-ta-kà li-li-kam-ma a-na tí-ir-tí-ni i-hi-id 2 ma-na kù.babbar a-na
english: send word whether we shall let some 10 minas of tin enter the guard-posts, and pay attention to our instructions.

akkadian: iš-tù itu.kam ku-zal-lu li-mu-um a-šur-i-mì-tí 1.5 ma-na.ta i-na itu.kam a-na gú ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣú-bu urudu
english: reckoned from the month kuzallu, eponymy aššur-imittī, they will pay interest at the rate 1.5 mina per month per talent.

akkadian: ša-ni-tim šé-pí-šu-nu 1 ma-na kù.babbar ší-im sú-ub-ri-im pá-ni-tim ù wa-ar-ki-ú-tim ša ir-dí-ú-ni-ni i-dí-nu-nim šà.ba
english: they gave 1 mina of silver, the price of the first slave and the earlier ones which they conducted here.

akkadian: šu-ma lá iš-qúl 1 ma-na.ta i-na itu.kam ṣí-ib-tám a-na 10 ma-na-e
english: if he has not paid in time, he must pay interest at the rate 1 mina per ten minas per month.

akkadian: ša-ṣú-ru šu-uk-na 0.3333 ma-na 1 gín kù.babbar ší-im ṣú-ba-tim 21 ma-na
english: i left the price of a textile, 0.3333 mina 1 shekel of silver (and) 21 minas 10 shekels of with you.

akkadian: a-lim{ki} ta-ša-qá-lam a-hi a-ta kù.babbar a-na é-a-ba-áš-tí šu-qú-ul-ma wa-ar-ki-tí a-na a-lim{ki}
english: please, my brother, pay the silver to ea-bāštī and see to it that it catches up with me in the city.

akkadian: a-na a-la-hi-im qí-bi-ma um-ma a-mur-ištar-ma 9 gú 17 ma-na urudu qá-tí
english: to ali-ahum from amur-ištar: aššuriš-takil recieved 9 talents 17 minas of copper, our father's share, in the office of the colony.

akkadian: i-ša-qal šu-ma i-na ú-mì-šu ma-al-ú-tim lá iš-qúl 22.5 še kù.babbar i-na
english: if he does not pay when his term is due he will add 1 / 8 shekel of silver per month.

akkadian: a-na mì-iš-li ša a-bi-ni a-dí-i ma-lá ta-az-me-ru-ni šu-mì a-bi-ni i-na é kà-ri-im lu-up-ta-ma ú mì-iš-li ša a-bi-a i-dí-ištar ù
english: write our father's name in the office of the colony for what you account for them, and then iddin-ištar and ennānum may deposit my father's (other) half-share.

akkadian: kišib a-šur-i-mì-tí dumu du-dí-ki kišib ú-ṣur-ša-a-šur dumu a-ku-a kišib a-šur-ba-ni kà-al-bi₄-im 15
english: seal of aššur-imittī son of dudiki, seal of uṣur-ša-aššur son of akuwa, seal of aššur-bāni, the dog".

akkadian: 8 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ku-pí-a dumu šu-a-nim i-na ší-im síg.hi.a ša ú-ší-na-lam
english: ikūn-piya son of šu-anum has received 8 minas of refined silver from the proceeds of ušinalam's wool.

akkadian: ma-na kù.gi ù 0.5 ma-na kù.babbar mì-ma a-nim ku-nu-ki-a púzur.ištar dumu en-na-nim
english: all this, under my seal, puzur-istar, son of ennanum, from zalpa, brought to our bride in spe.

akkadian: 1.3333 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-na ší-im síg.hi.a ša ú-ší-na-lam šu-ku-bu-um dumu e-na-ma-nim
english: šu-kūbum son of ennam-anum has received 1.3333 mina of refined silver from the proceeds of ušinalam's wool.

akkadian: a-na i-tur₄-dingir qí-bi₄-ma um-ma en-na-sú-in-ma áš-pu-ra-kum um-ma a-na-ku-ma ṭup-pu-a a-šar a-lá-hi-im dumu
english: to itūr-ilī from enna-suen: i wrote you and said: my tablets are with ali-ahum son of šalim-aššur.

akkadian: 10 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am tù-ur-a-a dumu ú-zu-a i-na ší-im síg.hi.a ša ú-ší-na-lam
english: tūraya son of uzuwa has received 10 minas of refined silver from the proceeds of ušinalam's wool.

akkadian: dí-na-šu bi <gap> a a-na ṣé-er am-tí-a áš-ta-pá-ra-ni ša li-bi tám-kà-ri-a lu
english: from the month allanātum - as to the silver you owe me, when you arrive from purušhaddum you will send it to me.

akkadian: kù.babbar ri-ik-sí-im 2.25 gín kù.babbar ša ì-lí-a ni-is-ha-tum ša a-šùr na-ad-a kù.babbar
english: in the packet of silver 2 1 / 4 shekels of silver of iliya, excise for (the city of) aššur, have been put.

akkadian: i-na é.gal-lim 1 anše sig₅ ni-da-an-ma me-at sá-da-li ší-im-šu-nu i-na a-ba-an é.gal-lim
english: sealed by enna-suen son of ikuwa, by salliya son of iddin-aššur by aššur-nādā son of ennam-aššur, by damiq-pī-aššur, by man-mahir son of amur-ištar.

akkadian: a-na ì-lí-dan i-da-an-ma 6 ma-na kù.babbar i-na ri-iš síg.hi.a-ma ì-lí-dan a-na a-hi-kà
english: here he has been delayed because of those goods, and thus he does not pay heed to the orders of your father's house.

akkadian: ù a-mur-ištar a-na 1 ma-na-im 2 gín.ta i-na itu.kam ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣú-bu kù.babbar i-na qá-qá-ad šál-mì-šu-nu ra-ki-is itu.kam
english: from the week of aššur-imittī and amur-ištar they will add per 1 mina2 shekels per month as interest.for the silver they are jointly liable.

akkadian: zu-ú-a ša 7 ma-na 7 gín an.na ša ni-ip-lá-tim ša ku-zi-a a-na illat-tim ha-bu-lu an.na dan-a-šùr iš-qú-ul
english: concerning the 7 minas 7 shekels of tin from the balance payment that kuziya owes to the caravan - dan-aššur has paid the tin.

akkadian: dumu qàr-da-a a-ha-ma 10 gín kù.babbar a be-a-li-im a-na šu-nu-nu 7 gín kù.babbar a-na ì-lí-áš-ra-ni ma-ah-ri-šu-nu-ma a-dí-in
english: furthermore, i gave 10 shekels of silver as a working-capital to šu-nūnu and 7 shekels of silver to ilī-ašrannī witnessed by the same men.

akkadian: 40 ma-na kù.babbar ni-is-ha-sú diri ša-du-a-sú ša-bu en-um-a-šùr a-na a-lu-a ù e-ni-ša-ru-um i-na ša-la-tù-ar ku-nu-ki ip-qí-id um-ma
english: 40 minas of silver, its import duty added, its transport tariff paid for, ennam-aššur has entrusted to aluwa and enišārum in šalatuwar under seal.

akkadian: a-dí-na-ku-ni tám-kà-ru-um en-um-a-šur lu-qú-tám ma-lá ta-áš-a-ma-šu-ni a-na en-um-a-šur dumu ša-lim-a-šur dí-in-ma tí-ir-ta-ku-nu le-zi-ba-am
english: any goods you have bought for him you must give to ennam-aššur son of šalim-aššur, and let him leave me a message from you (plural).

akkadian: ṣú-ha-ri-a dí-na-ma i bé-tí-a li-bi-ší a-sú-ri a-wa-tum e im-qú-ta-ma ma-ma-an a-na ba-áb dingir-lim e
english: god forbid that the matter descends on me so that someone makes me go to the gate of the god and i and you too become unhappy.

akkadian: diri ša-du-a-sú ša-bu ik-ri-bi₄ ša a-šur ku-nu-ki-a igi a-zu-ta-a igi i-dí-ba-ni i-na hu-ra-ma a-dí-na-ku-um um-ma
english: as for the textiles you entrusted to me in luhusaddiya - there was trouble on the roads and the textiles stayed in the villages until the situation was cleared.

akkadian: ku-nu-ki ša a-bi₄-ni igi a-lá-hi-im dumu e-lá-lí igi i-dí-a-šur dumu dan-a-šùr igi ṣí-lu-uš-da-gan ni-sú-ùh-ma urudu
english: we removed our father's sealings before ali-ahum son of elāli, iddin-aššur son of dan-aššur, and ṣilluš-dagān, and we checked the copper, and there were 47 talents of black copper.

akkadian: i-ma-ra-aṣ a-na ší-ip-kà-at ku-ra 7 gín.ta kù.babbar a-bu-ni iš qú-ul
english: our father paid at 7 shekels of silver on each (mina) for kura's investments.

akkadian: 1 ku-ta-nam i-ṣé-ri-a il₅-qé iš-tù hu-ra-ma a-dí dur₄-hu-mì-it 0.5 ma-na
english: the fees from hurama to durhumit amounted to 0.5 mina 2 shekels per donkey-load.

akkadian: 15 gín kù.babbar li-tí sig₅ i-ṣé-er wa-al-hi-iš-na pé-ru-wa ù tù-wa-tù-ú-i
english: 15 shekels of refined -silver walhišna, peruwa and tuwatuwi, his wife, owe to lamassutum.

akkadian: mì-ma lá i-da-na-am šu-ma be-lí a-ta kù.babbar ša nu-a-im ša-bi₄-i
english: if you are truly my lord, satisfy me with the silver from the anatolian.

akkadian: dí-in tám-kà-ru-tim e-ta-wu šu-ma kù.babbar i-na iš-ra-tim ba-tí-iq ša-lim-a-šùr i-na-dí
english: if the silver is insufficient for the tithe, šalim-aššur will deposit (what is missing).

akkadian: um-ma a-šùr-gi-im-lí-ma a-na a-zu-ú iš-ta-ah-šu ú ni-wa-la qí-bi₄-ma 10 gín
english: from aššur-gimlī to azu, ištahšu and niwala: aluwa brings you 10 shekels of tin.

akkadian: ni-kà-sí ni-sí kù.babbar a-na li-ip-ta-nim dí-in-ma ší-ma-am ša ba-lá-ṭí-a li-il₅-qé-am
english: give the silver to lipit-anum and let him acquire a profitable purchase for me.

akkadian: šé-ep-ištar e-zi-ib šà.ba 30 ku-ta-ni a-na šu-pu-nu-ma-an ni-dí-in 5 túg
english: we gave thereof 30 kutānus to šuppunuman; 5 textiles for the guide from išhianit.

akkadian: šu-be-lúm i-šu iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku ù e-me-me a-na itu.kam
english: reckoned from the week of aššur-taklāku and ememe he will pay within a month.

akkadian: ú i ṣí-li-a-ni šé-ri-a-šu-nu-ma a-na {d}utu.sipa dí-na-ma lu-ub-lam a-na-kam a-na
english: confident of my tablets i seized aššur-taklāku's goods here and i also detain him.

akkadian: iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša sú-kà-li-a a-na 13 ha-am-ša-tim kù.babbar i-ša-qal kù.babbar
english: reckoned from the week of sukkalliya he must pay the silver in 13 weeks.

akkadian: ša dan-a-šur lu-zi i-šu iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša {d}mar.tu-ba-ni ú a-šur-na-da
english: reckoned from the week of amurrum-bāni and aššur-nādā they must pay within 4 weeks.

akkadian: 1 ma-na 15 gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er ú-ṣur-ša-a-šur dumu a-ta-ta
english: uṣur-ša-aššur son of atata owes 1 mina 15 shekels of refined silver to ah-šalim.

akkadian: ší-a-ma-tim kù.babbar ma-la ta-na-dí-ú a-na ša ki-ma i-a-tí dí-in ù
english: my dear brother, give whatever silver and purchases you will deposit to my representatives.

akkadian: 1 ma-na kù.babbar iš-tù a-lim{ki} i-na e-lá-i-šu a-na ištar-lá-ma-sí ù a-lá-hi-im sig₅-pì-i-a-šùr dumu ir-ad-ì-lí-šu i-ša-qal
english: damiq-pī-aššur son of warad-ilīšu will pay 1 mina of silver to ištar-lamassī and ali-ahum when he comes up from the city.

akkadian: um-ma lá-ma-sà-tum púzur-a-šùr ù en-um-a-šur-ma a-na a-ta-a-a ir-ma-a-šur um-mì-iš-ha-ra ù ší-ma-at-ištar qí-bi₄-ma lá li-bi i-lim-ma
english: thus lamassutum, puzur-aššur and ennam-aššur, say to ataya, ir'am-aššur, ummī-išhara and šīmat-ištar: unfortunately your mother and both your brothers are dead.

akkadian: ha-ni ni-dí-šum i-na be-ú-lá-at ha-ni ša a-na ba-al-ṭù-šar ta-dí-na-ni 10 gín kù.babbar bu-lá-tí-šu-ma ni-il₅-qé um-ma
english: of the working capital of hani that you gave to balṭu-šar we received 10 shekels of silver as his own assets.

akkadian: {d}mar.tu-ba-ni dumu ma-na-na igi a-šùr-i-dí dumu mu-mu-lá-nim igi šu-ku-bi-im dumu a-šùr-i-dí igi šu-ma-li-ba-a-šùr dumu ku-us-ku-sí-im
english: witnessed by amurrum-bāni son of manana, by aššur-idī son of mumulānum, by šu-kūbum son of aššur-idī, by šumma-libba-aššur son of kuskusum.

akkadian: 2 túg.hi.a ku-ta-ni ša šu-ištar dumu lu-zi-ni a-na 27 ma-na urudu ma-sí-im li-ip-ta-num a-na i-dí-a-šùr
english: two -textiles belonging to šu-ištar, son of luzini, liptānum gave to iddin-aššur, son of dān-aššur, for 27 minas of refined copper.

akkadian: túg.hi.a il₅-tab-šu 1 me-at 17 šu-ru-tum a-na é.gal-lim e-ru-bu šà.ba 2 túg qá-a-tí ša kur-ub-ištar
english: five textiles they took for their clothing. 117 dark textiles entered the palace, two of which are the share of kurub-ištar.

akkadian: ki-ma a-šur-i-dí ša-lim-a-šur i-da-an ṭup-pu-um ha-ar-mu-um ša hu-bu-ul a-šur-i-dí i-na é ú-ṣú-ur-ša-a-šur dumu a-šur-ma-lik i-na li-bi₄ ṭup-pì-šu e-li-a-ma ù a-na
english: this certified tablet concerning aššur-idī's debt appeared in the house of uṣur-ša-aššur son of aššur-malik among his tablets, and thereafter they entrusted it to aššur-malik son of ali-ahum.

akkadian: a-na a-mu-ru-ba-ni ù šál-ma-a-šùr qí-bi₄-ma um-ma šu-ku-bu-ma 5 anše im ṣa-lá-mu i-qá-ar-bi₄-im 2
english: to amurrum-bāni and šalim-aššur from šu-kūbum: i am leading 5 black donkeys, thereof 2 with -loads, to you.

akkadian: a-na ás-qú-dim ù a-bi₄-lá qí-bí-ma um-ma i-dí-sú-in-ma i-na urudu a-šur-i-dí 1 gú urudu
english: say to asqudum? and abila thus iddin-suen: give from aššur-idī's copper 1 talent of refined copper to ennam-suen.

akkadian: {d}im-pí-lá-ah ṭur₄-da-nim a-na en-nam-a-šur qí-bi-ma a-na ša ú-na-hi-du a-hi a-ta i-hi-id-ma ṣú-ha-ri ṭur₄-dam
english: to ennam-aššur: pay heed to what i instructed you to do, my dear brother, and send my servant.

akkadian: igi a-šur-gal igi a-šur-{d}utu-ši igi pí-lá-ah-a-šur 10 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pu-um iš-tí puzur₄-a-na ni-a-im
english: witnessed by aššur-rabi, by aššur-šamšī, by pilah-aššur. 10 minas of refined silver is owed by our own puzur-anna.

akkadian: en-um-a-šùr i-ša-qal šu-ma é-té šu-nu-tí ku-li-a lá il₅-qé a-na kù.babbar-pì-šu wa-ší-ib bé-tim en-um-a-šùr
english: should kuliya not acquire that house, then ennum-assur will sue the resident of that house for his silver.

akkadian: ša-i-il₅ ša túg.hi.a ub-lá-ni ší-im 4 túg ša a-bi-a-nim ú ší-im ku-a-ú-tim šu-ma
english: ask aluwa there, who brought the textiles, about the price of abī-anum's 4 textiles and that of yours.

akkadian: igi {d}i-ba-ni dumu ga-na-a igi ku-lu-ma-a a-šùr-i-mì-tí 0.3333
english: in the presence of adad-bāni, son of ganaya, (and) of kulumaya.

akkadian: wa-ar-ki-tim lu-qú-tum i-ṣí-bi-it-ma lu-qú-tám ša a-sà-nim é.gal-lúm i-ta-ba-al
english: afterwards merchandise was seized and the palace took away asānum's merchandise.

akkadian: a-bi₄-a dumu šu-da-ga-an a-ha-ma ṭup-pu-um ha-ar-mu-um ša be-ú-lá-ti-šu
english: separately, there still exists a valid record of his working capital.

akkadian: illat-at i-ku-nim dumu dingir.illat wa-ar-ki illat-at puzur₄-ì-lí i-lá-qé-ú
english: after the caravan of puzur-ilī (has come) they will receive them.

akkadian: a-ra-dí-a-kum sá-ri-dam a-dí ha-hi-im a-na 17 gín kù.babbar
english: i rented a driver until hahhum for 17 shekels of silver.

akkadian: qá-dum a-he-a-ma šé-a-ni igi puzur₄-a-šùr igi en-na-nim a-na
english: sue me together with my brothers." witnessed by puzur-aššur, by ennānum.

akkadian: itu.1.kam hu-bu-ur li-mu-um ša qá-té a-bu-ša-lim dumu ì-lí-a-lim
english: month vi, eponymy of the successor of abu-salim, son of ili-alum.

akkadian: šu-ut dam.gàr-ru-um a-ma-kam tù-ur-ištar dumu zu-ma-<gap> be-lá-a-wa-tim ša-i-il₅-šu
english: over there turi-istar, son of zuma-x, (is) the litigant, ask him.

akkadian: šu-{d}en.líl ù a-mur-ištar i-ša-ha-at a-hi-a li-zi-zu a-dí a-hi-i
english: then my own representatives, šu-illil and amur-ištar may assist my brother.

akkadian: igi {d}en.líl-ba-ni dumu iš-ma-a-šur igi du₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šur dumu a-šur-ba-ni
english: witnessed by illil-bāni son of išīm-aššur, by ṭāb-ṣill-aššur son of aššur-bāni.

akkadian: a-na en-nam-a-šur qí-bi₄-ma um-ma a-lá-hu-um ù a-mur-ištar-ma lá
english: to ennam-aššur from ali-ahum and amur-ištar: sadly, our father has died.

akkadian: na-áš-a-ki-im a-na ištar-lá-ma-sí qí-bi₄-ma ší-im pí-ri-kà-ni iš-tí ṣú-ha-ri-ku-nu
english: to ištar-lamassī: the proceeds from the (will come) with your servant.

akkadian: tù-lá-ma-da-ni qá-dí a-hi-a-ma šé-a-ni igi puzur₄-a-šur igi en-na-nim
english: sue me together with my brothers." witnessed by puzur-aššur, by ennānum.

akkadian: 40 i-lá-tim sig₅ ša-ma-ni-ma a-lá-hu-um ù a-lu-a lu-ub-lu-nim
english: buy 40 good bags and let ali-ahum and aluwa bring them.

akkadian: ṣé-er 12 gín 13 gín kù.babbar a-na a-šur-mu-ta-pì-il₅
english: in addition to 12 shekels 13 shekels of silver for aššur-mūtappil.

akkadian: ú-lá tù-šé-bi₄-lam a-na-kam dan-a-šur 2 gín kù.babbar i-dí-nam
english: dan-aššur has given me 2 shekels of silver here, he himself.

akkadian: 0.5 ma-na 7 gín kù.babbar ú 2.25 gín kù.gi ištar-lá-ma-sí dam ku-ni-li a-na lá-ma-sà-tim dam e-lá-ma
english: 37 shekels of silver and 2 1 / 4 shekels of gold ištar-lamassī, wife of kūn-ilum, left to lamassutum, wife of elamma.

akkadian: 1 ma-na kù.babbar a-na a-šur-ma-lik dí-in-šu-ma i-na ša na na-ru-qí-im i-na ša li-bi₄-ni nu-ṣa-ha-ar 2 ma-na
english: give 1 mina of silver to aššur-mālik and we will deduct it from the assets of the joint-stock capital that we control.

akkadian: 37 ku-ta-nu qá-du-um ta-ad-mì-iq-tim ša šu-ištar 2 túg ni-is-ha-tum 3 gín kù.babbar 3 túg a ší-mì-im
english: 37 -textiles, including (those) as free loan, belonging to šu-ištar, 2 textiles import-tax, 3 shekels of silver (balanced), 3 textiles for pre-emption.

akkadian: sá-da-a ša 4 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er ú-ṣur-ša-a-šur ù a-šur-du₁₀ ša-lim-a-šur
english: concerning the fact that uṣur-ša-aššur and aššur-ṭāb owe 4 minas of refined silver to šalim-aššur.

akkadian: 0.3333 ma-na ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er a-šùr-ma-lik dumu ta-ha-zi-ra du₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šùr dumu lu-lu i-šu
english: aššur-malik son of tahazira owes 0.3333 mina of refined (silver) to ṭāb-ṣill-aššur son of lulu.

akkadian: a-na lu-lu-ú en-um-a-šur ù a-bu-ša-lim qí-bi-ma um-ma a-šur-du₁₀-ma a-ša-me-ma a-šur-du₁₀ lá
english: say to lullu, ennam-aššur and abu-šalim thus aššur-ṭāb: i hear that aššur-ṭāb has unfortunately died.

akkadian: pé-ru-wa i-šu i-na ša-tim ša-tim 6 gín.ta kù.babbar i-ša-qú-lu igi ki-li-nu-ma-an
english: in successive years they will pay each time 6 shekels in the presence of kilinuman.

akkadian: 1 ma-na kù.babbar ša hi-na-a e-lá-ma a-na i-dí-sú-en₆ ú-šé-bi₄-il₅ ṣé-eh-ri-lí ú-bi₄-il₅
english: 1 mina of silver belonging to hinnāya elamma dispatched to iddin-suen, ṣeher-ilī brought it away.

akkadian: ša ú-ṣur-ša-a-šur iz-kà-nim kà-an-kà-ma e-lá-nu-ma i-ba-ší šu.nígin 27 túg.hi.a a-šur-{d}utu-ši dumu
english: in all 27 textiles, <to> aššur-šamšī, son of nanakaš(š)um, ennam-aššur, son of elamma entrusted (them).

akkadian: kà-ni-kà-ma iš-tí a-šur-ba-ni šé-bi₄-lá-nim a-na en-um-a-šur qí-bi₄-ma šu-ma na-áš-pé-er-tum iš-tù a-lim
english: to ennam-aššur: ask whether they have brought a missive from the city and send it.

akkadian: ga-dí-na am-tám ku-zi-zi du-šu-ba ú šu-ni-il₅-ga a ší-mì-im i-dí-nu-ma 15 gín kù.babbar lá-ma-sú-tum ta-áš-qú-ul-ma
english: the slave-girl kuzizi dušuba and šunilga sold her and 15 shekels of silverlamassutum paid and bought the slave-girl kuzizi.

akkadian: ù <gap>{d}utu al-qé-ú 6 túg.hi.a qá-dum 1 túg ša e-na-ah-dingir i-dí-nu-ni a-na é kà-ri-im
english: i deposited at the office of the colony as a half-share of our father 6 textiles, including enah-ilī's textile.

akkadian: kà-ri-im ší-im urudu a-nim i-na kù.babbar ša wa-bar-tim ša ša-lá-tù-ar ki-ma en-um-a-šùr ku-da-tum i-lá-qé
english: kudātum will receive the price of this copper in silver from the station at šalatuwar on behalf of ennam-aššur.

akkadian: dumu qar-da-a a-ha-ma 10 gín kù.babbar a bé-a-lim a-na šu-nu-nu 7 gín kù.babbar a-na ì-lí-áš-ra-ni ma-ah-ri-šu-nu a-dí-in
english: furthermore, i gave 10 shekels of silver to šu-nūnu as a working capital and 7 shekels of silver to ilī-ašrannī witnessed by them.

akkadian: kišib puzur₄-tí-a-am-tim kišib a-šur-i-mì-tí dumu a-ta-a kišib ú-ṣur-ša-a-šur dumu a-šur-ma-lik kišib a-da-da dumu {d}im.gal kišib a-šur-du₁₀ dumu
english: sealed by puzur-ti'amtum, by aššur-imittī son of ataya, by uṣur-ša-aššur son of aššur-malik, by adada son of adad-rabi, by aššur-ṭāb son of sadaya.

akkadian: i-na ša ṭup-pí-šu 4 ma-na kù.babbar
english: the silver should pass overland in the name of šukkutum to kanesh.

akkadian: ni-iṣ-ba-da-kum ša i-na ba-ri-ku-nu i-qá-bi₄-ú um-ma
english: your representatives turned to me and said: the man is your colleague.

akkadian: pí-ri-kà-ni ša-ma-nim a-ta i-na ší-im kù.gi
english: you yourself must take your silver from the yield of the gold.

akkadian: kù.babbar i-na áb-nim ni-a-tim ta-ki-tám i-ša-qú-lu
english: they will weigh it out by our weight, in the correct amount.

akkadian: dí-in kù.babbar-áp-šu i-na a-lá-ak ṣú-ha-ri-im ú-šé-ba-lá-kum
english: i shall send you the silver for it when the servant comes.

akkadian: a-na kù.babbar ša-qá-lim ni-iš-ku-un-šu-um u₄-mu-šu im-lu-ú-ma
english: his term is up, but he has gone to the land harabiš.

akkadian: a-hi a-ta kù.babbar u₄-ma-am a-ni-a-am lá
english: my dear brother, may the silver not lie idle even this day.

akkadian: dí-na-am ú-ul i-na kù.babbar-pì-kà a-ṣa-ba-at a-ma
english: give me the silver, or i shall seize it from your silver.

akkadian: lá iš-qúl 0.1666 gín.ta i-na itu.kam ú-ṣa-áb
english: if he has not paid, he will add 1 / 6 shekel per month.

akkadian: i-li-qí-ú šu-ma 16 gín.ta kù.babbar i-ta-bu-lu kù.babbar
english: an instruction of mine went to aššur-nādā and aššur-ṣulūlī to settle accounts with him.

akkadian: šu-mì ṭá-hu kù.babbar ki-ma tal-qé-ú ir-ta-kà a-šar
english: send me word to where i am staying when you have recieved the silver.

akkadian: a-na ku-li-a qí-bi-ma um-ma a-sá-num-ma a-šu-mì a-ší-im sá-ah-ra-a-ku
english: to kuliya, say, thus says asānum: i am still staying (here) because of the meteoric iron.

akkadian: lá-ma a-li-kà-ni an.na-kà ta-dí-in šu-qú-ul-tí an.na-ki-kà 1 gú
english: the weight of your tin was 1 talent 30 minas; 0.5 mina they established as losses.

akkadian: ha-mu-uš-tim ša am-ri-a ù i-ku-nim 1.5 gín.ta a
english: from the week of amriya and ikūnum he will add 1.5 shekel per mina per month.

akkadian: ip-nu-ú-ni-ma um-ma šu-nu-ma a-wi-lu-um a-hu-kà kù.babbar a-na ig-ri
english: my dear brother, send to me personally 0.5 mina of silver with the first express caravan.

akkadian: ù-šé-ba-lá-kum kù.babbar a-na qá-tí-a lá ma-qí-it-ma me-eh-ra-tim lá
english: no silver has fallen into my hands, so i did not send you a corresponding amount.

akkadian: 10.75 gín kù.babbar i-ṣé-er a-li-li tù-mì-li-a-i-im a-lá-hu-um i-šu
english: alili, the man from tumlia, owes 11 minus 1 / 4 shekels of silver to ali-ahum.

akkadian: a-na a-lá-hi-im qí-bi₄-ma um-ma sig₅-pí-a-šur ù man-a-šur a-na-kam
english: to ali-ahum from damiq-pī-aššur and puzur-aššur: they satisfied puzur-aššur here for the deficit on the silver.

akkadian: šu-ma kù.babbar a-na ú-ku-ul-tí-a lá tù-šé-ba-lam a-ta-be-a-ma a-tal-kam
english: if you do not send me silver for my food i shall set out and come!

akkadian: ni-ša-kà-an tám-kà-ru-um i-na re-ší-a i-za-az kù.babbar 1-ma-na a-ša-qá-al
english: the creditor keeps a check on me (because) i have to pay 1 mina of silver!

akkadian: an.na en-nam-a-šur a-mì-ša-am ub-lam a-hu-a a-tù-nu šu-ma an.na i-dí-na-ku-nu-ti
english: my dear brothers, if he has given you the tin, then seal the tin and send it here.

akkadian: ṭup-pu-šu ha-ar-ma-am i-da-namₓ ša kù.babbar 8 ma-na ha-bu-lu šu-ma
english: moreover, he shall give me a valid record of his stating that he owes 8 minas of silver.

akkadian: lá iš-qú-ul a-na ma-na-im 1.5 gín.ta i-na itu.kam ú-ṣa-áb
english: if he has not paid, he will pay interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per mina per month.

akkadian: ta-da-nam lá i-le-e ma-lá-kà 4 gín kù.babbar a-na-ku al-qé
english: i myself will use that silver for buying salt and then they can make themselves ready and depart.

akkadian: ša ší-ti an.na-ki-a i-na bu-ru-uš-ha-tim i-na e-ra-bi₄-kà-ma šé-bi₄-lam šu-ma
english: and what (is due) for the remainder of my tin you must send me when you enter burušhattum.

akkadian: ni-kà-sí a-na-ku ú a-ta ni-sí-ú-ma ni-iz-ku-ú lá tù-na-ha-ni a-lá-hu-um
english: do not obstruct me!" ali-ahum answered ennam-aššur, saying: "it is the memoranda with your seal and my seal.

akkadian: šé-a-im a-ta-lá-ak iš-tí ru-ba-im ta-am-ni-a-i-im ni-na-me-er-ma um-ma ší-ip-ru-ma a-hu-ni
english: we met with the king of tawniya and the envoys said: our brother has died in your territory.

akkadian: ip-qí-dam šà.ba 1 šu-uq-lam ip-ṭur₄-ma 11 ma-na an.na il₅-té-qé
