english: of this load he has broken the seals of one packet and has taken 11 minas of silver.

akkadian: mì-ma a-na kù.babbar-pì-kà 1 gín li-ba-am lá i-pá-ri-id ú
english: do not worry about a single shekel of your silver, and do not remove trust from your heart.

akkadian: a-na 7 itu.kam i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im
english: if he has not paid (in time), he is to add interest in accordance with the rule of the colony.

akkadian: kù.babbar an.na-ki-kà ma-ma-hi-ir i-ku-pí-a a-na šu-ki-tim i-dí-nu-ma dumu šál-ma-{d}im na-áš-a-kum
english: i made šukkutum pay 4 minas of silver from what is in his tablet. šu-hubur brings that under šukkutum's seal.

akkadian: ha-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 1.5 gín.ta i-na itu.kam a-na
english: if he has not paid (in time), he must pay interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina.

akkadian: ṣí-ib-tim a-dí-na-kum-ma ṭup-pá-kà ú-kà-al 1 gín.ta i-na itu.1.kam-im a-na 1
english: you must pay interest at the rate of 1 shekel per mina per month. 18 weeks have passed for you.

akkadian: i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 1.5 gín.ta a-na ma-na-im i-na itu.1.kam
english: if he has not paid (in time), he must pay interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per mina per month.

akkadian: zi <gap> iš <gap> ù šál-ma-ni <gap> tám-kà-ri-im e-pu-šu i-na
english: my dear brother, my dear brother, the son of kuzuzarum owes me 17.5 shekels of silver, the price of copper.

akkadian: u₄-me-šu kù.babbar lá iš-qú-ul 0.6666 gín 15 še ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
english: if he has not paid when his term is up, he will pay an interest of 0.6666 shekels 15 grains.

akkadian: i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 1.5 gín.ta i-na itu.kam a-na ma-na-im
english: if he has not paid (in time), he must pay interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina.

akkadian: qá-at-kà i-na kù.babbar ša sá-li-a ù ì-lí-dan ha-bu-lu-ni ú-ša-áš-ki-nu-ma lu-qú-tám
english: if salliya has not placed the goods before you, salliya must give purchases in the city of assur to šalim-aššur.

akkadian: i-da-an a-na-kam ì-lí-dan aṣ-ba-at-ma 2 ma-na kù.babbar ú-ša-áš-qí-il₅-šu 2 ma-na
english: also, suen-nādā is staying in wahšušana; when he enters here i shall make him pay the silver and its interest.

akkadian: kišib a-mur-a-šùr dumu i-šar-ki-it-a-šùr kišib ku-na-na-a 2 gú 10 ma-na urudu ší-kam i-na a-ba-an ma-tim
english: reckoning from month viii, eponymy of assur-re'i, son of ili-emuqi, in conformity with the rule of the karum, he will add an interest of 1.5 mina per talent per month.

akkadian: dì-ni-ší-im lá ta-ha-da-ar a-na ni-ta-ah-šu-šar qí-bi₄-ma
english: to nitahšušar: air the -textiles that i left.

akkadian: ku-li-a i-ša-qá-lam itu.kam kán-mar-ta li-mu-um a-šùr-sipa
english: month ix, eponymy of assur-re'i, son of ili-emuqi.

akkadian: igi {d}iškur.illat igi ir-am-a-šùr dumu ì-dí-ba-ni
english: witnessed by adad-ellat, by ir'am-aššur, son of idi-bāni.

akkadian: áš-du ù wa-ar-kà-sà ša ša-lim-a-šùr igi
english: ašdu's house and its legacy belongs to šalim-aššur.

akkadian: 23.3333 ma-na hi-na-a qá-sú i-dí ša
english: 23.3333 minas hinnāya has deposited as his share.

akkadian: dumu pu-šu-ke-en₆ a-šùr-du-ri dumu puzur₄.ištar tap-pá-i
english: aššur-dūrī, son of puzur-ištar was my fellow witness.

akkadian: a-na dam.gàr-ri-im ù e-lá-lí kišib in-ba-a-šùr
english: to the merchant and elāli; sealed by inib-aššur.

akkadian: mì-šu ša ma-tí-ma té-er-ta-kà lá i-lá-kam
english: why doesn't any message ever come from you?

akkadian: 1 túg ku-ta-num sig₅ i li-bi-šu-ma
english: he also owes 1 -textile of good quality.

akkadian: i-ma-qá-at be-lúm-ba-ni ší-im ṣú-ba-tí-a ú kù.babbar
english: my dear brothers, pay attention to my instructions.

akkadian: itu.kam ma-hu-ur-dingir li-mu-um ša qá-té {d}iškur-ba-ni
english: month iv, eponymy of the successor of adad-bāni.

akkadian: a-dí-in ší-tí ṣú-ba-tí-kà 22 túg a-hu-ru
english: the rest of your textiles: 22 textiles remain.

akkadian: túg.hi.a a-ni-ú-tim mì-ma a-mur-ištar ú-lá il₅-qé
english: amur-ištar has not taken any of these textiles.

akkadian: gín kù.babbar sig₅ i-ṣé-er puzur₄-a-šur dumu a-ta-a a-lá-hu-um i-šu
english: puzur-aššur son of ataya owes 22 shekels of good silver to ali-ahum.

akkadian: 1 ma-na kù.babbar i-ṣé-er a-li-li ù kà-ar-ší-ni wa-al-dí-lúm ù
english: alili and karšini owe 1 mina of silver to waldi-ilum and ištar-lamassī.

akkadian: um-ma šu-ku-tum-ma a-na ta-na-wi-iš-tí ú i-iš-ta-ku-ša-ar a-na-kam en-na-ma-a-šùr pu-uz-ra-am
english: from šukkutum to tanawišti and ištakušar: ennam-aššur has fled from me here.

akkadian: 13.5 gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-na ṣé-er ú-ṣú-ur-ša-a-šur dumu a-mur-i-a
english: uṣur-ša-aššur son of amurriya owes 13.5 shekels of refined silver to irišum.

akkadian: iš-tí-ší-ma tí-ir-tám li-li-kam-ma kù.babbar lá-šu ki ší-im túg-tí-kà lu-šé-bi₄-lá-kum
english: i shall send it to you with the proceeds from your textiles.

akkadian: kà-ša-dim ú-ga-me-er i-na kù.babbar ša é a-bi-a gám-ri a-lá-qé
english: i shall take my expenses from the silver of my father's house.

akkadian: urudu ma-sí-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi-im dumu a-šùr-ba-ni ma-ma-hi-ir i-šu itu.kam
english: iddin-abum son of aššur-bāni owes 20 minas of washed copper to man-mahir.

akkadian: a-na i-tur₄-dingir ù a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma um-ma i-na-sú-in-ma a-ša-me-ma en-nam-a-šur
english: to itūr-ilī and ali-ahum from enna-suen: i hear that ennam-aššur is dead.

akkadian: an.na-ki-šu kù.babbar-áp-šu en-um-a-šur i-lá-qé ú 1 su-pá-nu-um ša kù.babbar
english: when the tin is sold, ennam-aššur will receive its value in silver.

akkadian: a-hi a-ta an.na ku-nu-ki-a a ša ki-ma i-a-tí pí-qí-id
english: my dear brother, entrust the tin under my seal to my representatives.

akkadian: 0.3333 ma-na lá 2 gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pu-um i-ṣé-er puzur₄.ištar
english: puzur-ištar owes 0.3333 mina less 2 shekels of refined silver to irišum.

akkadian: ú-šé-bi₄-lam ù a-dí-ni 2 túg ší-ma-sú i-ba-ší-ú a-ma-kam a-lu-a
english: so, until now the 2 textiles agreed by him are (still) outstanding.

akkadian: hu-ra-ṣa-nim i-ra-dí a-ma-kam a-ta ù i-na-sú-in ki-ma ni-a-tí i-ša-ha-at zu-ba i-zi-za-ma túg.hi.a
english: you and enna-suen should assist zuba there on our behalf and entrust the textiles to huraṣānum.

akkadian: ma-na kù.babbar a-na a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku dumu lu-ra-áb-a-ku dí-na-ma ṭup-pá-am ša hu-bu-li-a er-ša-šu šu-ma
english: give 0.6666 mina of silver to aššur-taklāku, son of lū-rab'āku, and ask him for my debt-note.

akkadian: 1 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am ša en-nam-a-šùr dumu kà-ri-a en-nam-a-šùr dumu šu-{d}en.líl il₅-qé
english: ennam-aššur son of šu-illil received 1 mina of refined silver belonging to ennam-aššur son of karriya.

akkadian: šu-ma en-nam-a-šùr dumu kà-ri-a a-na a-šùr-du₁₀ i-tù-ar en-nam-a-šùr dumu šu-{d}en.líl ú-ba-áb-šu iš-tù
english: if ennam-aššur son of karriya raises claim against aššur-ṭāb, ennam-aššur son of šu-illil will clear him.

akkadian: ú-ší-ir igi a-šur-i-mì-tí dumu a-ta-a igi a-da-da dumu {d}im.gal puzur₄-tí-a-am-tim tap-pá-i-ni a-na
english: witnessed by aššur-imittī son of ataya, by adada son of adad-rabi; puzur-ti'amtum was our (absent) partner.

akkadian: sú-ki-nim iš-ta-áp-ru a-pu-tum an.na ù túg.hi.a lá tù-pá-za-ra ú a-na ha-ra-an sú-ki-nim
english: urgent, do not smuggle tin and textiles and do not commit anything to the narrow track.

akkadian: a-ma-kam bu-za-num ki-ma i-a-tí kù.babbar a-na bu-za-nim dí-in-ma ša ki-ma ku-wa-tí šu-up-ra-ma
english: give the silver to buṣānum and write to your representatives that they should seize your tablet.

akkadian: da-ni-tí aq-bi₄ ṭup-pá-am ša ší-be-kà a-ma-kam hi-ri-im ša ki-ma kù.babbar a-ta-a tù-šé-bi-lá-ni
english: certify your tablet there with your witnesses to prove that you sent the silver with ataya.

akkadian: a-zu-za-a ša be-ú-lá-at puzur₄-ša-du-e ṭup-pu-um ša e-li-a-ni sà-ar ša ku-nu-ki ša i-ri-ší-im
english: concerning puzur-šadu'e's working capital: any tablet that may appear is invalid - one with irišum's seal.

akkadian: um-ma i-ku-pí-a-ma dan-a-šur ù ša-lim-wa-ar-dí-ma a-na en-um-a-šur qí-bi-ma 2 gú urudu sig₅
english: from ikūn-pīya, dan-aššur and šalim-wardī to ennam-aššur: dan-aššur has paid us 2 talents of good copper.

akkadian: áš-qú-ul 15 gín a-na dan-dingir áš-qú-ul 15 gín a-na šu-ma-am-ni-ir-ší šu.nígin 14 ma-na lá 5
english: i paid 15 shekels to dan-ilī, 15 shekels to šūmam-nirši - in all 14 minas less 5 shekels of silver.

akkadian: ša na-áb-su-in ù dumu i-tur₄-dingir a-na 1 gú-tim 1 ma-na-um 0.5 ma-na.ta i itu.kam ú-ṣa-áb
english: from the week of nabi-suen, son of itūr-ilī, he will add an interest of 1.5! mina per talent per month.

akkadian: a-na 11 túg ku-ta-ni ša e-lá-ma a-lá-ha-am ù a-mur-ištar a-šur-lá-ma-sí a-na e-lá+lá-<gap>-ma itu.5.kam ú-kà-na-šu-nu šu-ma
english: concerning 11 -textiles, belonging to elamma, aššur-lamassī shall confirm the liability of ali-ahum and amur-ištar for elamma within 5 months.

akkadian: dumu a-bu-qar me-eh-ra-at ta-ah-sí-is-tim a-ni-tim ša ší-be-e-kà igi a-šur-i-mì-tí dumu a-mur-a-šùr igi a-šùr-mu-ta-bi₄-il₅ dumu en-um-a-šùr igi ma-num-ba-lúm-a-šùr dumu
english: a copy of this note with your witnesses: witnessed by aššur-imittī son of amur-aššur, by aššur-muttabbil son of ennam-aššur, by mannum-balum-aššur son of ikūnum.

akkadian: 1 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am en-um-a-šur dumu šál-ma-a-šur a-na be-a-lim a-na i-tur₄-dingir ù e-lá-lí dumu me-er-e puzur₄-a-na
english: ennam-aššur son of šalim-aššur has given 1 mina of refined silver as a working-capital to itūr-ilī and elāli, sons of puzur-anna.

akkadian: kù.babbar ni-hi-bi₄-il₅ a-ni-nam a-ṣé-er a-šur-ma-lik ù šál-ma-a-šur ša ki-ma i-a-tí kù.babbar ú-šé-bi₄-il₅-ma a-na ša ki-ma a-bi₄-kà
english: i sent anninum to aššur-malik and šalim-aššur, my representatives, with the silver, and they paid the silver to your father's representatives.

akkadian: a-tal-kà-nim a ma-lá i pá-ni-tim a-na be-el kù.babbar ú-sá-li-ú-ma lá im-gu₅-ru-ni-ni ú-ma-am im-ta-ag-ru-ni
english: as i previously pleaded with the financiers and they did not agree - today they have agreed!

akkadian: ma-na-im kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pí-im a-šu-mì i-ku-pí-a a-na i-na-a dumu a-mu-ra-a a-pu-ul i ba-áb ha-ra-ni-a
english: further, i balanced for 1 mina of refined silver because of ikūn-pīya with innaya son of amuraya.

akkadian: um-ma i-dí-a-bu-um-ma a-na ša-lim-ma mu-za ù kà-du-ta-lá qí-bi-ma 15 gín ku-nu-ki-a kà-du-ta-lá na-áš-a-ki-na-tí
english: from iddin-abum to šalimma, muza and kadutala: kadutala brings you (fem. plur.) 15 shekels under my seal.

akkadian: 10 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am a-mur-ištar dumu da-mu-ma i-na ší-im síg.hi.a ša ú-ší-na-lam il₅-qé
english: amur-ištar son of damuma has received 10 minas of refined silver from the proceeds of ušinalam's wool.

akkadian: 17 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-na ší-im síg.hi.a ša ú-ší-na-lam a-šùr-iš-tí-kál dumu sú-kà-li-a il₅-qé
english: aššuriš-tikal son of sukalliya has received 17 minas of refined silver from the proceeds of ušinalam's wool.

akkadian: dí-in šu-ma kù.babbar lá ta-al-qé ṭup-pá-am ša tám-kà-ri-im ha-ar-ma-am a-na a-mu-ur-ša-ra-sà dí-in a-dí
english: if you have not received the silver, then give the certified tablet of the merchant to amur-šarrassa.

akkadian: 5 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am ú-zu-bi-iš-kum dumu šu-a-nim i-na ší-im síg.hi.a ša ú-ší-na-lam il₅-qé
english: uzub-iškum son of šu-anum has received 5 minas of refined silver from the proceeds of ušinalam's wool.

akkadian: ú-bi-il₅ igi a-di-da igi a-ba-ba igi dam-qá-a 3 gín kù.babbar i li-bi šu-li-i
english: witnessed by adida, by ababa, by damqaya. 3 shekels of silver is in the possession of šuli.

akkadian: 8 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am da-dí-a dumu en-na-nim i-na ší-im síg.hi.a ša ú-ší-na-lam il₅-qé
english: dādiya son of ennānum has received 8 minas of refined silver from the proceeds of ušinalam's wool.

akkadian: 18 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am en-um-a-šùr dumu sú-kà-lí-a i-na ší-im síg.hi.a ša ú-ší-na-lam il₅-qé
english: ennam-aššur son of sukkalliya has received 18 minas of refined silver from the proceeds of ušinalam's wool.

akkadian: a-na itu.5.kam ú-kà-an šu-ma lá uk-ta-in-šu-nu 0.3333 ma-na 5 gín.ta kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am a-na
english: if he does not confirm their liability aššur-lamassī will pay to elamma 25 shekels of silver apiece.

akkadian: 3 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-na ší-im síg.hi.a ša ú-ší-na-lam i-lá-áš-ra-ni dumu sú-kà-li-a il₅-qé
english: ilī-ašrannī son of sukkalliya has received 3 minas of refined silver from the proceeds of ušinalam's wool.

akkadian: a-na qá-tí en-um-a-šùr a-dí-in mì-ma a-nim ša in-na-a ù dam.gàr
english: all this - belonging to innaya and the merchant - ennam-aššur will lead.

akkadian: i-ša-qal itu.kam qá-ra-tum igi šál-ma-{d}iškur nu-a-ri-im igi i-dí-sú-in dumu a-ta-na-ah
english: in the presence of salim-adad, the musician, of iddin-suen, the son of atanah.

akkadian: 8.1666 gín kù.babbar ší-im é-tí-šu a-šùr-mì-tí a-na sú-ub-ri-ga iš-qú-ul šu-ma
english: 8.1666 shekels of silver, the price of his house, aššur-imittī paid to subriga.

akkadian: 1 gín e-né-a a-na-ší-ma ù ú-ša-ra-ší <gap> kà tù-kà lá
english: should then i covet a single shekel of silver and then release her?

akkadian: kù.babbar ša dam.gàr-ri-ma en-um-a-šur a-na tù-ra-am-dingir ih-bu-ul šu.nígin 2.6666 ma-na
english: further, ennam-aššur borrowed 0.5 mina of silver belonging to a merchant, from tūram-ilī.

akkadian: kù.babbar il₅-qé igi a-ší-tí-šu igi me-er-i-tí-šu gu₅-ba-áb-tim igi e-lá-lí me-er-i-šu
english: witnessed by his wife, by his daughter, the priestess, by elāli, his son.

akkadian: 17 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am ù 7.5 gín kù.gi pá-ša-lam a-šùr-i-mì-tí dumu e-ta-a i-na ší-im síg.hi.a ša ú-ší-na-lam
english: aššur-imittī son of etaya has received 17 minas of refined silver and 7.5 shekels of -gold from the proceeds of ušinalam's wool.

akkadian: 20 ma-na urudu ma-sí-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi-im ma-ma-hi-ir
english: iddin-abum owes 20 minas of washed copper to man-mahir.

akkadian: 5 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi-im a-šur-{d}utu-ši
english: iddin-abum owes 5 minas of refined silver to aššur-šamši.

akkadian: ší-ma-am ša ba-lá-ṭí-a ša-ma-nim a-hu-ú-a a-tù-nu ih-da-ma
english: my dear brothers, take care to send me adad-pilah.

akkadian: na-áš-a-ku-nu-tí kù.babbar a-dí a-lá-kà-ni a-šar a-lá-hi-im li-ib-ší
english: the silver should remain with ali-ahum until i arrive.

akkadian: {d}mar.tu-ba-ni igi a-šùr-i-dí igi šu-ku-bi-im igi šu-ma-li-ba-a-šùr
english: witnessed by amurrum-bāni, by aššur-idī, by šu-kūbum, by šumma-libbi-aššur.

akkadian: tí-ir-ta-ak-nu li-li-kam-ma úz-ni pé-té-a ú a-dí tí-ir-tí
english: also, until my instructions arrive the silver should remain.

akkadian: ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi-im a-šur-{d}utu-ši i-šu
english: iddin-abum owes 5 minas of refined silver to aššur-šamši.

akkadian: i-lá-qé igi ma-ṣí-ì-lí igi puzur₄.ištar igi en-um-a-šur
english: in the presence of maṣi-ilī, of puzur-ištar, of ennam-aššur.

akkadian: ša sà-ra-tim li-mu-um ša i qá-tí a-al-du₁₀
english: month ša-sarrātim, eponymy he who took over from ali-ṭāb.

akkadian: tù-ra-a en-na-sú-in ú mu-ti-a-šùr a-wi-lu a-ni-ú-tum da-a-nu
english: tūraya, ennam-suen and muti-aššur, these men acted as judges.

akkadian: ma-na an.na a-ṣé-er a-šur-ma-lik ṭí-ih-a-ma an.na lu-šé-bi-lu-nim
english: approach aššur-malik and have them send me the tin.

akkadian: iš-me a-šùr-gal dumu ma-nu-um-šu-um-šu gír ša a-šùr it-ma-ma a-šùr-dan dumu zu-ú nu.bànda pá-šu iš-me
english: aššur-rabi son of mannum-šumšu swore by aššur's dagger and aššur-dan son of zu'u, the lieutenant, heard his statement.

akkadian: e-la-ma i-šu itu.1.kam ša ke-na-tim li-mu-um ša qá-tí a-šùr-sig₅ dumu a-bar-sí-sí-im ha-muš-tum ša a-šur-mì-tí
english: month iii, eponymy of the successor of aššur-damiq, son of abarsisum, week eponymy of aššur-imittī, son of atāya.

akkadian: 1 me-at 73 ku-ta-nu i-na é.gal-lim ur-du-nim 7 túg ša li-wi-tim 1 túg ša ik-ri-bi₄-a ša dumu šál-mah
english: 173 -textiles (that) came down from the palace, 7 textiles as wrapping, 1 textile of my temple-fund, is what šalim-ahum's son brought me.

akkadian: lá 2 gín kù.babbar a-dí-na-kum ki-ma 0.3333 ma-na lá 2 gín kù.babbar a-bu-kà i-dí-nam 0.3333 ma-na a-na é
english: of that your father gave me 0.3333 mina less 2 shekels of silver; he gave 0.3333 mina to the office of the colony.

akkadian: 1 ma-na 7.5 gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er a-mur-ištar dumu da-da e-la-ma
english: 1 mina 7.5 shekels of refined silver āmur-ištar, son of dada, owes to elamma.

akkadian: 1 ma-na 15 gín kù.babbar i li-be i-lá-li-ú-ma-an a-lá-hi-nim tí-wa-da-i-im a-lá-hu-um
english: ilali-uman, the miller from tiwada, owes 1 mina 15 shekels of silver to ali-ahum.

akkadian: šál-ma-a-šur ù a-mur-ištar iṣ-bu-tù-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma a-mur-ištar-ma a-na šál-ma-a-šùr-ma dumu me-tim a-na-ku
english: šalim-aššur and amur-ištar seized us, and amur-ištar said to šalim-aššur: i appear as heir.

akkadian: a-na en-nam-a-šur ú a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma um-ma sig₅-pí-a-šur-ma a-dí ma-lá ú ší-ni-šu
english: to ennam-aššur and ali-ahum from damiq-pī-aššur: once or twice i sent word to you.

akkadian: ma-ma-an a-na é-tí-im i-tù-wa-ar 0.3333 ma-na 2.5 gín kù.babbar sú-ub-ri-ga a-na
english: if anybody claims the house, subriga will pay 22.5 shekels of silver to aššur-imittī.

akkadian: urudu-šu 4 gú 42 ma-na i-na li-bi i-dí-{d}mar.tu i-ri-ha-am iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim
english: the remainder of his copper, 4 talents 22 minas, iddin-amurrum still owes to me.

akkadian: 14 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-na ší-im síg.hi.a ša ú-ší-na-lam bu-zu-ta-a il₅-qé
english: buzutaya has received 14 minas of refined silver from the proceeds of ušinalam's wool.

akkadian: um-ma bu-zu-a du₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šur ù a-lá-bu-um-ma a-na en-um-a-šùr ù a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma a ma-lá tí-ir-tí-ku-nu túg-ṣú-ba-tí-ku-nu nu-na-pì-iš-ma túg-ṣú-ba-tù-ku-nu šál-mu 4 ku-ta-ni
english: from buzuwa, ṭāb-ṣill-aššur and ali-abum to ennam-aššur and ali-ahum: in accordance with your instructions we aired your textiles and your textiles are in order.

akkadian: i-a-tí ha-ra-nam dí-nam-ma ù a-na-ku i-na e-lá-i-a ku-a-tí ha-ra-nam lá-dí-na-kum ù ma-lá i-na pá-ni-tim
english: whereas brother or friend has acted in brotherhood with me over every last shekel of silver, they cannot let my smuggling goods be brought in together with their wool.

akkadian: qá-i-a-ni šu-ma e-mu-qá-tám e-pá-áš-ku-nu-ma ma a kà-ri-im i-lá-ak-ma kà-ru-um i-da-ku-nu ù a-na-ku qá-dí-ku-nu-ma a-bi₄
english: if he treats you in a violent way, yea even turns to the colony and the colony makes you appear in court, then i am with you in it!

akkadian: a-na-ku a-lá-nu-tí a-ha-tám ú bé-el-tám ša-ni-tám ma-nam i-šu-ú iš-tù u₄-mì-im ša a-bi-i i-mu-tù
english: from the day our father died, may aššur and our father's god be my witnesses - have i not exerted myself to the utmost night and day?

akkadian: a-na ṣí-ib-tim ni-il₅-qé-a-ku-um a-ṣé-er é ša ta-am-gu₅-ru mì-ša-al šu-ub-tí-im nu-ṭa-hi-ma 3 ma-na
english: we added half a to the surface of the house plot about which you had reached an agreement and we paid 3 minas of silver.

akkadian: mì-ma šu-um-šu puzur₄.ištar a-na ir-ma-a-šùr lá i-tù-ar iš-tù
english: puzur-ištar will not come back for anything, whatsoever, on ir'am-aššūr.

akkadian: za-al-pá-i-um a-na kà-li-tí-ni ú-bi₄-il₅ igi a-šùr-e-mu-qí dumu ga-za-nim-dub.sar
english: in the presence of assur-emuqi, son of gazanum, the scribe.

akkadian: a-na a-ta-ta dumu ma-num-ba-lúm-a-šùr ù kà-nu-tim dumu.mí en-na-sú-in
english: to atata, son of mannum-balum-assur, and kannutum, daughter of ennam-suen.

akkadian: a-na sig₅-pì-i-a-šùr qí-bi₄-ma wa-dí a-wa-tim ša ni-ta-ú-ni ta-am-tí-ší
english: to damiq-pī-aššur: apparently you have forgotten the matter we discussed.

akkadian: da-ak-ni-bi₄-im igi en-na-sú-in igi i-dí-a-šur dumu ku-zi-la-nim e-<gap>
english: witnessed by taqin-abum, by enna-suen, by iddin-aššur son of kuzilānum.

akkadian: a-na en-nam-a-šur qí-bi-ma um-ma ša-ta-na-ma 30 ma-na urudu sig₅ ku-nu-ki-a a-lu-ú-a na-áš-a-ku-um
english: to ennam-aššur from šāt-anna: aluwa brings you 30 minas of good copper under my seal.

akkadian: an.na ni-is-ni-iq šà.ba 1 gú 4.5 ma-na an.na ku-nu-ki-ni ṣí-li-a ù ú-ṣur-ša-ištar
english: thereof ṣilliya and uṣur-ša-ištar bring you 1 talent 4.5 minas of tin under our seals.

akkadian: um-ma i-ku-pí-a-ma a-na a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma i pá-ni-tim am-tám a-na bu-zi-a dumu a-sà-a a-dí-in-ma a-ṣé-ri-kà ub-lam am-tám
english: from ikūn-pīya to ali-ahum: earlier i gave a slave-girl to buziya son of asaya and he brought her to you.

akkadian: na-áš-ú-ni-ku-nu-tí ù ṭup-pí ša 12 ma-na kù.babbar ša hu-bu-li-a ša a-na
english: they also bring my tablet concerning 12 minas of silver from my debt, which i am to pay to them in 5 years.

akkadian: 14 gú urudu sig₅ ša-bu-ra-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-šur dumu dan-a-šur puzur₄.ištar a-hi-šu ù i-ku-pí-a dumu a-šur-i-mì-tí iš-ma-a-šur i-šu
english: iddin-aššur son of dan-aššur, puzur-ištar, his brother, and ikūn-pīya son of aššur-imittī owe 14 talents of good broken copper to išim-aššur.

akkadian: i-nu-mì túg.hi.a ša šé-pí-a ni-im-nu 2 túg sà-áp-tí-num é.gal-lúm il₅-qé 1 šu-lu-up-ga-um ú 2 ku-ta-nu ha-al-qú 5
english: when we counted the textiles shipped under my responsibility the palace took 2 -textiles; 1 šulupkaean-textile and 2 -textiles were lost.

akkadian: 46 ma-na kù.babbar iz-ku-am ta-áš-pu-ra-nim um-ma a-tù-nu-ma 4 ma-na kù.babbar
english: he retained in his possession 3 minas of silver that you owe (him and) therefore he paid 1 mina of silver.

akkadian: ṭù-ur-da-šu-nu 6 gín kù.babbar šé-bi₄-lam šà.ba 0.3333 gín dí-in-ma ša-<gap>-am
english: send me 6 shekels of silver and make 0.3333 shekel of it available so that she / you can buy ?.

akkadian: a-na a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma um-ma zu-ku-a-ma ší-im an-ni-ki-kà a-dí a-na-ku a-na
english: to ali-ahum from zukuwa: as to the price for your tin, before i arrived at šalatuwar the silver was not paid.

akkadian: i-ha-du-ú e-pu-uš kù.babbar ú-lá tù-šé-bi-lam ší-ma-am ša ú-šé-ra-ba-ni ta-ma-ar li-ba-kà
english: my father, my lord, as for the silver that enannātumhave me, the day i left that i did not that silver.

akkadian: be-lí a-ta lá ú-nu-ú-ni té-er-ta-kà li-li-kam-ma ší-im túg.hi.a li-dí-nu-nim-ma lá-tal-kam
english: let a message of yours come here so that they give me the price of the textiles, then i will leave.

akkadian: a-na ku-li-a qí-bi-ma um-ma a-sà-num-ma a-na-kam i-qá-qá-ar ší-a-ma-tim wa-áš-ba-ku
english: to kuliya, thus asānum: i am staying here in an area of purchases and there is much for sale!

akkadian: a-na ni-ip-lá-tí-šu a-na ša-lim-a-šùr iš-qú igi {d}mar.tu-ba-ni dumu ma-na-na
english: witnessed by amurrum-bāni son of manana, by puzur-anna son of iddin-adad.

akkadian: itu.1.kam ú-ṣa-áb itu.kam ša sà-ra-tim li-mu-um ša qá-té dingir-šu-gal
english: month ii, eponymy of the successor of ilšu-rabi, son of baziya.

akkadian: 14 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi-im a-mur-ištar i-šu-ú iš-tù
english: concerning 14 minas of refined silver that iddin-abum owes to amur-ištar.

akkadian: ni-iš a-lim{ki} it-mu-ma igi ša-lim-{d}iškur igi lá-qé-pí-im igi a-mur-{d}utu
english: separately, there still exists a valid record of his working capital.

akkadian: 13 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi₄-im a-mur-ištar ù a-šur-i-mì-tí
english: iddin-abum owes 13 minas of refined silver to amur-ištar and aššur-imittī.

akkadian: a-lá-hu-um en-um-a-šur e-pu-ul um-ma a-lá-hu-um-ma ta-ah-sí-sà-tum ku-nu-ku-kà ú ku-nu-ku-a
english: ali-ahum answered ennam-aššur, saying: the memoranda have your seal and mine.

akkadian: ša ki-ma im-dí-dan ù ku-zi-a a-na šál-ma-a-šùr a-na 7 ma-na 7 gín an.na i-tù-ru dan-a-šùr dumu ir-nu-id ú-ba-áb-šu
english: if imdī-dan's representatives and kuziya claim the 7 minas 7 shekels of tin from šalim-aššur, dan-aššur son of irnuid will clear him.

akkadian: 1.3333 ma-na 6 gín kù.babbar i pá-ni-tim ha-ta-a-ni ù e-wa-ri-mu-ša ub-lu-nim a-ha-ma 1 ma-na 19 gín kù.babbar i
english: hatāni and ewarimuša brought previously 1.3333 mina 6 shekels of silver; further, 1 mina 19 shekels of silver in their second transport.

akkadian: 2 ma-na 16.1666 gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i li-bi e-na-a-šur dumu a-mu-ra a-šur-ni-šu dumu ì-lí-illat-tí
english: ennam-aššur son of amuraya owes 2 minas 16.1666 shekels of refined silver to aššur-nīšu son of ilī-ellitī.

akkadian: li-ig-mì-il₅-šu kù.babbar ša ki-ma dam.gàr li-il₅-qé-ú-ma ṭup-pá-am ša hu-bu-ul šu-ki-tim šu-a-šur ù en-um-a-šur li-il₅-qé-ú
english: the representatives of the merchant should receive the silver, and šu-aššur and ennam-aššur must take šukkutum's debt-note.

akkadian: a-na i-dí-a-bi-im i-tur₄-dingir en-na-nim ù a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma um-ma en-nam-a-šur-ma a-šu-mì lu-qú-tim ša a-bi-ni a-na
english: to iddin-abum, itūr-ilī, ennānum and ali-ahum from ennam-aššur: you have written me about dispatching our father's goods.

akkadian: um-mì-šu i-zi-iz-ma ip-qí-du igi púzur-a-šur dumu i-ku-pí-a igi a-mur-dingir dumu šu-ku-bi-im igi ma-ṣí-ì-lí dumu bu-zu-zu igi púzur.ištar dumu šu-ku-bi-im
english: in the presence of puzur-aššur, son of ikūn-pīya, of amur-ilī, son of šu-kūbum, of maṣi-ilī, son of buzuzu, of puzur-ištar, son of šu-kūbum.

akkadian: a ma-lá dí-in a-lim{ki} kù.babbar šu-uq-lá-ma ù a-na
english: pay in accordance with the verdict of the city, and then let us go to the city.

akkadian: šu-ma kù.babbar-pì i-ma-šu-hu té-er-ta-kà li-li-kam-ma úz-ni pí-tí 1
english: send me a message if they try to rob me of my silver and keep me informed.

akkadian: ú-la ig-da-am-lu-ni 36 ma-na an.na il₅-qé-ú šà.ba 6
english: they took 36 minas of tin from which i deducted 6 minas that were for kūn-ilum's account.

akkadian: i-na é-be-tim ra-qí-im té-zi-bu-ni-a-tí me-ra-lí 1 gín kù.babbar
english: we asked merali for one single shekel of silver, but he did not give it to us.

akkadian: a-na kà-né-eš ú-šé-ba-lam 1.5 gín.ta a-1-ma-na-im i itu.kam
english: if he does not send it he will add as interest 1.5 shekel per mina per month.

akkadian: a-bi₄-a a-ta lá tù-na-ha-ni ù kù.babbar ma-dam lá
english: as for you, do not obstruct me, and do not make me expend a lot of silver.

akkadian: kù.babbar ú-ša-bi-šu ší-bé-e da-nu-tim ni-šu-šu-um a-ta a-ma-kam ma-lá-kà
english: you must make up your mind there. hanu brings you 1 mina of silver under our seals.

akkadian: ú an.na-ki-a pá-ni-im ša-lim-ar-dí ù šu-nu-nu lu-ba-li-ṭù-ni-ku-nu-tí-ma urudu
english: then seal the copper with your own seals, and send it to me as soon as possible.

akkadian: 13 gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er ili₅-ba-ni dumu a-šur-utu-ši lá-ma-sà-tum tí-šu
english: 13 shekels of refined silver ilī-bāni, son of aššur-šamšī, owes to lamassutum.

akkadian: 8 gú 16.5 gín an.na a-wi-it i-dí-sú-in šà.ba 41 ma-na
english: 8 talents 16.5 shekels of tin the declared value of iddin-suen('s merchandise).

akkadian: lu-ub-lam túg.hi.a ša a-lá-hu-um i-na pá-zu-ur-tim ú-šé-tí-qá-ni i-na ku-nu-ki-šu-nu li-ib-ší-ú
english: the textiles that ali-ahum transported from the smuggling must remain under seal.

akkadian: kišib ma-nu-ba-lúm-a-šur dumu ṣí-lá-{d}im kišib šu-{d}en.líl dumu ma-nu-ki-a-šur kišib man-a-šur dumu a-ta-a 0.3333 ma-na 2
english: seal of mannum-balum-aššur son of ṣilli-adad, seal of šu-illil son of mannum-kī-aššur, seal of puzur-aššur son of ataya.

akkadian: um-ma i-tur₄-dingir-ma a-na en-um-a-šur ù a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma a-pu-tum a-pu-tum ra-ma-ku-nu za-ki-a-ma mì-ma urudu a-na bu-ru-uš-ha-dim
english: from itūr-ilī to ennam-aššur and ali-ahum: urgent, urgent, clear yourselves and do not send any copper to burušhaddum!

akkadian: lu-qú-ti áb-kà-nim ú a-ha-ma 40 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am ša a-na šu-mì é a-bi₄-a a-na pì-lá-ah-ištar
english: also, i further entrusted 40 minas of refined silver in the name of our father's house to pilah-ištar.

akkadian: pá-ar-kà i-ša-qú-lu šu-ma lá iš-qú-lu 1.5 gín.ta
english: if they do not pay they will add interest at a rate of 1.5 shekel.

akkadian: i-lá-kà-kum ú-ṣur-a-num 0.8333 ma-na 4 gín kù.babbar
english: in the presence of zuba (and) of puzur-adad; ali-abum, son of zia was our colleague.

akkadian: a ší-a-tí kù.babbar ni-ik-lá li-ba-kà mì-ma lá
english: i made šukkutum pay 4 minas of silver from what was in his certified tablet.

akkadian: 0.5 ma-na kù.babbar ú 5 na-ru-uq še-im
english: if you observe that they are unpleasant, then take (only) the agreed amount in silver.

akkadian: 6 gín kù.babbar ta-da-nam iš-tù a-lim{ki} té-li-a-ma
english: when you came up from the city we did not meet and you went back.

akkadian: 3 ma-na i-sú-hi 0.5 ma-na 5 gín
english: if he has not paid (in time) 0.3333 mina per mina will accrue (as interest).

akkadian: 29 túg šu-ru-tum ša šu-ištar 15 túg ša en-na-sú-in šu.nígin 44 túg šu-ru-tum ša šu-ištar ù
english: 29 dark textiles of šu-ištar, 15 textiles of ennam-suen - in all 44 dark textiles of šu-ištar and ennam-suen.

akkadian: itu.kam ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣú-bu igi ištar.dingir-šu dumu a-šur-ba-ni igi a-da dumu e-na-a-šur
english: in the presence of ištar-ilšu, son of aššur-bāni, of ada, son of ennam-aššur.

akkadian: i-ša-qal iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša bu-zu-ta-a ù a-šùr-i-mì-tí itu.kam té-i-na-tim li-mu-um {d}iškur-ba-ni
english: reckoned from the week-eponymy of buzutaya and aššur-imittī, month x, eponymy-year of adad-bāni.

akkadian: 45 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er ì-lí-dan ù sà-li-a a-hi-šu ša-lim-a-šur i-šu
english: ilī-dan and his brother salliya owe 45 minas of refined silver to šalim-aššur.

akkadian: ù a-ta ta-áš-ta-pu šu-ma a-hu-a a-tù-nu iš-tí a-li-ki-im pá-nim-ma pì-iq-da-ni-šu-ma a-na a-lim{ki} li-li-kam-ma
english: if you are truly my brothers, then hand him over to the very first caravan and let him come to the city, and i shall pay his fees.

akkadian: um-ma ša-lim-a-šur a-na i-dí-a-bi-im i-tur₄-dingir e-na-nim i-na-ah-dingir ù en-nam-a-šur qí-bi-ma a-hu-a be-lu-a a-tù-nu lá li-bi₄ dingir-li-ma i-be-sà-e
english: from šalim-aššur to iddin-abum, itūr-ilī, ennānum, inah-ilī and ennam-aššur: my dear brothers and lords, unfortunately i have suffered great losses.

akkadian: ú-ṣú-bu kù.babbar i-na qá-qá-ad šál-mì-šu-nu ra-ki-is
english: they are jointly responsible for the silver.

akkadian: igi a-we-li a-ni-ú-tim a-wa-tum a-ni-a-tum i-gi₅-im-r
english: this case was settled before these men.

akkadian: ša-lim-a-šùr ù i-dí-sú-in dumu i-ba-a-a a-na
english: concerning šalim-ašsur and iddin-suen son of ibaya.

akkadian: a-na-ku-ma a-bi₄ a-ta be-lí a-ta an.na
english: six months ago i asked from you in hurama (to pay) my expenses.

akkadian: lá i-sà-hu-ur 0.3333 ma-na 3 gín
english: i hold the tablet with my witnesses from the gate of the god.

akkadian: tù-i-mu-um dumu a-šùr{ki} ha-ra-an sú-qí-nim ú-šé-ri-ba-am lá tù-i-mu-um ma-ma-an ha-ra-an sú-ki-nim e-ma-re
english: charge everyone his -tax at arate of 3 shekels of silver per mina, and make him pay the silver and let kuliya personally(!) bring it here.

akkadian: 1 ma-na 2 gín kù.babbar i-ṣé-er
english: meari owes 1 mina 2 shekels of silver to ali-ahum.

akkadian: a-ta a-na u₄-mì-im a-nim ta-áš-ta-pu <gap>
english: and you, until this very day you have kept silent!

akkadian: a-na ku-li-a qí-bi-ma um-ma hu-na-hu-na a-na-ah-dingir
english: to kuliya, thus says hunahuna: anah-ilī and puzur-aššur came here.

akkadian: 5 gín an.na i-ṣé-er en-um-a-šur lu-zi
english: ennam-aššur owes 0.6666 mina 5 shekels of tin to luzi.

akkadian: ni-is-ni-iq šu.nígin an.na-ki-kà 45 ma-na an.na-kà
english: total of your tin: 45 minas; your tin was cleared.

akkadian: ša a ší-ip-ru-tim ta-am-gu₅-ru-ni i-dí-in me-<gap>
english: to ali-ahum: why have you agreed to service as envoy?

akkadian: gín kù.babbar le-qé-a ù šu-ma lá ki-a-am <gap> ma-na
english: if an investor does not answer you, then take 15.5 minas 3 shekels of silver.

akkadian: lá tù-ša-ag-me-ra-ni lá ri-ig-ma-tum ší-bu-tum ra-bi-ṣú-um iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma en-um-a-šùr-ma
english: the attorney seized us and ennam-aššur answered: "i submit to the messenger of my lord.

akkadian: a-ta-ma a-lá-ak itu.2.kam lá a-sà-hu-a ú-ma-am a-ṣé-er ma-li-a dam.gàr
english: i shall not delay 2 months." today the merchant detains me from going to maliya.

akkadian: um-ma ili₅-ba-ni-ma a-na en-nam-a-šur qí-bi-ma ší-im kù.babbar 41.5 ma-na
english: from ilī-bāni to ennam-aššur: you left the price in silver for 41.5 minas of copper.

akkadian: ša né-zi-bu 5 le-ú 1 gú šu-qú-ul-ta-áš-nu 1 le-um
english: as for the tin we left, 5 bars weighed 1 talent, 1 bar 3.8333 minas.

akkadian: ta-al-pu-ta-ni lá nu-uš-ta-áš-me-ší um-ma né-nu-ma sú-ra-am e nu-ša-al-qé-šu-nu na-áš-pè-er-ta-kà
english: we thought: we must not allow them to take offense!" your missive is still here.

akkadian: ṭup-pá-am al-pu-tù-ni a-na <gap> itu.kam i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul a-na ṣí-ib-tim ki-ma
english: if he has not paid (in time), interest will accrue for him in accordance with the rules of the colony.

akkadian: a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-rum kà-ni-eš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am igi gír ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
english: for these words the kanesh colony made us available and this tablet (with) our testimony we presented before aššur's dagger."

akkadian: ma-lá u₄-me-šu kù.babbar lá iš-qú-ul 1.5 gín.ta i-na itu.1.kam a-na 1 ma-na-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb itu.1.kam
english: if he has not paid back at the completion of his term, he will add interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina.

akkadian: lu i ší-im qá-áb-li-a-tim mu-ša-li-im ù ma-az-li-ki iš-tù nu-a-am hu-bu-ul {d}nin.šubur-ba-ni tù-ša-bu-ú ší-tum kù.babbar mì-ma i-na li-bi-kà i-ší-tù
english: after you will have paid the anatolian the debt of ilabrat-bāni, for the rest of the silver, whatever you still owe me, i have the gods as claim on you.

akkadian: ú-ba-áb-šu 0.3333 ma-na kù.babbar ša a-we-el-tim ú 17 gín kù.babbar ša dingir-kur-ub šu-ma a-na bu-zi-a i-tù-ru šu-ištar ú-ba-áb-šu
english: as to the 0.3333 mina of silver belonging to the lady and the 17 shekels of silver belonging to ilī-kurub, if they raise claim against buziya, šu-ištar will clear him.

akkadian: um-ma kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš-ma a-na ú-bar-tim ša ku-bu-ur-na-at qí-bi-ma a-na-kam me-er-ú ša-lim-a-šùr im-hu-ru-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma šu-nu-ma ì-lí-dan ù sá-li-a dumu
english: from the kanesh colony to the trading station at kuburnat: here the sons of šalim-aššur confronted us and said: ilī-dan amd salliya sons of iddin-aššur owe silver to our father.

akkadian: 4 ma-na kù ṣa-ru-pá-am ni-is-ha-sú diri ša-du-a-sú ša-bu i-na illat šu-{d}en.líl a-na i-dí-a-bi₄-im a-na e-bu-ṭim i-dí-a-šùr i-dí-in
english: iddin-aššur has given 4 minas of refined silver, its import duty added, its transport tariff paid for, from the caravan of šu-illil, to iddin-abum as an investment loan.

akkadian: pá-ni-am ša 24 ma-na kù.babbar li-dí-nu-ni-ku-nu-tí-ma i-na li-bi₄ ṭup-pí-a šu-uk-na-šu kù.babbar ù ṭup-pá-am ša pá-na-kà ù a-šùr-gal
english: as to the silver and the tablet that panaka and aššur-rabi are bringing to you, pay the silver and give the tablet concerning my debt to šu-kūbum's representatives.

akkadian: i-id a-ša-kà-na-ku-nu-tí a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-né-eš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šur ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in igi ku-ra-a
english: i am willing to go to the river for you." the kanesh colony gave us (as witnesses)for these proceedings, and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: i-dí-in gan-lam₅ a-na-nu-um a-šu-mì dam.gàr an.na e-tí-iq ù a-lá-nu-um kù.babbar a-šu-mì dam.gàr-ma e-tí-iq a-ha-ma 0.5 ma-na
english: from here the tin will cross overland in the name of a merchant, and from there silver will cross overland in the name of the merchant again.

akkadian: ba-ab-tí ša-áš-qí-lá a-hu-ú-a a-tù-nu ih-da-ma <gap> ba-ab-tí-a ša kà-ni-iš-ki kù.babbar 10 ma-na ša-áš-qí-lá-ma gi-im-lá-ni
english: my dear brothers, take care to have paid at least 10 minas of my outstanding claims in kanesh and do me a favour.

akkadian: a-na e-lá-ma qí-bi₄-ma um-ma a-šùr-ma-lik-ma kù.babbar ša tù-šé-bi₄-lá-ni ù ṭup-pè-kà a-na ma-lá té-er-tí-kà a-na
english: say to elamma, thus aššur-mālik: the silver you sent me and your tablets i have now sent to the city following your instruction.

akkadian: a-na puzur₄-a-šur ú i-ku-pì-a-šur qí-bi₄-ma um-ma šu-ištar-ma be-lu-ú-a a-tù-nu i-hi-da-ma kù.babbar ú ṣí-ba-sú-ú id-na-a
english: say to puzur-aššur and ikūn-pī-aššur, thus šu-ištar: please, my lords, take care to make idnāya pay the silver and the interest on it.

akkadian: ú-kà-al ú šu-ma ku-li-a i-lá-kam-ma a-wa-tim ú-ga-mar a-dí a-lá-kà-ni i-ta-ba-lá-šu a-wa-tim lá tù-ga-ma-ra
english: and if kuliya comes in order to settle the affair, hold him in play until i arrive, do not settle the affair!"

akkadian: um-ma ma-ma-hi-ir-ma a-na a-la-hi-im qí-bi-ma a-dí ma-la ù ší-ni-šu tí-ir-tí i-li-kà-kum a-dí-i túg.hi.a
english: from man-mahir to ali-ahum: i have sent word to you both once and twice - concerning the textiles that are in luhuzattiya.

akkadian: ša hu-bu-ul i-dí-a-bi₄-im 20 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša li-ba-a a-na 13
english: concerning the debt of iddin-abum: reckoned from the week of libbaya he must pay 20 minas of refined silver within 13 weeks.

akkadian: ù šu-ut i-na ṭup-pì-ni ù ší-be-ni a-ma-kam igi a-lim{ki} lu ni-iz-ku
english: i and he should clear our affair there with our tablets and our witnesses before the city assembly."

akkadian: a-na a-dí-da ú a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma um-ma sig₅-pì-a-šur-ma 6 na-ru-qá-tim túg.hi.a ku-nu-ki-a
english: to adida and ali-ahum from damiq-pī-aššur: i left 6 sacks with textiles under my seal in the store-room.

akkadian: a-na a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma um-ma zu-ku-a-ma 12 ma-na kù.babbar i-dí-a-šur ha-bu-lam ṭup-pu-šu
english: to ali-ahum from zukuwa: iddin-aššur owes me 12 minas of silver; i left the certified tablet with you.

akkadian: a-šùr-ša-dí-lí-ma ù-bi₄-il₅ um-ma a-na-ku-ma a-na ša ki-ma i-a-tí kù.babbar le-ru-ub-ma
english: i said to my representatives: only when the silver has come in may the tin go out.

akkadian: en-na-nim ú-ša-bi₄ 0.5 ma-na kù.babbar <gap> na-na-a a-na e-lá-ma i-ša-qal
english: if elamma has paid the silver to ennānum nanaya will pay 0.5 mina of silver to elamma.

akkadian: a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-ma igi gír ša a-šur ší-bu-tí a-dí-in
english: for these words the kanesh colony made me available and i gave my testimony before aššur's dagger."

akkadian: kà-ri-im uš-ta-aṣ-bi₄-it a-dí ki-zi ak-lá iš-tí kà-ri-im ú-ta-na-na-an-ma a-ta-be-a-ma a-ta-lá-kam
english: i held back until <gap> i keep imploring the colony, and i shall set out and come.

akkadian: ú-ša-ag-me-er a-na a-lim{ki} im-ta-ša-ra-ni-ma i-na dí-in a-lim{ki} kù.babbar ú kù.ki a-lá-bu-um i-lá-qé-ma a-na a-wa-at kà-nu-tim lá-bu-um i-za-az
english: he has now dragged me before the city and by verdict of the city ali-abum will take that silver and gold and ali-abum will be responsible for kannutum's interests.

akkadian: ú-ša-ak-ší-da-ma li-bi ù li-ba-ku-nu e im-ra-aṣ a-ṣé-er kù.babbar a-nim ša i-ba-ší-ú 10 ma-na kù.babbar en-um-a-šur ú 10
english: let ennam-aššur and ali-ahum add each 10 minas of silver to this silver that is available, give them the silver and let them do as i have instructed them.

akkadian: ša li-bi šu-ki-tim kù.babbar-kà kù.babbar a-na ší-a-ma-tim šu-ut ú ma tí iš-tí šu-hu-bur iš-ku-nu-ni a-ma-kam i li-bi-kà
english: as to the 8 minas of sealed tin and the šilipki'u that ilī-ašrannī brought, in accordance with your instructions i have sold the tin and the textile to šukkutum.

akkadian: ma-na 2 gín kù.babbar a-na e-na-nim dumu a-bi-a i-na pu-ru-uš-ha-dim e-zi-ib šu-ma e-na-num wa-ša-áb kù.babbar ša-áš-qí-il₅-šu-ma šé-bi₄-lam
english: i left 0.5 mina 2 shekels of silver with ennānum son of abiya in purušhaddum - if ennānum is present make him pay the silver and send it here.

akkadian: al-ta-pá-at lu i ba-a-ba-tí-šu kù.babbar al-qé-ma a-na hu-bu-li-šu ú-ša-qí-il₅ lu i-na na-ru-qí-a kù.babbar ma-da-ma a-na hu-bu-ul a-bi₄-kà
english: i took silver from his outstanding claims and paid to cover his debt, and i paid a great deal of silver from my joint-stock capital for your father's debt.

akkadian: an.na-ku wa-aq-ru 2 ma-na kù.babbar a pá-ni-a šé-bi₄-lá-nim
english: tin is expensive, send 2 minas of silver to reach me en route".

akkadian: ší-tí ta-dí-na-kum tí-il₅-tí-tí-iš i-na é-be-tí-a ta-qá-nam lá ta-mu-a
english: send word to your representatives, so they grant me access to your house."

akkadian: gín kù.babbar a-na ì.giš sà-ar-dim na-ší a-na a-al-du₁₀
english: separately he has with him 0.5 shekel of silver for (buying) olive oil".

akkadian: a-pu-ul ṭup-pá-am ša ku-nu-ki-kà ša a-na 1.3333 ma-na kù.babbar a-na a-na-ah-ì-lí ša ṭup-pì-šu lá ta-tù-ru-ú-ni ta-dí-nam
english: you gave me a tablet with your seal stating that you would not come back on anah-ilī for the 1.3333 mina of silver of his debt-note.

akkadian: li-ib-ší a-hu-ú-a a-tù-nu a-na 1 ma-na-im 1.3333 gín.ta kù.babbar ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb a-na 15 u₄-me-e ha-mu-uš-tum ša
english: my dear brothers, i have to add interest at the rate 1.3333 shekel per mina; i received it for 15 days in the week of iddin-abum.

akkadian: é ša ištar-lá-ma-sí ù a-šùr-du₁₀ a-na 2.5 ma-na kù.babbar a-na ša-lim-ma i-dí-nu-ma kù.babbar ší-im é-šu-nu a-šùr-du₁₀
english: the house of ištar-lamassī and aššur-ṭāb they sold to šalimma for 2.5 minas of silver and with price for their house aššur-ṭāb and ištar-lamassī are satisfied.

akkadian: mu-za a-šur-gal na-ší 2 gín kù.babbar ku-nu-ki-a pì-it-ha-na ub-lá-ku-um a-ha-ma 5.6666 ma-na urudu sig₅ ig-ri-šu šu-a-tí-ma
english: pithana has brought you 2 shekels of silver under my seal; further, i gave 5.6666 minas of good copper as his salary to him as well.

akkadian: e-li-iš lu-bu-šé-e dam-qú-tim lu ta-ku-uš-ta-am dam-qám lu ra-qá-tám da-mì-iq-tám lu ší-li-ip-kà-am dam-qám ša lu-bu-uš ša-ru-tim kù.babbar
english: further, he also brings you 10 minas of refined silver, votive offerings for aššur, its import duty added, its transport tariff paid for, under our seals.

akkadian: ṣa-áb-ta-šu-ma 0.3333 ma-na 1 gín kù.babbar ša-áš-qí-lá-šu
english: seize him and make him pay 0.3333 mina 1 shekel of silver.

akkadian: ma-na kù.babbar a-na síg.hi a ša é
english: we paid 3 minas of silver for wool of the colonial office.

akkadian: ša 1 ma-na 10 gín kù.babbar ša-áp-ra-tim
english: i left surety worth 1 mina 10 shekels of silver with you.

akkadian: gín urudu a-na-ku qá-ta-tù-um ù ší-ni-am i-a-tí
english: also, they promised <gap> for me, (but) they have given me nothing.

akkadian: ša-áš-qí-lá a-le-e kù.babbar id-na-a 10 gín e-li-a-ni
english: consider where silver of idnāya, if only 10 shekels, may turn up.

akkadian: um-ma a-lá-hu-um-ma a-na sig₅-pì-i-a-šur qí-bi-ma 0.5 ma-na kù.babbar ku-nu-ki-a ú ša 8 gín kù.babbar
english: from ali-ahum to damiq-pī-aššur: elāli and ennam-ilī bring you 0.5 mina of silver under my seal and small goods worth 8 shekels of silver.

akkadian: a-na en-na-sú-in ú a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma um-ma man-a-šur-ma 0.5 ma-na 2 gín kù.babbar ku-nu-ki-a i-na
english: to enna-suen and ali-ahum from puzur-aššur: i left 0.5 mina 2 shekels of silver under my seal in purušhaddum with ennānum son of abiya.

akkadian: a-na ku-li-a qí-bi₄-ma um-ma a-šùr-i-mì-tí-ma 0.6666 ma-na 4 gín kù.babbar i-na ša-lá-tù-ar me-eh-ra-tim a-šu-mì
english: say to kuliya, thus aššur-imittī: in šalatuwar i gave you 44 shekels of silver as counter value in the name of your servant abī-ilī.

akkadian: ší-it-ru-kà ša té-zi-bu ù ší-it-ri ša {d}utu-ba-ni e-zi-bu šu-a-nim a be-e-tim na-ší <gap>
english: with your scarfs, which you left behind, and those which samas-bani left behind, su-anum is on his way to the house.

akkadian: 10 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am ma-áš-kà-tám i-ṣé-er a-sà-nim <gap> ṣú-ha-ri-šu ú ku-li-a dumu a-lá-bi-im
english: 10 minas of refined silver, on which a claim rests, is owed by asanum, his servant, to kuliya son of ali-abum.

akkadian: sú-in-na-da a-na puzur₄-a-šur i-na pu-ru-uš-ha-dim iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma sú-in-na-da-ma a-na puzur₄-a-šur 0.5 ma-na 2
english: suen-nādā seized us against puzur-aššur in purušhaddum, and suen-nādā said to puzur-aššur: i gave you 0.5 mina 2 shekels of silver.

akkadian: itu.kam ša ke-na-tim li-mu-um a-al-du₁₀ dumu sà-sà-tim igi puzur₄.ištar dumu a-šur-ma-lik igi en-nam-a-šur dumu ú-ta-a 0.5 ma-na kù.babbar
english: witnessed by puzur-ištar son of aššur-malik, by ennam-aššur son of utaya. šum-abiya owes 0.5 mina of refined silver to ennam-aššur; he is being held in service with this silver.

akkadian: qá-tá-at a-bi-kà al-ta-pá-at lu i-ba-ba-tí-šu kù.babbar al-qé-ma a-na hu-bu-li-šu ú-ša-qí-il₅ lu i-na na-ru-qí-a kù.babbar ma-da-ma a-na hu-bu-ul a-bi-kà
english: i took silver from his outstanding claims and paid to cover his debt, and i paid a great deal of silver from my joint-stock capital for your father's debt.

akkadian: šu-ma lá ki-a-am iš-tí me-er-e-a ù iš-tí ša ki-ma i-a-tí lá ta-ma-ga-ar ša ni-iš a-lim{ki} uz-na-tí-šu-nu al-pu-ut a-hu-ú-a
english: if that is not the case, then you will not agree with my sons or with my representatives." i made clear to them what was sworn by the city.

akkadian: mì-ma a-nim a-šu-mì i-dí-sú-in áš-qúl šà.ba 34.5 ma-na an.na a qá-tí-a i-dí-nu-nim 3.6666 ma-na 7 gín.ta bi-il₅-tám ik-šu-dam
english: all this i paid in the name of iddin-suen, ? 34.5 minas of tin they had given me for expenses, which amounted to 3 minas 47 shekels per talent.

akkadian: <gap> ig-ri e-ma-ri <gap> lu-ša-bi₄ iš-tí li-ip-ta-ni 2 ma-na urudu ah-bu-ul-ma
english: i borrowed 2 minas of copper from lipit-anum and he has taken it out of the copper you sent.

akkadian: a-ha-ma 10 gín kù.babbar ú 3 gín kù.babbar ší-im udu.hi.a a-na
english: agiya owes me 0.5 mina of silver, its import duty added, its transport tariff paid for, my working capital.

akkadian: an.na ku-un-kà-ma šé-bi-lá-nim šu-ma kù.babbar qá-dí an.na i-dí-na-ku-nu-ti ší-ma-am ša ba-lá-ṭí-a ša-ma-ma iš-tí a-li-ki pá-ni-ú-tí-ma
english: if he has given you silver together with the tin, then make a profitable purchase for me and send it here with the very first travellers.

akkadian: iš-tí-kà-ma i-ba-ší 30 ma-na an.na ta-dí-na-ma iš-tí pí-lá-ah-ištar i-ba-ší a-bi a-ta a šu-mì-kà sà-ah-ra-ku-ma li-bi₄
english: with respect to the tin you sold, 27 minas of tin are in your possession; you sold 30 minas of tin and that is with pilah-ištar.

akkadian: lá ta-kà-lá-a-ni šu-ma ha-bu-lá-ku ri-id-a-ma le-qé a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-ma igi gír ší-bu-tí
english: if i owe anything, the produce (evidence) and take it." the kanesh colony gave me for these proceedings, and i gave my testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: 10 gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša {d}utu-ba-ni ù a-šur-ma-lik a-na ha-mu-uš-tim ša ta-la-kà-ni ú-šé-ba-lam
english: 10 shekels of refined silver he will send to me reckoned from the week eponymy of of šamaš-bāni and aššur-mālik not later than the coming week-eponymy.

akkadian: ša be-li-a al-kam ba-a-am u₄-ma-ma a ma-lá i-na ṭup-pì-im kù.babbar a-bu-ni il₅-pu-tù-ni-a-tí-ma i li-bi₄-ni i-dí-ú
english: come along, even today (let me pay) as much as our father wrote concerning us in the tablet, what he set down as owed by us.

akkadian: a-hu-a-tù-nu ú-ṭù-tám lu tù-pá-qí-dá nu-dí-ma a-lá-nu-ma lá tù-pá-ra-dá-šu ṣú-ba-sà-a ù
english: please, my brothers, you must (her?) with barley<gap> and from there(?) you must not scare her!.

akkadian: nu-kà-al-kà kù.babbar ša i-tur₄-dingir šu-qú-lam-ma urudu-kà šé-ṣí um-ma en-nu-a-šur urudu
english: pay the silver of itūr-ilī and produce your copper." ennam-aššur answered: "there is no more copper.

akkadian: a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-né-eš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger."

akkadian: a-na šu-a-šur ma-nu-kà-a-bi₄-a ù ì-lí-pì-ú-ṣur qí-bi-ma um-ma a-bu-ša-lim 1 ma-na kù.babbar ù 4.5 gín kù.gi
english: to šu-aššur, mannu-kī-abiya and ilī-pī-uṣur, say, thus abu-šalim: 1 mina of silver and 4.5 shekels of full ? gold mannu-kī-abiya is bringing to you.

akkadian: ki-ma ša-lu-um kù.babbar 1 ma-na.ta ša na-áš-a-ni-ni šu-ma ha-ra-an sú-ki-ni-im ša-al-ma-at tí-ir-ta-kà li-li-kam ú-za-ni pì-té lu i-na
english: there, for the sake of the safety of every mina of silver that we bring, send us word and inform us whether the narrow track is safe.

akkadian: a-ni a-lá-hu-um iš-pu-ra-am um-ma šu-ut-ma šu-ma i-na ša a-bi₄ i-dí-na-ku-ni mì-ma i li-bi₄-kà i-ší-a-at a-na a-hi-a lá
english: also, now ali-ahum wrote to me, saying: if any of what my father gave to you remains in your possession, do not release it to my brother.

akkadian: 10 ma-na šé-bu-li-im i-li-kam 4 ma-na kù ṣa-ru-pá-am iš-tù ha-muš-tim ša e-na-ah-dingir itu.1.kam ma-hu-ur-dingir li-mì-im a-šùr-na-da a-na
english: i lent you 4 minas of refined silver against interest, from the week of enah-ilī, month mahhur-ilī, eponymy aššur-nādā, and i have your tablet in my possession.

akkadian: a-ṣé-er hu-bu-ul a-bi₄-šu it-bu-lu ú 3.3333 ma-na kù.babbar ša-lim-a-šur a-na i-dí-sú-in dumu i-ba-a i-na ga-ma-ar a-wa-tim i-ša-qal
english: not only did he remove his father's debt, but šalim-aššur must pay 3.3333 minas of silver to iddin-suen son of ibaya for the settlement of the matter.

akkadian: na-áš-ú-ni-ku-nu-tí ší-tí an.na 1 gú 3.8333 ma-na an.na ku-nu-ki-ni ú ku-nu-uk ṣí-li-a i bé-et gu₅-ba-áb-tim né-zi-ib an.na
english: the rest of the tin, 1 talent 3.8333 minas of tin, we left in the house of the priestess under our seals and the seal of ṣilliya.

akkadian: lu sig₅ lu-qú-ut-kà ša šé-ep ba-qú-nim ù kà-ta-tim a-na 30 ha-am-ša-tim dam.gàr ni-qí-ip-ma kù.babbar a-nim a qá-tim
english: we entrusted on commission to an agent your merchandise transported by baqqunum and katātum for 30 weeks, and he gave us this silver to have at disposal.

akkadian: ek-pá-at šu-ma kù.babbar a-na qá-tí-kà ma-qí-it kù.babbar a-na ṣé-er ša ki-ma ku-a-tí šé-bi₄-lá-ma li-ip-qí-du-ni-šu-ma ú lá-ag-mì-il₅-kà šu-ma
english: if any silver has fallen into your hands, send it to your representatives so they can sell it on credit and i can do you a service.

akkadian: a-na ku-ku-a en-na-sú-in ù ú-ṣú-ur-ša-a-šur qí-bí-ma um-ma šu-ištar-ma a-ma-kam a-am-tám sà-ni-qá-ma i-na ú-zi-ni-im e té-pu-uš-ma nu-a-am e
english: say to kukua, ennam-suen and uṣur-ša-aššur, thus šu-ištar: keep the maid there under conrol and let her not operate in uzinum and not affect the native anatolian.

akkadian: itu.kam-im a-na 1 ma-na-im tù-ṣa-ba-am li-mì-im i-ku-pí-ištar 5-<gap>
english: you hold 1.3333 mina 5 shekels of refined silver, the proceeds from my goods.

akkadian: li-bi₄ urudu-i-kà ni-dí a-na ta-ší-a-at urudu ša áb-ša-lim
english: your copper <gap> the rest of your copper <gap> i shall credit to you.

akkadian: ša-du-a-sú ša-bu ku-lu-ma-a na-áš-a-kum kù.gi da-mì-iq wa-ta-ar a-na-kam-ma
english: the gold is of extremely good quality, even here it costs 10:1 (in silver).

akkadian: a-dí-šu-um a-na en-nam-a-šur qí-bi₄-ma an.na-ki-ma ni-iṣ-ba-at-ma 7 ma-na
english: to ennam-aššur: we seized my own tin and had 7 minas of silver sealed.

akkadian: 10 ma-na síg.hi.a ú 5 gín an.na ta-dí-na-am
english: thereof you have given me 10 minas of wool and 5 shekels of tin.

akkadian: lá uk-ta-i-na-šu-nu ú ṭup-pu-šu ha-ar-ma-am lá i-ta-ad-nam a-na mu-nu-a-tí-a a-na 4 ma-na kù.babbar ì-dí-ba-ni puzur₄-a-šur i-šé-e
english: should he fail to confirm them and also to give me his valid record, (then) idi-bāni shall sue puzur-aššur for my computed share, for 4 minas of silver.

akkadian: ih-da-ma i-na ša-am-ší ṭup-pí-i ta-ša-me-a-ni i-zi-za-ma síg.hi-a da-mì-iq-tum ša-ma-ma ku-nu-ki ša ša-lim-ma a-na kà-du-ta-lá dí-na-ma lu-ub-lam
english: take care to be ready the very day you hear my letter, buy good wool and give it to kadutala under šalimma's seal, so he may bring it.

akkadian: kà-ru-um kà-ni-ìš dì-nam i-dì-in-ma ša-lim-a-šùr ù dumu a-mur-ištar ší-bi-šu-nu i-šé-e-ú-ma a-na itu.10.kam a-le-e i-ma-gu₅-ru-ni e-ta-wu itu.1.kam
english: the kanesh colony has passed a verdict, stating that šalim-aššur and amur-ištar's son shall seek out their witnesses, and within 10 months they shall negotiate where they agree.

akkadian: dumu sú-li-a igi ki-li-a dumu en-na-nim a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um dur₄-hu-mì-it i-d
english: the durhumit colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave a tablet with our testimony before aššur's dagger."

akkadian: 1 anše ar-ší-ah li-dí-na-kum en-na-sú-in ša-al-ma šu-ma kù.babbar <gap> qá-tí il₅-qé e-ri-šu-ma
english: ask enna-suen and if he has received silver for expenses demand it from him and load them (the donkeys).

akkadian: gín kù.babbar a-na a-lá-ni ša-ar-ša-ra-ni áš-qú-ul-ma a-na mu-za a-dí-in 2 gín kù.babbar ší-im 2 iš-ra-tim a-na a-šur-ma-lik dumu lu-zi-na
english: i paid 2.5 shekels of silver for a -measure of acorns and gave them to muza. 2 shekels of silver, the price of 2 belts for aššur-malik son of luzina.

akkadian: a tí-ir-tí-a lá ta-na-hi-dá ṭup-pá-am ha-ar-ma-am ša 12 ma-na kù.babbar ú ṣí-ba-tí-šu e-zi-ba-ku-nu-tí ša hu-bu-ul i-dí-a-šur dumu dan-a-šur i
english: i left a certified tablet concerning 12 minas of silver and its interest with you - the debt of iddin-aššur son of dan-aššur is overdue to me by 20 weeks.

akkadian: iz-ku-am 9.75 gín.ta 4.5 ma-na 6.83334 gín kù.babbar-áp-šu 4 ma-na 13.5 gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am ku-nu-ki-ni {d}utu-ba-ni na-áš-a-kum ší-tí kù.babbar
english: at 9 3 / 4 shekels per mina its value in silver was 4.5 minas 6.8333 shekels. šamaš-bāni brings you 4 minas 13.5 shekels of refined silver under our seals.

akkadian: 1 ma-na 2 gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er
english: 1 mina 2 shekels of refined silver anisaba owes to tūram-ilī.

akkadian: šu-ma pí-ri-kà-nu lá-šu kù.babbar i ku-nu-ki-šu li-ib-ší
english: if there are no, then let the silver remain under seal.

akkadian: i-ra-dí-ú-ni-ku-nu-tí 10 ma-na áb-na-am ú-ba-am i ku-nu-ki-a
english: they carry a weight-stone of 10 minas <gap> under my seal.

akkadian: a-na a-lá-hi-im qí-bi₄-ma um-ma ha-nu-ma a-na-kam šu-{d}en.líl
english: to ali-ahum from hanu: here your agent and i seized šu-illil.

akkadian: šu-{d}en.líl i-šu še-am sig₅ i-na <gap> ša-tim
english: he is to measure out the good grain in a year.

akkadian: 11 gín kù.babbar ša a-mur-ištar ki en-um-a-šùr
english: 11 shekels of silver belonging to amur-ištar is owed by ennam-aššur.

akkadian: 4 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-nu-mì kù.babbar a qá-tí a-šur-ni-im-ri i-ma-qú-tù a-na a-lá-hi-im i-da-an-ma itu.2.kam i-bé-el šu-ma i-ma-lá
english: as to the 4 minas of refined silver, when the silver falls into aššur-nimrī's hands he will give it to ali-ahum, and he will dispose of it for 2 months.

akkadian: um-ma šu-ištar-ma a-na en-na-sú-in qí-bí-ma mì-šu ša ta-áš-pu-ra-ma um-ma a-ta-ma 0.5-ma-na kù.babbar hu-bu-lá-am
english: thus šu-ištar, say to ennam-suen: why have you written me as follows: 'your maid has contracted a debt of 0.5 mina of silver'.

akkadian: a-na kù.babbar-pí-kà 2 gín ša a-na am-tim ta-du-nu-ni ší-a-ma-at a-lim{ki} a-šùr i pá-ni-a ú-ba-lá-kum šál-ma-a-ku mì-ma
english: as for your silver, the 2 shekels that you will give to the maid, i shall personally bring you purchases from the city of aššur.

akkadian: ù ša a-šur-i-mì-tí a-na še-im ša pá-i a-dí-na-ku-ni kù.babbar šé-bi-lam-ma še-am lá-áš-a-ma-kum ù a-šar i-ša-pu-ku wa-dí
english: with respect to the grain that i promised you, send me silver so i can buy grain for you, and explain where it is stored.

akkadian: 1.5 ma-na 1.6666 gín kù.babbar ší-im hu-sà-ri-im 0.5 ma-na 8.5 gín hu-sà-ru-um a ší-mì-im ta-dí-in a-hi
english: of that 1.5 mina 1.6666 shekel of silver was the price of lapis lazuli. 0.5 mina 8.5 shekels of lapis lazuli was offered for sale.

akkadian: 3 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am ša i-ṣé-er šu-ištar ni-mar-ištar ù bu-zi-a a-šur-ma-lik i-šu-ú kù.babbar ki-ma a-šur-ma-lik šu-ištar
english: as for the 3 minas of refined silver that šu-ištar, nimar-ištar and buziya owed to aššur-malik, on behalf of aššur-malik šu-ištar has received the silver.

akkadian: ha-ar-šu-um-nu-ma-an-ma ša-qí-il₅ kù.babbar-pì-im um-ma a-nu-pí-a-ma me-er-ú me-tim né-nu lu
english: however, haršumnuman is the one who paid the silver." anupiya said: "we are inheritors.

akkadian: i-ta-aṭ-li-im dí-na lá tù-ša-ra 6.5 gín kù.babbar a qá-tí-šu
english: do not release on credit." i gave 6.5 shekels of silver for his expenses.

akkadian: kán-wár-ta li-mu-um šu-da-a dumu en-na-nim um-ma e-la-ma-ma 1 ma-na
english: elamma declared: one has brought the 1 mina 6 shekels, your silver, to amur-ištar".

akkadian: ša ṭup-pì-kà ha-ar-mì-im a-mur-ša-ra-sà ú-ša-bi-kà-ma e-ṣú-ma a-hu-ur um-ma šu-ut-ma
english: very little remains." he said: "amur-šarrassa paid me no silver." he contested the silver.

akkadian: šà.ba 0.6666 ma-na a-na ni-is-ha-tim ni-dí-in 3 gín i ma-sà-im im-ṭí ší-tí kù.babbar-pì-ku-nu 16 ma-na 10.3333 gín šà
english: thereof we gave 0.6666 mina as excise (and) it became 3 shekels less due to purifying, (so that) the rest of your silver is 16 minas 10.3333 shekels.

akkadian: 1 ma-na 10 gín kù.babbar ša tám-kà-ru-um i-na ṣé-er ma-ma-hi-ir i-šu-ú kù.babbar en-nam-a-šur iš-qú-ul-ma ṭup-pu-šu a-na a-lá-hi-im ù
english: as to the 1 mina 10 shekels of silver that man-mahir owes to the merchant, ennam-aššur has paid the silver and left his tablet with ali-ahum and damqaya.

akkadian: šu-a-šur lu-kà-il₅ i-nu-mì šu-ku-tum iš-tí tám-kà-ri-im i-na-mu-ru-ú šu-ma li-bu-šu dam.gàr ma-lá u₄-mu-šu e-tí-qú-ni ṣí-ib-tám i-ṣé-er šu-ki-tim li-il₅-qé šu-ma
english: when šukkutum meets with the merchant, the merchant may, if he wishes to do so, charge interest from šukkutum in accordance with how much his terms are overdue.

akkadian: 10 gín kù.babbar ú ni-is-ha-sú wa-ta-ar ša-du-a-sú ša-bu-ú ša i-ku-pí-a a-na puzur₄.ištar i-na a-lim{ki} ha-bu-lu-ú a-na-kam šu-hu-bu-ur il₅-qé
english: the 10 shekels of silver, its import duty added, its transport tariff paid for, that ikūn-pīya owes to puzur-ištar in the city - šu-hubur has received that here.

akkadian: a-na-ku kù.babbar ù ṣí-ba-sú ú ṣí-ba-at ṣí-ib-tim a-šé-e-ku-nu a-na
english: i am the guarantor: i sue you for the silver, the interest and the compound interest.

akkadian: i-ša-qal a-pu-tum a-ma-kam lu-qú-tám ṣa-áb-ta a-na-kam a-dí lu-qú-tim a-
english: and as for me, this very day <gap> i am engaged in a conflict with him.

akkadian: e-zi-ib lu ku-a-tí e-zi-ba-ku-um ik-re-e ú-lá kà-i-ni ú-la ri-ig-ma-tù-um
english: mannum-balum-aššur answered, saying to ennam-aššur's representative: "puzur-anna son of šu-illil owes me 4 minas of silver.

akkadian: me-er-i-kà ku-ru-ub um-ma a-šùr-utu-ši-ma a-na ga-am-ri-kà a-na-ku a-za-za-kum igi
english: do it to your sons!" aššur-šamšī answered: "i will personally take your expenses for my account".

akkadian: šu-ma lá iš-qúl 0.3333 gín.ta i-na itu.kam ú-ṣa-áb li-mu-um a-šùr-na-da ha-mu-uš-tum ša qá-té kà-ar-wa-a
english: if he does not pay he will add as interest 0.3333 shekel per month year eponymy of aššur-nādā, week eponymy of the successor of karwaya.

akkadian: 7 itu.kam tù-uš-té-ší-ib-šu šu-ma a-hi a-ta {d}utu ṭup-pá-am ta-ša-me-ú lu-qú-tám a-na pì-lá-ah-ištar ù a-bu-ša-lim
english: please, my brother, the very day you hear this tablet, you must entrust the merchandise to pilah-ištar and abu-šalim so that they bring it here.

akkadian: ú tí-ir-ta-ku-nu li-li-kam ù bé-lu kù.babbar ma-du-tum ša lá il₅-qé-ú-ni a-hu-ru
english: our dear lords, also, send us word, for a great many creditors who have received nothing remain.

akkadian: ku-nu-ki-a li-dí-na-ku-nu-tí ki-lá-lá-ku-nu-ma li-tí-a-šu-ma ri-hi ú tù-ra-ma ku-un-kà-šu-ma a-šar a-šùr-ni-im-ri e-ez-ba-šu
english: both of you should split (the envelope) <gap> and seal it again and leave it for aššur-nimrī.

akkadian: ta-<gap> iš-ra-tí-šu ru-ba-um i-lá-qé i-na wa-ar-ki-tim a-we-lu-um a-na a-lim{ki} i-li-ik-ma um-ma
english: later the man went to the city assembly and said: "he gave it to me for purchases.

akkadian: i-na hu-ur-ší-im e-zi-ib šà.ba 12 túg.hi.a sig₅ 8 túg.hi.a tár-dí-ú-tim 4
english: among those (were) 12 textiles of good quality, 8 second quality textiles, 4 textiles belonging to ušmaya.

akkadian: iš-puru-nim <gap> šu-ma e-ta-ba-at šu-up-ra-ma a-na-kam é-bé-sú a-na ší-mì-im lu ni-dí-in
english: my representatives " if he has fled, write to us, then we will sell his house here."

akkadian: ni-dí-in igi ištar-ba-ni igi ší-ma-ta-nim igi zu-ni-a ma-num-ba-lúm-a-šur dumu du-ni-a ra-bu-ni
english: witnessed by ištar-bāni, by šimatānum, by zul / niya; mannum-balum-aššur, son of dunniya, was our fourth man."

akkadian: 1 gín kù.babbar šé-né-en ša sí-ni-iš-tim ša 1 gín ša ṣú-ùh-ri-im
english: buy for 1 shekel of silver women's shoes, for 1 shekel shoes for children and send them.

akkadian: li-li-kam-ma úz-ni pé-té-a a-na a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma ṣú-ba-tám ša tù-šé-bi-lá-ni a-dí ma-l
english: since they offer a low price, ilī-ašrannī your servant brings you the textile, still under your seal."

akkadian: um-ma dan-a-šur ù en-na-sú-in-ma a-na ir-ma-a-šur qí-bi₄-ma 10 túg.hi.a ku-nu-ki ša
english: thus dān-aššur and ennam-suen, say to ir'am-aššur: 10 textiles with the seals of kulumāya ennam-aššur brought us.

akkadian: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-na-ni-ma igi gír ša a-šùr <gap>
english: for these words the kanesh colony made me available and before aššur's dagger i gave my testimony.

akkadian: a-wa-tí i-na a-ma-ri-a e i-ba-al-ku-ta-a-nim šu-ma a-tù-nu a-na ta-<gap> ta-ša-hu-ṭá a-dí a-lá-ki-a i
english: if you yourselves fear <gap> then let it be said between you so as not to transgress until i arrive.

akkadian: ištar-lá-ma-sí ší-im-ta-ša ta-ší-im-ma i-na 1 ma-na lá 3 gín kù.babbar ša i-ba-ší-ú-ni 0.5
english: ištar-lamassī made her will as follows: of the 57 skekels of silver} that are available, iliya will take 37 shekels.

akkadian: 3 gú a-gi-a 17 ma-na an.na ša ki-ma i-a-tí i-dí-nu-ma
english: further, 10 shekels of silver plus 3 shekels of silver, the price of sheep, for 3 talents: agiya.

akkadian: lá tù-šé-bi-lá-ma a-dí a-we-lam ba-al-ṭù iš-tí-šu lá a-na-me-er lu-qú-tí-kà ba-tí-iq
english: <gap> you sent to me and i shall not meet with the man while he is (still) alive.

akkadian: am-ma <gap>-a-šu a kà-ni-iš lu-bi₄-il₅ ú-ul a mì-ša-am lu-šé-bi₄-lá-kum 30
english: write to pn, that he may bring his <gap> to kanesh or send it to you over there.

akkadian: iš-tí pá-nim-ma šé-bi-lá-nim a-na šu-a-šur qí-bi-ma ší-im kù.gi me-eh-ra-tim i-dí-ma
english: say to šu-anum: 'make the equivalent of the yield of the gold available by buying -textiles for me'.

akkadian: lu-na-dí-id ù lu-ta-mu šu-ma hu-sà-ra-am tù-uš-té-li-a hu-sà-ra-am ù lá-qé-a-nàm a-na e-lá-tí-im <gap> a-na a-lim{ki} šé-ri-a-nim
english: if you discover the lapis lazuli then give the lapis lazuli and the one who took it to the caravan and have it brought to the city.

akkadian: a ni-na-ša ú-šé-ba-lá-ku ú ma-a iš-tù 4 ša-na-té-e kù.babbar-áp a-šur ta-ma-kà-ar ú a-dí u₄-mì-im a-nim
english: now, realize well that since four years you use the silver of assur for trading purposes and that you have kept me waiting until this very day!

akkadian: iš-pu-ru-ni-ku-um a ma-lá a-we-lu iš-pu-ru-ni-ku-ni šu-ma a-wa-tum tí-ir-ta-kà li-li-kam-ma a-wi-lam kù.babbar lu nu-ša-áš-qí-il₅ iš-tí a-li-ki-im
english: in accordance with what the men wrote to you, if there is a case, then send me word so we may have the man pay the silver.

akkadian: lu ší-im lu-lu-im 12.8333 ma-na 5 gín kù.babbar iz-ku-am-ma šà.ba 1 ma-na 10 gín kù.babbar
english: damiq-pī-aššur took 22 shekels of silver. 17 shekels was either the transport tariff or the entrance fee - we paid it to the office of the colony.

akkadian: ni-pu-ul-šu-um a-na 5 gín kù.babbar nu-ku-ra-im ù 1.5 ma-na an.na ta-ší-a-tim ša il₅-qé-ú da-ni-tí a-qá-bi₄-šu-um
english: for the 5 shekels of silver that were disputed and the 1.5 mina of tin he took as transport costs i will state him my harsh conditions.

akkadian: šu-ma a-bi a-ta 1 ù 2 ma-na ki a-li-ki-im pá-nim-ma šé-bi-lam-ma šu-qá-al-kà lá i-pá-ṭá-ar-ma ù
english: please, my father, send me <gap> two minas with the next caravan, lest your packet (of tin) is opened and you get angry.

akkadian: ku-ra-ra-áš-qúl dingir-li kù.gi ša ili₅-pì-ú-ṣur ú ṭup-pá-am ha-ar-ma-am ša 1.6666 ma-na kù.babbar ša hu-bu-ul ku-li-a a-mur-{d}utu ú
english: the golden gods of ili-pi-usur and an encased tablet of 1.6666 mina of silver, being the debt of kulia, amur-samas and ennam-assur i hold as pledge.

akkadian: 1 ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb šu-ma lá-ma u₄-mu-šu im-lu-ú-ni ṭup-pu-šu ša na-ru-qí-šu il₅-ta-áp-tù 5 ma-na kù.gi šu-mì šu-{d}en.líl i-lá-pá-at
english: if they have written the tablet for his joint-stock investment before the completion of his term, he shall book 5 minas of gold in šu-illil's name.

akkadian: a-na en-nam-a-šur qí-bi-ma um-ma a-lá-hu-um-ma a-hi a-ta a-ma-kam iš-tù a-wa-tù-um i-ba-tù-qú-ni tí-ir-ta-kà li-li-kam-ma a ma-lá tí-ir-tí-kà le-pu-uš
english: to ennam-aššur from ali-ahum: my dear brother, send me word there after the matter has been dropped, then i shall act in accordance with your instructions.

akkadian: um-ma ša ki-ma ku-wa-tí-ma a-na en-um-a-šur qí-bi₄-ma 21 gú 40 ma-na urudu 1 gú 28 ma-na urudu
english: from your representatives to ennam-aššur: šalim-wardī leads 21 talents 40 minas of copper and 1 talent 28 minas of good copper under our seals to you.

english: sealed by ennānum son of ali-abum, by aššur-nādā son of irnuid, by katātum son of malaba, by nūr-suen son of nirah-muttabbil, by iddin-suen son of ibaya.
