akkadian: ša dam.gàr 3 gú ku-wa-um 2 šu-uq-lá-an ša
english: the scribe booked you for the additional packets, but the affair has not yet been settled.

akkadian: mì-šu-um ma-tí-ma té-er-ta-ku-nu lá i-li-kam-ma úz-ni lá ta-pá-tí-
english: why has no report of yours ever reached me and do you not keep me informed?"

akkadian: li-iš-lu-ṭù-ma lu-šé-bi₄-lu-ni-kum ší-im 1 túg a-bar-ni-im ša dumu a-lu-<gap>-nim li-iš-lu-ṭù-ma
english: they should take control of the proceeds from 1 abarnian textile belonging to alu<gap>num's son and send it to you.

akkadian: ha-bu-lá-ku ú-ul zi-ra-am ú-ul sú-ub-ra-am šé-bi₄-lam iš-tù mu.2.šè kù.babbar-pì ta-
english: be so kind as to give to kuliya that silver or what has been acquired for it during its journeys".

akkadian: ba-lá-ṭí-kà ú ba-lá-ṭí-ni a-na-kam-ma ú-šé-lá šál-ma-ku mì-ma i li-bi₄-kà lá
english: i am well, there is not reason to worry. <gap> purchase goods that they are in the countryside of hattum.

akkadian: šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 1 gín.ta kù.babbar a-na <gap> i-na itu.kam
english: if he has not paid (in time) he will pay interest at the rate 1 shekel of silver per month.

akkadian: šu-ma an.na 15 gín.ta ù e-li-iš 2 gú an.na ša-ma-nim šu-ma
english: if the rate of the tin is 15:1 or even more, then buy 2 talents of tin; if not, then buy -textiles.

akkadian: túg.hi.a ta-kà-na-kà i pá-ni šu-uq-lá-tim ù sí-ke túg.hi.a ša dam.gàr lá-pí-ta-nim i
english: when you seal the tin and the textiles write on the packets (with tin) and on the hem of the textiles: "belonging to ".

akkadian: né-ta-ri-iš-ma um-ma šu-ut-ma a-da-na-ku-um a-wi-lúm i-na lá i-da-i-ni i-tá-al-kam šu-ma a-ma-kam kù.babbar
english: when we kept asking šu-suen for the tablet he said: i will give it you, but the man has left without us knowing it!

akkadian: wa-ar-ki-a qá-bi₄-a-tí šu-ma wa-ar-ki-tí a-na a-lim{ki} lá tù-ša-ak-ší-dí 1 ma-na-um 0.6666 ma-na i-na
english: if after my departure you do not forward it to me in the city you will pay me in the city 0.6666 mina per mina (extra).

akkadian: kà-áš-da-ku-mì-in ki-ma ik-bu-sa-ni-ni ša ni-iš a-lim{ki} ta-mu-ú lu ú-kà-al igi e-dí-na-a igi en-um-a-šùr
english: that he repressed me, i wish to retain as (a statement) made with an oath by the city!" in the presence of eddināya, and of ennum-aššur."

akkadian: i-la-pá-at kù.babbar ša-bu-ú 4 ma-na kù.babbar ni-is-ha-sú diri ša-du-a-sú ša-bu ki wa-ar-ki-ú-tim ú-šé-ba-lam
english: he has been paid the silver. 4 minas of silver, its import duty added, its transport tariff paid for, he will send with the next transport.

akkadian: li-iš-qú-lu anše ú-nu-sú tap-pá-šu sà-ah-ru a-hu-a 0.3333 ma-na 1 gín kù.babbar ší-im ṣú-ba-tim
english: my dear brothers, i left 0.3333 mina 1 shekel of silver, the price of a textile, and 21 minas 10 shekels of good copper with you.

akkadian: hu-ša-hi-im tù-ma-na-a mu-lá kù.babbar-ku-nu ša a-na du₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šur ha-bu-lá-ku-nu a-ma-sú ma-ru-ma kù.babbar ṭup-pí li-tí-a-šu-ma i
english: pay the balance of your silver that i owe to ṭāb-ṣill-aššur - his maid and sons, and get my tablet, split it and place it with my tablets.

akkadian: ṭup-pá-am gal ṭá-bi₄-a-nim i-na ú-mì-im ša
english: iddin-kūbum said: erase the big tablet for me.

akkadian: li-it-ru-ni-ší ha-dí ša ur-dí lá i-qá-be-ú
english: they should not speak about <gap> my slave.

akkadian: im-dí-lúm i-šu itu.kam kán-wár-ta li-mu-um i-dí-a-šùr
english: month ix, epoynmy of iddin-aššur, son of kubīdi.

akkadian: an.na-ki-a tí-ir-ta-ak-nu li-li-kam-ma li-bi₄ lá ip-ta-na-ri-id
english: give them their wages, 12.5 shekels of silver.

akkadian: kù.babbar uk-ta-al šu-ma šu-ma a-e-ma ú-dá-pí-ir
english: month v, eponymy of su-rama, sons of uzua.

akkadian: 15 gín kù.babbar en-nam-a-šùr a-na ú-ṣú-ur-pì-a-šur
english: 15 shekels of silver ennam-aššur gave to uṣur-<pī>-aššur.

akkadian: 5 gín kù.babbar i-ṣé-er en-um-a-šur lu-zi-i
english: ennam-aššur owes 5 shekels of silver to luzi.

akkadian: kišib bu-bu-ra-nu-um a-na a-bi₄-a dumu be-e-be ù a-šùr-du₁₀ <gap>-nu
english: sealed by buburānum; to abiya son of bebe and aššur-ṭab. <gap> abiya.

akkadian: dumu ku-bi-dí um-ma e-la-ma-ma 1 ma-na 6 gín kù.babbar-áp-kà
english: elamma said: 'your 1 mina 6 shekels of silver amur-ištar has collected'.

akkadian: um-ma a-šur-ša-du-e a-mu-ur-ša-ra-sà ù ša-lim-wa-ar-dim-ma a-na a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma 31 ma-na an.na ku-nu-ki-kà
english: from aššur-šadū'e, amur-šarrassa and šalim-wardī to ali-ahum: šalim-wardī brought 31 minas of tin under your seal.

akkadian: ma ša tí <gap> a-na a-wa-tum mì-šu ša lá ta-áp-tí-a-ni um-ma a-na-ku-ma
english: i said: "he must not make you (fem.) angry." i keep giving her clothes and provisions.

akkadian: a-na i-na-a qí-bi-ma um-ma hu-sà-ru-um ù ta-ra-am-ku-bi-ma 15 ma-na kù.babbar ša ik-ri-bi-kà
english: to innaya from husārum and tarām-kūbī: aššur-ṭāb brought 15 minas of silver from your votive offering.

akkadian: um-ma ì-lí-a-ma a-na šu-ištar ú ur-me-ša qí-bi-ma a-na šu-ištar qí-bi-ma i-na {d}utu-ši ṭup-pá-am ta-ša-me-ú géme.hi.a
english: from iliya to šu-ištar and urmeša: specifically to šu-ištar: the day you hear the letter you must inspect the slave-girls.

akkadian: 1 ú-kà-pá-am e-dí-am 4 eb-le-e 2-ší-na ma-at-li-ih-šé-e a-za-mì-lam hu-ur-ší-a-num ša du-ul-ba-tim hu-ur-ší-a-num ša kà-ma-re-e 2-ší-na eb-lu-ú
english: 1 <gap> saddlecloth, 4 ropes, 2 pack-saddles, a sack, a box with dulbatum, a box with kamaru-fish, two ropes, in durhumit.

akkadian: a-na e-lá-ma qí-bi₄-ma 1 me-at 60 ku-ta-nu 7 anše ṣa-lá-mu a-ra-de₈-a-kum a-bu-ša-lim iš-tí-a
english: say to elamma: "160 kutānu-textiles, 7 black donkeys, i am leading to you; abu-šalim travels with me.

akkadian: dam.gàr ša-ak-na-at igi e-na-a-šur dumu ú-sà-ri-a igi e-na-sú-in dumu en-nam-a-šur
english: in the presence of ennam-aššur, son of uṣāriya, of enna(m)-suen, son of ennam-aššur

akkadian: um-ma šu-ištar-ma a-na zi-zi-zi-i ù ištar-lá-ma-sí qí-bi₄-ma 10 gín an.na
english: from šu-ištar to zizizi and ištar-lamassī: anupiya brings you 10 shekels of tin.

akkadian: um-ma ma-ma-hi-ir-ma dan-a-šur a-lá-hu-um ù šu-ištar-ma a-na en-um-a-šur qí-bi-ma mì-šu ša a-ma-kam a-šar lá a-bi-im ù um-mì-im na-lá-tí-ni-ma ù mu-ur-ṣa-am
english: from man-mahir, dan-aššur, ali-ahum and šu-ištar to ennam-aššur: why are you lying around there where there is no father and no mother, making the disease worse?

akkadian: <gap> um-me-a-nu <gap> lá ú-ša <gap> pu-<gap>
english: then i shall clear you here with the investors.

akkadian: 20 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pu-um i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi₄-im šu-{d}en.líl
english: iddin-abum owes 20 minas of refined silver to šu-illil.

akkadian: a-na en-na-ma-nim qí-bi₄-ma um-ma kà-kà-ba-ma a-na-kam dam.gàr-ru
english: to ennam-anum from kakkaba: the merchant belittles me here.

akkadian: gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er a-bu-ša-lim i-ri-šum i-šu
english: abu-šalim owes 6 shekels of refined silver to irišum.

akkadian: ša hu-bu-ul i-dí-a-bi₄-im 13.3333 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pu-um
english: concerning iddin-abum's debt of 13.3333 minas of refined silver.

akkadian: 2 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-ku-pí-a man-a-na
english: ikūn-pīya owes 2 minas of refined silver to puzur-anna.

akkadian: 0.3333 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku a-šur-du₁₀
english: 0.3333 mina of refined silver aššur-taklāku owed to aššur-ṭāb.

akkadian: a-na en-nam-a-šur ù a-lá-hi-im qí-bi₄-ma um-ma sig₅-pí-a-šùr-ma 0.5 ma-na lá 1 gín kù.babbar ù
english: to ennam-aššur and ali-ahum from damiq-pī-aššur: the brought me 29 shekels of silver and small goods under seal.

akkadian: ù <gap> 40 ma-na an.na ša li-bi-kà en-nam-a-šur li-ik-nu-uk an.na ša
english: the tin that you purchase yourselves, you personally must seal it together with him.

akkadian: ni-dí-in igi a-šur-ša-du-ì-lí igi ir-ma-a-šur dumu a-šur-ma-lik igi a-bu-ša-lim dumu šu-ištar
english: witnessed by aššur-šadu-ilī, by ir'am-aššur, son of aššūr-mālik, and by abu-šalim, son of šu-ištar."

akkadian: um-ma be-lu-lu-ma a-na ah-ša-lim qí-bi-ma i-nu-mì tù-uṣ-ú-ni 1 ma-na kù.babbar a-dí-na-kum
english: from belulu to ah-šalim: when you left i gave you 1 mina of silver.

akkadian: urudu ba-a-áb-tám té-zi-ba-am šà.ba 2.5 gú ki ku-ra al-qé 2 gú
english: in all: you left me 18 talents 50.5 minas of copper as outstanding claims.

akkadian: a-na en-um-a-šur ù sig₅-pí-a-šur a-na sig₅-pí-a-šur qí-bi-ma um-ma ša-ta-na-ma 10 gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am a-na ší-a-ma-tim
english: to ennam-aššur and damiq-pī-aššur; specifically to damiq-pī-aššur from šāt-anna: i gave you 10 shekels of refined silver for purchases.

akkadian: da-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in igi ili₅-ba-ni dumu a-mur-a-šur igi a-hu-wa-qar dumu šu-ištar tù-ra-am-ì-lí dumu e-dí-in-a-šur tap-pá-i-ni
english: witnessed by ilī-bāni son of amur-aššur, by ahu-waqar son of šu-ištar; tūram-ilī son of eddin-aššur was our (absent) partner."

akkadian: a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in igi ì-lí-ba-ni dumu a-mur-a-šùr igi a-hu-wa-qar dumu šu-ištar tù-ra-mì-ili₅ dumu e-dí-in-a-šùr tap-pá-i-ni
english: witnessed by ilī-bāni son of amur-aššur, by ahu-waqar son of šu-ištar; tūram-ilī son of eddin-aššur was our (absent) partner."

akkadian: a-na a-lá-hi-im ú-ṣur-ša-ištar ú zu-ku-a qí-bi-ma um-ma sig₅-pí-a-šur-ma 15 ma-na an.na ku-nu-ki-a ú-ṣur-ša-ištar ú ṣí-li-a
english: to ali-ahum, uṣur-ša-ištar and zukuwa from damiq-pī-aššur: uṣur-ša-ištar and ṣilliya bring you 15 minas of tin under my seal.

akkadian: a-na ša-lim-a-šùr qí-bi-ma um-ma i-dí-a-bu-um en-na-num šu-ištar ù en-um-a-šùr-ma 26 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am ku-nu-ki ša ki-ma ku-a-tí iš-tù bu-ru-uš-ha-dim
english: to šalim-aššur from iddin-abum, ennā-num, šu-ištar and ennam-aššur: ennam aššur has brought out 26 minas of refined silver sealed by your representatives from burušhaddum.

akkadian: a-na ma-nu-ki-a-šùr ù a-ha-tim qí-bi-ma um-ma ú-ṣur-ša-a-šùr-ma a-na ma-nu-ki-a-šùr qí-bi-ma a-hi a-ta šu-ma am-tum kù.babbar ta-ah-ta-ša-ah kù.babbar 2 gín
english: to mannu-kī-aššur and ahātum from uṣur-ša-aššur; specifically to mannu-kī-aššur: my dear brother, if the maid wants silver, give her some 2 shekels of silver.

akkadian: um-ma a-mur-ištar-ma a-na ku-li-a a-šur-e-nam šál-ma-a-šùr ù {d}mar.tu-ba-ni qí-bi-ma a-na-kam 1-<gap> túg.hi.a dam qú-tim wa-at-ru-tim a-na šál-ma-a-šùr dumu a-šùr-ba-ni
english: thus say amur-ištar to kuliya, aššur-ennam, šalim-aššur, and amurrum-bāni: here i entrusted 2(?) textiles of extremely good quality to šalim-aššur; the textiles are encumbered.

akkadian: ki-ma a-ma-kam tù-ša-hi-zi-ni um-ma a-ta-ma ší-im am-tim a-na me-er-i-a lá ta-dí-ni a-na ší-a-tí a-na
english: as you instructed me there, saying: 'you must not give the price of the slave-girl to my son!', for that reason i have not given her to your son.

akkadian: wa-ša-áb šu-ma kù.babbar lu urudu ša ú-šé-lá-ku-ni ší-ma-am a-dí-ni la ta-áš-a-am kù.babbar šé-ṣí-ma a-šar
english: if with the silver or copper that i sent up to you you have not yet made purchases, then remove the silver and let it stay where you are.

akkadian: ṣé-er ì-lí-iš-tí-kál ù pì-lá-ah-ištar zi-ki-ki na-áš-a-ku-nu-tí a-na zi-ki-ki qí-bi-ma a-ni-am a-na pì-lá-ah-ištar pì-qí-id-ma
english: to zikiki: entrust this to pilah-ištar and join it to his consignment and then you personally may serve him and be positive over every shekel of silver.

akkadian: um-ma a-šùr-ša-dí-dingir a-mur-ištar du₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šùr ì-lí-a-lim a-nu-pí-a ù a-ba-ba-a-a-i a-na ku-li-a qí-bi-ma a-wa-tí-kà ša
english: thus aššur-šad-ilī, amur-ištar, ṭāb-ṣilli-aššur, ilī-anum, anuppiya, and ababayai, say to kuliya: we have settled your affair concerning sabasiya's house, includeing the setting of a term for you.

akkadian: ṣa-lá-mu šu.nígin 4 gú 18 ma-na an.na a-wi-it i-li-a iš-tù a-lim{ki} a-di
english: from the city until kanesh the toll-and-fees amounted to 4 minas 6 1 / 4 shekels per talent, the head-tax to 15 shekels per person.

akkadian: ta-ša-am 0.1666 gín a mu-uš-ṭá-tim dí-in-ma ku-nu-uk-ma šu-ku-bu-um e-ri-ú-ma lá tù-šé-ba-lam li-ší-am
english: give 1 / 6 shekel for combs and put it under seal and do not send? šu-kūbum here empty-handed, let him bring it to me.

akkadian: hu-sà-ra-am lu ší-im hu-sà-ri-im ta-da-nam lá i-mu-ú lá ri-ig-ma-tum ší-bu-tum igi šu-ištar
english: he refused to give either the lapis lazuli or the price of the lapis." this is not a formal court case, only a witnessed statement.

akkadian: a-šur-i-mì-tí ma-lá-hu-um a-na 3 itu.kam i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im
english: he is to pay within 3 months; if he has not paid (in time) he shall add interest according to the rule of the colony.

akkadian: i-ṣé-er ma-ma-hi-ir dumu a-mur-ištar šál-ma-a-šur i-šu i-na e-ra-bi-šu-ma a-na ša-lá-tù-wa-ar itu.1.kam i-lá-ak-ma
english: sealed by šum-abiya son of ibbi-sīn, by šu-belum son of ilī-kurub, by salliya son of iddin-aššur, by enna-suen son of ikuwa, by his daughter haditum.

akkadian: 0.5 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er a-mur-a-šur i-dí-a-bu-um i-šu
english: half a mina of refined silver amur-aššur owes to iddin-abum.

akkadian: kù a-nim 5 0.6666 ma-na 5 gín ša
english: of this silver 5.6666 minas 5 shekels belong to aššur-emūqi.

akkadian: a-na a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma um-ma púzur-a-šur tí-ir-tí i-li-kà-kum 0.5
english: to ali-ahum from puzur-aššur: i already sent you my instructions.

akkadian: ṭup-pá-am ša hu-bu-li-šu ša li-mì ša 30 ma-na iš-tí e-na-na-tim i-ba-ší <gap>
english: the tablet concerning his debt to the eponyms, concerning 30 minas, is in ennanātum's possession.

akkadian: 2 me-at 70 áb-na-am e-pí-iq ša ú-nu-qí-im ra-bi-tám i-ṣé-er ha-bu-a-la bu-li-na ù kà-lu-a en-nam-a-šur i-šu ú
english: habuala, bulina and kaluwa owe 270 stones <gap> large, to ennam-aššur and they must drag the stones to his house.

akkadian: 7 gín.ta 1 ma-na 10 gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-na kù.babbar-áp im-dí-dan iš-tí šál-ma-a-šùr dan-a-šùr il₅-qé šu-ma
english: reckoned at the rate 1:7 dan-aššur has received 1 mina 10 shekels of refined silver from imdī-dan's silver from šalim-aššur.

akkadian: ištar-lá-ma-sí tí-šu iš-tù ha-muš-tim ša a-šur-i-mì-tí itu.kam ša sà-ra-tim li-mu-um a-šur-i-mì-tí 3 gín kù.babbar ṣí-ba-sú ù ninda a-na ša-na-at ú-bu-lu-nim
english: reckoned from the week of aššur-imittī, month ša-sarrātim, eponymy aššur-imittī, they will bring 3 shekels of silver, its interest, plus the bread within one year.

akkadian: um-ma la-ma-sí-ma a-na a-la-hi-im qí-bi₄-ma mì-šu ša ta-áš-pu-ra-ni um-ma a-ta-ma a-ma-kam a-na kù.babbar 1 gín e-né-ki a-hi-e-iš
english: from lamassī to ali-ahum: why have you written me as follows: your eyes are fixed together on every shekel of silver.

akkadian: ú-kúl-ti 2 anše ù sá-ri-dim ù na-ab-ri-ta-šu-nu anše-re i sí-kà-tim
english: after the 16.8333 minas of hand tin had been spent 8 minas 30.6666 shekels of tin will be balanced (to him).

akkadian: ni-dí-in igi a-ku-za igi lá-li-im igi šu-ku-bi-im igi a-šùr-i-mì-t
english: witnessed by akuza, by lalum, by šu-kūbum, by aššur-imittī, by itūr-ilī."

akkadian: um-ma a-na-ah-ištar-ma a-na áb-ša-lim qí-bi₄-ma 1 gín kù.babbar i-dí-{d}utu
english: from anah-ištar to ab-šalim: iddin-šamaš brings you 1 shekel of silver.

akkadian: 17 ma-na lá 7.5 gín i-ṣé-er na-áb-sú-en i-sú-rik₁₃ i-šu
english: nab-suen owes 17 minas less 7.5 shekels (of silver) to issu-arik.

akkadian: kù.babbar i-ṣé-er dingir-i-dí šu-{d}en.líl i-šu igi e-me-ni igi ì-lí-áš-ra-ni
english: ilī-idī owes 0.3333 mina less 2 shekels of silver to šu-illil.

akkadian: a-na ì-lí-e-mu-qí šu-ta-mu-zi a-bi-a-a e-lá-a ù lá-ma-sí qí-bi-ma um-ma a-dí-da ù a-lá-hu-um-ma 3.3333 ma-na kù.gi ša-lim-a-šur a-na a-šur-iš-tí-kál
english: to ilī-emūqī, šu-tammuzi, abiya, elaya and lamassī from adida and ali-ahum: šalim-aššur invested 3.3333 minas of gold in aššuriš-tikal son of sukkalliya.

akkadian: iš-tù ha-muš-tim ša i-tur₄-dingir <gap> itu.1.kam ša sà-ra-tim li-mu-um ša qá-té a-šùr-i-mì-tí ma-lá-hi-im a-na 5 ha-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma
english: reckoned from the week-eponymy of itūr-ilī, month ii, year-eponymy of the successor of aššur-imttī, the boatman, within 5 weeks he will pay.

akkadian: um-ma lá-ma-sí-ma a-na en-um-a-šur qí-bi-ma mì-šu-um na-áš-pè-ra-tí-kà a-na a-bi-kà lá ta-ša-pá-ar a-lá-hu-um <gap> a-ša-pu-ru-šu-ni
english: from lamassi to ennam-aššur: why is it that you do not send your messages to your father?

akkadian: igi en-um-a-šùr dumu sú-in-na-da igi a-šùr-i-mì-tí igi iš-me-dingir igi en-na-sú-in igi i-<gap>-ni igi a-lá+lá-<gap> a-hi-šu igi e-lá-lí dumu i-pí-li-is

english: witnessed by nikkilet, the priest, son of arawa, by puzur-ištar son of aššur-taklāku, by duliya, by kukuwa, the smith.

akkadian: um-ma pí-lá-ah-ištar-ma a-na a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku ù en-um-a-šur a-na en-um-a-šur qí-bi-ma áš-ta-na-me-ma a-na a-li-im ha-ra-kà a-dí ṭup-pí-im ša šu-mì
english: from pilah-ištar to aššur-taklāku and ennam-aššur; specifically to ennam-aššur: i keep hearing that you are going to the city.

akkadian: ku-nu-ki-šu nu-šé-li-ma ni-dí-šu-um 1 ma-na 6 gín kù.babbar a-na-ku
english: since he did not give me your two letters i also did not release to him the tablet of aššur-ṭāb.

akkadian: bé-el-tí-é.gal-lim li-mu-um puzur₄-{d}muš igi {d}im-pì-lá-ah igi en-um-a-šur dumu puzur₄-a-šur
english: in the presence of adad-pilah, of ennam-aššur, son of puzur-aššur.

akkadian: ú ší-bé-a az-ku-ra-kum ší-bé-a a-na ba-áb dingir ú-šé-ra-da-ma ṭup-pá-am ša ku-nu-ki-ku-nu ša 4
english: i am ready to lead my witnesses down to the gate of the god so that you can acquire a tablet with their seals, those of these four men.

akkadian: a-na dumu.mí šál-ma-a-šur a-dí-in ṭup-pá-am ša me-er-a-at šál-ma-a-šur a-dí-da šu-ta-mu-zi
english: he certified the tablet concerning šalim-aššur's daughter, adida, šu-tammuzi and elaya.

akkadian: 4.5 gín i li-bi₄-kà a-hi a-ta kù.babbar ú ší-a-ma-tim a-na
english: my dear brother, give the silver and the purchases to aššur-muttabbil.

akkadian: ba-bi-lim ù na-ra-am-zu 0.3333 ma-na lá 2 gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pu-um
english: puzur-ištar son of šu-anim owes 18 shekels of silver to irišum.

akkadian: ù 3.3333 gín kù.gi ku-nu-ki ša ku-zi-zi-a a-zu na-áš-a-kum ší-tí urudu
english: amur-ištar and ilī-ašrannī has bought a slave and have left for durhumit.

akkadian: 1 ma-na 15 gín kù.babbar i li-bi ša-ri-ša a-lá-hi-nim 0.6666 ma-na
english: 1 mina 15 shekels of silver is owed by šariša, the miller.

akkadian: túg.hi.a a-na 1 gú 10 ma-na urudu ma-sí-im a-mur-ištar i-dí-in i-na
english: amur-ištar sold 2 textiles for 1 talent 10 minas of washed copper.

akkadian: ṣú-ùh-ri-im ša a-ki-dí-e iš-tù a-lim{ki} ú-šé-lá-a-kum túg.hi.a tù-šé-li-a-ma
english: you brought these textiles up, but did not enter here with me, you went away on a journey.

akkadian: kù.babbar ší-im e-ri-im kù.babbar pá-ni 0.5 ma-na ù
english: as you hear my missive send me small goods worth 0.5 mina 5 shekels of silver to hahhum.

akkadian: a-na-dí-ma kù.babbar 10 ma-na ep-ša-ma ha-ra-nam a-na ṣú-ha-ri-a
english: let him enter the smuggling goods on the narrow track, and let him convert the textiles to silver.

akkadian: ma-lá ṭup-pí-im ša a-lim{ki} 1 ku-ta-nu-um ba-tí-iq um-ma
english: uzua said: 'they did not count the textiles in the city, they (simply) entrusted the bags to me'.

akkadian: 18 ma-na an.na a-wi-it i-li-a iš-tù a-lim{ki} a-di kà-ni-iš{ki} 1 gú-tám 4
english: the price of 2.5 tiles, 0.5 mina of silver, aššur-ṣulūlī gave to kūn-ilum.

akkadian: a-na ša ki-ma i-a-tí en-nam-a-šur ù a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma um-ma ša-lim-a-šur i-na té-ga-ra-ma
english: to my representatives, ennam-aššur and ali-ahum from šalim-aššur: i am staying in tegarama.

akkadian: a a-na a-šur-du₁₀ i-dí-in a-ha-ma 2.5 ma-na kù.babbar ku-nu-ki ša a-šur-{d}utu-ši a-na a-lá-hi-im
english: separately 2.5 minas of silver under the seals of aššur-šamšī aššur-ṭāb entrusted to ali-ahum.

akkadian: {d}utu-ši ṭup-pí ta-ša-me-ú tí-ib-a-ma a-tal-kam <gap> lá a-kà-ṣa-ad a-na ša ki-ma i-a-tí qí-bi-ma
english: my dear brother, the very day you hear my letter set out and leave.

akkadian: 0.6666 ma-na 1 gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er ištar-il₅-šu a-šùr-du₁₀ i-šu iš-tù ha-muš-tim ša
english: 0.6666 mina 5 shekels of refined silver ištar-ilšu, owes to aššur-ṭāb, son of elamma.

akkadian: a-ni-ú-tum li-iš-me-ú a-ma ta-ah-sí-sá-tù-ni ku-nu-ku-ú-a ú ku-nu-ku-kà i-ki-ir ú-lá kà-i-in ša
english: now, may these men listen - confirm or deny our memorandum with my seal and your seal, that you and i settled accounts and settled.

akkadian: 10 gín šu-ku-bu-um i-na-pá-lam iš-tù ni-ip-lá-tum ša hi-na-a ú šu-ku-bi₄-im ba-at-qá-ni 0.6666 ma-na 2 gín a-na kà-ri-im a-na-pá-al
english: after the balance payments by hinnāya and šu-kūbum have been deducted i will balance 42 shekels to the colony.

akkadian: šu-ha-ni-iš a-dí-na-kum um-ma a-ta-ma 3 túg ša
english: you said: 'i will bring up for you from the city 3 akkadian garments for children'.

akkadian: kù.babbar a-na-na a-ma-at en-um-a-šùr ta-áš-qú-ul šà.ba 0.8333
english: we brought out a tablet and some -stone from mannum-kī-aššur's house and gave it to ištar-lamassī.

akkadian: ší-tí kù.babbar ší-ma-am ša ba-lá-ṭí-a ša-ma-nim a-na

akkadian: an.na ku-nu-ku ù 5 ma-na.ta it-ra-sú qá-dum an.na qá-tim 34
english: my dear brothers, assist with my goods in the palace so there will be no unlawful activity and i shall not become worried.

akkadian: 8 gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-ku-pí-a dumu pí-lá-ah-ištar ku-li-a dumu
english: if he goes away to somebody else, he will hire someone in his place and he will compensate the wages of the hireling.

akkadian: šu-ki-tim ha-bu-lam itu.kam ša ke-na-tim a-30 u₄-me i-ša-qal li-mu-um bu-zu-ta-a
english: if there is any silver and its interest then let him give it to you, even though he may raise objections to you.

akkadian: i-šé-ra-tim im-ṭí 18 gín a-ma-sú-hu-tim ni-ik-bu-ús
english: you wrote us as follows: 'elamma has a debt of 4 minas of silver'.

akkadian: kù.babbar-áp-kà le-qé gi₄-mì-lam i-ṣé-ri-a šu-ku-un ù
english: do me this favor and (know that) i too can do you a favor!

akkadian: kù.babbar ša e-na-na-tum i-dí-na-ni i-na {d}utu-ši
english: do not fail to send silver lest both you and i will regret it!

akkadian: a-bi-a ha-bu-lá-tí kù.babbar ù ṣí-ba-sú im-tí-da-kum
english: the silver and the interest on it has become a great sum for you.

akkadian: túg.hi-tí-kà ú-šé-ṣí-ú ṭup-pá-am a ší-a-tí a-ti-a-kum
english: therefore i drew up a tablet for you and i named you my witnesses.

akkadian: ma-na kù.babbar a pá-ni ištar-pì-lá-ah ra-dí ú-nu-tim ša hi-na-a
english: elamma sent 1 mina for būr-suen, the transporter of the ; 0.5 mina of silver for aššur-dān, the transporter of hinnāya.

akkadian: ú-lá a-pá-al ša ki me-er-i-a né-nu lá nu-šé-ra-áb a-na-ku áp-lá-ah-ma uš-té-ri-ib li-ba-kà
english: we were not to bring in the house somebody to replace my son, (but) because i became afraid, i was the one who has now brought one in.

akkadian: ú-kúl-ti 2 anše-re ù sá-ri-dim ù
english: all this ku'uku brought to hinnāya.

akkadian: ú-kà-pì-na-hi me-eh-ra-at ṭup-pé-e ha-ru-mu-tim ša ku-bu-ur-na-at
english: copies of certified tablets from kuburnat.

akkadian: ú-ba-áb-šu igi na-áb-sú-in igi du₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šur igi {d}nin.šubur-ba-ni
english: witnessed by nāb-suen, by ṭāb-ṣill-aššur, by ilabrat-bāni.

akkadian: an.na i-ba-ší-ú lu-ub-lu-nim a ma-lá tí-ir-tí-ku-nu a-na-hi-id
english: i shall pay attention to your instructions.

akkadian: a-bi-<gap> iš-tí ik <gap> a-wa-tum lá ta-ga-<gap> bu-lá-tù ša
english: there is nothing from outstanding claims in the house.

akkadian: lá tù-uš-<gap> lá bi <gap> tí-ir ki a-wa-tim ša du-um
english: come so that we can decide what is fitting here.

akkadian: um-ma a-lu-lá-a ú a-mur-ištar-ma a-na en-um-a-šur qí-bi₄-ma na-áš-pé-er-tám ta-áš-pu-ra-ni-a-tí ki-ma a-we-lu ma-du-tum
english: from alulaya and amur-ištar to ennam-aššur: you have sent us a missive.

akkadian: ma-na 6.25 gín.ta da-tum ik-šu-dam 15 gín.ta qá-qá-da-tù-um 17.5 ma-na 4 gín an.na
english: separately, 5 11 / 12 shekels of silver of his one-third-share aššur-ṣulūlī took.

akkadian: dí-me-tim ù-re-e ik-ri-be ha-bu-lá-ku a-na a-nu-ni-tim ú-ra-am ha-bu-lá-ku 0.5 ma-na kù.babbar ni-is-ha-tim a-na a-šur ha-bu-lá-ku
english: i owe vulva-ornaments as votive offerings to ištar of assur, of qatna and of dim.

akkadian: ša ša-lim-a-šur a-na a-šur-i-mì-tí dumu a-mur-dingir ni-ip-qí-id a-ha-ma 7 ma-na 13 gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am a-šur-i-mì-tí dumu a-mur-dingir
english: further, aššur-imittī son of amur-ilī received 7 minas 13 shekels of refined silver from šalim-aššur's silver.

akkadian: ki-ma a-bi-a ta-ba-ší-ma ú-lá ú-ba-áš-kà-ma qá-at-kà ú-lá am-ha-aṣ a-na-kam puzur₄-{d}utu dumu šu-nu-nu
english: here you appointed puzur-šamaš son of šu-nūnu for me in order to pay the copper in 15 days, but until today he has not paid any copper to me.

akkadian: illat-at dumu a-ni-nim i-li-kà-ku-nu-tí i-na qé-er-bi₄-im kù.babbar mì-ma ú-lá
english: my dear brothers and lords, check my certified tablets and reach an agreement where possible with those of my customers you see.

akkadian: mu-mu-lá-nim igi a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku dumu i-ku-nim dumu sá-ma-a mì-ma a-nim a dur₄-hu-mì-it <gap> ša ki-ma i-a-tí ú-šé-bi₄-il₅
english: witnessed by aššur-idī son of mu-mulānum, by aššur-taklāku son of ikūnum son of samaya.

akkadian: igi ku-ra igi a-šur-{d}utu-ši a-ha-ma 2 ší-it-ru 4.5 túg wa-dí-ú-tum ša a-na-na a-na šu-ištar a-na ší-a-ma-tim ta-dí-in igi a-wi-li a-ni-ú-tim
english: further, 2 undergarments, 4.5 -textiles belonging to anna-anna were given to šu-ištar for purchases.witnessed by these men.

akkadian: i-na um-me-a-ni-ku-nu lu tí <gap> tám i-na ša-am-ší ša ṭup-pì-ni ta-ša-me-ú qá-qá-dí-kà ki-a-ma
english: concerning this amur-ištar keeps the silver in accordance with your instructions.

akkadian: ha <gap> lu <gap> li-mu-um ni-ta
english: as my brother died, we sent the tablet of the city and the attorney ababa.

akkadian: ša a-lim{ki} a-ba-ba ra-bi₄-ṣú-um ub-lá-ma kù.babbar
english: i shall come in 6 months and i and my outstanding claims shall be released(?).

akkadian: ša-ma-ma šé-bi₄-lá a-ta mì-ma-ša-ma lá tù-uš-té-bi₄-lam
english: you said: 'i will go and send you from hahhum a few minas of tin.

akkadian: ṣú-ba-tám iš-tí-in ú ší-na dí-na-ma 1.5
english: my dear lords, as to the silver that i to ṭāb-ṣill-aššur, pay when pn arrives.

akkadian: a-na 1 ma-na-im ú-ṣú-bu kù.babbar i
english: from the week eponymy of aššur-taklāku, son of ali-ahum, he shall pay within 16 weeks.

akkadian: šu-ma lá uš-té-bi₄-lam 15 gín kù.babbar
english: should he not send it to me then he will pay 15 shekels of silver.

akkadian: 0.5 ma-na 2 gín kù.babbar ší-im 2 anše.hi-kà
english: the silver that left purušhaddum as well as the proceeds from your copper--your goods have been spent, your donkeys too.

akkadian: šu-sú-in kù.babbar a-na 12 ha-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma i
english: the iron will be sold and ennam-aššur will receive 22.5 minas of silver, and then kura will receive itūr-ilī's silver.

akkadian: 10 ma-na ša qá-ru-bi-im i-ṣé-er tám-kà-ri-a lá-al-qé a-na kà-ni-iš i
english: they know the losses and the maintenance, but without permission from my investors ilī-ālum, šu-kūbum, aššur-malik and amur-ištar's son i cannot leave to go overland.

akkadian: 18 gín kù.babbar ší-im ku-ta-nim a-na sà-li-a áš-qúl igi a-nu-nu-a ù ib-na-{d}im 15 gín kù.babbar a-na ku-ku-ú áš-qú-ul
english: i paid 18 shekels of silver as the price for a kutānu to salliya.

akkadian: ni-is-ha-tum ù 7 gín kù.babbar i-na-pá-al 4 túg a ší-mì-im 41 ku-ta-nu-šu iz-ku-ú-nim
english: the rest of his textiles amounts to 34 dark textiles.

akkadian: sag itu.kam tí-i-na-tim a-na itu.kam i-ša-qal šu-ma
english: if he does not pay he will add an interest of 0.5 mina per 10 minas per month.

akkadian: qá-tí a-šur-i-mì-tí ma-lá-hi-im 0.3333 ma-na.ta i-na ša-tim
english: seal of kukuwa son of mannum-kī-iliya, seal of dadaya son of buzi, seal of ilī-dan son of iddin-aššur.

akkadian: ša-tim ú-ṣa-ba-am iš-tù mu.4.šè kù.babbar-pì ú-kà-al 1
english: my dear brothers, reach an agreement with the man from tumliya and take my share of the silver.

akkadian: a-lim{ki} a-na-kam ṭup-pí-šu-nu lu ni-il₅-ta-qé i-hi-id-ma tí-ir-ta-kà le-zi-ba-am
english: pay attention and leave your instructions.

akkadian: ú-ṣa-ab kišib ku-ku-a dumu ma-nu-ki-ì-lí-a kišib da-da-a dumu bu-zi kišib
english: from the capital on the wool that they are going to pay him, ilī-dan son of iddin-aššur shall give 6.6666 minas of good -silver to ennam-aššur.

akkadian: ší-na tap-pá-e-a kù.babbar ù né-ma-al-šu ta-dí-in
english: on top of this you have caused him to have expenses of one or two minas.

akkadian: šu-lá-ba-an ú ša ki um-me-a-ni um-me-a-nu ú-dí-ú-ma ù ta-ma-lá-ki
english: within 3 days we shall enter and clear it." puzur-aššur said together with his attorney: "7 minas of silver is deposited in a package.

akkadian: u₄-me-e ku-ša-hi-ku-nu ez-ba-ma ba-ab-tí za-ki-a-nim 8 ma-na kù.babbar iš-tí
english: he has held the silver for 4 years. 1 mina owed by šuppun-ahšu - he will pay interest of 20 sacks of grain annually.

akkadian: ta-da-ga-lá-ma ṭup-pu ha-ru-mu-tum ú ba-ba-a-tum ru-qá-tum i-ba-ší-ú ṭup-pí
english: we gave 16.3333 shekels of silver for their disposal; 36.6666 shekels of silver, their expenses, we borrowed in a merchant-house against interest.

akkadian: ú-ṣí-ir-ni-a-tí a-ba-ú-a bé-lu-a a-tù-nu ma-lá a-bi-i i-ší-mu-ni-a-tí-ni me-eh-ra-at
english: let me hear your missives, so i can come, see aššur's eye and your eyes and clear my father's house (of claims).

akkadian: u₄-ma-am tù-qá-a la ta-lá-ka-nim-ma é a-bi₄-ku-nu
english: urgent, if you are truely my brother, don't you keep hearing there that conditions here are harsh?

akkadian: ku-nu-uk a-šùr-du₁₀ li-qí-a-am ṭup-pá-am ša ku-nu-uk a-šùr-du₁₀ al-qé-a-ku
english: and then they should release to me the two letters of mine with my seal, which you have in possession, to cancel them.

akkadian: šu-nu a-lá-kam ú kà-lu-mì-i lá i-mu-ú-ni a-lá-ak a-na
english: you did indeed come to collect our father's assets, and once or twice you have questioned me, and i have not rejected you.

akkadian: a-šar a-dí bu-ra-im li-tab-ší-kà ta-áš-pu-ra-ni bu-ra-am
english: with respect to the for your dres that you wrote about, he does not bring you a .

akkadian: ke-na a-wa-tum ša igi a-šur ù
english: while i gave you silver for your house and opened your eyes, you have done this to me!

akkadian: wa-áš-bu-ni a-we-li i-na a-wa-tim ma-qí-ta-ma pí-šu-nu li-im-dá-nim-ma
english: pester them there for the case that i may clear myself, and then send word to me personally and give me encouragement.

akkadian: ù a-tù-nu a-dí u₄-mì-im a-nim sà-ah-ra-tù-nu a-am
english: you (plur.) do not come and clear the affairs of your paternal house, and the eponymn tries to seal up the house.

akkadian: qá-qá-ad šál-mì-šu-nu ú ke-ni-šu-nu ra-ki-is li-mu-um
english: if, when his term is due, he has not paid, he will add an interest of 1.5 shekels per month.

akkadian: iṭ-ra-a a-na be-ú-lá-tim dí-šu-ma be-ú-lá-tí ra-qá-tám
english: also, he owes me 13 shekels of silver - seize him and have him pay the silver and send it.

akkadian: a-šur-lá-ma-sí dumu la-qé-ep e-lá-ma i-šu iš-tù
english: month i, eponymy of the successor of šu-hubur. 8 minas of refined silver šuli, son of puzur-abeh, owes to elamma.

akkadian: gi₅-mì-lam₅ i-ṣé-er um-mì-ša ú-ul a-hi-ša lá-áš-ku-un ú-ul
english: the day pilah-ištar arrived here, since you had not accompanied him, he felt very unhappy and for five days did not leave his house.

akkadian: ša é a-bi-ni kà-ša-dam ú-lá ta-le-e-a-ni
english: here itūr-ilī blocks the gate of the colony like a lion and we are incapable of setting witnesses for the man.

akkadian: ni-il₅-té-šu-ma i li-bi ṭup-pí-kà i-na é
english: of that we paid 17 shekels of silver, the price of a donkey that you owed to ennānum son of abiya.

akkadian: ša ki-ma ku-nu-tí pí-iq-da-ma u₄-me-e-ku-nu ba-lu-um
english: also, send at least 1 or 2 minas of silver; send it so we can store 40 litres of grain before you come.

akkadian: wa-ah-šu-ša-na a-ta-lá-ak ki-ma ṭup-pí ta-áš-me-a-ni <gap>
english: when you have heard the letter <gap> should come here.

akkadian: gín 15 še.ta ta-dí-in šà.ba ša
english: of that the silver for 50.8333 minas of copper remain.

akkadian: šu-ma mì-ma ha-bu-lá-ku-um šu-šál-šu-um lá-áš-qú-ul igi
english: should i owe you anything, i will pay (it) threefold.""

akkadian: ú-šé-bi-lu lá-qé-ep kù.babbar-áp-šu i-lá-qé šà.ba 5 gín kù.babbar ši-im 0.5 ku-ta-nim ṣa-hu-ru
english: lā-qēp will take his silver (and) from it 5 shekels of silver, the price of 0.5 -textile, have been deducted.

akkadian: lu ší-im urudu sig₅ <gap>-šu e-ṣí-iš a-na ṣí-pá-ra-tim e-pá-ší-im ig-mu-ru i-na šà.ba 1 me-at ṣí-pá-ra-tim
english: as to the rest of the silver, either as the price of good copper or <gap> they spent (it) quickly on the production of nails.

akkadian: a-na e-lá-ma ú-lá i-tù-ar a-na 30 ma-na an.na ša ku-na-a a-na illat ì-li-a-lim nu-du-a-e i-dí-ú qá-de₈ illat-ma a-na a-wi-tí-šu i-za-sú-um
english: as for the 30 minas of tin, for which kunnāya served ilī-ālum's caravan a notice, it will belong to him together with (the other members of) the caravan according to its declared value.

akkadian: ṭup-pu-šu ni-dí-šu-um 4 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am ša a-šu-mì puzur₄-a-šur ni-is-ha-sú diri ša-du-a-sú ša-bu a-na-kam ša ki-ma ku-a-tí ú né-nu
english: as to 4 minas of refined silver, for which the import duty was added, the transport tariff paid in the name of puzur-aššur, here your representatives and we have made a claim.

english: if the rate is less than 15 shekels (to 1) then buy for one half of it tin and for the other half textiles and ship them to me with the first opportunity.

akkadian: lá-ma ma-tum iš-me-ú ra-ma-ku-nu šu-ul-ha-a 1 túg.hi.a a-na li-ta-áb-ší-a lu šu-ru-um lu bu-ra-am ša a-ki-dí-e iš-tù
english: give a set of textiles for me to wear, either a black one or an akkadian from hurama, to an affiliated trader so they may wrap it up and have it brought in.

akkadian: ma-al-ú-tim kù.babbar bé-lá-num lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im 1.5 gín.ta a-na ma-na-im ṣí-ib-tám a-na ur-hi-im ú-ṣa-áb
english: seal of ikuppiya, son of pilah-istar, seal of ili-bani, son of mutalum, seal of assur-re'i, son of usuranum. 8 shekels of refined silver ikuppiya, son of pilah-istar, owes to kuliya, son of ali-abum.

akkadian: a-ma-kam anše.hi.a ù lu-qú-sú i-wa-ṣa-i-šu-nu e-na-tim i-dá-ma ṣa-áb-ta iš-tí ì-lí-dan a-wa-tám ni-ib-tù-uq 5 ma-na kù.babbar iš-qú-ul-ni-a-tí
english: we have dropped the matter with ilī-dan; he has paid us 5 minas of silver; we did him a favour (to lend him) 5 minas of silver to be paid in 45 weeks.

akkadian: a-na tù-ùh-pì-a e-tí-iq-ma kù.babbar 10 gín ù 0.3333 ma-na ma-lá ga-am-ri-a a-lá-qé-a-ma ù a-ta-bi₄-a-ma a-ta-lá-kam a-bi₄
english: i will travel on to tuhpiya and try to get some silver, 10 or 20 shekels, as much as i need for my expenses, then i will get moving and depart for you.

akkadian: ṭup-pè-e qá-tí a-sà-nim dumu šu-hu-bur ú a-he-e-a e iṣ-ba-at-ma é a-bi₄-ni a-na a-wa-tim e
english: he must not take the tablets in the hands of asānum son of šu-hubur or my brothers and you must not set our father’s house up for a lawsuit.

akkadian: ku-ta-nam li-dí-na-kum túg a-na é kà-ri-im a qá-tí-kà a-dí 1 túg lá-ma-sà-tum
english: of the 25 dark textiles they took 3 textiles as import-tax, lamassutum took 1 textile, 21 dark textiles, apart those for wrapping, bēlum-bāni brought you.

akkadian: é a-bi-ni ta-áš-ku-un <gap> a-bi₄-kà e-ṣa-ma ku-a-a-tum <gap>
english: is your father's <gap> your own affairs are so small!

akkadian: ku-nu-ki-šu li-ib-ší ša 1.5 gín kù.babbar sà-he-er-tám li-il₅-qé-ú-nim
english: let them take small goods worth 1.5 shekels of silver.

akkadian: i-a-am ma <gap> be-ú-lá-tù <gap> a-ha-ma 10 gín kù.babbar <gap> i-na ha-hi-im
english: with <gap> mine <gap> working capital <gap> also, 10 shekels of silver <gap> in hahhum.

akkadian: ma-na ki-iš-da-at ku-ni-lim ú-ṣa-he-er a-hu-ú-a a-tù-nu 30 ma-na an.na ma-lá dá-tí-šu mu-ṭé-e-šu ú ni-is-ha-tí-šu i pá-ni-ma šé-bi₄-lá-nim-ma a-na-kam i
english: please, my brothers, send me with the first opportunity 30 minas of tin, as much as amounts to its road-tax, its underweight and the import-tax on it, so that i do not have to take it from your silver here.

akkadian: ša-lá-tù-wa-ar e-ru-bu kù.babbar lá i-ší-qí-il₅ iš-tù u₄-mì-im ša e-ru-bu kù.babbar ú-ša-áš-qí-il₅ 11 ma-na 12 gín kù.babbar e-zi-ib ša-du-e-tí-im
english: the day i arrived i had the silver paid. 11 minas 12 shekels of silver apart from the transport tariff was cleared for you as the proceeds from your tin, but before i came the tin was sold.

akkadian: ú-ra-a igi a-ku-za igi mar.tu-ba-ni igi lá-qé-pì-im igi i-tur₄-dingir
english: witnessed by uraya, by akuza, by amur-rum-bāni, by lā-qēpum, by itūr-ilī.

akkadian: ša 24 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi-im a-šùr-be-el-a-wa-tim i-šu-ú
english: concerning 24 minas of refined silver that iddin-abum owes to aššur-bēl-awātim.

akkadian: ni-dí-in igi puzur₄-<gap> dumu a-šùr-du₁₀ igi šu-a-šùr dumu šu-sú-in
english: witnessed by puzur-<gap> son of aššur-ṭāb, by šu-aššur son of šu-suen."

akkadian: en-um-a-šùr a-lá-ha-am áš-a-al um-ma en-um-a-šùr-ma a-na a-lá-hi-im-ma e-ni-ma-ma na-áš-pé-er-tám ku-nu-ki-kà igi 3 ú-kà-lim-kà-ma tù-kà-i-ni-ma šu-nu-tí-ma ni-ip-qí-sí am-ma
english: ennam-aššur questioned ali-ahum, saying to ali-ahum: now here i have shown you the missive sealed by you in front of 3 (witnesses), and you have confirmed it to me and we have entrusted it to them.

akkadian: e-ri-ib-tum a-na é kà-ri-im ni-dí-in ší-tí kù.babbar-pí-kà 11 ma-na 6 gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am ku-nu-ki-ni sig₅-pí-a-šur na-áš-a-kum lu
english: both the price of the tin and of the - in all your silver is 18.3333 mina and 17 less 1 / 4 shekels of gold, - all this, under our seals, damiq-pī-aššur brings to you.

akkadian: um-ma ma-ma-hi-ir-ma a-na en-nam-a-šur qí-bi₄-ma 1 gú 20 ma-na urudu ma-sí-am sig₅ a-ni-na dumu
english: from man-mahir to ennam-aššur: annina son of aššur-bēl-awātim brought 1 talent 20 minas of washed fine copper.

akkadian: 5 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pu-um i-na ší-im síg.hi.a ša ú-ší-na-lam puzur₄-ša-du-we dumu lá-qé-ep il₅-qé igi
english: puzur-šadu'e son of lā-qēp has received 5 minas of refined silver from the proceeds of ušinalam's wool.

akkadian: <gap> dumu du-dí-ki <gap> i-ṣé-er puzur₄-a-šur i-šu iš-tù
english: if they have not paid, they will add interest at the rate <gap> per month per mina.

akkadian: bi-lá-tim iš-tù tí-mì-il₅-ki-a a-di hu-ra-ma 0.3333 ma-na 6 gín.ta 1.6666 ma-na 4 gín áš-qúl 3.6666
english: they took the donkeys away during the campaign and i paid 50 shekels of tin to redeem them. 36 shekels of tin for 1 textile of kukū, 5 shekels for his sandals.

akkadian: 1 ma-na kù.babbar ku-nu-ki-ni ha-nu na-áš-a-ku-um ší-tí kù.babbar 1 ma-na 15 gín kù.babbar ni-qí-am nu-ṭá-
english: the rest of the silver, 1 mina 15 shekels of silver, we transferred as a sacrifice and wrote his tablet about 1 mina 15 shekels for a year - 3 months ago.

akkadian: a-na e-lá-ma qí-bi-ma um-ma a-hu-wa-qar-ma ta-áš-pu-ra-am um-ma a-ta-ma ṭup-pu-um i-hu-lá-pí-im lá-wi pá-nu-šu kišib a-lá-hi-im a-na
english: say to elamma, thus ahu-waqar: you wrote me as follows: '(there is) a tablet wrapped in a rag, on the face of which is written: 'seal of ali-ahum to hinnāya and elamma'.

akkadian: šu-a-tí lá-dí-in a-na ku-zi-zi-a qí-bi₄-ma a-bi₄ a-ta ší-im 2 ra-qá-tim
english: to kuziziya: my dear father, the proceeds from the 2 thin textiles<gap>

akkadian: a-na a-dí-da a-la-hi-im ú ù-ku-ú qí-bi₄-ma um-ma puzur₄-a-šùr-ma i-na 21 ṣú-ba-tí ša li-bi₄-ni ub-la-ni 1 ṣú-ba-ta-am ša a-ki-dí-i a-na ištar-la-ma-sí a-ša-at
english: to adida, ali-ahum and uku from puzur-aššur: of the 21 textiles in our posession that he brought give 1 akkadian textile to ištar-lamassī, ali-ahum's wife.

akkadian: an.na a-šur-i-mì-tí il₅-qé 3 túg a-wi-il₅-tum tal-qé 0.3333 ma-na 7 gín ší-im anše 2 gín ṣí-tum kù.babbar ah-ša-lim il₅-qé 2 túg
english: the lady took 3 textiles. 27 shekels was the price of a donkey, 2 shekels, expenditures? in silver, ah-šalim took?. 2 textiles of the harnesser.

akkadian: a-mur-ištar šu-qú-ul a-na a-mur-ištar qí-bi₄-ma a-pu-tum i-hi-id kù.babbar ú ṣí-ba-sú ša-áš-qí-il₅
english: to amur-ištar: urgent, pay attention and have the silver and its interest paid."

akkadian: 1 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pu-um i-ṣé-er <gap> dumu ku-um-da-nim dam.gàr i-šu igi
english: <gap> son of kumdānum owes 1 mina of refined silver to the merchant.

akkadian: itu.1.kam-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb igi a-šur-be-el-a-wa-tim dumu i-dí-da-gán igi a-šùr-e-mu-qí dumu ku-zi-zi-a
english: in the presence of aššur-bēl-awātim, son of iddin-dagan, of aššur-emūqī, son of kuziziya.

akkadian: a-na puzur₄-a-šur qí-bi-ma um-ma a-ni-i-a-ni-ma <gap> ma-na 13 gín ni-ga-li du₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šur
english: to puzur-aššur from ani-ani: ṭāb-ṣill-aššur gave me <gap> mina 13 shekels of sickels.

akkadian: mì-ma a-ni-im <gap> ú a-šùr-mu-ta-pì-il₅ ub-lu
english: all this <gap> and aššur-mūtappil brought away.

akkadian: ma-na kù.babbar a-na-kam ú-kà-al a-hi a-ta
english: my dear brother, buṣānum represents me there.

akkadian: itu.kam ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb itu.1.kam hu-bu-ur li-mu-um
english: month hubur, eponymy aššur-malik son of ali-ahum.

akkadian: šé-bi-lam a-hi a-ta <gap> tí-ir-ta-kà za-ku-sà <gap> li-li-kam-ma <gap> bi <gap>-ma ta-<gap>
english: my dear brother, a final report should come to me and <gap>with the caravan.

akkadian: maš-ki im-nu-ú 0.5 ma-na kù.babbar ku-nu-ki-ni a ma-lá tí-ir-tí-kà šé-ep-ištar ú ša-lim-ar-dí
english: in accordance with your instructions šēp-ištar and šalim-wardī bring you 0.5 mina of silver.

akkadian: gín.ta da-tum ik-šu-dam 15 gín.ta qá-qá-da-tù-um 17.8333 ma-na 4 gín áš-qúl 16.6666 gín mu-ṭá an.na-ak qá-tim 4 ša
english: for 4 porters from timilkiya until hurama at 26 shekels each i paid 1 mina 44 shekels (of tin). 3 minas 45 shekels (of tin) food for 2 donkeys and a donkey-driver and for their stay in a paddock.

akkadian: dumu e-lá-ma i-šu iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša hu-ra-ṣa-nim ù a-šur-ma-lik li-mu-um a-lá-hu-um dumu i-na-ah-dingir 1.5 gín.ta a-na 1 ma-na-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
english: from the week of hurāṣānum and aššur-mālik, eponymy of alī-ahum, son of īnah-ilī, he will add 1.5 shekel per mina as interest." "

akkadian: ù a-mur-ištar 15 gín kù.babbar i-ṣé-er zu-ba
english: zuba owes 15 shekels of silver to irišum.

akkadian: i-ša-qal itu.1.kam qá-ra-a-tum li-mu-um i-na-sú-in dumu i-dí-a-bi-im
english: month viii, eponymy of ennam-suen, son of iddin-abum.

akkadian: 2 gín kù.babbar ú-šé-bi-lam kù.babbar ku-nu-ki a-na
english: the sealed silver i placed under aššur's authority.

akkadian: igi sá-sí-a 0.3333 ma-na lá 2 gín
english: witnessed by šalim-aššur son of iliya, by sasiya.

akkadian: i-ša-qal 20 ma-na urudu {d}mar.tu-ba-ni a-na še-im
english: amurrum-bāni took 20 minas of copper for grain.

akkadian: a-na ì-lí-ba-ni ù ku-li-a qí-bi-ma um-ma a-šùr-e-nam-ma i-na ša-lá-tí-wa-ar 0.8333
english: to ilī-bāni and kuliya, say, this is what aššur-ennam says: in šalatiwar kuliya gave me 0.8333 mina of silver under his seal.

akkadian: um-ma i-ku-pì-a-ma a-na šu-ma-li-ba-a-šur en-um-a-šur ú be-kà-a qí-bi₄-ma a-na en-nam-a-šur qí-bi₄-ma 1.6666 ma-na kù.babbar ha-bu-lá-kum
english: from ikūn-pīya to šumma-libbi-aššur, ennam-aššur and bekaya; specifically to ennam-aššur: i owe you 1.6666 mina of silver.

akkadian: <gap> da-mu-kà <gap> ša ni-iš a-lim{ki} kà-i-lá a-na
english: bring my case before the city and my lord.

akkadian: i-ša-qú-lu 10 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er a-šur-iš-tí-kál ša-lim-a-šur
english: aššuriš-tikal owes 10 minas of refined silver to šalim-aššur.

akkadian: gín kù.babbar i-ší-qí-il₅ šà.ba 2 ma-na lá 5 gín
english: we brought our 20 talents of wool from mannum-kī-aššur's house, and following your instructions they bring it to you there.

akkadian: kù.babbar da-a-sú ša ga-me-er-tim ša-áš-qí-lá-šu šu-ma i-qá-bi₄ um-ma
english: if he objects and says: i cannot match the full amount, make him pay for half the amount.

akkadian: lu gi₅-mì-lam šu-a-tí-ma li-bu-šu-ma lu i-de₈ a-na-kam puzur₄-{d}utu
english: he said: "what silver does ikūn-pīya have as a claim on me?" i said: "i have answered you.

akkadian: um-ma ša-lim-a-šùr-ma a-na a-šùr-iš-tí-kál en-na-nim en-um-a-šùr dumu ú-zu-a ù en-um-a-šùr qí-bi-ma i-nu-mì
english: from šalim-aššur to aššuriš-tikal, ennānum, ennam-aššur son of uzuwa and ennam-aššur: when the price (for tin) stood at 1:17 i bought at 1:15; the tin is cleared.

akkadian: a-bi-a i-li-ku ki-ma ša 4.6666 ma-na kù.babbar hu-sà-ra-am iš-ú-mu-ni-ku-um ú a-na kù.babbar-pì-ni
english: my dear brother, give to my representatives the silver and profit on the 4.6666 minas of silver, the shares that accrued to us on the lapis lazuli.

akkadian: i-dí-ištar ub-lam nu-sà-ni-iq-šu-ma 7 gín im-ṭí 13 gín i ma-sà-im im-ṭí 1.5
english: we sent 1.5 mina silver to meet ištar-pilah, the transporter of hinnāya; 1.5 mina of silver we sent for the son of ahātum, the transporter of kūn-ilum.

akkadian: kù.babbar-áp-kà a ša ki-ma ku-a-tí-ma lá-áš-qú-ul ṭup-pu-šu <gap> a-ni-im <gap> šu-ma <gap> ta-ak-lá <gap> a-na
english: if abu-šalim is absent, send me word so i may pay your silver to your representatives.

akkadian: i-dí-na-kum lu hu-sà-ra-am dí-nam lu kù.babbar ší-im hu-sà-ri-im dí-na-ma a-na a-lim{ki}
english: either give me the lapis lazuli or give me the price in silver of the lapis lazuli, so i may bring it to the city.

akkadian: ší-im urudu-kà 17 <gap> kù.babbar-áp-kà 17 gín kù.babbar a-bu-za ha-bu-lá-ni ṭup-pu-šu ha-ar-ma-am ú-kà-al ša-áš-qí-il₅-šu-ma kù.babbar le-qé a-hi
english: abu-šalim owes 17 shekels of silver; i have his certified tablet; make him pay and take the silver.

akkadian: um-ma i-dí-a-bu-um-ma a-na šu-ma-li-ba-a-šur ù en-um-a-šur qí-bi-ma 1 ma-na 2 gín kù.babbar li-té-e hi-la-tí-šu ku-nu-ki-a šu-ma-li-ba-a-šùr na-ší a-ma-kam
english: from iddin-abum to šumma-libbi-aššur and ennam-aššur: 1 mina 2 shekels of -silver, with exudations, šumma-libbi-aššur brings under my seal.

akkadian: a-na a-mur-a-šur ù a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma um-ma a-šùr-nim-ri-ma šu-ma ta-áš-ta-na-me ší-i-mu ša an.na ù túg.hi-tí i-na pu-ru-uš-ha-dim ma-ah-ṣú ku-ku-a na-pá-ha-am
english: to amur-aššur and ali-ahum from aššur-nimrī: you may have heard that trade in tin and textiles is ruined in purušhaddum.

akkadian: 4 ma-na kù.babbar i qá-tí-šu tab nu
english: my representatives gave 17 minas of tin and 4 minas of silver remain in his possession.

akkadian: kù.babbar ni-is-ha-sú diri ša-du-a-sú ša-bu a-ha-ma 0.5 ma-na kù.babbar ni-is-ha-sú
english: i said: 'please by father, my boss, buy for me tin and send it to me', but you have not sent me anything!

akkadian: kù.babbar tám-kà-ri-šu i-šé-e ma-num-ba-lúm-a-šur ša ki-ma en-um-a-šur e-pu-ul um-ma ma-num-ba-lúm-a-šur-ma
english: since puzur-anna would go overland, i said: 'appoint someone responsible to me for your silver.' puzur-anna answered: 'who shall i appoint for you?

akkadian: ú ša-ni-am ṭup-pá-am ša dí-in a-lim(k
english: those i am waiting for.as for me, apart from you, whom do i have?"

akkadian: igi 5 ṣa-bi-im ú-kà-i-nu-ni ú tí-ir-tí a-bi-kà i-li-kà-kum a-hi
english: i shall take the silver that is the price, for as much as i have his statement and witnesses in burušhaddum."

akkadian: a-na a-lim{ki} i-lá-ak a-ma me-eh-ra-at dub ša-ni-im ú i ma-ah-ri-a-ma a-ba-ba ra-bi₄-ṣa-am
english: he among you who says as follows: i shall pay the silver, he will assist the attorney, and he shall make the one who has not paid pay.

akkadian: ša kà-ṣa-ri-im ki ah-ša-lim ni-kà-sí ni-ša-sí
english: we will settle accounts with ah-šalim."

akkadian: ni-dí-in igi du₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šur igi šu-ki-tim igi en-nu-um-sú-in
english: witnessed by ṭāb-ṣill-aššur, by šukkutum, by ennam-suen."

akkadian: a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni
english: witnessed by kuzilānum, by aššur-rabi; nimmar-adad was our (absent) partner."

akkadian: ma-na kù.babbar ku-nu-ki-šu ku-li-a i-dí-nam-ma a-na wa-ah-šu-ša-na a-na ṣé-ri-kà
english: i brought it to wahšušana to you and i said: herewith i entrust to you the silver under the seals of kuliya.

akkadian: kù.babbar i-a-im ú kù.babbar <gap> ku-a-im ša i šé-ep
english: also, in the city they confirmed your father and ilī-dan before 5 men, and a message from your father came to you.

akkadian: kà-ṣa-re ša a-na a-ku ta-áp-qí-du šà.ba 75 ku-ta-ni ub-lu-nim
english: the harnesser declared: 'in the outskirts of the city one large bag (with textiles) got lost' and he reckoned it as yours.

akkadian: 3 túg <gap> 2 ša kà-ṣa-ri <gap> a-lá-hu-um šé-ep-ištar <gap> i-ra-de₈-ú-ni-ku-nu-tí
english: give 2 talents of tin and 30 to aššuriš-tikal, 2 talents of tin and 30 to hannaya and let them make at least 10 minas of silver.

akkadian: a-na-ku ù ša qá-ta-at a-bi-a-a na-al-pu-tù ni-ta-na-lá-kà-ku-um kù.babbar ù né-ma-al-šu ta-dá-na-am
english: the interest on the silver of the eponym must not increase and my father's house and the investments my father made for you must not be lost.

akkadian: anše uš-pá-il₅-ma 1-ma-na 15 gín an.na a-pu-ul iš-tù bu-ra-li-im a-dí bi-ir-tù-im
english: from burallum until birtu'um 17 shekels of tin for transport. 7 shekels of tin from the town of the kaneshites until timilkiya as hire for a wagon.

akkadian: lá i-ta-ba-lá ší-ma-at kù.babbar dí-na-ma a-na é li-mì-im
english: give me the silver and do not bring an extra expense of 1 or 2 minas on me." witnessed statement."

akkadian: 17 gín an.na a-na ta-ší-a-tim 7 gín an.na
english: from timilkiya until hur(a)ma as hire of a donkey i paid 2 shekels of silver (and) 2 shekels of tin.

akkadian: 2 ma-na qá-qá-ad-kà lá ta-am-ha-aṣ-ma ma-a túg.hi-tù-a pa maškim a-dí u₄-mì-im i-lá-pu-tù
english: galgaliya, alu son of adudu and haršunuman, the priest of the sun-god, (owe me) 5 minas of silver; their term has expired and they are jointly responsible for the silver.

akkadian: ili₅-ba-ni dumu i-a-a ù a-bu-ša-lim ìr i-na bu-ru-uš-ha-dim a-na ni-kà-sí
english: ilī-bāni son of yaya and the slave abu-šalim seized us in burušhaddum in order to settle accounts, and ilī-bāni said: i act on behalf of šalim-aššur.

akkadian: ṣí-lá-{d}im a-dí-in igi ma-nu-ki-a-šur igi ku-zi-zi-a
english: witnessed by mannum-kī-aššur, by kuziziya.

akkadian: qá-sú i-ša-qal igi puzur₄-a-na igi a-lá-hi-im
english: witnessed by puzur-anna, by ali-ahum.

akkadian: šu-{d}en.líl i-lá-pá-at igi a-mur-ištar igi en-nam-a-šùr
english: witnessed by amur-ištar, by ennam-aššur.

akkadian: wa-al-dí-dingir i-dí-in igi ha-pu-a-šu igi ma-nu-ba-lúm-a-šur
english: witnessed by happu-aššu, by mannum-balum-aššur.

akkadian: li-mu-um bu-zu-ta-a igi ṣí-lu-šu-da-ga-an igi dingir-ma-a-šur
english: witnessed by ṣilluš-dagān, by ilīma-aššur.

akkadian: áp-ṭù-ur-ma ù i-a-tí iš-tí ṣa-bi-im 5 ú e-li-iš tù-uš-ta-ar-ší-a-ni-ma a-ma um-me-a-ni a-bi-a sí-ki ú-kà-lu-ú a-na é-bé-tí-kà ú-lá
english: moreover, my wife gave you 1 mina of silver as the price of tiltitiš and her daughter, but you refused to let tiltitiš be installed in my house and carry out the work load; instead, with an angry face you recount your calumnies.

akkadian: le-pu-lá-ku-nu-tí šu-ma 16 gín.ta ba-tí-iq ša ki-ma
english: send me 1 šulupkian textile with an akkadian -garment and 2 of <gap> that are thin and yellowish.

akkadian: ša áš-pu-ra-ku-ni šé-bi₄-lá-ma šu-bé-lam lu-kà-li-im-ma ší-im an
english: if you have with you an order of ali-ahum or of <gap> send me a message about it"."

akkadian: a-ša-sà-im iš-tí-šu 1 šu-lu-up-kà-am ù ku-sí-tám ša a-ki-dí-e ù 2 ku-ta-ni ša hu-ba-<gap>-ri qá-at-nu-tim ú er-qú-tim
english: as for your textiles that are in zimišhuna, i will sell as many of them as i can and, moreover, as for ištar-pilah, to whom 2 minas of gold have been given, every shekel of silver he carries belongs to the .

akkadian: en-na-sú-en₆ dumu šu-a-šùr a-na 3 ša-na-tim
english: on 3 minas of the silver of kurub-ištar a claim of pilah-ištar and šu-bēlum now rests.

akkadian: um-ma a-na-ku-ma ba-a-nim ri-id-a-ni bu-lá-tí kù.babbar-áp
english: ennam-aššur answered: "i submit to the tablet of the city and the attorney of my lord.

akkadian: ha-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal i-na 9 gú 17 ma-na
english: when he was about to leave <gap> and they refused to take it and he has left for kanesh.

akkadian: ú-ta-ší-ru-ni ša a-dí bé-tí-kà kù.babbar a-dí-na-ku-ni-ma e-ni-kà áp-té-ú a-ta té-ta-áp-ša-ni-ni dingir-lúm
english: also, i gave 5 shekels of silver and 2 sacks of wheat to your wife mula, and your father's maid rages against me and you every day over the girl.

akkadian: gú a-na ir-i-bi-im a-dí-in 40 ma-na a-na i-dí-sú-in a-dí-in ší-tí-tum ku-nu-ku-a i-ba-ší-ú
english: thereof: 1 talent of wool for itūr-ilī;

akkadian: ma-na-ah-tí šu-nu-ma i-dí-ú ù ba-lu-um um-me-a-ni-a
english: take care and encourage me and show me the eyes of the colony and your own eyes."

akkadian: um-ma šu-ta-mu-zi e-lá-a en-um-a-šùr ù lá-ma-sí-ma a-na en-um-a-šùr ù a-lá-hi-im
english: from šu-tammuzī, elaya, ennam-aššur and lamassī to ennam-aššur and ali-ahum: in accordance with your missive we have hired a attorney for you; abiya son of bebe is our attorney.

akkadian: 0.3333 ma-na kù.babbar tù-kà-a-al táq-bi₄-a-am um-ma a-ta-ma a-li-ik-ma ṭup-pá-am ša
english: send me a message then i will give both the tablet sealed by aššur-ṭāb and the one of 1.3333 mina of silver with your own seal to your representatives.

akkadian: é sà-ba-sí-a qá-du-um ša u₄-mu-kà ša-ak-nu-ni ni-ig-mu-ur-ma a-ṣé-er kù.babbar ù
english: and in addition to the silver and gold you had left behind we borrowed 1.3333 mina from ṭāb-aššur, son of ṭāb-ilī, at an interest of 7 shekels per mina.

akkadian: i-na itu.kam-im ú-ṣa-áb ša-ni-um ṭup-pu-šu kišib dingir-mu-ta-bi₄-il₅ dumu a-mur-ištar
english: if he has not paid the silver within his stipulated term, he must add interest in accordance with the rule of the colony per mina per month.

akkadian: a-ba-ba ra-bi-ṣú-um ša é ša-lim-a-šur en-um-a-šur ù ṣí-li-a ša ki-ma
english: ababa, the attorney of šalim-aššur's firm, ennam-aššur and ṣilliya, ali-ahum's representative, seized us against iddin-aššur and the attorney ababa said to iddin-aššur: you have heard the tablet from the city.

akkadian: dumu a-šur-iš-tí-kál a-lá-hu-um i-šu itu.1.kam ša sà-ra-tim li-mu-um ša
english: if he has not paid 0.3333 mina of silver when his term is up, he will add interest at the rate 0.5 shekel per 0.3333 mina per month.

akkadian: itu.kam be-el-tí-é.gal-lim li-mu-um ša qá-té šu-hu-bu-ur 8 ma-na
english: seal of šu-ištar, son of ennam-aššur, seal of ikūn-mīšar, son of ilī-dān, that ikūn-mīšar, son of ilī-dān, owes 8 shekels of refined silver to elamma.

akkadian: a-bi šu-ut i-lá-ak-ma iš-tù a-lim{ki} an.na
english: but you said: 'your sister needed the silver, so i gave it to her on the basis of your tablet'.

akkadian: ša-lim-a-šur ù-pá-ha-ar ù na-áš-pé-er-tám ša um-me-a-ni ša-lim-a-šur iš-tù itu.kam
english: i have received the 40 talents of good copper about which you reached an agreement with šalim-aššur's investors, in accordance with their missive dated mont, eponymy aššur-malik son of ali-ahum.

akkadian: ta-áš-pu-ri-ni um-ma a-tí-ma mì-šu-um ma-ma-an lá i-ṭa-ra-dam
english: i talked to him several times, but every time he bursts out, saying: 'several letters of mine went to her, but she refused to come here!

akkadian: a-lá-hu-um-ma a-hu-kà-ma ba-a-nim ma-lá a-bi₄ kù.babbar
english: do not obstruct me." ennam-aššur answered the attorney ababa: "i submit to the tablet of the city and the attorney of my lord.

akkadian: ù a-šar ba-áb-tum ša a-bi-kà i-ba-ší-ú kà-li-ma-ni
english: i have not rejected you with respect to going!" ali-ahum answered the attorney ababa, saying: "i submit to the tablet of the city and the attorney of my lord.

akkadian: qá-tí-a dí-na-am um-ma a-ta-ma a-dí túg.hi.a ta-ša-lá-ha-ni
english: i went to where the textiles were, in the villages, and i got the textiles out and with great effort i brought the textiles into wahšušana to your representatives.

akkadian: uš-ta-mi-er iš-tí-kà iš-tí lu-qú-tí-kà pá-ni-e-ma a-<gap>-re-a-am
english: but with your next lot of merchandise i will <gap>""

akkadian: qí-bi₄-ma a-dí-i kù.babbar ša e-lá-lí-ni-ú-ma-an ù dam a-hi-kà i-na e-ra-áb a-wi-il₅-tim <gap>-bi₄-a
english: say to āl-ṭab: "as for the silver of elal / niuman and your brother's wife, when the lady arrives <gap>"."

akkadian: kù.babbar ta-áš-ta-na-pá-ra-ni um-ma a-ta-ma kù.babbar šé-bi-lam i-nu-mì ta-ta-al-ku 15 gín kù.babbar té-zi-ba-ma a-dí kur-ub-ištar iš-tù
english: you say: “send me silver!” when you went away you left me 15 shekels of silver, and that was spent before kurub-ištar returned from tawiniya.

akkadian: mì-ma ša ta-ša-pá-ra-ni le-pu-uš a-ma-kam a-na a-wi-tí-a i-zi-iz-ma lu ga-am-lá-ku ṭup-pá-am a-na dub.sar ša šu-bi₄-ri-a-ta-am i-ša-me-ú dí-ma li-iš-ta-sí
english: over there, stand up for my case and let me enjoy (your) favor!' the tablet you must give to a scribe who understands šubarian so that he can read it.""

akkadian: dumu bu-da-tim igi lá-qé-ep dumu <gap>-ša-ša lá-ma kù.babbar mì-ma wa ší-im a-ší-im a-nim am-hu-ru 10 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am ni-is-ha-sú diri ša-du-a-sú ša-bu a-šu-mì {d}a-šur-du₁₀
english: before i received the silver, the proceeds from this iron, i sent 10 minas of refined silver - its import duty added, its transport tariff paid for - in the name of aššur-ṭāb to the city for purchases with enna-suen.

akkadian: um-ma a-šùr-ša-dí-li-ma a-na ku-li-a ù a-šur-la-ma-sí a-na ku-li-a qí-bi-ma a-šu-mì a-wa-tim ša é sà-ba-sí-a a-wu-tum ša ma-ah-ri-kà lá iz-ku-ú lu-qú-ut-kà ša i-na a-pí-im té-zi-bu-ma
english: thus says aššur-šad-ilī to kuliya and aššur-lamassī and in particular to kuliya: because of the affair of sabasiya's house, the case that was not settled in your presence, latarāk has seized your merchandise that you had left behind in apum.

akkadian: it-ba-al 4 anše ṣa-lá-mu 1 ma-na 15 gín kù.babbar it-bu-lu 0.5 ma-na kù.babbar bé-ú-lá-at a-šùr-lá-ma-sí dumu en-um-a-a 2 gín lu-bu-šu 10 gín kù.babbar ú-nu-ut
english: when at the accounting there was a surplus of 15 shekels of silver we paid 2 shekels of silver for food for the donkeys (and) for 11 shekels of silver we bought for you (an additional) 2.5 minas of tin.

akkadian: sí-ki-tim kišib ku-ra-áš-mì-iš dumu gal-na-pá-hi-im kišib bu-li-na dumu ra-bi₄-ša-qí-im kišib šé-zu-ur dumu kà-zu-ba kišib a-šu-wa-an dumu ha-ar-ša kišib a-zu dumu kà-zu kišib ú-ra-a kišib {d}mar.tu-ba-ni me-er-ú ma-na-na kišib zu-ba dumu ištar-pá-li-il₅ kišib a-de₈-lá-at dumu {d}im-ba-ni
english: seal of kurašmiš son of the chief of smiths, seal of bulina son of the chief cupbearer, seal of šezur son of kazuba, seal of ašuwan son of harša, seal of azu son of kazu, seal of uraya and the seal of amurrum-bāni, sons of manana, seal of zuba son of ištar-pālil, seal of adad-ellat son of adad-bāni.

akkadian: kišib a-šùr-du₁₀ dumu a-hu-wa-qar kišib šu-a-nim dumu a-ki-a-nim kišib a-šur-du-gul dumu im-da-hi kišib a-šur-du₁₀ dumu i-dí-ba-ni 12 gín kù.babbar i-ṣé-er a-šùr-du₁₀ dumu i-dí-ba-ni en-na-sú-in i-šu itu.kam na-ar-ma-ak-a-šur li-mu-um e-lá-li
english: seal of aššur-ṭāb, son of ahu-waqar, seal of šu-anim, son of akiānum, seal of aššur-dugul, son of imdī-ahī, seal of aššur-ṭāb, son of idi-bāni, ennam-suen has a claim of 12 shekels of silver on aššur-ṭāb, son of idi-āni; month ii / iii, eponymy of elalī, son of ikūnum.

akkadian: 10 gín.ta ú-ba-al 4 gú an.na ú-tù-ra-e-šu ù li-wi-sú li-we-tum lu túg ku-ta-nu lu ša-ak-ṣú ù a ší-ti kù.babbar ku-ta-ni ša-a-ma iš-tí a-li-ki-im pá-né-e-ma ab-kam-ma a-na na-ab-ri-tim li-ik-šu-dam-ma
english: buy 4 talents of tin, its surplus and its wrapping - the wrapping should be either -textiles or different(?) ones - and for the rest of the silver and dispatch it with the very first transport so it reaches me for inspection and thus encourage your merchant.

akkadian: 11 ma-na kù.babbar ša qá-ta-at a-al-du₁₀ a-šur-{d}utu ú en-na-su-en il₅-ta-áp-tù šu-ma kù.babbar i-na ṣé-er a-šur-{d}utu ú en-na-sú-in i-ta-al-qé é-bi-tám ša a-lim{ki} ša a-al-du₁₀ e-ru-ba-at kù.babbar igi
english: as for the 11 minas of silver for which aššur-šamšī and ennam-suen had themselves registered as guarantors of āl-ṭāb, should the silver be collected at the expense of aššur-šamšī, and ennam-suen, then āl-ṭāb's house in the city is a pledge for the silver.

akkadian: dumu da-da-nim ub-lu-ni-kum a-šu-mì kù.babbar ša é a.ba ša na-ru-uq a-la-hi-im ša ta-áš-pu-ra-ni qá-at-kà ù qá-sú ša a-la-hi-im a-šur-du₁₀ il₅-qé ší-ma-am iš-a-ma
english: as for the silver of the paternal house that is (in) the joint-stock capital of ali-ahum, about which you wrote - aššur-ṭāb took your and ali-ahum's part (and) he made purchases (with it) and shipped them off.

akkadian: kà-ru-um dí-nam i-dí-in-ma ša 2.5 gú 7 ma-na kù.babbar 1 ma-na kù.gi ù 4 túg ku-ta-ni lá-qé-e kù.babbar-pì-im ša i-dí-a-bi₄-im iš-ra-tim ša
english: the colony has passed a verdict, stating that of the 2.5 talents 7 minas of silver, 1 mina of gold and 4 -textiles the recipient of iddin-abum's silver will deduct the tithe of the king (from) šalim-aššur.

akkadian: i-tur₄-dingir tal-qé é kà-ri-im a-na ta-ú-ri-kà i-zi-zu-ma ni-im-hu-ur-šu-nu-ma 18 gín kù.babbar ša-du-a-at-kà ni-dí 8 gín.ta 13.5 gín kù.gi ší-im kù.ki 1.5 ma-na 6.5 gín kù.gi-ṣí ù ší-tí kù.gi-ṣí-kà 0.6666 ma-na 5.5 gín kù.gi pá-ša-lum iš-tí a-šur-ra-bi i-ba-ší a-na-kam šu-ul-mu-um i-ba-ší
english: when the colonial office took steps to make you come back, we appealed to them and deposited 18 shekels of silver, the šaddu'tu-tax you owe. 13.5 shekels of gold at a rate of 8 shekels to 1 (yields) as price of the gold 1 mina 36.5 shekels (of silver), it is my gold and the rest of your gold, 45.5 shekels of ld, is with aššur-rabi.

akkadian: a-na a-dí-da a-lá-hi-im ú a-ba-a a-na a-ba-a qí-bi-ma um-ma sig₅-pì-a-šur-ma <gap> ta-áš-pu-ra-am um-ma a-ta-ma 8 gín.ta an.na-kà ta-dí-in 1
english: to adida, ali-ahum and abaya; specifically to abaya from damiq-pī-aššur: you wrote as follows: your tin was sold at the rate 1:8. 1 abarnian textile was sold for 0.5 mina 0.3333 shekel.

akkadian: ša šu-{d}en.líl dumu ma-num-ki-a-šur um-ma šu-ut-ma 1 ma-na kù.babbar a-lá-qé-ma a-ha-ma en-um-a-šur a-hu-šu 1 ma-na kù.babbar a-na a-bi₄-a ha-bu-ul
english: also, as for your favours to šu-illil son of mannum-kī-aššur he said: "i shall take 1 mina of silver, and furthermore his brother ennam-aššur owes 1 mina of silver to my father.

akkadian: a-na ku-li-a a-šur-lá-ma-sí ù a-šur-lá-ma-sí-ma qí-bi-ma um-ma a-šur-e-mu-qí a-na a-šur-lá-ma-sí dumu púzur-ì-lí-qí-bi₄-ma 3 gín kù.babbar iš-tù li-mì-im a-šur-ma-lik dumu
english: to kuliya, assur-lamassi and assur-lamassi, thus says assur-emuqi, to assur-lamassi, son of puzur-ili in particular: "you have 3 shekels of silver, given by me, since the eponymy of assur-malik, son of su-hanis.

akkadian: um-ma a-lá-hi-im-ma a-šur-re-ṣí en-um-a-šur ù da-dí-a a-na e-lá-ma qí-bi-ma a ma-lá té-er-tí-kà 30 ma-na kù.babbar é tám-kà-ri-im
english: thus ali-ahum, aššur-rēṣī, ennam-aššur and dadiya, say to elamma: in accordance with your instruction we borrowed for you at interest 30 minas of silver at a merchant's office.

akkadian: ša-lim-a-šùr iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma šu-ut-ma a-na šu-be-lim ù en-na-sú-in-ma kù.babbar 1 gú ù 2 gú a-na hu-bu-ul a-bi₄-ku-nu
english: šalim-aššur seized us and said to šu-bēlum and enna-suen: i have paid some 1 or 2 talents of silver for your father's debt out of my joint-stock capital.

akkadian: mì-šu sí-ki tù-kà-lá kù.babbar 1 gín ša dam.gàr ù ú-nu-tí i-ta-la-ak um-ma en-nu-a-šur ù la-qé-ep ma-aṣ-a-ni
english: every single shekel of silver of the merchant's has gone as well as my goods." ennam-aššur and lā-qēp answered: "we hold you back on our own responsibility.

akkadian: šu-bé-lúm dumu i-dí-a-bi-im a-na puzur₄.ištar iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma šu-bé-lúm-ma a-na puzur₄.ištar-ma 16 ma-na kù.babbar ù ṣí-ba-sú a-na
english: šu-bēlum son of iddin-abum seized us in his case against puzur-ištar, and šu-bēlum said to puzur-ištar: you owe 16 minas of silver plus interest to my father.

akkadian: um-ma a-šur-utu-ši-ma a-na en-nam-a-šur qí-bi-ma a-na ma-lá ú ší-ni-šu áš-pu-ra-kum um-ma a-na-ku-ma ṭup-pá-am ša a-šur-re-ṣí šé-bi-lá-am
english: from aššur-šamšī to ennam-aššur: once or twice i wrote to you, saying: send me aššur-rēṣī's tablet." but as for you - you do not send me word.

akkadian: i-na 40 gú urudu sig₅ ša i-dí-a-šur ú-mì-a-ni e-pu-lu šà.ba 6.6666 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am a-lá-hu-um iš-qú-ul-ma ki-ma šu-ku-bi-im a-hi-šu kù.babbar ì-lí-a il₅-qé
english: of the 40 talents of good copper about which iddin-aššur reached an agreement with the investors, of that ali-ahum paid 6.6666 minas of refined silver, and iliya received the silver on behalf of šu-kūbum, his brother.

akkadian: ù me-er-e ha-na-na ú-lá i-tù-ar e-10+5 gín ša na-ki-le-ed ú kà-nu šu-ma wa-at-ra-am kù.babbar ha-na-na iš-tí na-ki-le-ed i-le-e i li-bi₄-ša kà-áp-sí-a tí-šu
english: if, apart from the 15 shekels, which nakile'ed has to confirm, hanana proves to have an additional claim in silver on nakile'ed, kapsiya will have a claim on her (hudida) for the (figurines of the) gods.

akkadian: ki a-li-ki-im pá-nim-ma ṭur₄-da-nim a-šu-mì ṭup-pé-a ša a-na i-na-a dumu e-lá-lí en-na-sú-en₆ dumu šu-ištar ù a-šur-ma-lik dumu qá-a-tim kù.babbar a-hi-ib-lu kù.babbar ú-šé-bi-lá-šu-nu-tí
english: as for my tablets recording that i became indebted for silver to innāya, son of elālī, to ennam-suen, son of šu-ištar and to aššur-mālik, son of qa'ātum, i have sent them the silver, they are satisfied.

akkadian: 2 gín kù.babbar iš-tí i-tur₄-dingir dumu puzur₄-a-na 2 ší-ni-šu ší-né-en ša wa-ah-šu-ša-na sig₅ iš-tù wa-ah-šu-ša-na ú-šé-ba-lam šu-ma lá ú-šé-bi₄-lam 6 gín kù.babbar
english: 2 shekels of silver owed by itūr-ilī son of puzur-anna; from wahšušana he must send two pairs of good shoes from wahšušana; if he has not sent it he is to pay 6 shekels of silver.

akkadian: da-me-e i-lá-ak šu-ma a-hi a-ta a-ṣé-er kù.babbar-pí-a kù.babbar 5 gín ni-iq-a-am ša-ar-ší-a-ni-ma a-hi a-ta e-né-kà i-na gán-lim me-at bi-re-e a-ta-mar ni-iq-a-am ša-ar-ší-ma-e
english: if you are truly my brother, provide me with some 5 shekels of silver as sacrifice in addition to my silver, and my dear brother, i shall contantly see your eyes from a hundred miles away.

akkadian: kù.babbar a-nim a-šur-gal ù <gap>-e-tim lu-šé-tí-qú-nim šu-ma i-ku-pì-a-šur a-mì-ša-am i-lá-kam šu-ut ù a-šur-gal lu-šé-tí-qú-nim ù ší-tí túg.hi.a-kà a-na dan-a-šur e-zi-ib-šu-nu
english: if it is not fitting for donkeys to go, <gap> spend 10 shekels <gap> and to ikūn-pī-aššur <gap> before you to <gap> before him <gap> where they will save <gap> decide about my goods.

akkadian: úz-ni pé-té-e 1 ma-na kù.babbar ha-tù-ma ša ma-ṣa-ra-tim ha-bu-lu ṭup-pu-šu ha-ar-ma-am ù-kà-al u₄-mu-šu ma-al-ú i-ma-ṭá a-na a-šùr-ma-lik dumu i-na-a qá-ta-tum
english: as to the 1 mina of silver that hattu owes for the guards, i hold his certified tablet; his terms are overdue. <gap> i have been booked as guarantor for aššur-malik son of innaya.

akkadian: <gap> ù <gap> 4 <gap> ša té-zi-bu <gap> ku-nu-ku-šu-nu <gap> ù ša ka-sà-tim ša du₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šùr ù 1
english: <gap> 4 <gap> which you left behind <gap> their seals <gap> and those of the cups of ṭāb-ṣilli-aššur and one <gap> abī-wedu(m), son of <gap> is leading to you.

akkadian: kišib zi-qí-qí dumu ì-lí-dan kišib šál-ma-a-šur dumu ú-zu-a kišib puzur₄.ištar dumu id-na-a 0.3333 ma-na 5 gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am bé-ú-lá-tim ša e-lá-ma puzur₄.ištar dumu id-na-a
english: seal of ziqiqi, son of ilī-dān, seal of šalim-aššur, son of uzua, seal of puzur-ištar, son of idnāya. 25 shekels of refined silver, a working capital belonging to elamma, puzur-ištar, son of idnāya, has received; with the silver he is held.

akkadian: šál-ma-a-šur i-ba-ší-ú ṭup-pu-a le-qé-ma a-šar ku-wa-tí li-ib-ší-ú šu-ma ṭup-pu-a a-šar ku-wa-tí i-ba-ší-ú ṭup-pu-a ku-nu-ki-a pè-té-ma 6 gín a-mu-tum ku-nu-ku ša dumu puzur₄-sú-in i-na qé-ra-áb
english: take my tablets and let them be with you." if my tablets are with you, then open for the seal on my tablets, and (you will see that) six shekels of iron sealed by puzur-suen's son is placed with my tablets.

akkadian: e-lá-lí dumu a-šur-en-nam ša é gal-da-a igi a-mu-ú-a dumu ha-am-ha-am-tim igi a-da-da-a dumu a-bi₄-a dumu be-be-e
english: in the presence of elālī, son of aššur-ennam, of the house of galdaya, of amua, son of hamhamtum, of adadaya, son of abiya, son of bebē."

akkadian: ṣú-ha-ru-ú a-sà-nim ša é ás-qú-dim ú pì-lá-ah-ištar dumu e-lá-ma ha-ra-nam iš-té-ni-iš i-li-ku-nim-ma i-na hu-ra-ma a-na é ku-bi-a iš-té-ni-iš e-ru-bu-ma ni-is-ha-tí-šu-nu é.gal-lúm iš-té-ni-iš i-sú-ùh i-na
english: the servants of asānum, who belongs to the house of asqūdum, and pilah-ištar, son of elamma, together went on a business trip and in hurama they together entered kubiya's house and the palace levied the import-tax from them together.

akkadian: i-tù-ru-nim a-lá-ha-am a-ṭá-ra-dam 0.5 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am ú ša 3 gín sà-hi-ir-tám ku-nu-ki-a ili₅-tù-ra-am ú-šé-bi₄-lá-kum-ma 17 gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am ku-nu-ki-a ší-im ṣú-ba-tí-kà id-na-a ú
english: i sent ilī-tūram to you with 0.5 mina of refined silver and small goods worth 3 shekels under my seal, and idnaya and aluwa are bringing you 17 shekels of silver under my seal, the proceeds from your textiles.

akkadian: a-ha-ma a-ša iq-bi₄-a-ku-ni šé-sí-ma túg.hi.a a ší-mì-im lu ni-dí-šu-nu-ma ú kù.babbar-pì ku-ta-ni iš-tù ta-ṣí-ru-šu pu-šu ší me-ma šu-ma iš-tí-kà a-na a-hu-tim ta-šé-e-šu mì-ma a-wa-tám ša i pì-šu ta-ša-me-ú sig₅.sig₅-ma i ṭù-pì-im
english: and also, as concerns my silver for the -textiles, after you have fixed the price for him, listen to what he has to say and if you aim at him establishing brotherhood with you, then write every word your hear from his mouth, for me on a tablet and send it me secretly.

akkadian: lá-qé-pí-im šu-ma a-na 5 u₄-me-e a-lu-ú dumu a-du-du-ú la i-li-kà-ma a-wa-tám i-dí-nam kù.babbar ša al-qé-ú i-na ṣí-ib-tí-a ú-ṣa-ha-ar-ma ù a-na ma-la ṭup-pí-šu kù.babbar ù ṣí-ba-sú ba-lu-um dí-ni-im ù ma-mì-tim
english: if alu son of adudu has not come within 5 days and answered me in court, i shall deduct the money i took from my interest and then he must pay the silver and its interest in accordance with his tablet, without a verdict or an oath.

akkadian: šál-ma-a-šùr a-ṣé-er a-mur-ištar ú-ṭá-hi-ú-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma šál-ma-a-šur-ma a-na a-mur-ištar-ma mì-šu-um ší-im túg-ba-tí-a urudu ta-aṣ-ba-at um-ma a-mur-ištar-ma ke-na 4 gú lá-mu-nam aṣ-ba-at ba-lu-um
english: šalim-aššur made us approach amur-ištar, and šalim-aššur said to amur-ištar: why have you seized the copper that was the proceeds from my textiles?" amur-ištar answered: "yes, i have seized 4 talents of poor copper.

akkadian: nu-uš-té-ri a-na u₄-me a-nim ší-im pí-ri-kà-ni wa-dí-i-ma túg a-na ša-lá-tù-wa-ar iš-tí-in i ṣú-ha-ri-kà a-ṣé-er <gap> šu-pu-ur-ma ú tí-ir-ta-kà
english: until this day indicate the price of the pirikannus and send one of your servants to šalatuwar to <gap> with the textiles, and then i shall clear your orders for you.

akkadian: a-šu-mì kù.babbar ša ša-zu-úz-tí a-lu-lá-a iš-qú-lá-ku-nu-tí-ni kù.babbar lu a hu-bu-li-a ta-áš-qú-lá-ma ṭup-pá-am ha-ar-ma-am ša ku-nu-ki-a tù-šé-ṣí-a ṭup-pá-am li-it-a-ma šé-bi₄-lá-nim ú a-na ší-tí kù.babbar tí-ir-ta-ak-nu li-li-kam šu-ma šu-ku-ba-am kù.babbar
english: concerning the silver that alulaya's representative paid to you - what silver you have paid on my debt and recovered the certified tablet with my seal - split that tablet and send it to me. then send me word about the rest of the silver.

akkadian: urudu dí-in <gap> kù.babbar <gap> i ra-mì-ni-kà dí-ma <gap> pá-li-lam ša-am
english: if the sacks with copper <gap> give <gap> silver <gap> give of your own funds, and buy a ."

akkadian: <gap> ma-na kù.babbar <gap> puzur₄-a-šur <gap> ma-na kù.babbar <gap> ṣí-li-ištar <gap> iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša ú-ra-a
english: <gap> minas of silver <gap> puzur-aššur <gap> minas of silver ṣill-ištar owes; he will pay within 1 year reckoned from the week of uraya and kurub-ištar.

akkadian: hu-bu-li-im ša da-ra-áš qá-tí a-lu-lá-a ša-ak-na-at kù.babbar ù urudu ku-nu-ki-a ša-ta-na na-áš-a-ku-nu-tí a-ma-tim ú ṣú-hu-ur-ší-na a-na é-bé-tí-a da-ra-áš lu-šé-ri-ib-ma kù.babbar iš-tí ma-nu-ki-a-šur li-ib-ší-ma a-ma-tim ba-tí-iq ú-tù-ur dí-na-ma 1 ma-na-am ša-ni-am kù.babbar da-ra-áš li-iš-qú-lá-ku-nu-tí-ma ù kù.babbar ku-nu-ki-a ma-nu-ki-a-šur i-na kù.babbar a-mu-ri-im lu-kà-in-ma iš-té-ni-iš ša 2 ma-na
english: let daraš bring the slave-girls and their children into my house, and let the silver remain with mannum-kī-aššur; sell the slave-girls at the best available price, and let daraš pay to you another mina of silver, and then mannum-kī-aššur must confirm the silver under my seal among the checked silver; for in all 2 minas of silver you and daraš must make a purchase in kanesh that will benefit him, and the (you buy) should enter mannum-kī-aššur's (house).

akkadian: ša-qá-lá-am qá-bi nu-ša-ah-li-il₅ ṭup-pu-šu šé-bi-lam 3 gú urudu sig₅ i ší-im an.na-kà ù túg.hi-tí-kà 5 gú urudu sig₅ ku-nu-ki-ni šu-nu-nu
english: we <gap> send his tablet. šu-nūnu brings you 3 talents of good copper from the proceeds from your tin and your textiles, (in all) 5 talents of good copper under our seals.

akkadian: ištar-lá-ma-sí ù ma-nu-ki-dingir i-zi-za-ma kù.babbar a-na ma-nu-ki-a-šur ú-lá a-na ša ki-ma ma-nu-ki-a-šur šu-uq-lá-ma 20 gú síg.hi.a ù sí-kà-an-lugal ša a-na ša-pá-ar-tim ma-nu-ki-a-šur ú-kà-lu ki-ma kù.babbar ta-ša-qá-lá-ni a-šar ša-pár-tum kà-an-ku ku-nu-ki ma-nu-ki-ì-lí-a lu-dí-ma ù ṭup-pá-am ša 3 ma-na kù.babbar ú ṣí-ba-tí-šu šé-ṣí-a-ma ṭup-pá-am šu-a-tí ú sí-kà-lugal
english: ištar-lamassī and mannum-kī-iliya and pay the silver to mannum-kī-aššur or to mannum-kī-aššur's representatives, and as to the 20 talents of wool and the -stone that mannum-kī-aššur holds as security, when you pay the silver let him identify mannum-kī-iliya's seal in case the security is sealed, and then take out the tablet of the 3 minas of silver and its interest, and seal this tablet and the -stone and entrust it to ištar-lamassī.

akkadian: 4 gú 42 ma-na urudu iš-tí i-dí-{d}mar.tu 0.5 ma-na bé-ú-la-at ki-ta-a 8 ma-na ki šu-li dumu puzur₄-a-bi₄-ih 4 ma-na 3.83334 gín kù.babbar ki id-na-a 1 gú 20 ma-na urudu ù 0.3333 ma-na 5 gín kù.babbar ki i-ba-a 8 gín kù.babbar ki i-ku-mì-šar 2 ma-na 10 gín kù.babbar a-šùr-du-ri li-mu-um ip-hu-ru-um 1.5 gín.ta
english: 4 talents 42 minas of copper with iddin-aurum. 0.5 mina of silver, working capital of kitaya. 8 minas of silver with šuli, son of puzur-abeh. 4 minas 3.8333 shekels of silver with idnāya, month iv, eponymy of šudāya; he will add 1 1 / 4 shekel per (mina per month) as interest. 1 talent 20 minas of copper and 25 shekels <of silver(?)> with ibaya. 8 shekels of silver with ikūn-mīšar. 2 minas 10 shekels of silver with aššur-dūrī, year eponymy of iphurum.

akkadian: ša é a-lim{ki} ṣí-ib-tum im-tí-da-ku-nu-tí ù šu-ma a-ta sà-ah-ra-tí kù.babbar ša é a-lim{ki} šu-ta-aṣ-bi₄-ta-ma ku-un-kà-ma a-na ra-bi₄-ṣí-im dí-ma lu-ub-lam-ma li-ma-am lu nu-ṭá-ib a-na a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma a-ma-kam a-dí
english: here interest on the silver due to the city hall has increased for you, so if you are delayed, then have the silver of the city hall procured, seal it and give it to the attorney that he may bring it so we can satisfy the eponym.

akkadian: ša-lim-wa-ar-dí ub-lá-am a-na ma-lá tí-ir-tí-kà an.na a-na a-mu-ur-ša-ra-sà ù ša-lim-wa-ar-dim ni-dí-ma a-na li-bi ma-tim ú-šé-ri-bu-ma 6.5 gín.ta a-na an-ni-ki-kà ub-lu-ni-kum šà.ba 3.5
english: in accordance with your instructions we gave the tin to amur-šarrassa and šalim-wardī and they led it into the heartland, and they brought you (silver) at 6.5 shekels per (shekel) for your tin for you.

akkadian: pí-lá-ah-ištar áš-pu-ku-nu-tí-ni ṣú-ha-ru-a a-dí u₄-mì-im a-nim wa-áš-bu-ni a-na ma-lá tí-ir-tí-a ih-da-ma kù.babbar li-dí-ku-nu-tí-ma kù.babbar ku-nu-ki-ku-nu iš-tí a-li-ki-im pá-ni-ú-tim-ma ù ṣú-ha-ri-a šé-bi₄-lá-ma gán-lam
english: pay heed to my instructions and let him give you the silver, send the silver under your seals with the very first transport and with my servants, and let it pass overland in his name.

akkadian: 12 ma-na urudu sig₅ a-šu-mì sú-e-im ša la-ba-ar-ša a-na ša-pá-ar-tim i-dí-a-ší-ni ù sú-am a-la-hu-um e-ri-šu-ma ù-ha-li-qú-ší urudu-am áš-qúl ù kù.babbar a-na dumu
english: as to the 12 minas of good copper that labarša deposited for her as security because of the mill-stone - when ali-ahum demanded it from him and they had destroyed it, i paid the copper.

akkadian: ša-a-ma šé-bi₄-lam a-hi a-ta a-na ša-zu-úz-tí-a i-hi-id túg.hi-tí-a a-na ší-mì-im dí-na-ma ù me-eh-ra-at ša-áp-ra-tim ša na-ad-a-ni kù.babbar en-um-a-šùr dumu šál-ma-a-šùr e-ri-iš-ma li-dí-na-ku-ma kù.babbar lu ší-im túg.hi-tí-a lu me-eh-ra-at ša-áp-ra-tim ša i-du-nu-ni-ku-ni i pá-ni-kà bi₄-lam
english: sell my textiles and then demand in silver from ennam-aššur son of šalim-aššur what corresponds to the pledges that have been deposited, so he may give it to you, and bring personally the silver, both the proceeds in silver from my textiles and the corresponding amount for the pledges that they give to you.

akkadian: 2 ma-na kù.babbar ša té-zi-bu-ni-a-tí-ni a-na dam.gàr ni-iš-qúl 1 gín im-ṭí 0.6666 ma-na 0.5 gín a-na e-na-ni-a áš-qúl šà.ba 10 gín sí-lu-lu il₅-qé 0.5 ma-na kù.babbar ší-im am-tim ki
english: the 2 minas of silver that you left behind to us we paid to the merchant; it was 1 shekel short. 40.5 shekels i paid to ennāniya, 10 shekels, thereof ṣilulu took. 0.5 mina of silver, the price of a slave-girl is due by the priest.

akkadian: a-na ta-ar-bi₄-tim ù-ku-ul-tí-im ù qú-bu-ri-im ša me-er-ú-at kà-áp-sí-a a-na an.na ta-ad-mì-iq-tim ša dumu.mí ha-na-na dam ha-na-na ú me-er-ú ha-na-na mì-ma a-na kà-áp-sí-a dam a-lá-bi₄-im i-dí-nu-ni a-na kà-áp-sí-a ú-lá i-tù-ru
english: for the costs of upbringing, the food and the tomb of the daughters of kapsiya, for the tin, the venture credit of the daughter of hanana, hanana's wife and sons will not raise claims against kapsiya for anything they have given to kapsiya, wife of ali-abum.

akkadian: um-me-a-ni lu-za-ki-ku-nu i-na ba-ri-ku-nu lá tù-uš-té-ṣa-a-ma um-me-a-nu lá kà-<gap> a-we-lá-tù-ku-nu <gap> lá i-ha-li-qá <gap> ta-ša-lá-ta <gap>
english: you must not quarrel with each other <gap>, and the investors should not <gap> your women <gap>should not be lost <gap> you (plur.) must (not) act rashly <gap>

akkadian: ra-bi₄-at i-na ir-ni-tim šu-uq-la-tim ša um-me-a-ni-a a-na pá-ṭù-ri-im i-zi-iz a-dí an.na ma-sí-ra-am ú-ša-áš-qí-li-ni a-hi a-ta 7 gín.ta kù.babbar a-na an.na-ki-a
english: he is ready to open the packages of my investors <gap> until he has made me pay the -tin, my dear brother, pay 7 shekels of silver per (mina) for my tin to my representatives.

akkadian: kišib e-la-lí dumu i-ku-nim kišib ša-lim-a-hi-im dumu dan-a-šur kišib en-na-sú-en₆ dumu sú-kà-lí-a kišib i-dí-a-šur dumu a-šur-ma-lik ša 1 ma-na 1.5 gín i-ṣé-er dingir-šu-gal dumu
english: seal of elalī, son of ikūnum, seal of šalim-ahum, son of dān-aššur, seal of ennam-suen, son of sukkalliya, seal of iddin-aššur, son of aššur-mālik, that ilšu-rabi, son of bulāli, owes 1 mina 1.5 shekel of silver to elamma.

akkadian: a-lá-hu-um i-šu 6 na-ru-uq mì-iš-lam še-um mì-iš-lam₅ ar-ša-tum i-na ha-ar-pé-e i-ma-da-ad 15 gín kù.babbar iš-tí ha-ar-šu-um-nu-ma-an 5 na-ru-uq mì-iš-lúm še-um mì-iš-lam₅ ar-ša-tim i ha-ar-pé-e
english: he will measure out 6 sacks (of grain), half barley, half wheat at harvest time. 15 shekels of silver is owed by haršumnuman; he will measure out 5 sacks (of grain), half barley, half wheat, at harvest time.
